authors_text: Anh Duy Nguyen,Thuy Dung Nguyen,Huy Hieu Pham,Thanh Hung Nguyen,Phi Le Nguyen
title: Image-based Contextual Pill Recognition with Medical Knowledge Graph Assistance
title_zh: 借助医学知识图辅助进行基于图像的上下文药丸识别
comment: Accepted for presentation at the 14th Asian Conference on Intelligent Information and Database Systems (ACIIDS 2022)
comments: Accepted for presentation at the 14th Asian Conference on Intelligent Information and Database Systems (ACIIDS 2022)
abstract: Identifying pills given their captured images under various conditions and backgrounds has been becoming more and more essential. Several efforts have been devoted to utilizing the deep learning-based approach to tackle the pill recognition problem in the literature. However, due to the high similarity between pills' appearance, misrecognition often occurs, leaving pill recognition a challenge. To this end, in this paper, we introduce a novel approach named PIKA that leverages external knowledge to enhance pill recognition accuracy. Specifically, we address a practical scenario (which we call contextual pill recognition), aiming to identify pills in a picture of a patient's pill intake. Firstly, we propose a novel method for modeling the implicit association between pills in the presence of an external data source, in this case, prescriptions. Secondly, we present a walk-based graph embedding model that transforms from the graph space to vector space and extracts condensed relational features of the pills. Thirdly, a final framework is provided that leverages both image-based visual and graph-based relational features to accomplish the pill identification task. Within this framework, the visual representation of each pill is mapped to the graph embedding space, which is then used to execute attention over the graph representation, resulting in a semantically-rich context vector that aids in the final classification. To our knowledge, this is the first study to use external prescription data to establish associations between medicines and to classify them using this aiding information. The architecture of PIKA is lightweight and has the flexibility to incorporate into any recognition backbones. The experimental results show that by leveraging the external knowledge graph, PIKA can improve the recognition accuracy from 4.8% to 34.1% in terms of F1-score, compared to baselines.

Several efforts have been devoted to utilizing the deep learning-based approach to tackle the pill recognition problem in the literature. However, due to the high similarity between pills' appearance, misrecognition often occurs, leaving pill recognition a challenge. To this end, in this paper, we introduce a novel approach named PIKA that leverages external knowledge to enhance pill recognition accuracy. Specifically, we address a practical scenario (which we call contextual pill recognition), aiming to identify pills in a picture of a patient's pill intake. Firstly, we propose a novel method for modeling the implicit association between pills in the presence of an external data source, in this case, prescriptions. Secondly, we present a walk-based graph embedding model that transforms from the graph space to vector space and extracts condensed relational features of the pills. Thirdly, a final framework is provided that leverages both image-based visual and graph-based relational features to accomplish the pill identification task. Within this framework, the visual representation of each pill is mapped to the graph embedding space, which is then used to execute attention over the graph representation, resulting in a semantically-rich context vector that aids in the final classification. To our knowledge, this is the first study to use external prescription data to establish associations between medicines and to classify them using this aiding information. The architecture of PIKA is lightweight and has the flexibility to incorporate into any recognition backbones. The experimental results show that by leveraging the external knowledge graph, PIKA can improve the recognition accuracy from 4.8% to 34.1% in terms of F1-score, compared to baselines.
abstract_zh: 根据在各种条件和背景下拍摄的图像来识别药丸变得越来越重要。文献中已经致力于利用基于深度学习的方法来解决药丸识别问题。然而，由于药丸外观高度相似，经常发生误识别，给药丸识别带来挑战。为此，在本文中，我们介绍了一种名为 PIKA 的新颖方法，该方法利用外部知识来提高药丸识别的准确性。具体来说，我们解决了一个实际场景（我们称之为上下文药丸识别），旨在识别患者服药图片中的药丸。首先，我们提出了一种新方法，用于在存在外部数据源（在本例中为处方）的情况下对药丸之间的隐式关联进行建模。其次，我们提出了一种基于行走的图嵌入模型，该模型从图空间转换到向量空间并提取药丸的压缩关系特征。第三，提供了一个最终框架，利用基于图像的视觉和基于图形的关系特征来完成药丸识别任务。在此框架内，每个药丸的视觉表示被映射到图嵌入空间，然后用于执行对图表示的关注，从而产生有助于最终分类的语义丰富的上下文向量。据我们所知，这是第一项使用外部处方数据来建立药物之间的关联并使用这些辅助信息对它们进行分类的研究。 PIKA 的架构是轻量级的，并且可以灵活地融入到任何识别主干中。实验结果表明，通过利用外部知识图谱，与基线相比，PIKA 的 F1 分数识别准确率从 4.8% 提高到 34.1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合医疗知识图谱的图像化药片识别方法PIKA，旨在解决复杂背景下药片外观相似导致的识别难题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的药片识别方法因药片外观高度相似常出现误识别，需借助外部知识提升准确性。
AI.method: 设计了基于处方数据的隐式关联建模方法、图嵌入模型提取关系特征，并融合图像视觉特征与图结构信息进行注意力机制分类。
AI.result: 实验表明PIKA在F1-score指标上将识别准确率从4.8%提升至34.1%，优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: PIKA通过整合医疗知识图谱有效提升了药片识别性能，其轻量化架构可灵活适配多种识别框架。

title: A New Kind of Adversarial Example
title_zh: 一种新型的对抗性例子
abstract: Almost all adversarial attacks are formulated to add an imperceptible perturbation to an image in order to fool a model. Here, we consider the opposite which is adversarial examples that can fool a human but not a model. A large enough and perceptible perturbation is added to an image such that a model maintains its original decision, whereas a human will most likely make a mistake if forced to decide (or opt not to decide at all). Existing targeted attacks can be reformulated to synthesize such adversarial examples. Our proposed attack, dubbed NKE, is similar in essence to the fooling images, but is more efficient since it uses gradient descent instead of evolutionary algorithms. It also offers a new and unified perspective into the problem of adversarial vulnerability. Experimental results over MNIST and CIFAR-10 datasets show that our attack is quite efficient in fooling deep neural networks. Code is available at https://github.com/aliborji/NKE.
summary: Almost all adversarial attacks are formulated to add an imperceptible perturbation to an image in order to fool a model. Here, we consider the opposite which is adversarial examples that can fool a human but not a model. A large enough and perceptible perturbation is added to an image such that a model maintains its original decision, whereas a human will most likely make a mistake if forced to decide (or opt not to decide at all). Existing targeted attacks can be reformulated to synthesize such adversarial examples. Our proposed attack, dubbed NKE, is similar in essence to the fooling images, but is more efficient since it uses gradient descent instead of evolutionary algorithms. It also offers a new and unified perspective into the problem of adversarial vulnerability. Experimental results over MNIST and CIFAR-10 datasets show that our attack is quite efficient in fooling deep neural networks. Code is available at https://github.com/aliborji/NKE.
abstract_zh: 几乎所有的对抗性攻击都是为了给图像添加难以察觉的扰动，以欺骗模型。在这里，我们考虑相反的情况，即可以欺骗人类但不能欺骗模型的对抗性示例。将足够大且可感知的扰动添加到图像中，以便模型保持其原始决策，而如果被迫做出决定（或选择根本不做出决定），人类很可能会犯错误。可以重新制定现有的针对性攻击以综合此类对抗性示例。我们提出的攻击被称为 NKE，本质上与愚弄图像类似，但更有效，因为它使用梯度下降而不是进化算法。它还为对抗性脆弱性问题提供了一个新的、统一的视角。 MNIST 和 CIFAR-10 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的攻击在欺骗深度神经网络方面非常有效。代码可在 https://github.com/aliborji/NKE 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的对抗样本，通过显著扰动使人类误判而模型保持正确决策
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击主要针对模型欺骗，而本文探索能欺骗人类但不欺骗模型的对抗样本，以揭示人类与模型决策差异并提供新的研究视角
AI.method: 基于梯度下降的NKE攻击方法，通过显著扰动生成对抗样本，区别于传统进化算法
AI.result: 在MNIST和CIFAR-10数据集上高效生成欺骗人类但不影响模型的对抗样本，代码已开源
AI.conclusion: NKE方法在效率上优于传统算法，为对抗样本研究提供了新的统一视角

title: Transferable Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning with Dynamic Participating Agents
title_zh: 具有动态参与智能体的可迁移多智能体强化学习
comment: 10 pages, 7 figures
comments: 10 pages, 7 figures
abstract: We study multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) with centralized training and decentralized execution. During the training, new agents may join, and existing agents may unexpectedly leave the training. In such situations, a standard deep MARL model must be trained again from scratch, which is very time-consuming. To tackle this problem, we propose a special network architecture with a few-shot learning algorithm that allows the number of agents to vary during centralized training. In particular, when a new agent joins the centralized training, our few-shot learning algorithm trains its policy network and value network using a small number of samples; when an agent leaves the training, the training process of the remaining agents is not affected. Our experiments show that using the proposed network architecture and algorithm, model adaptation when new agents join can be 100+ times faster than the baseline. Our work is applicable to any setting, including cooperative, competitive, and mixed.
summary: We study multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) with centralized training and decentralized execution. During the training, new agents may join, and existing agents may unexpectedly leave the training. In such situations, a standard deep MARL model must be trained again from scratch, which is very time-consuming. To tackle this problem, we propose a special network architecture with a few-shot learning algorithm that allows the number of agents to vary during centralized training. In particular, when a new agent joins the centralized training, our few-shot learning algorithm trains its policy network and value network using a small number of samples; when an agent leaves the training, the training process of the remaining agents is not affected. Our experiments show that using the proposed network architecture and algorithm, model adaptation when new agents join can be 100+ times faster than the baseline. Our work is applicable to any setting, including cooperative, competitive, and mixed.
abstract_zh: 我们研究具有集中训练和分散执行的多智能体强化学习（MARL）。在培训期间，可能会有新的座席加入，而现有的座席可能会意外退出培训。在这种情况下，标准的深度MARL模型必须从头开始重新训练，这是非常耗时的。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种带有少量学习算法的特殊网络架构，允许代理数量在集中训练期间变化。特别是，当一个新的智能体加入集中训练时，我们的少样本学习算法使用少量样本来训练其策略网络和价值网络；当一个智能体离开训练时，剩余智能体的训练过程不受影响。我们的实验表明，使用所提出的网络架构和算法，新代理加入时的模型适应速度可以比基线快 100 倍以上。我们的工作适用于任何环境，包括合作、竞争和混合。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在集中训练和分散执行的多智能体强化学习（MARL）中，如何处理训练过程中智能体动态加入或离开的问题，并提出了一种可转移的网络架构和少量样本学习算法。
AI.motivation: 传统MARL模型在智能体数量变化时需从头训练，导致效率低下，因此需要一种能快速适应动态参与智能体的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计了一种特殊网络架构，结合少量样本学习算法，使新加入智能体能通过少量样本快速训练策略网络和价值网络，而离开的智能体不影响其余训练过程。
AI.result: 实验表明，新智能体加入时的模型适应速度比基线方法快100倍以上，且方法适用于合作、竞争及混合场景。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法有效解决了MARL中动态参与智能体的适应性问题，具有广泛的适用性和高效性。

search_text: Transferable Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning with Dynamic Participating Agents 具有动态参与智能体的可迁移多智能体强化学习 We study multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) with centralized training and decentralized execution. During the training, new agents may join, and existing agents may unexpectedly leave the training. In such situations, a standard deep MARL model must be trained again from scratch, which is very time-consuming. To tackle this problem, we propose a special network architecture with a few-shot learning algorithm that allows the number of agents to vary during centralized training. In particular, when a new agent joins the centralized training, our few-shot learning algorithm trains its policy network and value network using a small number of samples; when an agent leaves the training, the training process of the remaining agents is not affected. Our experiments show that using the proposed network architecture and algorithm, model adaptation when new agents join can be 100+ times faster than the baseline. Our work is applicable to any setting, including cooperative, competitive, and mixed. 我们研究具有集中训练和分散执行的多智能体强化学习（MARL）。在培训期间，可能会有新的座席加入，而现有的座席可能会意外退出培训。在这种情况下，标准的深度MARL模型必须从头开始重新训练，这是非常耗时的。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种带有少量学习算法的特殊网络架构，允许代理数量在集中训练期间变化。特别是，当一个新的智能体加入集中训练时，我们的少样本学习算法使用少量样本来训练其策略网络和价值网络；当一个智能体离开训练时，剩余智能体的训练过程不受影响。我们的实验表明，使用所提出的网络架构和算法，新代理加入时的模型适应速度可以比基线快 100 倍以上。我们的工作适用于任何环境，包括合作、竞争和混合。 本文研究了在集中训练和分散执行的多智能体强化学习（MARL）中，如何处理训练过程中智能体动态加入或离开的问题，并提出了一种可转移的网络架构和少量样本学习算法。 Xuting Tang,Jia Xu,Shusen Wang cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.MA

title: Adaptive Latent Factor Analysis via Generalized Momentum-Incorporated Particle Swarm Optimization
title_zh: 通过广义动量粒子群优化进行自适应潜在因子分析
abstract: Stochastic gradient descent (SGD) algorithm is an effective learning strategy to build a latent factor analysis (LFA) model on a high-dimensional and incomplete (HDI) matrix. A particle swarm optimization (PSO) algorithm is commonly adopted to make an SGD-based LFA model's hyper-parameters, i.e, learning rate and regularization coefficient, self-adaptation. However, a standard PSO algorithm may suffer from accuracy loss caused by premature convergence. To address this issue, this paper incorporates more historical information into each particle's evolutionary process for avoiding premature convergence following the principle of a generalized-momentum (GM) method, thereby innovatively achieving a novel GM-incorporated PSO (GM-PSO). With it, a GM-PSO-based LFA (GMPL) model is further achieved to implement efficient self-adaptation of hyper-parameters. The experimental results on three HDI matrices demonstrate that the GMPL model achieves a higher prediction accuracy for missing data estimation in industrial applications.
summary: Stochastic gradient descent (SGD) algorithm is an effective learning strategy to build a latent factor analysis (LFA) model on a high-dimensional and incomplete (HDI) matrix. A particle swarm optimization (PSO) algorithm is commonly adopted to make an SGD-based LFA model's hyper-parameters, i.e, learning rate and regularization coefficient, self-adaptation. However, a standard PSO algorithm may suffer from accuracy loss caused by premature convergence. To address this issue, this paper incorporates more historical information into each particle's evolutionary process for avoiding premature convergence following the principle of a generalized-momentum (GM) method, thereby innovatively achieving a novel GM-incorporated PSO (GM-PSO). With it, a GM-PSO-based LFA (GMPL) model is further achieved to implement efficient self-adaptation of hyper-parameters. The experimental results on three HDI matrices demonstrate that the GMPL model achieves a higher prediction accuracy for missing data estimation in industrial applications.
abstract_zh: 随机梯度下降（SGD）算法是一种在高维不完全（HDI）矩阵上构建潜在因子分析（LFA）模型的有效学习策略。通常采用粒子群优化（PSO）算法来使基于SGD的LFA模型的超参数（即学习率和正则化系数）自适应。然而，标准 PSO 算法可能会因过早收敛而导致精度损失。为了解决这个问题，本文遵循广义动量（GM）方法的原理，将更多的历史信息融入到每个粒子的进化过程中，以避免过早收敛，从而创新地实现了一种新颖的结合GM的粒子群算法（GM-PSO）。借此，进一步实现了基于GM-PSO的LFA（GMPL）模型，实现超参数的高效自适应。三个HDI矩阵的实验结果表明，GMPL模型在工业应用中的缺失数据估计方面实现了更高的预测精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合广义动量方法的粒子群优化算法（GM-PSO），用于改进高维不完整矩阵的潜在因子分析模型的超参数自适应性。
AI.motivation: 标准粒子群优化（PSO）算法在优化潜在因子分析（LFA）模型超参数时易出现早熟收敛导致精度下降的问题。
AI.method: 通过将历史信息纳入粒子进化过程，提出广义动量（GM）方法改进的GM-PSO算法，并构建基于GM-PSO的LFA模型（GMPL）。
AI.result: 在三个高维不完整矩阵上的实验表明，GMPL模型在工业应用的缺失数据估计中实现了更高的预测精度。
AI.conclusion: GM-PSO有效避免了早熟收敛，提升了超参数自适应能力与缺失数据预测性能。

authors_text: MyeongAh Cho,Tae-young Chun,g Taeoh Kim,Sangyoun Lee
title: NIR-to-VIS Face Recognition via Embedding Relations and Coordinates of the Pairwise Features
title_zh: 通过嵌入关系和成对特征坐标进行 NIR-to-VIS 人脸识别
abstract: NIR-to-VIS face recognition is identifying faces of two different domains by extracting domain-invariant features. However, this is a challenging problem due to the two different domain characteristics, and the lack of NIR face dataset. In order to reduce domain discrepancy while using the existing face recognition models, we propose a 'Relation Module' which can simply add-on to any face recognition models. The local features extracted from face image contain information of each component of the face. Based on two different domain characteristics, to use the relationships between local features is more domain-invariant than to use it as it is. In addition to these relationships, positional information such as distance from lips to chin or eye to eye, also provides domain-invariant information. In our Relation Module, Relation Layer implicitly captures relationships, and Coordinates Layer models the positional information. Also, our proposed Triplet loss with conditional margin reduces intra-class variation in training, and resulting in additional performance improvements. Different from the general face recognition models, our add-on module does not need to pre-train with the large scale dataset. The proposed module fine-tuned only with CASIA NIR-VIS 2.0 database. With the proposed module, we achieve 14.81% rank-1 accuracy and 15.47% verification rate of 0.1% FAR improvements compare to two baseline models.
summary: NIR-to-VIS face recognition is identifying faces of two different domains by extracting domain-invariant features. However, this is a challenging problem due to the two different domain characteristics, and the lack of NIR face dataset. In order to reduce domain discrepancy while using the existing face recognition models, we propose a 'Relation Module' which can simply add-on to any face recognition models. The local features extracted from face image contain information of each component of the face. Based on two different domain characteristics, to use the relationships between local features is more domain-invariant than to use it as it is. In addition to these relationships, positional information such as distance from lips to chin or eye to eye, also provides domain-invariant information. In our Relation Module, Relation Layer implicitly captures relationships, and Coordinates Layer models the positional information. Also, our proposed Triplet loss with conditional margin reduces intra-class variation in training, and resulting in additional performance improvements. Different from the general face recognition models, our add-on module does not need to pre-train with the large scale dataset. The proposed module fine-tuned only with CASIA NIR-VIS 2.0 database. With the proposed module, we achieve 14.81% rank-1 accuracy and 15.47% verification rate of 0.1% FAR improvements compare to two baseline models.
abstract_zh: NIR-to-VIS人脸识别是通过提取域不变特征来识别两个不同域的人脸。然而，由于两个不同的领域特征以及缺乏近红外人脸数据集，这是一个具有挑战性的问题。为了减少使用现有人脸识别模型时的领域差异，我们提出了一个“关系模块”，它可以简单地添加到任何人脸识别模型中。从人脸图像中提取的局部特征包含了人脸各组成部分的信息。基于两个不同的领域特征，使用局部特征之间的关系比直接使用更具领域不变性。除了这些关系之外，位置信息（例如嘴唇到下巴或眼睛到眼睛的距离）也提供域不变信息。在我们的关系模块中，关系层隐式捕获关系，坐标层对位置信息进行建模。此外，我们提出的带有条件裕度的 Triplet 损失减少了训练中的类内差异，并带来了额外的性能改进。与一般的人脸识别模型不同，我们的附加模块不需要使用大规模数据集进行预训练。所提出的模块仅使用 CASIA NIR-VIS 2.0 数据库进行微调。与两个基线模型相比，使用所提出的模块，我们实现了 14.81% 的 1 级准确率和 15.47% 的验证率，FAR 提高了 0.1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过提取面部局部特征的关系和坐标信息来解决近红外(NIR)到可见光(VIS)人脸跨域识别问题的方法。
AI.motivation: 由于NIR与VIS域的特征差异及NIR数据集稀缺，传统方法难以有效减少域间差异，亟需一种无需大规模预训练的跨域特征提取方案。
AI.method: 设计可附加于任意人脸识别模型的'关系模块'，包含捕捉局部特征关系的Relation Layer和建模位置信息的Coordinates Layer，并提出带条件边距的三元组损失函数以降低类内差异。
AI.result: 在CASIA NIR-VIS 2.0数据集上实现14.81%的rank-1准确率和15.47%的验证率(0.1% FAR)，较基线模型显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合局部特征关系与坐标信息，结合改进的三元组损失函数，所提模块有效缓解了跨域差异问题，且无需依赖大规模预训练数据。

However, this is a challenging problem due to the two different domain characteristics, and the lack of NIR face dataset. In order to reduce domain discrepancy while using the existing face recognition models, we propose a 'Relation Module' which can simply add-on to any face recognition models. The local features extracted from face image contain information of each component of the face. Based on two different domain characteristics, to use the relationships between local features is more domain-invariant than to use it as it is. In addition to these relationships, positional information such as distance from lips to chin or eye to eye, also provides domain-invariant information. In our Relation Module, Relation Layer implicitly captures relationships, and Coordinates Layer models the positional information. Also, our proposed Triplet loss with conditional margin reduces intra-class variation in training, and resulting in additional performance improvements. Different from the general face recognition models, our add-on module does not need to pre-train with the large scale dataset. The proposed module fine-tuned only with CASIA NIR-VIS 2.0 database. With the proposed module, we achieve 14.81% rank-1 accuracy and 15.47% verification rate of 0.1% FAR improvements compare to two baseline models. NIR-to-VIS人脸识别是通过提取域不变特征来识别两个不同域的人脸。然而，由于两个不同的领域特征以及缺乏近红外人脸数据集，这是一个具有挑战性的问题。为了减少使用现有人脸识别模型时的领域差异，我们提出了一个“关系模块”，它可以简单地添加到任何人脸识别模型中。从人脸图像中提取的局部特征包含了人脸各组成部分的信息。基于两个不同的领域特征，使用局部特征之间的关系比直接使用更具领域不变性。除了这些关系之外，位置信息（例如嘴唇到下巴或眼睛到眼睛的距离）也提供域不变信息。在我们的关系模块中，关系层隐式捕获关系，坐标层对位置信息进行建模。此外，我们提出的带有条件裕度的 Triplet 损失减少了训练中的类内差异，并带来了额外的性能改进。与一般的人脸识别模型不同，我们的附加模块不需要使用大规模数据集进行预训练。所提出的模块仅使用 CASIA NIR-VIS 2.0 数据库进行微调。与两个基线模型相比，使用所提出的模块，我们实现了 14.81% 的 1 级准确率和 15.47% 的验证率，FAR 提高了 0.1%。 本文提出一种通过提取面部局部特征的关系和坐标信息来解决近红外(NIR)到可见光(VIS)人脸跨域识别问题的方法。 MyeongAh Cho,Tae-young Chun,g Taeoh Kim,Sangyoun Lee cs.CV

authors_text: Jose Miguel Arrieta Ramos,Oscar Perdómo,Fabio A. González
title: Deep Semi-Supervised and Self-Supervised Learning for Diabetic Retinopathy Detection
title_zh: 用于糖尿病视网膜病变检测的深度半监督和自监督学习
abstract: Diabetic retinopathy (DR) is one of the leading causes of blindness in the working-age population of developed countries, caused by a side effect of diabetes that reduces the blood supply to the retina. Deep neural networks have been widely used in automated systems for DR classification on eye fundus images. However, these models need a large number of annotated images. In the medical domain, annotations from experts are costly, tedious, and time-consuming; as a result, a limited number of annotated images are available. This paper presents a semi-supervised method that leverages unlabeled images and labeled ones to train a model that detects diabetic retinopathy. The proposed method uses unsupervised pretraining via self-supervised learning followed by supervised fine-tuning with a small set of labeled images and knowledge distillation to increase the performance in classification task. This method was evaluated on the EyePACS test and Messidor-2 dataset achieving 0.94 and 0.89 AUC respectively using only 2% of EyePACS train labeled images.
summary: Diabetic retinopathy (DR) is one of the leading causes of blindness in the working-age population of developed countries, caused by a side effect of diabetes that reduces the blood supply to the retina. Deep neural networks have been widely used in automated systems for DR classification on eye fundus images. However, these models need a large number of annotated images. In the medical domain, annotations from experts are costly, tedious, and time-consuming; as a result, a limited number of annotated images are available. This paper presents a semi-supervised method that leverages unlabeled images and labeled ones to train a model that detects diabetic retinopathy. The proposed method uses unsupervised pretraining via self-supervised learning followed by supervised fine-tuning with a small set of labeled images and knowledge distillation to increase the performance in classification task. This method was evaluated on the EyePACS test and Messidor-2 dataset achieving 0.94 and 0.89 AUC respectively using only 2% of EyePACS train labeled images.
abstract_zh: 糖尿病视网膜病变（DR）是发达国家劳动年龄人口失明的主要原因之一，由糖尿病的副作用导致视网膜血液供应减少引起。深度神经网络已广泛应用于眼底图像 DR 分类的自动化系统中。然而，这些模型需要大量带注释的图像。在医学领域，专家的注释成本高昂、繁琐且耗时；因此，可用的带注释图像数量有限。本文提出了一种半监督方法，利用未标记图像和标记图像来训练检测糖尿病视网膜病变的模型。该方法通过自监督学习进行无监督预训练，然后使用一小组标记图像和知识蒸馏进行监督微调，以提高分类任务的性能。该方法在 EyePACS 测试和 Messidor-2 数据集上进行评估，仅使用 2% 的 EyePACS 训练标记图像分别实现 0.94 和 0.89 AUC。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督和自监督学习方法，用于在少量标注数据下检测糖尿病视网膜病变。
AI.motivation: 糖尿病视网膜病变检测需要大量标注的视网膜图像，但医学领域标注数据获取成本高且稀缺，因此需开发减少对标注数据依赖的方法。
AI.method: 通过自监督预训练获取特征表示，结合少量标注数据进行监督微调，并利用知识蒸馏提升分类性能。
AI.result: 在EyePACS和Messidor-2数据集上分别达到0.94和0.89的AUC值，仅使用2%的标注训练数据。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在有限标注数据下显著提升了糖尿病视网膜病变检测性能，为医学图像分析提供了有效解决方案。

title: Domestic Activity Clustering from Audio via Depthwise Separable Convolutional Autoencoder Network
title_zh: 通过深度可分离卷积自动编码器网络从音频进行家庭活动聚类
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables. Accepted by IEEE MMSP 2022
comments: 6 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables. Accepted by IEEE MMSP 2022
abstract: Automatic estimation of domestic activities from audio can be used to solve many problems, such as reducing the labor cost for nursing the elderly people. This study focuses on solving the problem of domestic activity clustering from audio. The target of domestic activity clustering is to cluster audio clips which belong to the same category of domestic activity into one cluster in an unsupervised way. In this paper, we propose a method of domestic activity clustering using a depthwise separable convolutional autoencoder network. In the proposed method, initial embeddings are learned by the depthwise separable convolutional autoencoder, and a clustering-oriented loss is designed to jointly optimize embedding refinement and cluster assignment. Different methods are evaluated on a public dataset (a derivative of the SINS dataset) used in the challenge on Detection and Classification of Acoustic Scenes and Events (DCASE) in 2018. Our method obtains the normalized mutual information (NMI) score of 54.46%, and the clustering accuracy (CA) score of 63.64%, and outperforms state-of-the-art methods in terms of NMI and CA. In addition, both computational complexity and memory requirement of our method is lower than that of previous deep-model-based methods. Codes: https://github.com/vinceasvp/domestic-activity-clustering-from-audio
summary: Automatic estimation of domestic activities from audio can be used to solve many problems, such as reducing the labor cost for nursing the elderly people. This study focuses on solving the problem of domestic activity clustering from audio. The target of domestic activity clustering is to cluster audio clips which belong to the same category of domestic activity into one cluster in an unsupervised way. In this paper, we propose a method of domestic activity clustering using a depthwise separable convolutional autoencoder network. In the proposed method, initial embeddings are learned by the depthwise separable convolutional autoencoder, and a clustering-oriented loss is designed to jointly optimize embedding refinement and cluster assignment. Different methods are evaluated on a public dataset (a derivative of the SINS dataset) used in the challenge on Detection and Classification of Acoustic Scenes and Events (DCASE) in 2018. Our method obtains the normalized mutual information (NMI) score of 54.46%, and the clustering accuracy (CA) score of 63.64%, and outperforms state-of-the-art methods in terms of NMI and CA. In addition, both computational complexity and memory requirement of our method is lower than that of previous deep-model-based methods. Codes: https://github.com/vinceasvp/domestic-activity-clustering-from-audio
abstract_zh: 根据音频自动估计家庭活动可以解决许多问题，例如减少护理老年人的劳动力成本。本研究的重点是从音频中解决家庭活动聚类问题。家庭活动聚类的目标是以无监督的方式将属于同一家庭活动类别的音频片段聚类成一个簇。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用深度可分离卷积自动编码器网络进行家庭活动聚类的方法。在所提出的方法中，通过深度可分离卷积自动编码器学习初始嵌入，并设计面向聚类的损失来联合优化嵌入细化和聚类分配。在 2018 年声学场景和事件检测与分类（DCASE）挑战赛中使用的公共数据集（SINS 数据集的衍生品）上对不同的方法进行了评估。我们的方法获得了 54.46% 的归一化互信息（NMI）得分和 63.64% 的聚类准确度（CA）得分，并且在 NMI 和 CA 方面优于最先进的方法。此外，我们的方法的计算复杂度和内存需求都低于以前基于深度模型的方法。代码：https://github.com/vinceasvp/domestic-activity-clustering-from-audio

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度可分离卷积自编码网络的音频家庭活动聚类方法。
AI.motivation: 通过音频自动估计家庭活动可降低护理老年人的人工成本，但现有方法在聚类效果和计算效率上存在不足。
AI.method: 设计深度可分离卷积自编码网络学习初始嵌入，并引入聚类导向损失函数联合优化嵌入精炼与聚类分配。
AI.result: 在DCASE 2018数据集上取得NMI 54.46%、CA 63.64%的指标，优于现有方法且计算复杂度和内存需求更低。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为家庭活动音频聚类提供了高效解决方案，在护理场景中具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: M. Rasel Mahmud,Michael Stewart,Alberto Cordova,John Quarles
title: Vibrotactile Feedback to Make Real Walking in Virtual Reality More Accessible
title_zh: 振动触觉反馈让虚拟现实中的真实行走变得更容易
comment: 13 pages, 7 figures
comments: 13 pages, 7 figures
abstract: This research aims to examine the effects of various vibrotactile feedback techniques on gait (i.e., walking patterns) in virtual reality (VR). Prior studies have demonstrated that gait disturbances in VR users are significant usability barriers. However, adequate research has not been performed to address this problem. In our study, 39 participants (with mobility impairments: 18, without mobility impairments: 21) performed timed walking tasks in a real-world environment and identical activities in a VR environment with different forms of vibrotactile feedback (spatial, static, and rhythmic). Within-group results revealed that each form of vibrotactile feedback improved gait performance in VR significantly (p < .001) relative to the no vibrotactile condition in VR for individuals with and without mobility impairments. Moreover, spatial vibrotactile feedback increased gait performance significantly (p < .001) in both participant groups compared to other vibrotactile conditions. The findings of this research will help to make real walking in VR more accessible for those with and without mobility impairments.
summary: This research aims to examine the effects of various vibrotactile feedback techniques on gait (i.e., walking patterns) in virtual reality (VR). Prior studies have demonstrated that gait disturbances in VR users are significant usability barriers. However, adequate research has not been performed to address this problem. In our study, 39 participants (with mobility impairments: 18, without mobility impairments: 21) performed timed walking tasks in a real-world environment and identical activities in a VR environment with different forms of vibrotactile feedback (spatial, static, and rhythmic). Within-group results revealed that each form of vibrotactile feedback improved gait performance in VR significantly (p < .001) relative to the no vibrotactile condition in VR for individuals with and without mobility impairments. Moreover, spatial vibrotactile feedback increased gait performance significantly (p < .001) in both participant groups compared to other vibrotactile conditions. The findings of this research will help to make real walking in VR more accessible for those with and without mobility impairments.
abstract_zh: 本研究旨在研究各种振动触觉反馈技术对虚拟现实 (VR) 中步态（即行走模式）的影响。先前的研究表明，VR 用户的步态障碍是严重的可用性障碍。然而，尚未进行足够的研究来解决这个问题。在我们的研究中，39 名参与者（有行动障碍：18 人，无行动障碍：21 人）在现实环境中执行定时步行任务，并在具有不同形式的振动触觉反馈（空间、静态和节奏）的 VR 环境中执行相同的活动。组内结果显示，对于有或没有行动障碍的个体，相对于 VR 中无振动触觉条件，每种形式的振动触觉反馈都能显着改善 VR 中的步态表现 (p < .001)。此外，与其他振动触觉条件相比，空间振动触觉反馈显着提高了两个参与者组的步态表现 (p < .001)。这项研究的结果将有助于让有或没有行动障碍的人更容易在 VR 中真正行走。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨不同触觉反馈技术对虚拟现实（VR）中行走模式的影响，旨在提升VR行走的可访问性。
AI.motivation: 先前研究表明VR用户存在显著的步态障碍，但缺乏有效解决方案的研究。本研究旨在通过触觉反馈技术改善这一问题。
AI.method: 招募39名参与者（含18名行动障碍者），在真实环境和VR环境中完成计时行走任务，对比无触觉反馈及三种触觉反馈（空间、静态、节奏）的效果。
AI.result: 所有触觉反馈形式均显著提升VR中的步态表现（p<0.001），其中空间触觉反馈效果最佳，优于其他反馈形式。
AI.conclusion: 触觉反馈技术，尤其是空间反馈，可有效提升VR行走的可访问性，为行动障碍者和普通用户提供支持。

search_text: Vibrotactile Feedback to Make Real Walking in Virtual Reality More Accessible 振动触觉反馈让虚拟现实中的真实行走变得更容易 This research aims to examine the effects of various vibrotactile feedback techniques on gait (i.e., walking patterns) in virtual reality (VR). Prior studies have demonstrated that gait disturbances in VR users are significant usability barriers. However, adequate research has not been performed to address this problem. In our study, 39 participants (with mobility impairments: 18, without mobility impairments: 21) performed timed walking tasks in a real-world environment and identical activities in a VR environment with different forms of vibrotactile feedback (spatial, static, and rhythmic). Within-group results revealed that each form of vibrotactile feedback improved gait performance in VR significantly (p < .001) relative to the no vibrotactile condition in VR for individuals with and without mobility impairments. Moreover, spatial vibrotactile feedback increased gait performance significantly (p < .001) in both participant groups compared to other vibrotactile conditions. The findings of this research will help to make real walking in VR more accessible for those with and without mobility impairments. 本研究旨在研究各种振动触觉反馈技术对虚拟现实 (VR) 中步态（即行走模式）的影响。先前的研究表明，VR 用户的步态障碍是严重的可用性障碍。然而，尚未进行足够的研究来解决这个问题。在我们的研究中，39 名参与者（有行动障碍：18 人，无行动障碍：21 人）在现实环境中执行定时步行任务，并在具有不同形式的振动触觉反馈（空间、静态和节奏）的 VR 环境中执行相同的活动。组内结果显示，对于有或没有行动障碍的个体，相对于 VR 中无振动触觉条件，每种形式的振动触觉反馈都能显着改善 VR 中的步态表现 (p < .001)。此外，与其他振动触觉条件相比，空间振动触觉反馈显着提高了两个参与者组的步态表现 (p < .001)。这项研究的结果将有助于让有或没有行动障碍的人更容易在 VR 中真正行走。 本研究探讨不同触觉反馈技术对虚拟现实（VR）中行走模式的影响，旨在提升VR行走的可访问性。 M. Rasel Mahmud,Michael Stewart,Alberto Cordova,John Quarles cs.HC

title: Evolutionary bagging for ensemble learning
title_zh: 用于集成学习的进化装袋
comment: ef:Neurocomputing, Volume 510, 21 October 2022, Pages 1-14
comments: ef:Neurocomputing, Volume 510, 21 October 2022, Pages 1-14
abstract: Ensemble learning has gained success in machine learning with major advantages over other learning methods. Bagging is a prominent ensemble learning method that creates subgroups of data, known as bags, that are trained by individual machine learning methods such as decision trees. Random forest is a prominent example of bagging with additional features in the learning process. Evolutionary algorithms have been prominent for optimisation problems and also been used for machine learning. Evolutionary algorithms are gradient-free methods that work with a population of candidate solutions that maintain diversity for creating new solutions. In conventional bagged ensemble learning, the bags are created once and the content, in terms of the training examples, are fixed over the learning process. In our paper, we propose evolutionary bagged ensemble learning, where we utilise evolutionary algorithms to evolve the content of the bags in order to iteratively enhance the ensemble by providing diversity in the bags. The results show that our evolutionary ensemble bagging method outperforms conventional ensemble methods (bagging and random forests) for several benchmark datasets under certain constraints. We find that evolutionary bagging can inherently sustain a diverse set of bags without reduction in performance accuracy.
summary: Ensemble learning has gained success in machine learning with major advantages over other learning methods. Bagging is a prominent ensemble learning method that creates subgroups of data, known as bags, that are trained by individual machine learning methods such as decision trees. Random forest is a prominent example of bagging with additional features in the learning process. Evolutionary algorithms have been prominent for optimisation problems and also been used for machine learning. Evolutionary algorithms are gradient-free methods that work with a population of candidate solutions that maintain diversity for creating new solutions. In conventional bagged ensemble learning, the bags are created once and the content, in terms of the training examples, are fixed over the learning process. In our paper, we propose evolutionary bagged ensemble learning, where we utilise evolutionary algorithms to evolve the content of the bags in order to iteratively enhance the ensemble by providing diversity in the bags. The results show that our evolutionary ensemble bagging method outperforms conventional ensemble methods (bagging and random forests) for several benchmark datasets under certain constraints. We find that evolutionary bagging can inherently sustain a diverse set of bags without reduction in performance accuracy.
abstract_zh: 集成学习在机器学习领域取得了成功，与其他学习方法相比具有重大优势。 Bagging 是一种著名的集成学习方法，它创建数据子组（称为包），并通过决策树等单独的机器学习方法进行训练。随机森林是在学习过程中添加附加特征的装袋的一个突出例子。进化算法在优化问题上表现突出，也被用于机器学习。进化算法是无梯度方法，它与一组候选解决方案一起工作，保持多样性以创建新的解决方案。在传统的袋装集成学习中，袋被创建一次，并且就训练示例而言，内容在学习过程中是固定的。在我们的论文中，我们提出了进化袋装集成学习，我们利用进化算法来进化袋子的内容，以便通过提供袋子的多样性来迭代增强集成。结果表明，在某些约束下，对于多个基准数据集，我们的进化集成装袋方法优于传统的集成方法（装袋和随机森林）。我们发现，进化装袋本质上可以维持多种袋子，而不会降低性能准确性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于进化算法的集成学习袋ging方法，通过动态调整数据子集来提升模型性能并保持多样性。
AI.motivation: 传统袋ging方法在训练过程中固定数据子集，难以适应复杂数据分布，而进化算法能通过种群多样性优化解，因此结合两者以提升集成学习效果。
AI.method: 利用进化算法动态演化数据子集（袋子），通过迭代优化维持多样性，增强集成学习模型的泛化能力。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，进化袋ging方法在特定约束下优于传统袋ging和随机森林，且保持较高准确率。
AI.conclusion: 进化袋ging方法能有效维持袋子多样性，提升集成学习性能，为复杂数据提供新解决方案。

authors_text: Caio da S. Dias,Alceu de S. Britto Jr.,Jean P. Barddal,Laurent Heutte,Alessandro L. Koerich
title: Pattern Spotting and Image Retrieval in Historical Documents using Deep Hashing
title_zh: 使用深度哈希在历史文档中进行模式识别和图像检索
comment: 7 pages
comments: 7 pages
abstract: This paper presents a deep learning approach for image retrieval and pattern spotting in digital collections of historical documents. First, a region proposal algorithm detects object candidates in the document page images. Next, deep learning models are used for feature extraction, considering two distinct variants, which provide either real-valued or binary code representations. Finally, candidate images are ranked by computing the feature similarity with a given input query. A robust experimental protocol evaluates the proposed approach considering each representation scheme (real-valued and binary code) on the DocExplore image database. The experimental results show that the proposed deep models compare favorably to the state-of-the-art image retrieval approaches for images of historical documents, outperforming other deep models by 2.56 percentage points using the same techniques for pattern spotting. Besides, the proposed approach also reduces the search time by up to 200x and the storage cost up to 6,000x when compared to related works based on real-valued representations.
summary: This paper presents a deep learning approach for image retrieval and pattern spotting in digital collections of historical documents. First, a region proposal algorithm detects object candidates in the document page images. Next, deep learning models are used for feature extraction, considering two distinct variants, which provide either real-valued or binary code representations. Finally, candidate images are ranked by computing the feature similarity with a given input query. A robust experimental protocol evaluates the proposed approach considering each representation scheme (real-valued and binary code) on the DocExplore image database. The experimental results show that the proposed deep models compare favorably to the state-of-the-art image retrieval approaches for images of historical documents, outperforming other deep models by 2.56 percentage points using the same techniques for pattern spotting. Besides, the proposed approach also reduces the search time by up to 200x and the storage cost up to 6,000x when compared to related works based on real-valued representations.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于历史文档数字集合中的图像检索和模式识别的深度学习方法。首先，区域提议算法检测文档页面图像中的候选对象。接下来，深度学习模型用于特征提取，考虑两种不同的变体，它们提供实值或二进制代码表示。最后，通过计算与给定输入查询的特征相似度来对候选图像进行排名。一个强大的实验协议评估了所提出的方法，考虑了 DocExplore 图像数据库上的每种表示方案（实值和二进制代码）。实验结果表明，所提出的深度模型优于历史文档图像的最先进的图像检索方法，比使用相同模式识别技术的其他深度模型高出 2.56 个百分点。此外，与基于实值表示的相关工作相比，所提出的方法还将搜索时间减少了 200 倍，存储成本减少了 6,000 倍。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于深度哈希的历史文档图像检索与模式识别方法
AI.motivation: 解决历史文档图像检索中存储成本高、搜索效率低的问题
AI.method: 结合区域提议算法与深度学习模型，通过实值/二进制编码实现特征提取与相似度计算
AI.result: 准确率较现有方法提升2.56个百分点，搜索速度提升200倍，存储成本降低6000倍
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在检索精度与计算效率上均优于现有深度学习方案

A robust experimental protocol evaluates the proposed approach considering each representation scheme (real-valued and binary code) on the DocExplore image database. The experimental results show that the proposed deep models compare favorably to the state-of-the-art image retrieval approaches for images of historical documents, outperforming other deep models by 2.56 percentage points using the same techniques for pattern spotting. Besides, the proposed approach also reduces the search time by up to 200x and the storage cost up to 6,000x when compared to related works based on real-valued representations. 本文提出了一种用于历史文档数字集合中的图像检索和模式识别的深度学习方法。首先，区域提议算法检测文档页面图像中的候选对象。接下来，深度学习模型用于特征提取，考虑两种不同的变体，它们提供实值或二进制代码表示。最后，通过计算与给定输入查询的特征相似度来对候选图像进行排名。一个强大的实验协议评估了所提出的方法，考虑了 DocExplore 图像数据库上的每种表示方案（实值和二进制代码）。实验结果表明，所提出的深度模型优于历史文档图像的最先进的图像检索方法，比使用相同模式识别技术的其他深度模型高出 2.56 个百分点。此外，与基于实值表示的相关工作相比，所提出的方法还将搜索时间减少了 200 倍，存储成本减少了 6,000 倍。 提出一种基于深度哈希的历史文档图像检索与模式识别方法 Caio da S. Dias,Alceu de S. Britto Jr.,Jean P. Barddal,Laurent Heutte,Alessandro L. Koerich cs.CV,cs.IR,cs.LG

authors_text: Alexander G. Olenskyj,Brent S. Sams,Zhenghao Fei,Vishal Singh,Pranav V. Raja,Gail M. Bornhorst,J. Mason Earles
title: End-to-end deep learning for directly estimating grape yield from ground-based imagery
title_zh: 用于根据地面图像直接估算葡萄产量的端到端深度学习
comment: ef:Comput. Electron. Agric. 198 (2022)
comments: ef:Comput. Electron. Agric. 198 (2022)
abstract: Yield estimation is a powerful tool in vineyard management, as it allows growers to fine-tune practices to optimize yield and quality. However, yield estimation is currently performed using manual sampling, which is time-consuming and imprecise. This study demonstrates the application of proximal imaging combined with deep learning for yield estimation in vineyards. Continuous data collection using a vehicle-mounted sensing kit combined with collection of ground truth yield data at harvest using a commercial yield monitor allowed for the generation of a large dataset of 23,581 yield points and 107,933 images. Moreover, this study was conducted in a mechanically managed commercial vineyard, representing a challenging environment for image analysis but a common set of conditions in the California Central Valley. Three model architectures were tested: object detection, CNN regression, and transformer models. The object detection model was trained on hand-labeled images to localize grape bunches, and either bunch count or pixel area was summed to correlate with grape yield. Conversely, regression models were trained end-to-end to predict grape yield from image data without the need for hand labeling. Results demonstrated that both a transformer as well as the object detection model with pixel area processing performed comparably, with a mean absolute percent error of 18% and 18.5%, respectively on a representative holdout dataset. Saliency mapping was used to demonstrate the attention of the CNN model was localized near the predicted location of grape bunches, as well as on the top of the grapevine canopy. Overall, the study showed the applicability of proximal imaging and deep learning for prediction of grapevine yield on a large scale. Additionally, the end-to-end modeling approach was able to perform comparably to the object detection approach while eliminating the need for hand-labeling.

Conversely, regression models were trained end-to-end to predict grape yield from image data without the need for hand labeling. Results demonstrated that both a transformer as well as the object detection model with pixel area processing performed comparably, with a mean absolute percent error of 18% and 18.5%, respectively on a representative holdout dataset. Saliency mapping was used to demonstrate the attention of the CNN model was localized near the predicted location of grape bunches, as well as on the top of the grapevine canopy. Overall, the study showed the applicability of proximal imaging and deep learning for prediction of grapevine yield on a large scale. Additionally, the end-to-end modeling approach was able to perform comparably to the object detection approach while eliminating the need for hand-labeling.
abstract_zh: 产量估算是葡萄园管理中的一个强大工具，因为它允许种植者微调实践以优化产量和质量。然而，目前产量估算是通过手动抽样进行的，既耗时又不精确。这项研究展示了近端成像与深度学习相结合在葡萄园产量估算中的应用。使用车载传感套件进行连续数据收集，结合使用商业产量监视器收集收获时的地面真实产量数据，可以生成包含 23,581 个产量点和 107,933 张图像的大型数据集。此外，这项研究是在一个机械管理的商业葡萄园中进行的，这对于图像分析来说是一个具有挑战性的环境，但却是加州中央山谷的一组常见条件。测试了三种模型架构：目标检测、CNN 回归和 Transformer 模型。目标检测模型在手工标记的图像上进行训练，以定位葡萄串，并对葡萄串计数或像素面积进行求和，以与葡萄产量相关。相反，回归模型经过端到端训练，可以根据图像数据预测葡萄产量，而无需手动标记。结果表明，变换器以及具有像素区域处理的对象检测模型的性能相当，在代表性保留数据集上的平均绝对百分比误差分别为 18% 和 18.5%。使用显着性映射来证明 CNN 模型的注意力集中在葡萄串的预测位置附近以及葡萄树冠的顶部。总体而言，该研究表明了近端成像和深度学习在大规模预测葡萄产量方面的适用性。此外，端到端建模方法的性能与对象检测方法相当，同时消除了手动标记的需要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于端到端深度学习的方法，直接从地面图像中估算葡萄产量。
AI.motivation: 传统葡萄产量估算依赖人工采样，存在耗时且不精确的问题，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 结合车载传感设备采集图像与实际产量数据，构建包含23,581个产量点和107,933张图像的数据集，分别测试目标检测、CNN回归和Transformer模型，对比不同方法的性能。
AI.result: Transformer模型与基于像素面积的目标检测模型在测试集上均达到18%和18.5%的平均绝对百分比误差，且CNN注意力机制聚焦于葡萄串和藤蔓顶部。
AI.conclusion: 近程成像与深度学习可有效实现大规模葡萄产量预测，端到端模型无需人工标注即可达到与目标检测相当的精度。

authors_text: V. Araujo,D. Schaffer,A. B. Costa,S. R. Musse
title: Can gender categorization influence the perception of animated virtual humans?
title_zh: 性别分类会影响动画虚拟人的感知吗？
comment: 8 pages, 1 figure, 2 tables
comments: 8 pages, 1 figure, 2 tables
abstract: Animations have become increasingly realistic with the evolution of Computer Graphics (CG). In particular, human models and behaviors were represented through animated virtual humans, sometimes with a high level of realism. In particular, gender is a characteristic that is related to human identification, so that virtual humans assigned to a specific gender have, in general, stereotyped representations through movements, clothes, hair and colors, in order to be understood by users as desired by designers. An important area of study is finding out whether participants' perceptions change depending on how a virtual human is visually presented. Findings in this area can help the industry to guide the modeling and animation of virtual humans to deliver the expected impact to the audience. In this paper, we reproduce, through CG, a perceptual study that aims to assess gender bias in relation to a simulated baby. In the original study, two groups of people watched the same video of a baby reacting to the same stimuli, but one group was told the baby was female and the other group was told the same baby was male, producing different perceptions. The results of our study with virtual babies were similar to the findings with real babies. First, it shows that people's emotional response change depending on the character gender attribute, in this case the only difference was the baby's name. Our research indicates that by just informing the name of a virtual human can be enough to create a gender perception that impact the participant emotional answer.
summary: Animations have become increasingly realistic with the evolution of Computer Graphics (CG). In particular, human models and behaviors were represented through animated virtual humans, sometimes with a high level of realism. In particular, gender is a characteristic that is related to human identification, so that virtual humans assigned to a specific gender have, in general, stereotyped representations through movements, clothes, hair and colors, in order to be understood by users as desired by designers. An important area of study is finding out whether participants' perceptions change depending on how a virtual human is visually presented. Findings in this area can help the industry to guide the modeling and animation of virtual humans to deliver the expected impact to the audience. In this paper, we reproduce, through CG, a perceptual study that aims to assess gender bias in relation to a simulated baby. In the original study, two groups of people watched the same video of a baby reacting to the same stimuli, but one group was told the baby was female and the other group was told the same baby was male, producing different perceptions. The results of our study with virtual babies were similar to the findings with real babies. First, it shows that people's emotional response change depending on the character gender attribute, in this case the only difference was the baby's name. Our research indicates that by just informing the name of a virtual human can be enough to create a gender perception that impact the participant emotional answer.
abstract_zh: 随着计算机图形学 (CG) 的发展，动画变得越来越逼真。特别是，人类模型和行为是通过动画虚拟人类来表现的，有时具有高度的真实感。特别是，性别是与人类身份相关的特征，因此分配给特定性别的虚拟人通常通过动作、衣服、头发和颜色具有刻板的表征，以便按照设计者的期望被用户理解。一个重要的研究领域是找出参与者的感知是否会根据虚拟人的视觉呈现方式而变化。该领域的发现可以帮助行业指导虚拟人的建模和动画，以向观众带来预期的影响。在本文中，我们通过 CG 重现了一项感知研究，旨在评估与模拟婴儿相关的性别偏见。在最初的研究中，两组人观看了婴儿对相同刺激做出反应的同一个视频，但一组被告知婴儿是女性，另一组被告知同一个婴儿是男性，产生了不同的看法。我们对虚拟婴儿的研究结果与真实婴儿的研究结果相似。首先，它表明人们的情绪反应会根据角色的性别属性而变化，在这种情况下，唯一的区别是婴儿的名字。我们的研究表明，仅通过告知虚拟人的名字就足以产生影响参与者情绪答案的性别认知。

AI.tldr: 本文通过计算机图形学技术研究性别分类对虚拟人类感知的影响，特别是通过虚拟婴儿的名称暗示性别来观察参与者的情感反应差异。
AI.motivation: 虚拟人类的性别特征常通过动作、服装等预设刻板印象，但需验证性别属性（如名称）是否足以影响用户感知，以指导虚拟角色设计。
AI.method: 使用CG技术构建虚拟婴儿模型，通过实验让参与者观看相同动画但被告知不同性别（仅通过名称区分），记录其情感反应差异。
AI.result: 实验发现，仅通过虚拟婴儿的名称（性别暗示）即可引发参与者显著不同的情感反应，结果与真实婴儿实验一致。
AI.conclusion: 性别属性可通过简单线索（如名称）影响用户对虚拟人类的感知与情感反应，提示设计时需谨慎处理性别相关特征。

In this paper, we reproduce, through CG, a perceptual study that aims to assess gender bias in relation to a simulated baby. In the original study, two groups of people watched the same video of a baby reacting to the same stimuli, but one group was told the baby was female and the other group was told the same baby was male, producing different perceptions. The results of our study with virtual babies were similar to the findings with real babies. First, it shows that people's emotional response change depending on the character gender attribute, in this case the only difference was the baby's name. Our research indicates that by just informing the name of a virtual human can be enough to create a gender perception that impact the participant emotional answer. 随着计算机图形学 (CG) 的发展，动画变得越来越逼真。特别是，人类模型和行为是通过动画虚拟人类来表现的，有时具有高度的真实感。特别是，性别是与人类身份相关的特征，因此分配给特定性别的虚拟人通常通过动作、衣服、头发和颜色具有刻板的表征，以便按照设计者的期望被用户理解。一个重要的研究领域是找出参与者的感知是否会根据虚拟人的视觉呈现方式而变化。该领域的发现可以帮助行业指导虚拟人的建模和动画，以向观众带来预期的影响。在本文中，我们通过 CG 重现了一项感知研究，旨在评估与模拟婴儿相关的性别偏见。在最初的研究中，两组人观看了婴儿对相同刺激做出反应的同一个视频，但一组被告知婴儿是女性，另一组被告知同一个婴儿是男性，产生了不同的看法。我们对虚拟婴儿的研究结果与真实婴儿的研究结果相似。首先，它表明人们的情绪反应会根据角色的性别属性而变化，在这种情况下，唯一的区别是婴儿的名字。我们的研究表明，仅通过告知虚拟人的名字就足以产生影响参与者情绪答案的性别认知。 本文通过计算机图形学技术研究性别分类对虚拟人类感知的影响，特别是通过虚拟婴儿的名称暗示性别来观察参与者的情感反应差异。 V. Araujo,D. Schaffer,A. B. Costa,S. R. Musse cs.HC,cs.CY

title: Improving Meta-Learning Generalization with Activation-Based Early-Stopping
title_zh: 通过基于激活的早期停止来提高元学习泛化能力
comment: Accepted at CoLLAs 2022. To be published in Proceedings of Machine Learning Research (PMLR)
comments: Accepted at CoLLAs 2022. To be published in Proceedings of Machine Learning Research (PMLR)
abstract: Meta-Learning algorithms for few-shot learning aim to train neural networks capable of generalizing to novel tasks using only a few examples. Early-stopping is critical for performance, halting model training when it reaches optimal generalization to the new task distribution. Early-stopping mechanisms in Meta-Learning typically rely on measuring the model performance on labeled examples from a meta-validation set drawn from the training (source) dataset. This is problematic in few-shot transfer learning settings, where the meta-test set comes from a different target dataset (OOD) and can potentially have a large distributional shift with the meta-validation set. In this work, we propose Activation Based Early-stopping (ABE), an alternative to using validation-based early-stopping for meta-learning. Specifically, we analyze the evolution, during meta-training, of the neural activations at each hidden layer, on a small set of unlabelled support examples from a single task of the target tasks distribution, as this constitutes a minimal and justifiably accessible information from the target problem. Our experiments show that simple, label agnostic statistics on the activations offer an effective way to estimate how the target generalization evolves over time. At each hidden layer, we characterize the activation distributions, from their first and second order moments, then further summarized along the feature dimensions, resulting in a compact yet intuitive characterization in a four-dimensional space. Detecting when, throughout training time, and at which layer, the target activation trajectory diverges from the activation trajectory of the source data, allows us to perform early-stopping and improve generalization in a large array of few-shot transfer learning settings, across different algorithms, source and target datasets.

This is problematic in few-shot transfer learning settings, where the meta-test set comes from a different target dataset (OOD) and can potentially have a large distributional shift with the meta-validation set. In this work, we propose Activation Based Early-stopping (ABE), an alternative to using validation-based early-stopping for meta-learning. Specifically, we analyze the evolution, during meta-training, of the neural activations at each hidden layer, on a small set of unlabelled support examples from a single task of the target tasks distribution, as this constitutes a minimal and justifiably accessible information from the target problem. Our experiments show that simple, label agnostic statistics on the activations offer an effective way to estimate how the target generalization evolves over time. At each hidden layer, we characterize the activation distributions, from their first and second order moments, then further summarized along the feature dimensions, resulting in a compact yet intuitive characterization in a four-dimensional space. Detecting when, throughout training time, and at which layer, the target activation trajectory diverges from the activation trajectory of the source data, allows us to perform early-stopping and improve generalization in a large array of few-shot transfer learning settings, across different algorithms, source and target datasets.
abstract_zh: 用于少样本学习的元学习算法旨在训练能够仅使用几个示例泛化到新任务的神经网络。提前停止对于性能至关重要，当模型训练达到新任务分布的最佳泛化时，停止模型训练。元学习中的早期停止机制通常依赖于从训练（源）数据集提取的元验证集中测量标记示例的模型性能。这在少样本迁移学习设置中是有问题的，其中元测试集来自不同的目标数据集（OOD），并且可能与元验证集发生较大的分布变化。在这项工作中，我们提出了基于激活的早期停止（ABE），这是使用基于验证的早期停止进行元学习的替代方案。具体来说，我们在元训练期间，在来自目标任务分布的单个任务的一小组未标记的支持示例上分析每个隐藏层的神经激活的演变，因为这构成了来自目标问题的最小且合理可访问的信息。我们的实验表明，简单的、与标签无关的激活统计数据提供了一种有效的方法来估计目标泛化如何随时间演变。在每个隐藏层，我们从一阶矩和二阶矩表征激活分布，然后沿特征维度进一步总结，从而在四维空间中形成紧凑而直观的表征。在整个训练过程中，检测目标激活轨迹何时、在哪一层偏离源数据的激活轨迹，使我们能够在跨不同算法、源和目标数据集的大量少样本迁移学习设置中执行早期停止并提高泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于激活值的早停机制（ABE），用于改进元学习在少量样本迁移学习中的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统元学习早停依赖源数据集的验证集，但在目标数据分布差异较大的迁移学习场景中，验证集与测试集分布不一致导致性能下降。
AI.method: 通过分析目标任务中未标记支持样本的神经网络激活值统计特征（一阶/二阶矩），在四维空间中刻画激活轨迹分布，检测其与源数据轨迹的偏离时刻以触发早停。
AI.result: 实验表明ABE方法在多种元学习算法和跨数据集的少量样本迁移任务中均能有效提升泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 基于激活值的早停机制无需目标标签即可捕捉分布偏移，为开放分布场景下的元学习提供了更鲁棒的训练终止策略。

title: Deep VULMAN: A Deep Reinforcement Learning-Enabled Cyber Vulnerability Management Framework
title_zh: Deep VULMAN：支持深度强化学习的网络漏洞管理框架
comment: 12 pages, 3 figures
comments: 12 pages, 3 figures
abstract: Cyber vulnerability management is a critical function of a cybersecurity operations center (CSOC) that helps protect organizations against cyber-attacks on their computer and network systems. Adversaries hold an asymmetric advantage over the CSOC, as the number of deficiencies in these systems is increasing at a significantly higher rate compared to the expansion rate of the security teams to mitigate them in a resource-constrained environment. The current approaches are deterministic and one-time decision-making methods, which do not consider future uncertainties when prioritizing and selecting vulnerabilities for mitigation. These approaches are also constrained by the sub-optimal distribution of resources, providing no flexibility to adjust their response to fluctuations in vulnerability arrivals. We propose a novel framework, Deep VULMAN, consisting of a deep reinforcement learning agent and an integer programming method to fill this gap in the cyber vulnerability management process. Our sequential decision-making framework, first, determines the near-optimal amount of resources to be allocated for mitigation under uncertainty for a given system state and then determines the optimal set of prioritized vulnerability instances for mitigation. Our proposed framework outperforms the current methods in prioritizing the selection of important organization-specific vulnerabilities, on both simulated and real-world vulnerability data, observed over a one-year period.
summary: Cyber vulnerability management is a critical function of a cybersecurity operations center (CSOC) that helps protect organizations against cyber-attacks on their computer and network systems. Adversaries hold an asymmetric advantage over the CSOC, as the number of deficiencies in these systems is increasing at a significantly higher rate compared to the expansion rate of the security teams to mitigate them in a resource-constrained environment. The current approaches are deterministic and one-time decision-making methods, which do not consider future uncertainties when prioritizing and selecting vulnerabilities for mitigation. These approaches are also constrained by the sub-optimal distribution of resources, providing no flexibility to adjust their response to fluctuations in vulnerability arrivals. We propose a novel framework, Deep VULMAN, consisting of a deep reinforcement learning agent and an integer programming method to fill this gap in the cyber vulnerability management process. Our sequential decision-making framework, first, determines the near-optimal amount of resources to be allocated for mitigation under uncertainty for a given system state and then determines the optimal set of prioritized vulnerability instances for mitigation. Our proposed framework outperforms the current methods in prioritizing the selection of important organization-specific vulnerabilities, on both simulated and real-world vulnerability data, observed over a one-year period.
abstract_zh: 网络漏洞管理是网络安全运营中心 (CSOC) 的一项关键功能，可帮助保护组织的计算机和网络系统免受网络攻击。对手相对于 CSOC 拥有不对称优势，因为与在资源有限的环境中缓解这些问题所需的安全团队的扩张速度相比，这些系统中缺陷数量的增长速度要快得多。当前的方法是确定性的一次性决策方法，在优先考虑和选择缓解漏洞时没有考虑未来的不确定性。这些方法还受到资源分配不理想的限制，无法灵活调整对漏洞到达波动的响应。我们提出了一种新颖的框架 Deep VULMAN，它由深度强化学习代理和整数编程方法组成，以填补网络漏洞管理过程中的这一空白。我们的顺序决策框架首先确定在给定系统状态的不确定性下分配用于缓解的接近最佳的资源量，然后确定用于缓解的优先漏洞实例的最佳集合。我们提出的框架在根据一年内观察到的模拟和真实漏洞数据优先选择重要的组织特定漏洞方面优于当前的方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于深度强化学习的网络漏洞管理框架，以优化资源分配和漏洞优先级排序。
AI.motivation: 现有方法确定性且一次性决策，无法应对未来不确定性及资源分配不优的问题。
AI.method: 结合深度强化学习代理与整数规划方法，进行顺序决策以确定资源分配和漏洞优先级。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实世界数据集上，优于现有方法，有效提升漏洞优先级排序和资源分配效率。
AI.conclusion: 提出的Deep VULMAN框架填补了漏洞管理中的空白，有效提升资源分配和漏洞应对效率。

We propose a novel framework, Deep VULMAN, consisting of a deep reinforcement learning agent and an integer programming method to fill this gap in the cyber vulnerability management process. Our sequential decision-making framework, first, determines the near-optimal amount of resources to be allocated for mitigation under uncertainty for a given system state and then determines the optimal set of prioritized vulnerability instances for mitigation. Our proposed framework outperforms the current methods in prioritizing the selection of important organization-specific vulnerabilities, on both simulated and real-world vulnerability data, observed over a one-year period. 网络漏洞管理是网络安全运营中心 (CSOC) 的一项关键功能，可帮助保护组织的计算机和网络系统免受网络攻击。对手相对于 CSOC 拥有不对称优势，因为与在资源有限的环境中缓解这些问题所需的安全团队的扩张速度相比，这些系统中缺陷数量的增长速度要快得多。当前的方法是确定性的一次性决策方法，在优先考虑和选择缓解漏洞时没有考虑未来的不确定性。这些方法还受到资源分配不理想的限制，无法灵活调整对漏洞到达波动的响应。我们提出了一种新颖的框架 Deep VULMAN，它由深度强化学习代理和整数编程方法组成，以填补网络漏洞管理过程中的这一空白。我们的顺序决策框架首先确定在给定系统状态的不确定性下分配用于缓解的接近最佳的资源量，然后确定用于缓解的优先漏洞实例的最佳集合。我们提出的框架在根据一年内观察到的模拟和真实漏洞数据优先选择重要的组织特定漏洞方面优于当前的方法。 提出一种基于深度强化学习的网络漏洞管理框架，以优化资源分配和漏洞优先级排序。 Soumyadeep Hore,Ankit Shah,Nathaniel D. Bastian cs.AI,cs.CR,cs.NE

authors_text: Lukasz Tulczyjew,Michal Kawulok,Nicolas Longépé,Bertrand Le Saux,Jakub Nalepa
title: A Multibranch Convolutional Neural Network for Hyperspectral Unmixing
title_zh: 用于高光谱分解的多分支卷积神经网络
comment: 14 pages (including supplementary material), published in IEEE Geoscience and Remote Sensing Letters
comments: 14 pages (including supplementary material), published in IEEE Geoscience and Remote Sensing Letters
abstract: Hyperspectral unmixing remains one of the most challenging tasks in the analysis of such data. Deep learning has been blooming in the field and proved to outperform other classic unmixing techniques, and can be effectively deployed onboard Earth observation satellites equipped with hyperspectral imagers. In this letter, we follow this research pathway and propose a multi-branch convolutional neural network that benefits from fusing spectral, spatial, and spectral-spatial features in the unmixing process. The results of our experiments, backed up with the ablation study, revealed that our techniques outperform others from the literature and lead to higher-quality fractional abundance estimation. Also, we investigated the influence of reducing the training sets on the capabilities of all algorithms and their robustness against noise, as capturing large and representative ground-truth sets is time-consuming and costly in practice, especially in emerging Earth observation scenarios.
summary: Hyperspectral unmixing remains one of the most challenging tasks in the analysis of such data. Deep learning has been blooming in the field and proved to outperform other classic unmixing techniques, and can be effectively deployed onboard Earth observation satellites equipped with hyperspectral imagers. In this letter, we follow this research pathway and propose a multi-branch convolutional neural network that benefits from fusing spectral, spatial, and spectral-spatial features in the unmixing process. The results of our experiments, backed up with the ablation study, revealed that our techniques outperform others from the literature and lead to higher-quality fractional abundance estimation. Also, we investigated the influence of reducing the training sets on the capabilities of all algorithms and their robustness against noise, as capturing large and representative ground-truth sets is time-consuming and costly in practice, especially in emerging Earth observation scenarios.
abstract_zh: 高光谱分解仍然是此类数据分析中最具挑战性的任务之一。深度学习在该领域蓬勃发展，并被证明优于其他经典的分解技术，并且可以有效地部署在配备高光谱成像仪的地球观测卫星上。在这封信中，我们遵循这一研究路径，提出了一种多分支卷积神经网络，该网络受益于在分解过程中融合光谱、空间和光谱空间特征。我们的实验结果在消融研究的支持下表明，我们的技术优于文献中的其他技术，并且可以实现更高质量的分数丰度估计。此外，我们还研究了减少训练集对所有算法的能力及其对噪声的鲁棒性的影响，因为在实践中捕获大型且有代表性的地面实况集既耗时又昂贵，尤其是在新兴的地球观测场景中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多分支卷积神经网络，通过融合光谱、空间及光谱-空间特征，提升高光谱解混的精度。
AI.motivation: 高光谱解混是数据处理中的难点，传统方法效果有限，而深度学习在卫星搭载的高光谱成像应用中展现出潜力，需探索更优的特征融合方法。
AI.method: 设计多分支CNN架构，分别提取光谱、空间及联合特征，并通过消融实验验证有效性，同时分析训练集规模缩减与噪声对算法的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在分数丰度估计上优于现有技术，且在小样本和噪声环境下表现更稳健。
AI.conclusion: 多分支特征融合策略显著提升解混性能，为实际地球观测场景中数据获取成本高的问题提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Lukasz Tulczyjew,Michal Kawulok,Nicolas Longépé,Bertrand Le Saux,Jakub Nalepa
title: Graph Neural Networks Extract High-Resolution Cultivated Land Maps from Sentinel-2 Image Series
title_zh: 图神经网络从 Sentinel-2 图像系列中提取高分辨率耕地地图
comment: 7 pages (including supplementary material), published in IEEE Geoscience and Remote Sensing Letters
comments: 7 pages (including supplementary material), published in IEEE Geoscience and Remote Sensing Letters
abstract: Maintaining farm sustainability through optimizing the agricultural management practices helps build more planet-friendly environment. The emerging satellite missions can acquire multi- and hyperspectral imagery which captures more detailed spectral information concerning the scanned area, hence allows us to benefit from subtle spectral features during the analysis process in agricultural applications. We introduce an approach for extracting 2.5 m cultivated land maps from 10 m Sentinel-2 multispectral image series which benefits from a compact graph convolutional neural network. The experiments indicate that our models not only outperform classical and deep machine learning techniques through delivering higher-quality segmentation maps, but also dramatically reduce the memory footprint when compared to U-Nets (almost 8k trainable parameters of our models, with up to 31M parameters of U-Nets). Such memory frugality is pivotal in the missions which allow us to uplink a model to the AI-powered satellite once it is in orbit, as sending large nets is impossible due to the time constraints.
summary: Maintaining farm sustainability through optimizing the agricultural management practices helps build more planet-friendly environment. The emerging satellite missions can acquire multi- and hyperspectral imagery which captures more detailed spectral information concerning the scanned area, hence allows us to benefit from subtle spectral features during the analysis process in agricultural applications. We introduce an approach for extracting 2.5 m cultivated land maps from 10 m Sentinel-2 multispectral image series which benefits from a compact graph convolutional neural network. The experiments indicate that our models not only outperform classical and deep machine learning techniques through delivering higher-quality segmentation maps, but also dramatically reduce the memory footprint when compared to U-Nets (almost 8k trainable parameters of our models, with up to 31M parameters of U-Nets). Such memory frugality is pivotal in the missions which allow us to uplink a model to the AI-powered satellite once it is in orbit, as sending large nets is impossible due to the time constraints.
abstract_zh: 通过优化农业管理实践来保持农场的可持续性有助于建设更加地球友好的环境。新兴的卫星任务可以获取多光谱和高光谱图像，从而捕获有关扫描区域的更详细的光谱信息，从而使我们能够在农业应用的分析过程中受益于微妙的光谱特征。我们介绍了一种从 10 m Sentinel-2 多光谱图像系列中提取 2.5 m 耕地地图的方法，该方法受益于紧凑图卷积神经网络。实验表明，我们的模型不仅通过提供更高质量的分割图优于经典和深度机器学习技术，而且与 U-Net 相比，还大大减少了内存占用（我们的模型有近 8k 个可训练参数，U-Net 的参数高达 31M）。这种内存节约对于任务至关重要，一旦人工智能卫星进入轨道，我们就可以将模型上传到该卫星，因为由于时间限制，发送大型网络是不可能的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用图神经网络从Sentinel-2卫星图像中生成高分辨率耕地地图的方法。
AI.motivation: 通过优化农业管理提升可持续性，但传统方法难以处理卫星高光谱数据且模型内存消耗大，需更高效解决方案。
AI.method: 设计紧凑型图卷积神经网络，处理10米分辨率Sentinel-2多光谱图像序列，生成2.5米耕地地图。
AI.result: 模型分割精度优于传统方法，参数量仅为U-Net的1/3800（8k vs 31M），显著降低内存占用。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保证分割质量的同时实现极低内存消耗，适合卫星在轨AI模型部署需求。

title: Word-Level Fine-Grained Story Visualization
title_zh: 单词级细粒度故事可视化
comment: ECCV 2022
comments: ECCV 2022
abstract: Story visualization aims to generate a sequence of images to narrate each sentence in a multi-sentence story with a global consistency across dynamic scenes and characters. Current works still struggle with output images' quality and consistency, and rely on additional semantic information or auxiliary captioning networks. To address these challenges, we first introduce a new sentence representation, which incorporates word information from all story sentences to mitigate the inconsistency problem. Then, we propose a new discriminator with fusion features and further extend the spatial attention to improve image quality and story consistency. Extensive experiments on different datasets and human evaluation demonstrate the superior performance of our approach, compared to state-of-the-art methods, neither using segmentation masks nor auxiliary captioning networks.
summary: Story visualization aims to generate a sequence of images to narrate each sentence in a multi-sentence story with a global consistency across dynamic scenes and characters. Current works still struggle with output images' quality and consistency, and rely on additional semantic information or auxiliary captioning networks. To address these challenges, we first introduce a new sentence representation, which incorporates word information from all story sentences to mitigate the inconsistency problem. Then, we propose a new discriminator with fusion features and further extend the spatial attention to improve image quality and story consistency. Extensive experiments on different datasets and human evaluation demonstrate the superior performance of our approach, compared to state-of-the-art methods, neither using segmentation masks nor auxiliary captioning networks.
abstract_zh: 故事可视化旨在生成一系列图像来叙述多句子故事中的每个句子，并在动态场景和角色之间保持全局一致性。当前的工作仍然在努力解决输出图像的质量和一致性问题，并且依赖于额外的语义信息或辅助字幕网络。为了解决这些挑战，我们首先引入一种新的句子表示，它合并了所有故事句子中的单词信息，以减轻不一致问题。然后，我们提出了一种具有融合特征的新鉴别器，并进一步扩展了空间注意力以提高图像质量和故事一致性。对不同数据集和人类评估的广泛实验证明了我们的方法与最先进的方法相比具有优越的性能，既不使用分割掩模也不使用辅助字幕网络。

AI.tldr: 生成图像序列以叙述多句故事，保持动态场景和角色的一致性
AI.motivation: 现有方法在图像质量与故事一致性上存在不足，且依赖额外语义信息或辅助字幕网络
AI.method: 引入融合全故事词信息的句子表示，设计融合特征判别器并扩展空间注意力机制
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实验及人类评估显示，方法优于现有技术且无需分割掩码或辅助字幕网络
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过词级细粒度建模有效提升了故事可视化质量与一致性

ai_content_json.method: 引入融合全故事词信息的句子表示，设计融合特征判别器并扩展空间注意力机制
ai_content_json.result: 在多个数据集上实验及人类评估显示，方法优于现有技术且无需分割掩码或辅助字幕网络

search_text: Word-Level Fine-Grained Story Visualization 单词级细粒度故事可视化 Story visualization aims to generate a sequence of images to narrate each sentence in a multi-sentence story with a global consistency across dynamic scenes and characters. Current works still struggle with output images' quality and consistency, and rely on additional semantic information or auxiliary captioning networks. To address these challenges, we first introduce a new sentence representation, which incorporates word information from all story sentences to mitigate the inconsistency problem. Then, we propose a new discriminator with fusion features and further extend the spatial attention to improve image quality and story consistency. Extensive experiments on different datasets and human evaluation demonstrate the superior performance of our approach, compared to state-of-the-art methods, neither using segmentation masks nor auxiliary captioning networks. 故事可视化旨在生成一系列图像来叙述多句子故事中的每个句子，并在动态场景和角色之间保持全局一致性。当前的工作仍然在努力解决输出图像的质量和一致性问题，并且依赖于额外的语义信息或辅助字幕网络。为了解决这些挑战，我们首先引入一种新的句子表示，它合并了所有故事句子中的单词信息，以减轻不一致问题。然后，我们提出了一种具有融合特征的新鉴别器，并进一步扩展了空间注意力以提高图像质量和故事一致性。对不同数据集和人类评估的广泛实验证明了我们的方法与最先进的方法相比具有优越的性能，既不使用分割掩模也不使用辅助字幕网络。 生成图像序列以叙述多句故事，保持动态场景和角色的一致性 Bowen Li,Thomas Lukasiewicz cs.CV,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Fabrizio Pedersoli,Dryden Wiebe,Amin Banitalebi,Yong Zhang,George Tzanetakis,Kwang Moo Yi
title: Estimating Visual Information From Audio Through Manifold Learning
title_zh: 通过流形学习估计音频中的视觉信息
abstract: We propose a new framework for extracting visual information about a scene only using audio signals. Audio-based methods can overcome some of the limitations of vision-based methods i.e., they do not require "line-of-sight", are robust to occlusions and changes in illumination, and can function as a backup in case vision/lidar sensors fail. Therefore, audio-based methods can be useful even for applications in which only visual information is of interest Our framework is based on Manifold Learning and consists of two steps. First, we train a Vector-Quantized Variational Auto-Encoder to learn the data manifold of the particular visual modality we are interested in. Second, we train an Audio Transformation network to map multi-channel audio signals to the latent representation of the corresponding visual sample. We show that our method is able to produce meaningful images from audio using a publicly available audio/visual dataset. In particular, we consider the prediction of the following visual modalities from audio: depth and semantic segmentation. We hope the findings of our work can facilitate further research in visual information extraction from audio. Code is available at: https://github.com/ubc-vision/audio_manifold.
summary: We propose a new framework for extracting visual information about a scene only using audio signals. Audio-based methods can overcome some of the limitations of vision-based methods i.e., they do not require "line-of-sight", are robust to occlusions and changes in illumination, and can function as a backup in case vision/lidar sensors fail. Therefore, audio-based methods can be useful even for applications in which only visual information is of interest Our framework is based on Manifold Learning and consists of two steps. First, we train a Vector-Quantized Variational Auto-Encoder to learn the data manifold of the particular visual modality we are interested in. Second, we train an Audio Transformation network to map multi-channel audio signals to the latent representation of the corresponding visual sample. We show that our method is able to produce meaningful images from audio using a publicly available audio/visual dataset. In particular, we consider the prediction of the following visual modalities from audio: depth and semantic segmentation. We hope the findings of our work can facilitate further research in visual information extraction from audio. Code is available at: https://github.com/ubc-vision/audio_manifold.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新框架，用于仅使用音频信号提取场景的视觉信息。基于音频的方法可以克服基于视觉的方法的一些局限性，即它们不需要“视线”，对遮挡和照明变化具有鲁棒性，并且可以在视觉/激光雷达传感器发生故障时充当备份。因此，即使对于仅对视觉信息感兴趣的应用程序，基于音频的方法也很有用。我们的框架基于流形学习，由两个步骤组成。首先，我们训练矢量量化变分自动编码器来学习我们感兴趣的特定视觉模态的数据流形。其次，我们训练音频转换网络将多通道音频信号映射到相应视觉样本的潜在表示。我们表明，我们的方法能够使用公开可用的音频/视频数据集从音频生成有意义的图像。特别是，我们考虑从音频预测以下视觉模式：深度和语义分割。我们希望我们的工作结果能够促进从音频中提取视觉信息的进一步研究。代码位于：https://github.com/ubc-vision/audio_manifold。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于流形学习的框架，仅通过音频信号估计场景的视觉信息，包括深度和语义分割。
AI.motivation: 音频方法可克服视觉方法的局限性，如无需视线、抗遮挡和光照变化，并可在视觉传感器失效时作为备份。
AI.method: 分两步：1) 使用VQ-VAE学习目标视觉模态的数据流形；2) 训练音频转换网络将多通道音频映射到视觉潜在表示。
AI.result: 在公开视听数据集上验证了方法有效性，成功从音频生成有意义的深度图和语义分割结果。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为从音频中提取视觉信息提供了新思路，有望推动相关领域研究。

title: Towards Generating Large Synthetic Phytoplankton Datasets for Efficient Monitoring of Harmful Algal Blooms
title_zh: 致力于生成大型合成浮游植物数据集以有效监测有害藻华
abstract: Climate change is increasing the frequency and severity of harmful algal blooms (HABs), which cause significant fish deaths in aquaculture farms. This contributes to ocean pollution and greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions since dead fish are either dumped into the ocean or taken to landfills, which in turn negatively impacts the climate. Currently, the standard method to enumerate harmful algae and other phytoplankton is to manually observe and count them under a microscope. This is a time-consuming, tedious and error-prone process, resulting in compromised management decisions by farmers. Hence, automating this process for quick and accurate HAB monitoring is extremely helpful. However, this requires large and diverse datasets of phytoplankton images, and such datasets are hard to produce quickly. In this work, we explore the feasibility of generating novel high-resolution photorealistic synthetic phytoplankton images, containing multiple species in the same image, given a small dataset of real images. To this end, we employ Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) to generate synthetic images. We evaluate three different GAN architectures: ProjectedGAN, FastGAN, and StyleGANv2 using standard image quality metrics. We empirically show the generation of high-fidelity synthetic phytoplankton images using a training dataset of only 961 real images. Thus, this work demonstrates the ability of GANs to create large synthetic datasets of phytoplankton from small training datasets, accomplishing a key step towards sustainable systematic monitoring of harmful algal blooms.

However, this requires large and diverse datasets of phytoplankton images, and such datasets are hard to produce quickly. In this work, we explore the feasibility of generating novel high-resolution photorealistic synthetic phytoplankton images, containing multiple species in the same image, given a small dataset of real images. To this end, we employ Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) to generate synthetic images. We evaluate three different GAN architectures: ProjectedGAN, FastGAN, and StyleGANv2 using standard image quality metrics. abstract_zh: 气候变化正在增加有害藻华（HAB）的频率和严重程度，导致水产养殖场鱼类大量死亡。这会加剧海洋污染和温室气体（GHG）排放，因为死鱼要么被倾倒到海洋中，要么被运往垃圾填埋场，进而对气候产生负面影响。目前，计数有害藻类和其他浮游植物的标准方法是在显微镜下手动观察和计数。这是一个耗时、乏味且容易出错的过程，导致农民的管理决策受到影响。因此，自动化该过程以实现快速、准确的 HAB 监控非常有帮助。然而，这需要大量且多样化的浮游植物图像数据集，并且此类数据集很难快速生成。在这项工作中，我们探索了在给定小型真实图像数据集的情况下生成新颖的高分辨率真实感合成浮游植物图像的可行性，其中在同一图像中包含多个物种。为此，我们采用生成对抗网络（GAN）来生成合成图像。我们使用标准图像质量指标评估三种不同的 GAN 架构：ProjectedGAN、FastGAN 和 StyleGANv2。我们凭经验展示了使用仅包含 961 张真实图像的训练数据集生成高保真度合成浮游植物图像。因此，这项工作展示了 GAN 从小型训练数据集中创建大型浮游植物综合数据集的能力，从而实现了有害藻华可持续系统监测的关键一步。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过生成对抗网络（GAN）从少量真实图像中生成高分辨率的合成浮游植物图像，以解决有害藻华（HAB）监测中数据集不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 手动显微镜观察浮游植物耗时且易出错，而气候变暖导致的有害藻华频发加剧了海洋污染和温室气体排放，亟需自动化监测手段，但缺乏大规模多样化数据集。
AI.method: 采用ProjectedGAN、FastGAN和StyleGANv2三种架构，基于仅961张真实浮游植物图像训练生成对抗网络，生成包含多种类别的高保真合成图像，并通过标准图像质量指标评估效果。
AI.result: 成功生成高保真合成浮游植物图像，证明GAN可在小规模真实数据集上生成大规模合成数据，为有害藻华的系统性监测提供关键技术支持。
AI.conclusion: GAN技术能有效生成浮游植物合成数据集，为自动化HAB监测提供可行方案，推动可持续海洋环境管理。

We evaluate three different GAN architectures: ProjectedGAN, FastGAN, and StyleGANv2 using standard image quality metrics. We empirically show the generation of high-fidelity synthetic phytoplankton images using a training dataset of only 961 real images. Thus, this work demonstrates the ability of GANs to create large synthetic datasets of phytoplankton from small training datasets, accomplishing a key step towards sustainable systematic monitoring of harmful algal blooms. 气候变化正在增加有害藻华（HAB）的频率和严重程度，导致水产养殖场鱼类大量死亡。这会加剧海洋污染和温室气体（GHG）排放，因为死鱼要么被倾倒到海洋中，要么被运往垃圾填埋场，进而对气候产生负面影响。目前，计数有害藻类和其他浮游植物的标准方法是在显微镜下手动观察和计数。这是一个耗时、乏味且容易出错的过程，导致农民的管理决策受到影响。因此，自动化该过程以实现快速、准确的 HAB 监控非常有帮助。然而，这需要大量且多样化的浮游植物图像数据集，并且此类数据集很难快速生成。在这项工作中，我们探索了在给定小型真实图像数据集的情况下生成新颖的高分辨率真实感合成浮游植物图像的可行性，其中在同一图像中包含多个物种。为此，我们采用生成对抗网络（GAN）来生成合成图像。我们使用标准图像质量指标评估三种不同的 GAN 架构：ProjectedGAN、FastGAN 和 StyleGANv2。我们凭经验展示了使用仅包含 961 张真实图像的训练数据集生成高保真度合成浮游植物图像。因此，这项工作展示了 GAN 从小型训练数据集中创建大型浮游植物综合数据集的能力，从而实现了有害藻华可持续系统监测的关键一步。 本文旨在通过生成对抗网络（GAN）从少量真实图像中生成高分辨率的合成浮游植物图像，以解决有害藻华（HAB）监测中数据集不足的问题。 Nitpreet Bamra,Vikram Voleti,Alexander Wong,Jason Deglint cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Nafiul Nipu,Carla Floricel,Negar Naghashzadeh,Roberto Paoli,G. Elisabeta Marai
title: Visual Analysis and Detection of Contrails in Aircraft Engine Simulations
title_zh: 飞机发动机仿真中尾迹的可视化分析和检测
comment: 11 Pages, 7 figures, IEEE VIS 2022
comments: 11 Pages, 7 figures, IEEE VIS 2022
abstract: Contrails are condensation trails generated from emitted particles by aircraft engines, which perturb Earth's radiation budget. Simulation modeling is used to interpret the formation and development of contrails. These simulations are computationally intensive and rely on high-performance computing solutions, and the contrail structures are not well defined. We propose a visual computing system to assist in defining contrails and their characteristics, as well as in the analysis of parameters for computer-generated aircraft engine simulations. The back-end of our system leverages a contrail-formation criterion and clustering methods to detect contrails' shape and evolution and identify similar simulation runs. The front-end system helps analyze contrails and their parameters across multiple simulation runs. The evaluation with domain experts shows this approach successfully aids in contrail data investigation.
summary: Contrails are condensation trails generated from emitted particles by aircraft engines, which perturb Earth's radiation budget. Simulation modeling is used to interpret the formation and development of contrails. These simulations are computationally intensive and rely on high-performance computing solutions, and the contrail structures are not well defined. We propose a visual computing system to assist in defining contrails and their characteristics, as well as in the analysis of parameters for computer-generated aircraft engine simulations. The back-end of our system leverages a contrail-formation criterion and clustering methods to detect contrails' shape and evolution and identify similar simulation runs. The front-end system helps analyze contrails and their parameters across multiple simulation runs. The evaluation with domain experts shows this approach successfully aids in contrail data investigation.
abstract_zh: 凝结尾迹是飞机发动机发射的粒子产生的凝结痕迹，它会扰乱地球的辐射预算。仿真建模用于解释尾迹的形成和发展。这些模拟计算量大，依赖于高性能计算解决方案，并且轨迹结构没有明确定义。我们提出了一种视觉计算系统来帮助定义尾迹及其特征，以及分析计算机生成的飞机发动机模拟的参数。我们系统的后端利用轨迹形成标准和聚类方法来检测轨迹的形状和演变并识别类似的模拟运行。前端系统有助于分析多次模拟运行中的尾迹及其参数。领域专家的评估表明，这种方法成功地帮助了轨迹数据调查。

AI.tldr: 开发可视化系统辅助定义和分析飞机发动机模拟中的尾迹及其参数
AI.motivation: 现有模拟计算复杂且尾迹结构不明确，需可视化工具辅助分析
AI.method: 后端采用尾迹形成标准与聚类方法检测尾迹形态及演变，前端支持多模拟运行的参数分析
AI.result: 评估显示该方法有效辅助专家进行尾迹数据调查
AI.conclusion: 该系统有效提升尾迹模拟分析效率与准确性
