title: RealPatch: A Statistical Matching Framework for Model Patching with Real Samples
title_zh: RealPatch：用于真实样本模型修补的统计匹配框架
abstract: Machine learning classifiers are typically trained to minimise the average error across a dataset. Unfortunately, in practice, this process often exploits spurious correlations caused by subgroup imbalance within the training data, resulting in high average performance but highly variable performance across subgroups. Recent work to address this problem proposes model patching with CAMEL. This previous approach uses generative adversarial networks to perform intra-class inter-subgroup data augmentations, requiring (a) the training of a number of computationally expensive models and (b) sufficient quality of model's synthetic outputs for the given domain. In this work, we propose RealPatch, a framework for simpler, faster, and more data-efficient data augmentation based on statistical matching. Our framework performs model patching by augmenting a dataset with real samples, mitigating the need to train generative models for the target task. We demonstrate the effectiveness of RealPatch on three benchmark datasets, CelebA, Waterbirds and a subset of iWildCam, showing improvements in worst-case subgroup performance and in subgroup performance gap in binary classification. Furthermore, we conduct experiments with the imSitu dataset with 211 classes, a setting where generative model-based patching such as CAMEL is impractical. We show that RealPatch can successfully eliminate dataset leakage while reducing model leakage and maintaining high utility. The code for RealPatch can be found at https://github.com/wearepal/RealPatch.
summary: Machine learning classifiers are typically trained to minimise the average error across a dataset. Unfortunately, in practice, this process often exploits spurious correlations caused by subgroup imbalance within the training data, resulting in high average performance but highly variable performance across subgroups. Recent work to address this problem proposes model patching with CAMEL. This previous approach uses generative adversarial networks to perform intra-class inter-subgroup data augmentations, requiring (a) the training of a number of computationally expensive models and (b) sufficient quality of model's synthetic outputs for the given domain. In this work, we propose RealPatch, a framework for simpler, faster, and more data-efficient data augmentation based on statistical matching. Our framework performs model patching by augmenting a dataset with real samples, mitigating the need to train generative models for the target task. We demonstrate the effectiveness of RealPatch on three benchmark datasets, CelebA, Waterbirds and a subset of iWildCam, showing improvements in worst-case subgroup performance and in subgroup performance gap in binary classification. Furthermore, we conduct experiments with the imSitu dataset with 211 classes, a setting where generative model-based patching such as CAMEL is impractical. We show that RealPatch can successfully eliminate dataset leakage while reducing model leakage and maintaining high utility. The code for RealPatch can be found at https://github.com/wearepal/RealPatch.
abstract_zh: 机器学习分类器通常经过训练以最小化数据集中的平均误差。不幸的是，在实践中，这个过程经常利用训练数据中子组不平衡引起的虚假相关性，导致平均性能较高，但子组之间的性能差异很大。最近解决这个问题的工作提出了使用 CAMEL 进行模型修补。先前的方法使用生成对抗网络来执行类内子组间数据增强，需要（a）训练大量计算成本较高的模型，以及（b）给定域的模型合成输出具有足够的质量。在这项工作中，我们提出了 RealPatch，这是一个基于统计匹配的更简单、更快、更高效的数据增强框架。我们的框架通过使用真实样本增强数据集来执行模型修补，从而减少了为目标任务训练生成模型的需要。我们在三个基准数据集 CelebA、Waterbirds 和 iWildCam 子集上展示了 RealPatch 的有效性，显示了最坏情况子组性能和二元分类中子组性能差距的改进。此外，我们使用包含 211 个类别的 imSitu 数据集进行了实验，在这种情况下，基于生成模型的修补（例如 CAMEL）是不切实际的。我们证明 RealPatch 可以成功消除数据集泄漏，同时减少模型泄漏并保持高实用性。 RealPatch 的代码可以在 https://github.com/wearepal/RealPatch 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RealPatch框架，通过使用真实样本进行统计匹配，改进模型修补方法以提升子群体性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如CAMEL依赖生成对抗网络（GAN）生成合成数据，存在计算成本高且依赖生成质量的问题，而RealPatch旨在通过真实样本实现更高效的数据增强。
AI.method: 基于统计匹配的框架，通过直接使用真实样本增强数据集，避免训练生成模型，从而降低计算复杂度并提升数据效率。
AI.result: 在CelebA、Waterbirds和iWildCam等数据集上，RealPatch显著提升了最差子群体性能并缩小子群体性能差距；在211类的imSitu数据集上有效消除数据泄漏且保持高实用性。
AI.conclusion: RealPatch提供了一种无需生成模型的高效数据增强方法，在保持模型实用性的同时解决了子群体性能不平衡问题，适用于复杂场景。

search_text: RealPatch: A Statistical Matching Framework for Model Patching with Real Samples RealPatch：用于真实样本模型修补的统计匹配框架 Machine learning classifiers are typically trained to minimise the average error across a dataset. Unfortunately, in practice, this process often exploits spurious correlations caused by subgroup imbalance within the training data, resulting in high average performance but highly variable performance across subgroups. Recent work to address this problem proposes model patching with CAMEL. This previous approach uses generative adversarial networks to perform intra-class inter-subgroup data augmentations, requiring (a) the training of a number of computationally expensive models and (b) sufficient quality of model's synthetic outputs for the given domain. In this work, we propose RealPatch, a framework for simpler, faster, and more data-efficient data augmentation based on statistical matching. Our framework performs model patching by augmenting a dataset with real samples, mitigating the need to train generative models for the target task. We demonstrate the effectiveness of RealPatch on three benchmark datasets, CelebA, Waterbirds and a subset of iWildCam, showing improvements in worst-case subgroup performance and in subgroup performance gap in binary classification. Furthermore, we conduct experiments with the imSitu dataset with 211 classes, a setting where generative model-based patching such as CAMEL is impractical. We show that RealPatch can successfully eliminate dataset leakage while reducing model leakage and maintaining high utility. The code for RealPatch can be found at https://github.com/wearepal/RealPatch. 机器学习分类器通常经过训练以最小化数据集中的平均误差。不幸的是，在实践中，这个过程经常利用训练数据中子组不平衡引起的虚假相关性，导致平均性能较高，但子组之间的性能差异很大。最近解决这个问题的工作提出了使用 CAMEL 进行模型修补。先前的方法使用生成对抗网络来执行类内子组间数据增强，需要（a）训练大量计算成本较高的模型，以及（b）给定域的模型合成输出具有足够的质量。在这项工作中，我们提出了 RealPatch，这是一个基于统计匹配的更简单、更快、更高效的数据增强框架。我们的框架通过使用真实样本增强数据集来执行模型修补，从而减少了为目标任务训练生成模型的需要。我们在三个基准数据集 CelebA、Waterbirds 和 iWildCam 子集上展示了 RealPatch 的有效性，显示了最坏情况子组性能和二元分类中子组性能差距的改进。此外，我们使用包含 211 个类别的 imSitu 数据集进行了实验，在这种情况下，基于生成模型的修补（例如 CAMEL）是不切实际的。我们证明 RealPatch 可以成功消除数据集泄漏，同时减少模型泄漏并保持高实用性。 RealPatch 的代码可以在 https://github.com/wearepal/RealPatch 找到。 本文提出RealPatch框架，通过使用真实样本进行统计匹配，改进模型修补方法以提升子群体性能。 Sara Romiti,Christopher Inskip,Viktoriia Sharmanska,Novi Quadrianto cs.CV

title: A Study of Modeling Rising Intonation in Cantonese Neural Speech Synthesis
title_zh: 粤语神经语音合成中升调建模的研究
comment: Accepted by INTERSPEECH 2022
comments: Accepted by INTERSPEECH 2022
abstract: In human speech, the attitude of a speaker cannot be fully expressed only by the textual content. It has to come along with the intonation. Declarative questions are commonly used in daily Cantonese conversations, and they are usually uttered with rising intonation. Vanilla neural text-to-speech (TTS) systems are not capable of synthesizing rising intonation for these sentences due to the loss of semantic information. Though it has become more common to complement the systems with extra language models, their performance in modeling rising intonation is not well studied. In this paper, we propose to complement the Cantonese TTS model with a BERT-based statement/question classifier. We design different training strategies and compare their performance. We conduct our experiments on a Cantonese corpus named CanTTS. Empirical results show that the separate training approach obtains the best generalization performance and feasibility.
summary: In human speech, the attitude of a speaker cannot be fully expressed only by the textual content. It has to come along with the intonation. Declarative questions are commonly used in daily Cantonese conversations, and they are usually uttered with rising intonation. Vanilla neural text-to-speech (TTS) systems are not capable of synthesizing rising intonation for these sentences due to the loss of semantic information. Though it has become more common to complement the systems with extra language models, their performance in modeling rising intonation is not well studied. In this paper, we propose to complement the Cantonese TTS model with a BERT-based statement/question classifier. We design different training strategies and compare their performance. We conduct our experiments on a Cantonese corpus named CanTTS. Empirical results show that the separate training approach obtains the best generalization performance and feasibility.
abstract_zh: 在人类言语中，仅靠文本内容并不能完全表达说话者的态度。它必须与语调一起出现。陈述性疑问句常用于日常粤语对话中，且通常以升调的方式说出。由于语义信息的丢失，普通神经文本转语音 (TTS) 系统无法合成这些句子的升调。尽管用额外的语言模型来补充系统已经变得越来越普遍，但它们在建模升调方面的性能还没有得到很好的研究。在本文中，我们建议用基于 BERT 的陈述/问题分类器来补充粤语 TTS 模型。我们设计不同的训练策略并比较它们的表现。我们在名为 CanTTS 的粤语语料库上进行实验。实证结果表明，单独训练方法获得了最佳的泛化性能和可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过改进神经语音合成模型，更准确地在粤语中合成陈述句疑问句的升调。
AI.motivation: 传统神经文本到语音（TTS）系统无法有效合成粤语中陈述句疑问句的升调，导致语义信息丢失，影响表达自然性。
AI.method: 提出结合BERT模型的陈述/疑问句分类器，设计多种训练策略，并在CanTTS语料库中进行实验对比。
AI.result: 实验表明，独立训练策略在泛化性能和可行性方面表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入语义分类器并采用独立训练策略，可有效提升粤语TTS系统对升调的建模能力。

title: On the independence between phenomenal consciousness and computational intelligence
title_zh: 论现象意识与计算智能之间的独立性
abstract: Consciousness and intelligence are properties commonly understood as dependent by folk psychology and society in general. The term artificial intelligence and the kind of problems that it managed to solve in the recent years has been shown as an argument to establish that machines experience some sort of consciousness. Following the analogy of Russell, if a machine is able to do what a conscious human being does, the likelihood that the machine is conscious increases. However, the social implications of this analogy are catastrophic. Concretely, if rights are given to entities that can solve the kind of problems that a neurotypical person can, does the machine have potentially more rights that a person that has a disability? For example, the autistic syndrome disorder spectrum can make a person unable to solve the kind of problems that a machine solves. We believe that the obvious answer is no, as problem solving does not imply consciousness. Consequently, we will argue in this paper how phenomenal consciousness and, at least, computational intelligence are independent and why machines do not possess phenomenal consciousness, although they can potentially develop a higher computational intelligence that human beings. In order to do so, we try to formulate an objective measure of computational intelligence and study how it presents in human beings, animals and machines. Analogously, we study phenomenal consciousness as a dichotomous variable and how it is distributed in humans, animals and machines. As phenomenal consciousness and computational intelligence are independent, this fact has critical implications for society that we also analyze in this work.

The term artificial intelligence and the kind of problems that it managed to solve in the recent years has been shown as an argument to establish that machines experience some sort of consciousness. However, the social implications of this analogy are catastrophic. Concretely, if rights are given to entities that can solve the kind of problems that a neurotypical person can, does the machine have potentially more rights that a person that has a disability? For example, the autistic syndrome disorder spectrum can make a person unable to solve the kind of problems that a machine solves. We believe that the obvious answer is no, as problem solving does not imply consciousness. Consequently, we will argue in this paper how phenomenal consciousness and, at least, computational intelligence are independent and why machines do not possess phenomenal consciousness, although they can potentially develop a higher computational intelligence that human beings. In order to do so, we try to formulate an objective measure of computational intelligence and study how it presents in human beings, animals and machines. Analogously, we study phenomenal consciousness as a dichotomous variable and how it is distributed in humans, animals and machines. As phenomenal consciousness and computational intelligence are independent, this fact has critical implications for society that we also analyze in this work.
abstract_zh: 意识和智力通常被民间心理学和社会普遍理解为依赖属性。人工智能一词及其近年来设法解决的问题已被证明是机器具有某种意识的论据。按照罗素的类比，如果机器能够做有意识的人类所做的事情，那么机器具有意识的可能性就会增加。然而，这个类比的社会影响是灾难性的。具体来说，如果将权利赋予能够解决神经正常人可以解决的问题的实体，那么机器是否比残疾人拥有更多的潜在权利？例如，自闭症谱系障碍可以使人无法解决机器可以解决的问题。我们认为显而易见的答案是否定的，因为解决问题并不意味着有意识。因此，我们将在本文中讨论现象意识和至少计算智能如何是独立的，以及为什么机器不具备现象意识，尽管它们有可能发展出比人类更高的计算智能。为了做到这一点，我们试图制定计算智能的客观衡量标准，并研究它如何在人类、动物和机器中呈现。类似地，我们将现象意识作为二分变量来研究，以及它如何在人类、动物和机器中分布。由于现象意识和计算智能是独立的，这一事实对社会具有重要影响，我们也在这项工作中进行了分析。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨现象意识与计算智能的独立性，论证机器虽可能具备高计算智能但无现象意识。
AI.motivation: 社会普遍将意识与智能视为相关属性，但赋予机器权利可能引发伦理矛盾（如残疾人类与机器的对比），需明确二者关系。
AI.method: 构建计算智能的客观衡量标准，分析其在人类、动物及机器中的表现；将现象意识视为二元变量，研究其分布特征。
AI.result: 现象意识与计算智能相互独立，机器可拥有高计算智能却无现象意识。
AI.conclusion: 该结论对社会伦理、人工智能权利界定具有重要影响，需重新审视意识与智能的关系。

In order to do so, we try to formulate an objective measure of computational intelligence and study how it presents in human beings, animals and machines. As phenomenal consciousness and computational intelligence are independent, this fact has critical implications for society that we also analyze in this work. 意识和智力通常被民间心理学和社会普遍理解为依赖属性。人工智能一词及其近年来设法解决的问题已被证明是机器具有某种意识的论据。按照罗素的类比，如果机器能够做有意识的人类所做的事情，那么机器具有意识的可能性就会增加。然而，这个类比的社会影响是灾难性的。具体来说，如果将权利赋予能够解决神经正常人可以解决的问题的实体，那么机器是否比残疾人拥有更多的潜在权利？例如，自闭症谱系障碍可以使人无法解决机器可以解决的问题。我们认为显而易见的答案是否定的，因为解决问题并不意味着有意识。因此，我们将在本文中讨论现象意识和至少计算智能如何是独立的，以及为什么机器不具备现象意识，尽管它们有可能发展出比人类更高的计算智能。为了做到这一点，我们试图制定计算智能的客观衡量标准，并研究它如何在人类、动物和机器中呈现。类似地，我们将现象意识作为二分变量来研究，以及它如何在人类、动物和机器中分布。由于现象意识和计算智能是独立的，这一事实对社会具有重要影响，我们也在这项工作中进行了分析。 本文探讨现象意识与计算智能的独立性，论证机器虽可能具备高计算智能但无现象意识。 Eduardo C. Garrido Merchán,Sara Lumbreras cs.AI

authors_text: Robert J. Piechocki,Xiaoyang Wang,Mohammud J. Bocus
title: Multimodal sensor fusion in the latent representation space
title_zh: 潜在表示空间中的多模态传感器融合
comment: Under review for Nature Scientific Reports
comments: Under review for Nature Scientific Reports
abstract: A new method for multimodal sensor fusion is introduced. The technique relies on a two-stage process. In the first stage, a multimodal generative model is constructed from unlabelled training data. In the second stage, the generative model serves as a reconstruction prior and the search manifold for the sensor fusion tasks. The method also handles cases where observations are accessed only via subsampling i.e. compressed sensing. We demonstrate the effectiveness and excellent performance on a range of multimodal fusion experiments such as multisensory classification, denoising, and recovery from subsampled observations.
summary: A new method for multimodal sensor fusion is introduced. The technique relies on a two-stage process. In the first stage, a multimodal generative model is constructed from unlabelled training data. In the second stage, the generative model serves as a reconstruction prior and the search manifold for the sensor fusion tasks. The method also handles cases where observations are accessed only via subsampling i.e. compressed sensing. We demonstrate the effectiveness and excellent performance on a range of multimodal fusion experiments such as multisensory classification, denoising, and recovery from subsampled observations.
abstract_zh: 介绍了一种多模态传感器融合的新方法。该技术依赖于两阶段过程。在第一阶段，根据未标记的训练数据构建多模式生成模型。在第二阶段，生成模型充当传感器融合任务的重建先验和搜索流形。该方法还处理仅通过子采样（即压缩感知）访问观测值的情况。我们展示了一系列多模态融合实验的有效性和出色的性能，例如多感官分类、去噪和从子采样观察中恢复。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于潜在表示空间的多模态传感器融合方法，适用于压缩感知场景。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理未标记数据和压缩感知场景下的多模态融合存在局限，需更高效的方法。
AI.method: 采用两阶段方法：首先构建未标记数据的多模态生成模型；其次利用该模型作为重建先验和搜索流形进行传感器融合，支持压缩感知。
AI.result: 在多感官分类、去噪及子采样恢复任务中表现出色，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过潜在空间建模有效提升多模态融合性能，尤其适用于压缩感知场景。

title: Machine learning optimization of Majorana hybrid nanowires
title_zh: 马约拉纳混合纳米线的机器学习优化
comment: 13 pages, 13 figures; added references
comments: 13 pages, 13 figures; added references
abstract: As the complexity of quantum systems such as quantum bit arrays increases, efforts to automate expensive tuning are increasingly worthwhile. We investigate machine learning based tuning of gate arrays using the CMA-ES algorithm for the case study of Majorana wires with strong disorder. We find that the algorithm is able to efficiently improve the topological signatures, learn intrinsic disorder profiles, and completely eliminate disorder effects. For example, with only 20 gates, it is possible to fully recover Majorana zero modes destroyed by disorder by optimizing gate voltages.
summary: As the complexity of quantum systems such as quantum bit arrays increases, efforts to automate expensive tuning are increasingly worthwhile. We investigate machine learning based tuning of gate arrays using the CMA-ES algorithm for the case study of Majorana wires with strong disorder. We find that the algorithm is able to efficiently improve the topological signatures, learn intrinsic disorder profiles, and completely eliminate disorder effects. For example, with only 20 gates, it is possible to fully recover Majorana zero modes destroyed by disorder by optimizing gate voltages.
abstract_zh: 随着量子位阵列等量子系统的复杂性增加，自动化昂贵的调谐的努力变得越来越值得。我们使用 CMA-ES 算法研究基于机器学习的门阵列调整，以进行具有强无序性的马约拉纳线的案例研究。我们发现该算法能够有效地改善拓扑特征，学习内在的无序分布，并完全消除无序效应。例如，仅用20个栅极，通过优化栅极电压就可以完全恢复被无序破坏的马约拉纳零模式。

AI.tldr: 本文利用机器学习优化马约拉纳混合纳米线的栅极电压，以克服无序效应并恢复拓扑特性。
AI.motivation: 随着量子系统复杂度提升，手动调谐成本高昂，亟需自动化方法优化参数以提升拓扑量子计算的可行性。
AI.method: 采用基于CMA-ES算法的机器学习方法，对具有强无序的马约拉纳纳米线的栅极阵列进行自动调谐优化。
AI.result: 算法有效提升了拓扑特征，学习了无序分布，完全消除无序影响，仅需20个栅极即可恢复被破坏的马约拉纳零模。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习为量子系统参数优化提供有效方案，为拓扑量子计算中的无序问题解决开辟新路径。

title: KD-SCFNet: Towards More Accurate and Efficient Salient Object Detection via Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: KD-SCFNet：通过知识蒸馏实现更准确、更高效的显着目标检测
comment: There are some important mistakes in the article that need to be modified
comments: There are some important mistakes in the article that need to be modified
abstract: Most existing salient object detection (SOD) models are difficult to apply due to the complex and huge model structures. Although some lightweight models are proposed, the accuracy is barely satisfactory. In this paper, we design a novel semantics-guided contextual fusion network (SCFNet) that focuses on the interactive fusion of multi-level features for accurate and efficient salient object detection. Furthermore, we apply knowledge distillation to SOD task and provide a sizeable dataset KD-SOD80K. In detail, we transfer the rich knowledge from a seasoned teacher to the untrained SCFNet through unlabeled images, enabling SCFNet to learn a strong generalization ability to detect salient objects more accurately. The knowledge distillation based SCFNet (KDSCFNet) achieves comparable accuracy to the state-of-the-art heavyweight methods with less than 1M parameters and 174 FPS real-time detection speed. Extensive experiments demonstrate the robustness and effectiveness of the proposed distillation method and SOD framework. Code and data: https://github.com/zhangjinCV/KD-SCFNet.
summary: Most existing salient object detection (SOD) models are difficult to apply due to the complex and huge model structures. Although some lightweight models are proposed, the accuracy is barely satisfactory. In this paper, we design a novel semantics-guided contextual fusion network (SCFNet) that focuses on the interactive fusion of multi-level features for accurate and efficient salient object detection. Furthermore, we apply knowledge distillation to SOD task and provide a sizeable dataset KD-SOD80K. In detail, we transfer the rich knowledge from a seasoned teacher to the untrained SCFNet through unlabeled images, enabling SCFNet to learn a strong generalization ability to detect salient objects more accurately. The knowledge distillation based SCFNet (KDSCFNet) achieves comparable accuracy to the state-of-the-art heavyweight methods with less than 1M parameters and 174 FPS real-time detection speed. Extensive experiments demonstrate the robustness and effectiveness of the proposed distillation method and SOD framework. Code and data: https://github.com/zhangjinCV/KD-SCFNet.
abstract_zh: 大多数现有的显着目标检测（SOD）模型由于模型结构复杂且庞大而难以应用。尽管提出了一些轻量级模型，但精度却差强人意。在本文中，我们设计了一种新颖的语义引导上下文融合网络（SCFNet），专注于多级特征的交互式融合，以实现准确高效的显着目标检测。此外，我们将知识蒸馏应用于 SOD 任务并提供了相当大的数据集 KD-SOD80K。具体来说，我们通过未标记的图像将经验丰富的教师的丰富知识转移到未经训练的 SCFNet，使 SCFNet 能够学习强大的泛化能力，以更准确地检测显着对象。基于知识蒸馏的 SCFNet（KDSCFNet）以少于 1M 的参数和 174 FPS 的实时检测速度实现了与最先进的重量级方法相当的精度。大量实验证明了所提出的蒸馏方法和 SOD 框架的稳健性和有效性。代码和数据：https://github.com/zhangjinCV/KD-SCFNet。

AI.tldr: 本文提出KD-SCFNet，通过知识蒸馏实现更精确高效的显著性目标检测。
AI.motivation: 现有显著性目标检测模型结构复杂且精度不足，轻量模型难以兼顾效率与准确性。
AI.method: 设计语义引导的上下文融合网络（SCFNet）并结合知识蒸馏，利用未标记图像从教师模型迁移知识，构建KD-SOD80K数据集。
AI.result: KD-SCFNet在参数量低于1M时达到与重型方法相当的精度，实时检测速度达174 FPS，实验验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 知识蒸馏与多级特征融合框架有效平衡了显著性检测的精度与效率。

search_text: KD-SCFNet: Towards More Accurate and Efficient Salient Object Detection via Knowledge Distillation KD-SCFNet：通过知识蒸馏实现更准确、更高效的显着目标检测 Most existing salient object detection (SOD) models are difficult to apply due to the complex and huge model structures. Although some lightweight models are proposed, the accuracy is barely satisfactory. In this paper, we design a novel semantics-guided contextual fusion network (SCFNet) that focuses on the interactive fusion of multi-level features for accurate and efficient salient object detection. Furthermore, we apply knowledge distillation to SOD task and provide a sizeable dataset KD-SOD80K. In detail, we transfer the rich knowledge from a seasoned teacher to the untrained SCFNet through unlabeled images, enabling SCFNet to learn a strong generalization ability to detect salient objects more accurately. The knowledge distillation based SCFNet (KDSCFNet) achieves comparable accuracy to the state-of-the-art heavyweight methods with less than 1M parameters and 174 FPS real-time detection speed. Extensive experiments demonstrate the robustness and effectiveness of the proposed distillation method and SOD framework. Code and data: https://github.com/zhangjinCV/KD-SCFNet. 大多数现有的显着目标检测（SOD）模型由于模型结构复杂且庞大而难以应用。尽管提出了一些轻量级模型，但精度却差强人意。在本文中，我们设计了一种新颖的语义引导上下文融合网络（SCFNet），专注于多级特征的交互式融合，以实现准确高效的显着目标检测。此外，我们将知识蒸馏应用于 SOD 任务并提供了相当大的数据集 KD-SOD80K。具体来说，我们通过未标记的图像将经验丰富的教师的丰富知识转移到未经训练的 SCFNet，使 SCFNet 能够学习强大的泛化能力，以更准确地检测显着对象。基于知识蒸馏的 SCFNet（KDSCFNet）以少于 1M 的参数和 174 FPS 的实时检测速度实现了与最先进的重量级方法相当的精度。大量实验证明了所提出的蒸馏方法和 SOD 框架的稳健性和有效性。代码和数据：https://github.com/zhangjinCV/KD-SCFNet。 本文提出KD-SCFNet，通过知识蒸馏实现更精确高效的显著性目标检测。 Jin Zhang,Qiuwei Liang,Yanjiao Shi cs.CV

title: FauxThrow: Exploring the Effects of Incorrect Point of Release in Throwing Motions
title_zh: FauxThrow：探索投掷动作中不正确释放点的影响
comment: 4 pages, 2 figures To appear in the ACM Symposium on Applied Perception (SAP'22), September 22-23, 2022, Virtual Event, USA This version includes a minor change to Table 1 (effect size)
comments: 4 pages, 2 figures To appear in the ACM Symposium on Applied Perception (SAP'22), September 22-23, 2022, Virtual Event, USA This version includes a minor change to Table 1 (effect size)
abstract: Our aim is to develop a better understanding of how the Point of Release (PoR) of a ball affects the perception of animated throwing motions. We present the results of a perceptual study where participants viewed animations of a virtual human throwing a ball, in which the point of release was modified to be early or late. We found that errors in overarm throws with a late PoR are detected more easily than an early PoR, while the opposite is true for underarm throws. The viewpoint and the distance the ball travels also have an effect on perceived realism. The results of this research can help improve the plausibility of throwing animations in interactive applications such as games or VR.
summary: Our aim is to develop a better understanding of how the Point of Release (PoR) of a ball affects the perception of animated throwing motions. We present the results of a perceptual study where participants viewed animations of a virtual human throwing a ball, in which the point of release was modified to be early or late. We found that errors in overarm throws with a late PoR are detected more easily than an early PoR, while the opposite is true for underarm throws. The viewpoint and the distance the ball travels also have an effect on perceived realism. The results of this research can help improve the plausibility of throwing animations in interactive applications such as games or VR.
abstract_zh: 我们的目标是更好地理解球的释放点 (PoR) 如何影响动画投掷动作的感知。我们展示了一项感知研究的结果，参与者观看了虚拟人扔球的动画，其中释放点被修改为提前或推迟。我们发现，较晚 PoR 的过臂投掷错误比早期 PoR 更容易被发现，而腋下投掷则相反。球的视点和距离也会影响感知的真实感。这项研究的结果有助于提高游戏或 VR 等交互式应用中投掷动画的可信度。

AI.tldr: 研究投掷动作中释放点错误对动画真实感的影响
AI.motivation: 提升虚拟环境中投掷动画的真实感和可信度
AI.method: 通过感知实验，让参与者观看不同释放点的投掷动画并评估其真实感
AI.result: 发现过臂投掷延迟释放点更易被察觉，而下臂投掷提前释放点更易被察觉，视角和飞行距离也影响真实感
AI.conclusion: 研究结果可指导优化游戏和VR中投掷动画的设计，提升视觉真实感

title: CCTV-Exposure: An open-source system for measuring user's privacy exposure to mapped CCTV cameras based on geo-location (Extended Version)
title_zh: CCTV-Exposure：一种开源系统，用于根据地理位置测量用户对映射闭路电视摄像机的隐私暴露（扩展版本）
abstract: In this work, we present CCTV-Exposure -- the first CCTV-aware solution to evaluate potential privacy exposure to closed-circuit television (CCTV) cameras. The objective was to develop a toolset for quantifying human exposure to CCTV cameras from a privacy perspective. Our novel approach is trajectory analysis of the individuals, coupled with a database of geo-location mapped CCTV cameras annotated with minimal yet sufficient meta-information. For this purpose, CCTV-Exposure model based on a Global Positioning System (GPS) tracking was applied to estimate individual privacy exposure in different scenarios. The current investigation provides an application example and validation of the modeling approach. The methodology and toolset developed and implemented in this work provide time-sequence and location-sequence of the exposure events, thus making possible association of the exposure with the individual activities and cameras, and delivers main statistics on individual's exposure to CCTV cameras with high spatio-temporal resolution.
summary: In this work, we present CCTV-Exposure -- the first CCTV-aware solution to evaluate potential privacy exposure to closed-circuit television (CCTV) cameras. The objective was to develop a toolset for quantifying human exposure to CCTV cameras from a privacy perspective. Our novel approach is trajectory analysis of the individuals, coupled with a database of geo-location mapped CCTV cameras annotated with minimal yet sufficient meta-information. For this purpose, CCTV-Exposure model based on a Global Positioning System (GPS) tracking was applied to estimate individual privacy exposure in different scenarios. The current investigation provides an application example and validation of the modeling approach. The methodology and toolset developed and implemented in this work provide time-sequence and location-sequence of the exposure events, thus making possible association of the exposure with the individual activities and cameras, and delivers main statistics on individual's exposure to CCTV cameras with high spatio-temporal resolution.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了 CCTV-Exposure——第一个闭路电视感知解决方案，用于评估闭路电视 (CCTV) 摄像机的潜在隐私暴露。目标是开发一套工具集，从隐私角度量化人类接触闭路电视摄像机的情况。我们的新颖方法是对个体进行轨迹分析，并结合地理位置映射的闭路电视摄像机数据库，并用最少但足够的元信息进行注释。为此，应用基于全球定位系统（GPS）跟踪的闭路电视暴露模型来估计不同场景下的个人隐私暴露。当前的研究提供了建模方法的应用示例和验证。这项工作中开发和实施的方法和工具集提供了暴露事件的时间序列和位置序列，从而使暴露与个人活动和摄像机的关联成为可能，并以高时空分辨率提供了个人暴露于闭路电视摄像机的主要统计数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CCTV-Exposure系统，通过地理定位技术量化用户隐私暴露于监控摄像头的程度。
AI.motivation: 随着CCTV摄像头的普及，用户隐私暴露风险增加，但缺乏有效工具评估个体隐私暴露程度。
AI.method: 结合GPS轨迹分析与地理标记的CCTV摄像头数据库，通过时空序列分析计算个体暴露事件。
AI.result: 开发了可关联个体活动与摄像头的暴露统计工具，提供高时空分辨率的隐私暴露数据验证。
AI.conclusion: 该开源系统为隐私风险评估提供了可扩展的方法论，有助于提升公众对CCTV监控风险的认知。

title: Empirical Study of Overfitting in Deep FNN Prediction Models for Breast Cancer Metastasis
title_zh: 乳腺癌转移深度 FNN 预测模型过拟合的实证研究
abstract: Overfitting is defined as the fact that the current model fits a specific data set perfectly, resulting in weakened generalization, and ultimately may affect the accuracy in predicting future data. In this research we used an EHR dataset concerning breast cancer metastasis to study overfitting of deep feedforward Neural Networks (FNNs) prediction models. We included 11 hyperparameters of the deep FNNs models and took an empirical approach to study how each of these hyperparameters was affecting both the prediction performance and overfitting when given a large range of values. We also studied how some of the interesting pairs of hyperparameters were interacting to influence the model performance and overfitting. The 11 hyperparameters we studied include activate function; weight initializer, number of hidden layers, learning rate, momentum, decay, dropout rate, batch size, epochs, L1, and L2. Our results show that most of the single hyperparameters are either negatively or positively corrected with model prediction performance and overfitting. In particular, we found that overfitting overall tends to negatively correlate with learning rate, decay, batch sides, and L2, but tends to positively correlate with momentum, epochs, and L1. According to our results, learning rate, decay, and batch size may have a more significant impact on both overfitting and prediction performance than most of the other hyperparameters, including L1, L2, and dropout rate, which were designed for minimizing overfitting. We also find some interesting interacting pairs of hyperparameters such as learning rate and momentum, learning rate and decay, and batch size and epochs. Keywords: Deep learning, overfitting, prediction, grid search, feedforward neural networks, breast cancer metastasis.
summary: Overfitting is defined as the fact that the current model fits a specific data set perfectly, resulting in weakened generalization, and ultimately may affect the accuracy in predicting future data. In this research we used an EHR dataset concerning breast cancer metastasis to study overfitting of deep feedforward Neural Networks (FNNs) prediction models. We included 11 hyperparameters of the deep FNNs models and took an empirical approach to study how each of these hyperparameters was affecting both the prediction performance and overfitting when given a large range of values. We also studied how some of the interesting pairs of hyperparameters were interacting to influence the model performance and overfitting. The 11 hyperparameters we studied include activate function; weight initializer, number of hidden layers, learning rate, momentum, decay, dropout rate, batch size, epochs, L1, and L2. Our results show that most of the single hyperparameters are either negatively or positively corrected with model prediction performance and overfitting. In particular, we found that overfitting overall tends to negatively correlate with learning rate, decay, batch sides, and L2, but tends to positively correlate with momentum, epochs, and L1. According to our results, learning rate, decay, and batch size may have a more significant impact on both overfitting and prediction performance than most of the other hyperparameters, including L1, L2, and dropout rate, which were designed for minimizing overfitting. We also find some interesting interacting pairs of hyperparameters such as learning rate and momentum, learning rate and decay, and batch size and epochs. Keywords: Deep learning, overfitting, prediction, grid search, feedforward neural networks, breast cancer metastasis.
abstract_zh: 过拟合被定义为当前模型完美拟合特定数据集，导致泛化能力减弱，最终可能影响预测未来数据的准确性。在这项研究中，我们使用有关乳腺癌转移的 EHR 数据集来研究深度前馈神经网络 (FNN) 预测模型的过度拟合。我们纳入了深度 FNN 模型的 11 个超参数，并采用实证方法来研究每个超参数在给定大范围值时如何影响预测性能和过度拟合。我们还研究了一些有趣的超参数对如何相互作用来影响模型性能和过度拟合。我们研究的11个超参数包括activate函数；权重初始值设定项、隐藏层数、学习率、动量、衰减、丢失率、批量大小、历元、L1 和 L2。我们的结果表明，大多数单个超参数都通过模型预测性能和过度拟合进行负校正或正校正。特别是，我们发现整体过度拟合往往与学习率、衰减、批次边和 L2 负相关，但往往与动量、时期和 L1 正相关。根据我们的结果，学习率、衰减和批量大小可能比大多数其他超参数（包括 L1、L2 和 dropout 率）对过拟合和预测性能产生更显着的影响，这些超参数是为最小化过拟合而设计的。我们还发现了一些有趣的相互作用的超参数对，例如学习率和动量、学习率和衰减以及批量大小和时期。关键词：深度学习、过度拟合、预测、网格搜索、前馈神经网络、乳腺癌转移。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过实证研究分析深度前馈神经网络（FNN）在乳腺癌转移预测模型中的过拟合问题，探讨11个超参数对模型性能和过拟合的影响。
AI.motivation: 过拟合会削弱模型的泛化能力，影响预测准确性。研究旨在明确不同超参数对过拟合及预测性能的影响，为优化模型提供依据。
AI.method: 基于电子健康记录（EHR）数据集，采用网格搜索法对11个超参数（如激活函数、学习率、批量大小等）进行广泛取值实验，分析其单独及交互作用对模型的影响。
AI.result: 结果显示，学习率、衰减率、批量大小和L2正则化与过拟合呈负相关，而动量、训练轮数和L1正则化呈正相关。部分超参数对（如学习率与动量）存在显著交互作用。
AI.conclusion: 学习率、衰减率和批量大小对过拟合及预测性能影响显著，传统抗过拟合参数（如L1/L2）效果有限，需综合考虑超参数交互作用以优化模型。

ai_content.tldr: 该论文通过实证研究分析深度前馈神经网络（FNN）在乳腺癌转移预测模型中的过拟合问题，探讨11个超参数对模型性能和过拟合的影响。
ai_content.motivation: 过拟合会削弱模型的泛化能力，影响预测准确性。研究旨在明确不同超参数对过拟合及预测性能的影响，为优化模型提供依据。

ai_content.result: 结果显示，学习率、衰减率、批量大小和L2正则化与过拟合呈负相关，而动量、训练轮数和L1正则化呈正相关。部分超参数对（如学习率与动量）存在显著交互作用。

search_text: Empirical Study of Overfitting in Deep FNN Prediction Models for Breast Cancer Metastasis 乳腺癌转移深度 FNN 预测模型过拟合的实证研究 Overfitting is defined as the fact that the current model fits a specific data set perfectly, resulting in weakened generalization, and ultimately may affect the accuracy in predicting future data. In this research we used an EHR dataset concerning breast cancer metastasis to study overfitting of deep feedforward Neural Networks (FNNs) prediction models. We included 11 hyperparameters of the deep FNNs models and took an empirical approach to study how each of these hyperparameters was affecting both the prediction performance and overfitting when given a large range of values. We also studied how some of the interesting pairs of hyperparameters were interacting to influence the model performance and overfitting. The 11 hyperparameters we studied include activate function; weight initializer, number of hidden layers, learning rate, momentum, decay, dropout rate, batch size, epochs, L1, and L2. Our results show that most of the single hyperparameters are either negatively or positively corrected with model prediction performance and overfitting. In particular, we found that overfitting overall tends to negatively correlate with learning rate, decay, batch sides, and L2, but tends to positively correlate with momentum, epochs, and L1. According to our results, learning rate, decay, and batch size may have a more significant impact on both overfitting and prediction performance than most of the other hyperparameters, including L1, L2, and dropout rate, which were designed for minimizing overfitting. We also find some interesting interacting pairs of hyperparameters such as learning rate and momentum, learning rate and decay, and batch size and epochs. Keywords: Deep learning, overfitting, prediction, grid search, feedforward neural networks, breast cancer metastasis. 过拟合被定义为当前模型完美拟合特定数据集，导致泛化能力减弱，最终可能影响预测未来数据的准确性。在这项研究中，我们使用有关乳腺癌转移的 EHR 数据集来研究深度前馈神经网络 (FNN) 预测模型的过度拟合。我们纳入了深度 FNN 模型的 11 个超参数，并采用实证方法来研究每个超参数在给定大范围值时如何影响预测性能和过度拟合。我们还研究了一些有趣的超参数对如何相互作用来影响模型性能和过度拟合。我们研究的11个超参数包括activate函数；权重初始值设定项、隐藏层数、学习率、动量、衰减、丢失率、批量大小、历元、L1 和 L2。我们的结果表明，大多数单个超参数都通过模型预测性能和过度拟合进行负校正或正校正。特别是，我们发现整体过度拟合往往与学习率、衰减、批次边和 L2 负相关，但往往与动量、时期和 L1 正相关。根据我们的结果，学习率、衰减和批量大小可能比大多数其他超参数（包括 L1、L2 和 dropout 率）对过拟合和预测性能产生更显着的影响，这些超参数是为最小化过拟合而设计的。我们还发现了一些有趣的相互作用的超参数对，例如学习率和动量、学习率和衰减以及批量大小和时期。关键词：深度学习、过度拟合、预测、网格搜索、前馈神经网络、乳腺癌转移。 该论文通过实证研究分析深度前馈神经网络（FNN）在乳腺癌转移预测模型中的过拟合问题，探讨11个超参数对模型性能和过拟合的影响。 Chuhan Xu,Pablo Coen-Pirani,Xia Jiang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Benyuan Sun,Jin Dai,Zihao Liang,Congying Liu,Yi Yang,Bo Bai
title: GPPF: A General Perception Pre-training Framework via Sparsely Activated Multi-Task Learning
title_zh: GPPF：通过稀疏激活多任务学习的通用感知预训练框架
comment: 22 pages
comments: 22 pages
abstract: Pre-training over mixtured multi-task, multi-domain, and multi-modal data remains an open challenge in vision perception pre-training. In this paper, we propose GPPF, a General Perception Pre-training Framework, that pre-trains a task-level dynamic network, which is composed by knowledge "legos" in each layers, on labeled multi-task and multi-domain datasets. By inspecting humans' innate ability to learn in complex environment, we recognize and transfer three critical elements to deep networks: (1) simultaneous exposure to diverse cross-task and cross-domain information in each batch. (2) partitioned knowledge storage in separate lego units driven by knowledge sharing. (3) sparse activation of a subset of lego units for both pre-training and downstream tasks. Noteworthy, the joint training of disparate vision tasks is non-trivial due to their differences in input shapes, loss functions, output formats, data distributions, etc. Therefore, we innovatively develop a plug-and-play multi-task training algorithm, which supports Single Iteration Multiple Tasks (SIMT) concurrently training. SIMT lays the foundation of pre-training with large-scale multi-task multi-domain datasets and is proved essential for stable training in our GPPF experiments. Excitingly, the exhaustive experiments show that, our GPPF-R50 model achieves significant improvements of 2.5-5.8 over a strong baseline of the 8 pre-training tasks in GPPF-15M and harvests a range of SOTAs over the 22 downstream tasks with similar computation budgets. We also validate the generalization ability of GPPF to SOTA vision transformers with consistent improvements. These solid experimental results fully prove the effective knowledge learning, storing, sharing, and transfer provided by our novel GPPF framework.
summary: Pre-training over mixtured multi-task, multi-domain, and multi-modal data remains an open challenge in vision perception pre-training. In this paper, we propose GPPF, a General Perception Pre-training Framework, that pre-trains a task-level dynamic network, which is composed by knowledge "legos" in each layers, on labeled multi-task and multi-domain datasets. By inspecting humans' innate ability to learn in complex environment, we recognize and transfer three critical elements to deep networks: (1) simultaneous exposure to diverse cross-task and cross-domain information in each batch. (2) partitioned knowledge storage in separate lego units driven by knowledge sharing. (3) sparse activation of a subset of lego units for both pre-training and downstream tasks. Noteworthy, the joint training of disparate vision tasks is non-trivial due to their differences in input shapes, loss functions, output formats, data distributions, etc. Therefore, we innovatively develop a plug-and-play multi-task training algorithm, which supports Single Iteration Multiple Tasks (SIMT) concurrently training. SIMT lays the foundation of pre-training with large-scale multi-task multi-domain datasets and is proved essential for stable training in our GPPF experiments. Excitingly, the exhaustive experiments show that, our GPPF-R50 model achieves significant improvements of 2.5-5.8 over a strong baseline of the 8 pre-training tasks in GPPF-15M and harvests a range of SOTAs over the 22 downstream tasks with similar computation budgets. We also validate the generalization ability of GPPF to SOTA vision transformers with consistent improvements. These solid experimental results fully prove the effective knowledge learning, storing, sharing, and transfer provided by our novel GPPF framework.
abstract_zh: 混合多任务、多域和多模态数据的预训练仍然是视觉感知预训练中的一个开放挑战。在本文中，我们提出了 GPPF，一种通用感知预训练框架，它在标记的多任务和多领域数据集上预训练任务级动态网络，该网络由每层知识“乐高积木”组成。通过检查人类在复杂环境中学习的先天能力，我们识别并将三个关键要素转移到深度网络中：（1）在每个批次中同时暴露于不同的跨任务和跨域信息。 (2)由知识共享驱动的将知识存储在单独的乐高单元中。 (3) 对预训练和下游任务的乐高单元子集进行稀疏激活。值得注意的是，由于不同视觉任务在输入形状、损失函数、输出格式、数据分布等方面的差异，不同视觉任务的联合训练并非易事。因此，我们创新性地开发了一种即插即用的多任务训练算法，支持单迭代多任务（SIMT）并发训练。 SIMT为大规模多任务多领域数据集的预训练奠定了基础，并在我们的GPPF实验中被证明对于稳定训练至关重要。令人兴奋的是，详尽的实验表明，我们的 GPPF-R50 模型比 GPPF-15M 中 8 个预训练任务的强大基线实现了 2.5-5.8 的显着改进，并在具有相似计算预算的 22 个下游任务中收获了一系列 SOTA。我们还通过持续改进验证了 GPPF 对 SOTA 视觉转换器的泛化能力。这些扎实的实验结果充分证明了我们新颖的 GPPF 框架提供的有效的知识学习、存储、共享和传输。

AI.tldr: 提出一种通用感知预训练框架GPPF，通过稀疏激活的多任务学习处理多任务、多领域和多模态数据。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉感知预训练在处理混合多任务、多领域和多模态数据时面临挑战，需模仿人类在复杂环境中的学习能力，实现跨任务知识共享与稀疏激活。
AI.method: 构建由分层知识模块（lego units）组成的动态网络，结合单次迭代多任务（SIMT）算法，实现跨任务、跨领域的稀疏激活与知识共享。
AI.result: GPPF-R50模型在15M数据集上较基线提升2.5-5.8%，在22个下游任务中达到SOTA，且适用于主流视觉Transformer模型。
AI.conclusion: GPPF通过动态网络结构和SIMT算法有效实现了知识学习、存储、共享与迁移，为大规模多任务预训练提供了新范式。

search_text: GPPF: A General Perception Pre-training Framework via Sparsely Activated Multi-Task Learning GPPF：通过稀疏激活多任务学习的通用感知预训练框架 Pre-training over mixtured multi-task, multi-domain, and multi-modal data remains an open challenge in vision perception pre-training. In this paper, we propose GPPF, a General Perception Pre-training Framework, that pre-trains a task-level dynamic network, which is composed by knowledge "legos" in each layers, on labeled multi-task and multi-domain datasets. (2) partitioned knowledge storage in separate lego units driven by knowledge sharing. (3) sparse activation of a subset of lego units for both pre-training and downstream tasks. We also validate the generalization ability of GPPF to SOTA vision transformers with consistent improvements. authors_text: Lars Hillebrand,Tobias Deußer,Tim Dilmaghani,Bernd Kliem,Rüdiger Loitz,Christian Bauckhage,Rafet Sifa
title: KPI-BERT: A Joint Named Entity Recognition and Relation Extraction Model for Financial Reports
title_zh: KPI-BERT：财务报告联合命名实体识别与关系提取模型
comment: Accepted at ICPR 2022, 8 pages, 1 figure, 6 tables
comments: Accepted at ICPR 2022, 8 pages, 1 figure, 6 tables
abstract: We present KPI-BERT, a system which employs novel methods of named entity recognition (NER) and relation extraction (RE) to extract and link key performance indicators (KPIs), e.g. "revenue" or "interest expenses", of companies from real-world German financial documents. Specifically, we introduce an end-to-end trainable architecture that is based on Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers (BERT) combining a recurrent neural network (RNN) with conditional label masking to sequentially tag entities before it classifies their relations. Our model also introduces a learnable RNN-based pooling mechanism and incorporates domain expert knowledge by explicitly filtering impossible relations. We achieve a substantially higher prediction performance on a new practical dataset of German financial reports, outperforming several strong baselines including a competing state-of-the-art span-based entity tagging approach.
summary: We present KPI-BERT, a system which employs novel methods of named entity recognition (NER) and relation extraction (RE) to extract and link key performance indicators (KPIs), e.g. "revenue" or "interest expenses", of companies from real-world German financial documents. Specifically, we introduce an end-to-end trainable architecture that is based on Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers (BERT) combining a recurrent neural network (RNN) with conditional label masking to sequentially tag entities before it classifies their relations. Our model also introduces a learnable RNN-based pooling mechanism and incorporates domain expert knowledge by explicitly filtering impossible relations. We achieve a substantially higher prediction performance on a new practical dataset of German financial reports, outperforming several strong baselines including a competing state-of-the-art span-based entity tagging approach.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 KPI-BERT，这是一个采用命名实体识别 (NER) 和关系提取 (RE) 的新颖方法来提取和链接关键绩效指标 (KPI) 的系统，例如来自现实世界德国财务文件的公司的“收入”或“利息支出”。具体来说，我们引入了一种端到端的可训练架构，该架构基于 Transformers 的双向编码器表示 (BERT)，将循环神经网络 (RNN) 与条件标签掩码相结合，在对实体的关系进行分类之前按顺序标记实体。我们的模型还引入了可学习的基于 RNN 的池机制，并通过显式过滤不可能的关系来合并领域专家知识。我们在德国财务报告的新实用数据集上实现了显着更高的预测性能，优于几个强大的基线，包括竞争的最先进的基于跨度的实体标记方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出KPI-BERT模型，通过结合命名实体识别和关系抽取技术，从德语财务报告中提取并关联企业关键绩效指标（如收入、利息支出等）。
AI.motivation: 财务报告中的关键绩效指标（KPI）提取和关系建模对商业分析至关重要，但现有方法在处理复杂财务文本时存在准确率不足的问题，需结合领域知识与深度学习技术提升效果。
AI.method: 基于BERT架构，融合循环神经网络（RNN）与条件标签掩码机制，分步完成实体标注与关系分类；引入可学习的RNN池化机制，并通过领域专家知识过滤不可能关系以增强模型表现。
AI.result: 在德语财务报告数据集上显著优于多个基线模型，包括最先进的基于跨度的实体标注方法，验证了模型有效性。
AI.conclusion: KPI-BERT通过结合预训练语言模型、序列标注优化与领域约束，为财务文本中的KPI提取与关系建模提供了高效解决方案。

search_text: KPI-BERT: A Joint Named Entity Recognition and Relation Extraction Model for Financial Reports KPI-BERT：财务报告联合命名实体识别与关系提取模型 We present KPI-BERT, a system which employs novel methods of named entity recognition (NER) and relation extraction (RE) to extract and link key performance indicators (KPIs), e.g. "revenue" or "interest expenses", of companies from real-world German financial documents. Specifically, we introduce an end-to-end trainable architecture that is based on Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers (BERT) combining a recurrent neural network (RNN) with conditional label masking to sequentially tag entities before it classifies their relations. Our model also introduces a learnable RNN-based pooling mechanism and incorporates domain expert knowledge by explicitly filtering impossible relations. We achieve a substantially higher prediction performance on a new practical dataset of German financial reports, outperforming several strong baselines including a competing state-of-the-art span-based entity tagging approach. 我们提出了 KPI-BERT，这是一个采用命名实体识别 (NER) 和关系提取 (RE) 的新颖方法来提取和链接关键绩效指标 (KPI) 的系统，例如来自现实世界德国财务文件的公司的“收入”或“利息支出”。具体来说，我们引入了一种端到端的可训练架构，该架构基于 Transformers 的双向编码器表示 (BERT)，将循环神经网络 (RNN) 与条件标签掩码相结合，在对实体的关系进行分类之前按顺序标记实体。我们的模型还引入了可学习的基于 RNN 的池机制，并通过显式过滤不可能的关系来合并领域专家知识。我们在德国财务报告的新实用数据集上实现了显着更高的预测性能，优于几个强大的基线，包括竞争的最先进的基于跨度的实体标记方法。 本文提出KPI-BERT模型，通过结合命名实体识别和关系抽取技术，从德语财务报告中提取并关联企业关键绩效指标（如收入、利息支出等）。 Lars Hillebrand,Tobias Deußer,Tim Dilmaghani,Bernd Kliem,Rüdiger Loitz,Christian Bauckhage,Rafet Sifa cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Berke Doga Basaran,Mengyun Qiao,Paul M. Matthews,Wenjia Bai
title: Subject-Specific Lesion Generation and Pseudo-Healthy Synthesis for Multiple Sclerosis Brain Images
title_zh: 多发性硬化症脑图像的特定主题病变生成和伪健康合成
comment: 13 pages, 6 figures, 2022 MICCAI SASHIMI (Simulation and Synthesis in Medical Imaging) Workshop paper
comments: 13 pages, 6 figures, 2022 MICCAI SASHIMI (Simulation and Synthesis in Medical Imaging) Workshop paper
abstract: Understanding the intensity characteristics of brain lesions is key for defining image-based biomarkers in neurological studies and for predicting disease burden and outcome. In this work, we present a novel foreground-based generative method for modelling the local lesion characteristics that can both generate synthetic lesions on healthy images and synthesize subject-specific pseudo-healthy images from pathological images. Furthermore, the proposed method can be used as a data augmentation module to generate synthetic images for training brain image segmentation networks. Experiments on multiple sclerosis (MS) brain images acquired on magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) demonstrate that the proposed method can generate highly realistic pseudo-healthy and pseudo-pathological brain images. Data augmentation using the synthetic images improves the brain image segmentation performance compared to traditional data augmentation methods as well as a recent lesion-aware data augmentation technique, CarveMix. The code will be released at https://github.com/dogabasaran/lesion-synthesis.
summary: Understanding the intensity characteristics of brain lesions is key for defining image-based biomarkers in neurological studies and for predicting disease burden and outcome. In this work, we present a novel foreground-based generative method for modelling the local lesion characteristics that can both generate synthetic lesions on healthy images and synthesize subject-specific pseudo-healthy images from pathological images. Furthermore, the proposed method can be used as a data augmentation module to generate synthetic images for training brain image segmentation networks. Experiments on multiple sclerosis (MS) brain images acquired on magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) demonstrate that the proposed method can generate highly realistic pseudo-healthy and pseudo-pathological brain images. Data augmentation using the synthetic images improves the brain image segmentation performance compared to traditional data augmentation methods as well as a recent lesion-aware data augmentation technique, CarveMix. The code will be released at https://github.com/dogabasaran/lesion-synthesis.
abstract_zh: 了解脑损伤的强度特征是定义神经学研究中基于图像的生物标志物以及预测疾病负担和结果的关键。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于前景的生成方法，用于对局部病变特征进行建模，该方法既可以在健康图像上生成合成病变，又可以从病理图像中合成特定于受试者的伪健康图像。此外，所提出的方法可以用作数据增强模块来生成用于训练大脑图像分割网络的合成图像。对磁共振成像（MRI）采集的多发性硬化症（MS）脑图像的实验表明，该方法可以生成高度逼真的伪健康和伪病理脑图像。与传统的数据增强方法以及最近的病变感知数据增强技术 CarveMix 相比，使用合成图像的数据增强提高了大脑图像分割性能。该代码将在 https://github.com/dogabasaran/lesion-synthesis 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于前景的生成方法，用于生成多发性硬化症（MS）脑部图像的合成病灶和伪健康图像，并将其作为数据增强模块提升脑图像分割性能。
AI.motivation: 理解脑部病灶的强度特征对定义影像生物标志物和预测疾病负担至关重要，但现有数据增强方法难以生成符合临床特征的合成图像。
AI.method: 设计前景驱动的生成模型，通过建模局部病灶特征，在健康图像上生成合成病灶，并从病理图像中生成个体化伪健康图像，作为分割网络的数据增强模块。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法生成的伪健康和伪病理图像具有高度真实感，且数据增强效果优于传统方法及近期CarveMix技术，显著提升脑图像分割准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过生成符合临床特征的合成图像，有效增强了分割模型性能，为神经影像学研究提供了新的数据增强范式。

authors_text: Gukyeong Kwon,Zhaowei Cai,Avinash Ravichandran,Erhan Bas,Rahul Bhotika,Stefano Soatto
title: Masked Vision and Language Modeling for Multi-modal Representation Learning
title_zh: 用于多模态表示学习的蒙蔽视觉和语言建模
comment: International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR) 2023
comments: International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR) 2023
abstract: In this paper, we study how to use masked signal modeling in vision and language (V+L) representation learning. Instead of developing masked language modeling (MLM) and masked image modeling (MIM) independently, we propose to build joint masked vision and language modeling, where the masked signal of one modality is reconstructed with the help from another modality. This is motivated by the nature of image-text paired data that both of the image and the text convey almost the same information but in different formats. The masked signal reconstruction of one modality conditioned on another modality can also implicitly learn cross-modal alignment between language tokens and image patches. Our experiments on various V+L tasks show that the proposed method, along with common V+L alignment losses, achieves state-of-the-art performance in the regime of millions of pre-training data. Also, we outperforms the other competitors by a significant margin in limited data scenarios.
summary: In this paper, we study how to use masked signal modeling in vision and language (V+L) representation learning. Instead of developing masked language modeling (MLM) and masked image modeling (MIM) independently, we propose to build joint masked vision and language modeling, where the masked signal of one modality is reconstructed with the help from another modality. This is motivated by the nature of image-text paired data that both of the image and the text convey almost the same information but in different formats. The masked signal reconstruction of one modality conditioned on another modality can also implicitly learn cross-modal alignment between language tokens and image patches. Our experiments on various V+L tasks show that the proposed method, along with common V+L alignment losses, achieves state-of-the-art performance in the regime of millions of pre-training data. Also, we outperforms the other competitors by a significant margin in limited data scenarios.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了如何在视觉和语言（V+L）表示学习中使用掩蔽信号建模。我们建议建立联合掩蔽视觉和语言建模，而不是独立开发掩蔽语言模型（MLM）和掩蔽图像建模（MIM），其中一种模态的掩蔽信号在另一种模态的帮助下重建。这是由图像文本配对数据的性质所激发的，图像和文本都传达几乎相同的信息，但以不同的格式。以另一种模态为条件的一种模态的屏蔽信号重建也可以隐式地学习语言标记和图像块之间的跨模态对齐。我们对各种 V+L 任务的实验表明，所提出的方法以及常见的 V+L 对齐损失在数百万个预训练数据的情况下实现了最先进的性能。此外，在有限的数据场景中，我们的表现明显优于其他竞争对手。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种联合的掩码视觉与语言建模方法，通过跨模态信号重建实现多模态表征学习。
AI.motivation: 图像-文本配对数据中两种模态传递的信息本质相同但格式不同，利用跨模态重建可隐式学习语言与视觉元素的对齐关系。
AI.method: 联合训练掩码视觉建模（MIM）与掩码语言建模（MLM），通过跨模态信号重建实现多模态表征学习，结合常规V+L对齐损失函数。
AI.result: 在百万级预训练数据下达到SOTA性能，且在小数据场景下显著优于其他方法。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态联合掩码建模能有效提升多模态表征学习效果，尤其在数据有限场景下具有显著优势。

This is motivated by the nature of image-text paired data that both of the image and the text convey almost the same information but in different formats. Our experiments on various V+L tasks show that the proposed method, along with common V+L alignment losses, achieves state-of-the-art performance in the regime of millions of pre-training data. Also, we outperforms the other competitors by a significant margin in limited data scenarios. 在本文中，我们研究了如何在视觉和语言（V+L）表示学习中使用掩蔽信号建模。我们建议建立联合掩蔽视觉和语言建模，而不是独立开发掩蔽语言模型（MLM）和掩蔽图像建模（MIM），其中一种模态的掩蔽信号在另一种模态的帮助下重建。这是由图像文本配对数据的性质所激发的，图像和文本都传达几乎相同的信息，但以不同的格式。以另一种模态为条件的一种模态的屏蔽信号重建也可以隐式地学习语言标记和图像块之间的跨模态对齐。我们对各种 V+L 任务的实验表明，所提出的方法以及常见的 V+L 对齐损失在数百万个预训练数据的情况下实现了最先进的性能。此外，在有限的数据场景中，我们的表现明显优于其他竞争对手。 本文提出一种联合的掩码视觉与语言建模方法，通过跨模态信号重建实现多模态表征学习。 Gukyeong Kwon,Zhaowei Cai,Avinash Ravichandran,Erhan Bas,Rahul Bhotika,Stefano Soatto cs.CV,cs.CL,cs.LG

title: SC6D: Symmetry-agnostic and Correspondence-free 6D Object Pose Estimation
title_zh: SC6D：对称性不可知且无对应的 6D 物体姿态估计
abstract: This paper presents an efficient symmetry-agnostic and correspondence-free framework, referred to as SC6D, for 6D object pose estimation from a single monocular RGB image. SC6D requires neither the 3D CAD model of the object nor any prior knowledge of the symmetries. The pose estimation is decomposed into three sub-tasks: a) object 3D rotation representation learning and matching; b) estimation of the 2D location of the object center; and c) scale-invariant distance estimation (the translation along the z-axis) via classification. SC6D is evaluated on three benchmark datasets, T-LESS, YCB-V, and ITODD, and results in state-of-the-art performance on the T-LESS dataset. Moreover, SC6D is computationally much more efficient than the previous state-of-the-art method SurfEmb. The implementation and pre-trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/dingdingcai/SC6D-pose.
summary: This paper presents an efficient symmetry-agnostic and correspondence-free framework, referred to as SC6D, for 6D object pose estimation from a single monocular RGB image. SC6D requires neither the 3D CAD model of the object nor any prior knowledge of the symmetries. The pose estimation is decomposed into three sub-tasks: a) object 3D rotation representation learning and matching; b) estimation of the 2D location of the object center; and c) scale-invariant distance estimation (the translation along the z-axis) via classification. SC6D is evaluated on three benchmark datasets, T-LESS, YCB-V, and ITODD, and results in state-of-the-art performance on the T-LESS dataset. Moreover, SC6D is computationally much more efficient than the previous state-of-the-art method SurfEmb. The implementation and pre-trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/dingdingcai/SC6D-pose.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种高效的对称不可知且无对应的框架，称为 SC6D，用于从单个单目 RGB 图像进行 6D 物体姿态估计。 SC6D 既不需要对象的 3D CAD 模型，也不需要任何对称性的先验知识。位姿估计被分解为三个子任务：a）物体3D旋转表示学习和匹配； b) 物体中心2D位置的估计； c) 通过分类进行尺度不变距离估计（沿 z 轴的平移）。 SC6D 在三个基准数据集（T-LESS、YCB-V 和 ITODD）上进行评估，并在 T-LESS 数据集上获得最先进的性能。此外，SC6D 的计算效率比之前最先进的方法 SurfEmb 更加高效。实现和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/dingdingcai/SC6D-pose 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需3D CAD模型和对称性先验知识的6D目标姿态估计框架SC6D，通过单目RGB图像实现高效估计。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖3D模型或对称性先验，限制了适用性；需开发无需这些条件且计算高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 将姿态估计分解为三部分：3D旋转表示学习、2D中心定位及分类实现的尺度不变距离估计（Z轴平移）。
AI.result: 在T-LESS等三个数据集上达到SOTA性能，尤其在T-LESS数据集表现突出，计算效率优于SurfEmb。
AI.conclusion: SC6D通过解耦子任务和避免对称性假设，实现了高效且无需3D模型的6D姿态估计，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Rui Xu,Yong Luo,Bo Du,Kaiming Kuang,Jiancheng Yang
title: LSSANet: A Long Short Slice-Aware Network for Pulmonary Nodule Detection
title_zh: LSSANet：用于肺结节检测的长短切片感知网络
comment: MICCAI 2022
comments: MICCAI 2022
abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have been demonstrated to be highly effective in the field of pulmonary nodule detection. However, existing CNN based pulmonary nodule detection methods lack the ability to capture long-range dependencies, which is vital for global information extraction. In computer vision tasks, non-local operations have been widely utilized, but the computational cost could be very high for 3D computed tomography (CT) images. To address this issue, we propose a long short slice-aware network (LSSANet) for the detection of pulmonary nodules. In particular, we develop a new non-local mechanism termed long short slice grouping (LSSG), which splits the compact non-local embeddings into a short-distance slice grouped one and a long-distance slice grouped counterpart. This not only reduces the computational burden, but also keeps long-range dependencies among any elements across slices and in the whole feature map. The proposed LSSG is easy-to-use and can be plugged into many pulmonary nodule detection networks. To verify the performance of LSSANet, we compare with several recently proposed and competitive detection approaches based on 2D/3D CNN. Promising evaluation results on the large-scale PN9 dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. Code is at https://github.com/Ruixxxx/LSSANet.
summary: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have been demonstrated to be highly effective in the field of pulmonary nodule detection. However, existing CNN based pulmonary nodule detection methods lack the ability to capture long-range dependencies, which is vital for global information extraction. In computer vision tasks, non-local operations have been widely utilized, but the computational cost could be very high for 3D computed tomography (CT) images. To address this issue, we propose a long short slice-aware network (LSSANet) for the detection of pulmonary nodules. In particular, we develop a new non-local mechanism termed long short slice grouping (LSSG), which splits the compact non-local embeddings into a short-distance slice grouped one and a long-distance slice grouped counterpart. This not only reduces the computational burden, but also keeps long-range dependencies among any elements across slices and in the whole feature map. The proposed LSSG is easy-to-use and can be plugged into many pulmonary nodule detection networks. To verify the performance of LSSANet, we compare with several recently proposed and competitive detection approaches based on 2D/3D CNN. Promising evaluation results on the large-scale PN9 dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. Code is at https://github.com/Ruixxxx/LSSANet.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）已被证明在肺结节检测领域非常有效。然而，现有的基于 CNN 的肺结节检测方法缺乏捕获长程依赖性的能力，而这对于全局信息提取至关重要。在计算机视觉任务中，非局部操作已被广泛使用，但对于 3D 计算机断层扫描 (CT) 图像来说，计算成本可能非常高。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种长短切片感知网络（LSANet）来检测肺结节。特别是，我们开发了一种新的非局部机制，称为长短切片分组（LSSG），它将紧凑的非局部嵌入分为短距离切片分组和长距离切片分组对应。这不仅减少了计算负担，而且还保持了跨切片和整个特征图中的任何元素之间的远程依赖关系。所提出的 LSSG 易于使用，并且可以插入许多肺结节检测网络中。为了验证 LSSANet 的性能，我们与最近提出的几种基于 2D/3D CNN 的竞争性检测方法进行了比较。大规模 PN9 数据集上的有希望的评估结果证明了我们方法的有效性。代码位于 https://github.com/Ruixxxx/LSSANet。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LSSANet的长短期切片感知网络，用于肺结节检测。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于卷积神经网络的肺结节检测方法无法有效捕捉长距离依赖关系，这对全局信息提取至关重要。非局部操作虽然广泛用于计算机视觉任务，但计算成本较高，尤其在3D CT图像上。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种新的非局部机制，称为长短期切片分组（LSSG），将紧凑的非局部嵌入分为短距离切片分组和长距离切片分组。该方法降低了计算负担，同时保留了切片之间和整个特征图中的长距离依赖关系。
AI.result: 在大规模PN9数据集上的评估结果表明，LSSANet方法具有良好的性能。
AI.conclusion: LSSG机制易于使用，可以集成到许多肺结节检测网络中，为肺结节检测提供了一种有效的解决方案。

authors_text: Diego Paez-Granados,Yujie He,David Gonon,Dan Jia,Bastian Leibe,Kenji Suzuki,Aude Billard
title: Pedestrian-Robot Interactions on Autonomous Crowd Navigation: Reactive Control Methods and Evaluation Metrics
title_zh: 自主人群导航中的步行机器人交互：反应控制方法和评估指标
comment: \c{opyright}IEEE All rights reserved. IEEE-IROS-2022, Oct.23-27. Kyoto, Japan
comments: \c{opyright}IEEE All rights reserved. IEEE-IROS-2022, Oct.23-27. Kyoto, Japan
abstract: Autonomous navigation in highly populated areas remains a challenging task for robots because of the difficulty in guaranteeing safe interactions with pedestrians in unstructured situations. In this work, we present a crowd navigation control framework that delivers continuous obstacle avoidance and post-contact control evaluated on an autonomous personal mobility vehicle. We propose evaluation metrics for accounting efficiency, controller response and crowd interactions in natural crowds. We report the results of over 110 trials in different crowd types: sparse, flows, and mixed traffic, with low- (< 0.15 ppsm), mid- (< 0.65 ppsm), and high- (< 1 ppsm) pedestrian densities. We present comparative results between two low-level obstacle avoidance methods and a baseline of shared control. Results show a 10% drop in relative time to goal on the highest density tests, and no other efficiency metric decrease. Moreover, autonomous navigation showed to be comparable to shared-control navigation with a lower relative jerk and significantly higher fluency in commands indicating high compatibility with the crowd. We conclude that the reactive controller fulfils a necessary task of fast and continuous adaptation to crowd navigation, and it should be coupled with high-level planners for environmental and situational awareness.

Moreover, autonomous navigation showed to be comparable to shared-control navigation with a lower relative jerk and significantly higher fluency in commands indicating high compatibility with the crowd. We conclude that the reactive controller fulfils a necessary task of fast and continuous adaptation to crowd navigation, and it should be coupled with high-level planners for environmental and situational awareness.
abstract_zh: 对于机器人来说，人口稠密地区的自主导航仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为在非结构化情况下很难保证与行人的安全交互。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种人群导航控制框架，该框架可在自动个人移动车辆上提供连续避障和接触后控制评估。我们提出了自然人群中会计效率、控制器响应和人群互动的评估指标。我们报告了针对不同人群类型进行的 110 多项试验的结果：稀疏、流动和混合交通，行人密度为低 (< 0.15 ppsm)、中 (< 0.65 ppsm) 和高 (< 1 ppsm)。我们展示了两种低级避障方法和共享控制基线之间的比较结果。结果显示，在最高密度测试中，达到目标的相对时间下降了 10%，并且其他效率指标没有下降。此外，自主导航与共享控制导航相当，具有较低的相对加加速度和显着更高的命令流畅度，表明与人群的高度兼容性。我们的结论是，反应控制器完成了快速、持续适应人群导航的必要任务，并且应该与环境和态势感知的高级规划器相结合。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于自主人群导航的反应式控制框架，并通过实验评估其在不同人群密度下的避障与交互性能。
AI.motivation: 在高人口密度区域实现机器人自主导航面临安全交互的挑战，现有方法难以保证复杂场景下的避障效率与流畅性。
AI.method: 设计包含连续避障与碰撞后控制的框架，提出效率、响应性及人群交互的评估指标，并在110次不同密度（低/中/高）人群试验中对比两种避障方法与共享控制基线。
AI.result: 高密度场景下目标到达时间减少10%，其他效率指标无下降；自主导航相较共享控制具有更低的相对冲击度和更高指令流畅性。
AI.conclusion: 反应式控制器能实现快速适应性，但需结合高层规划器以提升环境感知能力，从而完善复杂人群导航系统。

search_text: Pedestrian-Robot Interactions on Autonomous Crowd Navigation: Reactive Control Methods and Evaluation Metrics 自主人群导航中的步行机器人交互：反应控制方法和评估指标 Autonomous navigation in highly populated areas remains a challenging task for robots because of the difficulty in guaranteeing safe interactions with pedestrians in unstructured situations. In this work, we present a crowd navigation control framework that delivers continuous obstacle avoidance and post-contact control evaluated on an autonomous personal mobility vehicle. We propose evaluation metrics for accounting efficiency, controller response and crowd interactions in natural crowds. We report the results of over 110 trials in different crowd types: sparse, flows, and mixed traffic, with low- (< 0.15 ppsm), mid- (< 0.65 ppsm), and high- (< 1 ppsm) pedestrian densities. We present comparative results between two low-level obstacle avoidance methods and a baseline of shared control. Results show a 10% drop in relative time to goal on the highest density tests, and no other efficiency metric decrease. Moreover, autonomous navigation showed to be comparable to shared-control navigation with a lower relative jerk and significantly higher fluency in commands indicating high compatibility with the crowd. We conclude that the reactive controller fulfils a necessary task of fast and continuous adaptation to crowd navigation, and it should be coupled with high-level planners for environmental and situational awareness. 对于机器人来说，人口稠密地区的自主导航仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为在非结构化情况下很难保证与行人的安全交互。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种人群导航控制框架，该框架可在自动个人移动车辆上提供连续避障和接触后控制评估。我们提出了自然人群中会计效率、控制器响应和人群互动的评估指标。我们报告了针对不同人群类型进行的 110 多项试验的结果：稀疏、流动和混合交通，行人密度为低 (< 0.15 ppsm)、中 (< 0.65 ppsm) 和高 (< 1 ppsm)。我们展示了两种低级避障方法和共享控制基线之间的比较结果。结果显示，在最高密度测试中，达到目标的相对时间下降了 10%，并且其他效率指标没有下降。此外，自主导航与共享控制导航相当，具有较低的相对加加速度和显着更高的命令流畅度，表明与人群的高度兼容性。我们的结论是，反应控制器完成了快速、持续适应人群导航的必要任务，并且应该与环境和态势感知的高级规划器相结合。 本文提出了一种用于自主人群导航的反应式控制框架，并通过实验评估其在不同人群密度下的避障与交互性能。 Diego Paez-Granados,Yujie He,David Gonon,Dan Jia,Bastian Leibe,Kenji Suzuki,Aude Billard cs.RO,cs.CV,cs.HC

authors_text: Qihang Zhou,Jiming Chen,Haoyu Liu,Shibo He,Wenchao Meng
title: Detecting Multivariate Time Series Anomalies with Zero Known Label
title_zh: 使用零已知标签检测多元时间序列异常
abstract: Multivariate time series anomaly detection has been extensively studied under the semi-supervised setting, where a training dataset with all normal instances is required. However, preparing such a dataset is very laborious since each single data instance should be fully guaranteed to be normal. It is, therefore, desired to explore multivariate time series anomaly detection methods based on the dataset without any label knowledge. In this paper, we propose MTGFlow, an unsupervised anomaly detection approach for multivariate time series anomaly detection via dynamic graph and entity-aware normalizing flow, leaning only on a widely accepted hypothesis that abnormal instances exhibit sparse densities than the normal. However, the complex interdependencies among entities and the diverse inherent characteristics of each entity pose significant challenges on the density estimation, let alone to detect anomalies based on the estimated possibility distribution. To tackle these problems, we propose to learn the mutual and dynamic relations among entities via a graph structure learning model, which helps to model accurate distribution of multivariate time series. Moreover, taking account of distinct characteristics of the individual entities, an entity-aware normalizing flow is developed to describe each entity into a parameterized normal distribution, thereby producing fine-grained density estimation. Incorporating these two strategies, MTGFlow achieves superior anomaly detection performance. Experiments on five public datasets with seven baselines are conducted, MTGFlow outperforms the SOTA methods by up to 5.0 AUROC\%. Codes will be released at https://github.com/zqhang/Detecting-Multivariate-Time-Series-Anomalies-with-Zero-Known-Label.
summary: Multivariate time series anomaly detection has been extensively studied under the semi-supervised setting, where a training dataset with all normal instances is required. However, preparing such a dataset is very laborious since each single data instance should be fully guaranteed to be normal. It is, therefore, desired to explore multivariate time series anomaly detection methods based on the dataset without any label knowledge. In this paper, we propose MTGFlow, an unsupervised anomaly detection approach for multivariate time series anomaly detection via dynamic graph and entity-aware normalizing flow, leaning only on a widely accepted hypothesis that abnormal instances exhibit sparse densities than the normal. However, the complex interdependencies among entities and the diverse inherent characteristics of each entity pose significant challenges on the density estimation, let alone to detect anomalies based on the estimated possibility distribution. To tackle these problems, we propose to learn the mutual and dynamic relations among entities via a graph structure learning model, which helps to model accurate distribution of multivariate time series. Moreover, taking account of distinct characteristics of the individual entities, an entity-aware normalizing flow is developed to describe each entity into a parameterized normal distribution, thereby producing fine-grained density estimation. Incorporating these two strategies, MTGFlow achieves superior anomaly detection performance. Experiments on five public datasets with seven baselines are conducted, MTGFlow outperforms the SOTA methods by up to 5.0 AUROC\%. Codes will be released at https://github.com/zqhang/Detecting-Multivariate-Time-Series-Anomalies-with-Zero-Known-Label.
abstract_zh: 多变量时间序列异常检测在半监督环境下得到了广泛的研究，其中需要包含所有正常实例的训练数据集。然而，准备这样的数据集是非常费力的，因为要充分保证每个数据实例都是正常的。因此，需要探索基于数据集且无需任何标签知识的多元时间序列异常检测方法。在本文中，我们提出了 MTGFlow，一种通过动态图和实体感知归一化流程进行多元时间序列异常检测的无监督异常检测方法，仅依赖于一个广泛接受的假设，即异常实例表现出比正常实例稀疏的密度。然而，实体之间复杂的相互依赖关系以及每个实体不同的固有特征对密度估计提出了重大挑战，更不用说根据估计的可能性分布来检测异常了。为了解决这些问题，我们建议通过图结构学习模型来学习实体之间的相互和动态关系，这有助于对多元时间序列的准确分布进行建模。此外，考虑到各个实体的独特特征，开发了实体感知归一化流程，将每个实体描述为参数化正态分布，从而产生细粒度的密度估计。结合这两种策略，MTGFlow 实现了卓越的异常检测性能。在具有 7 个基线的 5 个公共数据集上进行了实验，MTGFlow 的性能优于 SOTA 方法高达 5.0 AUROC%。代码将在 https://github.com/zqhang/Detecting-Multivariate-Time-Series-Anomalies-with-Zero-Known-Label 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需任何标签的多变量时间序列异常检测方法MTGFlow，通过动态图结构和实体感知归一化流实现。
AI.motivation: 传统多变量时间序列异常检测依赖大量正常样本标签，但实际中获取完全正常的标签数据极为困难。异常样本通常具有稀疏密度特征，但复杂实体间依赖关系和个体差异导致密度估计困难。
AI.method: 通过图结构学习模型捕捉实体间动态关系，结合实体感知归一化流对每个实体进行参数化正态分布建模，实现细粒度密度估计。
AI.result: 在五个公开数据集上实验表明，MTGFlow相较七个基线方法在AUROC指标上最高提升5.0%。
AI.conclusion: MTGFlow通过融合动态图建模与实体感知归一化流，有效解决了无标签场景下的多变量时间序列异常检测难题，取得了优于现有方法的性能。

title: Edge-Based Self-Supervision for Semi-Supervised Few-Shot Microscopy Image Cell Segmentation
title_zh: 用于半监督少镜头显微镜图像细胞分割的基于边缘的自监督
comment: Accepted by MOVI 2022
comments: Accepted by MOVI 2022
abstract: Deep neural networks currently deliver promising results for microscopy image cell segmentation, but they require large-scale labelled databases, which is a costly and time-consuming process. In this work, we relax the labelling requirement by combining self-supervised with semi-supervised learning. We propose the prediction of edge-based maps for self-supervising the training of the unlabelled images, which is combined with the supervised training of a small number of labelled images for learning the segmentation task. In our experiments, we evaluate on a few-shot microscopy image cell segmentation benchmark and show that only a small number of annotated images, e.g. 10% of the original training set, is enough for our approach to reach similar performance as with the fully annotated databases on 1- to 10-shots. Our code and trained models is made publicly available
summary: Deep neural networks currently deliver promising results for microscopy image cell segmentation, but they require large-scale labelled databases, which is a costly and time-consuming process. In this work, we relax the labelling requirement by combining self-supervised with semi-supervised learning. We propose the prediction of edge-based maps for self-supervising the training of the unlabelled images, which is combined with the supervised training of a small number of labelled images for learning the segmentation task. In our experiments, we evaluate on a few-shot microscopy image cell segmentation benchmark and show that only a small number of annotated images, e.g. 10% of the original training set, is enough for our approach to reach similar performance as with the fully annotated databases on 1- to 10-shots. Our code and trained models is made publicly available
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络目前为显微镜图像细胞分割提供了有希望的结果，但它们需要大规模的标记数据库，这是一个昂贵且耗时的过程。在这项工作中，我们通过将自监督学习与半监督学习相结合来放宽标签要求。我们提出基于边缘的图预测来自监督未标记图像的训练，并与少量标记图像的监督训练相结合以学习分割任务。在我们的实验中，我们对几次拍摄的显微镜图像细胞分割基准进行了评估，并表明只有少量带注释的图像，例如原始训练集的 10% 足以让我们的方法在 1 到 10 个镜头上达到与完全注释数据库相似的性能。我们的代码和经过训练的模型是公开的

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合自监督与半监督学习的少样本显微图像细胞分割方法，通过预测边缘图减少对标注数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习方法依赖大量标注数据进行细胞分割，但标注过程成本高且耗时，需探索减少标注需求的解决方案。
AI.method: 利用未标注图像生成边缘图作为自监督信号，结合少量标注图像的监督学习，共同训练分割模型。
AI.result: 在少样本基准测试中，仅使用10%标注数据即可达到全标注数据的分割性能，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在降低标注需求的同时保持高分割精度，为显微图像分析提供实用方案，且公开代码促进后续研究。

search_text: Edge-Based Self-Supervision for Semi-Supervised Few-Shot Microscopy Image Cell Segmentation 用于半监督少镜头显微镜图像细胞分割的基于边缘的自监督 Deep neural networks currently deliver promising results for microscopy image cell segmentation, but they require large-scale labelled databases, which is a costly and time-consuming process. In this work, we relax the labelling requirement by combining self-supervised with semi-supervised learning. We propose the prediction of edge-based maps for self-supervising the training of the unlabelled images, which is combined with the supervised training of a small number of labelled images for learning the segmentation task. In our experiments, we evaluate on a few-shot microscopy image cell segmentation benchmark and show that only a small number of annotated images, e.g. 10% of the original training set, is enough for our approach to reach similar performance as with the fully annotated databases on 1- to 10-shots. Our code and trained models is made publicly available 深度神经网络目前为显微镜图像细胞分割提供了有希望的结果，但它们需要大规模的标记数据库，这是一个昂贵且耗时的过程。在这项工作中，我们通过将自监督学习与半监督学习相结合来放宽标签要求。我们提出基于边缘的图预测来自监督未标记图像的训练，并与少量标记图像的监督训练相结合以学习分割任务。在我们的实验中，我们对几次拍摄的显微镜图像细胞分割基准进行了评估，并表明只有少量带注释的图像，例如原始训练集的 10% 足以让我们的方法在 1 到 10 个镜头上达到与完全注释数据库相似的性能。我们的代码和经过训练的模型是公开的 本文提出一种结合自监督与半监督学习的少样本显微图像细胞分割方法，通过预测边缘图减少对标注数据的依赖。 Youssef Dawoud,Katharina Ernst,Gustavo Carneiro,Vasileios Belagiannis cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Chen Ding,Xiao-Yue Xu,Yun-Fei Niu,Shuo Zhang,Wan-Su Bao,He-Liang Huang
title: Active Learning on a Programmable Photonic Quantum Processor
title_zh: 可编程光子量子处理器的主动学习
abstract: Training a quantum machine learning model generally requires a large labeled dataset, which incurs high labeling and computational costs. To reduce such costs, a selective training strategy, called active learning (AL), chooses only a subset of the original dataset to learn while maintaining the trained model's performance. Here, we design and implement two AL-enpowered variational quantum classifiers, to investigate the potential applications and effectiveness of AL in quantum machine learning. Firstly, we build a programmable free-space photonic quantum processor, which enables the programmed implementation of various hybrid quantum-classical computing algorithms. Then, we code the designed variational quantum classifier with AL into the quantum processor, and execute comparative tests for the classifiers with and without the AL strategy. The results validate the great advantage of AL in quantum machine learning, as it saves at most $85\%$ labeling efforts and $91.6\%$ percent computational efforts compared to the training without AL on a data classification task. Our results inspire AL's further applications in large-scale quantum machine learning to drastically reduce training data and speed up training, underpinning the exploration of practical quantum advantages in quantum physics or real-world applications.
summary: Training a quantum machine learning model generally requires a large labeled dataset, which incurs high labeling and computational costs. To reduce such costs, a selective training strategy, called active learning (AL), chooses only a subset of the original dataset to learn while maintaining the trained model's performance. Here, we design and implement two AL-enpowered variational quantum classifiers, to investigate the potential applications and effectiveness of AL in quantum machine learning. Firstly, we build a programmable free-space photonic quantum processor, which enables the programmed implementation of various hybrid quantum-classical computing algorithms. Then, we code the designed variational quantum classifier with AL into the quantum processor, and execute comparative tests for the classifiers with and without the AL strategy. The results validate the great advantage of AL in quantum machine learning, as it saves at most $85\%$ labeling efforts and $91.6\%$ percent computational efforts compared to the training without AL on a data classification task. Our results inspire AL's further applications in large-scale quantum machine learning to drastically reduce training data and speed up training, underpinning the exploration of practical quantum advantages in quantum physics or real-world applications.
abstract_zh: 训练量子机器学习模型通常需要大量标记数据集，这会产生很高的标记和计算成本。为了降低此类成本，称为主动学习 (AL) 的选择性训练策略仅选择原始数据集的子集进行学习，同时保持训练模型的性能。在这里，我们设计并实现了两个 AL 支持的变分量子分类器，以研究 AL 在量子机器学习中的潜在应用和有效性。首先，我们构建了一个可编程的自由空间光子量子处理器，可以实现各种混合量子经典计算算法的编程实现。然后，我们将设计的带有 AL 策略的变分量子分类器编码到量子处理器中，并对带有和不带有 AL 策略的分类器进行比较测试。结果验证了 AL 在量子机器学习中的巨大优势，因为与没有 AL 的数据分类任务训练相比，它最多节省 85\%$ 的标记工作量和 91.6\%$ 的计算工作量。我们的研究结果激发了 AL 在大规模量子机器学习中的进一步应用，以大幅减少训练数据并加快训练速度，为探索量子物理或现实应用中的实用量子优势奠定基础。

AI.tldr: 本文在可编程光子量子处理器上设计并实现了两种主动学习驱动的变分量子分类器，验证了主动学习在量子机器学习中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 量子机器学习模型训练需要大量标注数据，导致标注和计算成本高昂，需通过主动学习策略降低这些成本。
AI.method: 构建可编程自由空间光子量子处理器，实现混合量子-经典算法，并将带主动学习的变分量子分类器编码至处理器中进行对比测试。
AI.result: 主动学习策略在数据分类任务中节省了最多85%的标注工作量和91.6%的计算工作量。
AI.conclusion: 主动学习可显著减少量子机器学习的训练数据和计算时间，为探索量子优势提供实践基础。

ai_content.tldr: 本文在可编程光子量子处理器上设计并实现了两种主动学习驱动的变分量子分类器，验证了主动学习在量子机器学习中的有效性。

title: A Novel Approach To Network Intrusion Detection System Using Deep Learning For Sdn: Futuristic Approach
title_zh: 使用 Sdn 深度学习的网络入侵检测系统新方法：未来方法
abstract: Software-Defined Networking (SDN) is the next generation to change the architecture of traditional networks. SDN is one of the promising solutions to change the architecture of internet networks. Attacks become more common due to the centralized nature of SDN architecture. It is vital to provide security for the SDN. In this study, we propose a Network Intrusion Detection System-Deep Learning module (NIDS-DL) approach in the context of SDN. Our suggested method combines Network Intrusion Detection Systems (NIDS) with many types of deep learning algorithms. Our approach employs 12 features extracted from 41 features in the NSL-KDD dataset using a feature selection method. We employed classifiers (CNN, DNN, RNN, LSTM, and GRU). When we compare classifier scores, our technique produced accuracy results of (98.63%, 98.53%, 98.13%, 98.04%, and 97.78%) respectively. The novelty of our new approach (NIDS-DL) uses 5 deep learning classifiers and made pre-processing dataset to harvests the best results. Our proposed approach was successful in binary classification and detecting attacks, implying that our approach (NIDS-DL) might be used with great efficiency in the future.
summary: Software-Defined Networking (SDN) is the next generation to change the architecture of traditional networks. SDN is one of the promising solutions to change the architecture of internet networks. Attacks become more common due to the centralized nature of SDN architecture. It is vital to provide security for the SDN. In this study, we propose a Network Intrusion Detection System-Deep Learning module (NIDS-DL) approach in the context of SDN. Our suggested method combines Network Intrusion Detection Systems (NIDS) with many types of deep learning algorithms. Our approach employs 12 features extracted from 41 features in the NSL-KDD dataset using a feature selection method. We employed classifiers (CNN, DNN, RNN, LSTM, and GRU). When we compare classifier scores, our technique produced accuracy results of (98.63%, 98.53%, 98.13%, 98.04%, and 97.78%) respectively. The novelty of our new approach (NIDS-DL) uses 5 deep learning classifiers and made pre-processing dataset to harvests the best results. Our proposed approach was successful in binary classification and detecting attacks, implying that our approach (NIDS-DL) might be used with great efficiency in the future.
abstract_zh: 软件定义网络（SDN）是改变传统网络架构的下一代网络。 SDN 是改变互联网网络架构的最有前途的解决方案之一。由于 SDN 架构的中心化特性，攻击变得更加常见。为SDN提供安全至关重要。在本研究中，我们提出了 SDN 背景下的网络入侵检测系统深度学习模块 (NIDS-DL) 方法。我们建议的方法将网络入侵检测系统 (NIDS) 与多种类型的深度学习算法相结合。我们的方法采用特征选择方法从 NSL-KDD 数据集中的 41 个特征中提取出 12 个特征。我们使用了分类器（CNN、DNN、RNN、LSTM 和 GRU）。当我们比较分类器分数时，我们的技术产生的准确度结果分别为（98.63%、98.53%、98.13%、98.04% 和 97.78%）。我们新方法（NIDS-DL）的新颖之处在于使用了 5 个深度学习分类器，并对数据集进行了预处理，以获得最佳结果。我们提出的方法在二进制分类和检测攻击方面取得了成功，这意味着我们的方法（NIDS-DL）在未来可能会非常有效地使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合深度学习算法的新型网络入侵检测系统（NIDS-DL），用于提升软件定义网络（SDN）的安全性。
AI.motivation: 由于SDN的集中式架构易受攻击，亟需高效的安全检测机制以应对日益增多的网络威胁。
AI.method: 基于NSL-KDD数据集选取12个关键特征，采用CNN、DNN、RNN、LSTM和GRU五种深度学习分类器进行攻击检测。
AI.conclusion: NIDS-DL方法在二分类攻击检测中表现优异，未来可高效应用于SDN环境的安全防护。

ai_content.conclusion: NIDS-DL方法在二分类攻击检测中表现优异，未来可高效应用于SDN环境的安全防护。
