Our proposed approach was successful in binary classification and detecting attacks, implying that our approach (NIDS-DL) might be used with great efficiency in the future. 软件定义网络（SDN）是改变传统网络架构的下一代网络。 SDN 是改变互联网网络架构的最有前途的解决方案之一。由于 SDN 架构的中心化特性，攻击变得更加常见。为SDN提供安全至关重要。在本研究中，我们提出了 SDN 背景下的网络入侵检测系统深度学习模块 (NIDS-DL) 方法。我们建议的方法将网络入侵检测系统 (NIDS) 与多种类型的深度学习算法相结合。我们的方法采用特征选择方法从 NSL-KDD 数据集中的 41 个特征中提取出 12 个特征。我们使用了分类器（CNN、DNN、RNN、LSTM 和 GRU）。当我们比较分类器分数时，我们的技术产生的准确度结果分别为（98.63%、98.53%、98.13%、98.04% 和 97.78%）。我们新方法（NIDS-DL）的新颖之处在于使用了 5 个深度学习分类器，并对数据集进行了预处理，以获得最佳结果。我们提出的方法在二进制分类和检测攻击方面取得了成功，这意味着我们的方法（NIDS-DL）在未来可能会非常有效地使用。 本文提出了一种结合深度学习算法的新型网络入侵检测系统（NIDS-DL），用于提升软件定义网络（SDN）的安全性。 Mhmood Radhi Hadi,Adnan Saher Mohammed cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.NI

title: Unsupervised Discovery of Semantic Concepts in Satellite Imagery with Style-based Wavelet-driven Generative Models
title_zh: 使用基于样式的小波驱动生成模型无监督地发现卫星图像中的语义概念
comment: 11 pages, 5 figures, accepted at SETN 2022
comments: 11 pages, 5 figures, accepted at SETN 2022
abstract: In recent years, considerable advancements have been made in the area of Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs), particularly with the advent of style-based architectures that address many key shortcomings - both in terms of modeling capabilities and network interpretability. Despite these improvements, the adoption of such approaches in the domain of satellite imagery is not straightforward. Typical vision datasets used in generative tasks are well-aligned and annotated, and exhibit limited variability. In contrast, satellite imagery exhibits great spatial and spectral variability, wide presence of fine, high-frequency details, while the tedious nature of annotating satellite imagery leads to annotation scarcity - further motivating developments in unsupervised learning. In this light, we present the first pre-trained style- and wavelet-based GAN model that can readily synthesize a wide gamut of realistic satellite images in a variety of settings and conditions - while also preserving high-frequency information. Furthermore, we show that by analyzing the intermediate activations of our network, one can discover a multitude of interpretable semantic directions that facilitate the guided synthesis of satellite images in terms of high-level concepts (e.g., urbanization) without using any form of supervision. Via a set of qualitative and quantitative experiments we demonstrate the efficacy of our framework, in terms of suitability for downstream tasks (e.g., data augmentation), quality of synthetic imagery, as well as generalization capabilities to unseen datasets.
summary: In recent years, considerable advancements have been made in the area of Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs), particularly with the advent of style-based architectures that address many key shortcomings - both in terms of modeling capabilities and network interpretability. Despite these improvements, the adoption of such approaches in the domain of satellite imagery is not straightforward. Typical vision datasets used in generative tasks are well-aligned and annotated, and exhibit limited variability. In contrast, satellite imagery exhibits great spatial and spectral variability, wide presence of fine, high-frequency details, while the tedious nature of annotating satellite imagery leads to annotation scarcity - further motivating developments in unsupervised learning. In this light, we present the first pre-trained style- and wavelet-based GAN model that can readily synthesize a wide gamut of realistic satellite images in a variety of settings and conditions - while also preserving high-frequency information. Furthermore, we show that by analyzing the intermediate activations of our network, one can discover a multitude of interpretable semantic directions that facilitate the guided synthesis of satellite images in terms of high-level concepts (e.g., urbanization) without using any form of supervision. Via a set of qualitative and quantitative experiments we demonstrate the efficacy of our framework, in terms of suitability for downstream tasks (e.g., data augmentation), quality of synthetic imagery, as well as generalization capabilities to unseen datasets.
abstract_zh: 近年来，生成对抗网络（GAN）领域取得了相当大的进步，特别是随着基于样式的架构的出现，解决了建模能力和网络可解释性方面的许多关键缺点。尽管有这些改进，但在卫星图像领域采用此类方法并不容易。生成任务中使用的典型视觉数据集经过良好对齐和注释，并且表现出有限的可变性。相比之下，卫星图像表现出巨大的空间和光谱变化，广泛存在精细的高频细节，而注释卫星图像的繁琐性质导致注释稀缺——进一步推动了无监督学习的发展。有鉴于此，我们提出了第一个基于预训练风格和小波的 GAN 模型，该模型可以在各种设置和条件下轻松合成各种真实的卫星图像，同时还保留高频信息。此外，我们表明，通过分析网络的中间激活，人们可以发现多种可解释的语义方向，这些方向有助于在高级概念（例如城市化）方面引导卫星图像的合成，而无需使用任何形式的监督。通过一系列定性和定量实验，我们展示了我们的框架在下游任务（例如数据增强）的适用性、合成图像的质量以及对未见过的数据集的泛化能力方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于风格和小波变换的生成对抗网络（GAN）模型，用于在卫星图像中无监督地发现语义概念并生成高质量的合成图像。
AI.motivation: 卫星图像具有高度的空间和光谱变异性，且标注稀缺，传统生成模型因依赖标注数据和低频信息而难以适应，需开发无监督方法以解决这一问题。
AI.method: 设计预训练的风格-小波驱动GAN模型，结合小波变换保留高频细节，并通过分析网络中间激活状态发现可解释的语义方向，实现无监督引导合成。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架在合成图像质量、下游任务适用性（如数据增强）及对未见数据集的泛化能力方面表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为卫星图像的无监督语义概念发现提供了有效解决方案，推动了生成模型在遥感领域的应用。

title: Audio-visual scene classification via contrastive event-object alignment and semantic-based fusion
title_zh: 通过对比事件-对象对齐和基于语义的融合进行视听场景分类
comment: IEEE MMSP 2022
comments: IEEE MMSP 2022
abstract: Previous works on scene classification are mainly based on audio or visual signals, while humans perceive the environmental scenes through multiple senses. Recent studies on audio-visual scene classification separately fine-tune the largescale audio and image pre-trained models on the target dataset, then either fuse the intermediate representations of the audio model and the visual model, or fuse the coarse-grained decision of both models at the clip level. Such methods ignore the detailed audio events and visual objects in audio-visual scenes (AVS), while humans often identify different scenes through audio events and visual objects within and the congruence between them. To exploit the fine-grained information of audio events and visual objects in AVS, and coordinate the implicit relationship between audio events and visual objects, this paper proposes a multibranch model equipped with contrastive event-object alignment (CEOA) and semantic-based fusion (SF) for AVSC. CEOA aims to align the learned embeddings of audio events and visual objects by comparing the difference between audio-visual event-object pairs. Then, visual objects associated with certain audio events and vice versa are accentuated by cross-attention and undergo SF for semantic-level fusion. Experiments show that: 1) the proposed AVSC model equipped with CEOA and SF outperforms the results of audio-only and visual-only models, i.e., the audio-visual results are better than the results from a single modality. 2) CEOA aligns the embeddings of audio events and related visual objects on a fine-grained level, and the SF effectively integrates both; 3) Compared with other large-scale integrated systems, the proposed model shows competitive performance, even without using additional datasets and data augmentation tricks.
summary: Previous works on scene classification are mainly based on audio or visual signals, while humans perceive the environmental scenes through multiple senses. Recent studies on audio-visual scene classification separately fine-tune the largescale audio and image pre-trained models on the target dataset, then either fuse the intermediate representations of the audio model and the visual model, or fuse the coarse-grained decision of both models at the clip level. Such methods ignore the detailed audio events and visual objects in audio-visual scenes (AVS), while humans often identify different scenes through audio events and visual objects within and the congruence between them. To exploit the fine-grained information of audio events and visual objects in AVS, and coordinate the implicit relationship between audio events and visual objects, this paper proposes a multibranch model equipped with contrastive event-object alignment (CEOA) and semantic-based fusion (SF) for AVSC. CEOA aims to align the learned embeddings of audio events and visual objects by comparing the difference between audio-visual event-object pairs. Then, visual objects associated with certain audio events and vice versa are accentuated by cross-attention and undergo SF for semantic-level fusion. Experiments show that: 1) the proposed AVSC model equipped with CEOA and SF outperforms the results of audio-only and visual-only models, i.e., the audio-visual results are better than the results from a single modality. 2) CEOA aligns the embeddings of audio events and related visual objects on a fine-grained level, and the SF effectively integrates both; 3) Compared with other large-scale integrated systems, the proposed model shows competitive performance, even without using additional datasets and data augmentation tricks.
abstract_zh: 以往的场景分类工作主要基于音频或视觉信号，而人类通过多种感官来感知环境场景。最近关于视听场景分类的研究分别对目标数据集上的大规模音频和图像预训练模型进行微调，然后融合音频模型和视觉模型的中间表示，或者融合两个模型在剪辑级别的粗粒度决策。这些方法忽略了视听场景（AVS）中详细的音频事件和视觉对象，而人类经常通过其中的音频事件和视觉对象以及它们之间的一致性来识别不同的场景。为了利用AVS中音频事件和视觉对象的细粒度信息，并协调音频事件和视觉对象之间的隐式关系，本文提出了一种配备对比事件对象对齐（CEOA）和基于语义的融合（SF）的AVSC多分支模型。 CEOA 旨在通过比较视听事件-对象对之间的差异来对齐音频事件和视觉对象的学习嵌入。然后，与某些音频事件相关的视觉对象（反之亦然）通过交叉注意力得到强调，并经过 SF 进行语义级融合。实验表明：1）所提出的配备CEOA和SF的AVSC模型优于纯音频和纯视觉模型的结果，即视听结果优于单一模态的结果。 2）CEOA在细粒度的层面上对齐音频事件和相关视觉对象的嵌入，而SF有效地整合了两者； 3）与其他大规模集成系统相比，即使不使用额外的数据集和数据增强技巧，所提出的模型也显示出有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多分支模型，通过对比事件-物体对齐（CEOA）和语义融合（SF）方法，实现音频-视觉场景分类（AVSC）。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅使用音频或视觉信号单独分类，或在高层融合，忽略了音频事件与视觉物体的细粒度信息及其隐含关系，而人类依赖这些细节及一致性识别场景。
AI.method: 设计包含CEOA模块和SF模块的多分支模型：CEOA通过对比音频-视觉事件-物体对齐嵌入，利用跨注意力增强关联性；SF在语义层融合对齐后的特征。
AI.result: 实验表明：1) 音频-视觉模型优于单模态模型；2) CEOA在细粒度对齐上有效，SF实现高效融合；3) 不依赖额外数据集和数据增强时仍具竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过细粒度事件-物体对齐与语义融合，有效提升音频-视觉场景分类性能，且无需复杂数据增强即可达到先进水平。

CEOA aims to align the learned embeddings of audio events and visual objects by comparing the difference between audio-visual event-object pairs. Then, visual objects associated with certain audio events and vice versa are accentuated by cross-attention and undergo SF for semantic-level fusion. Experiments show that: 1) the proposed AVSC model equipped with CEOA and SF outperforms the results of audio-only and visual-only models, i.e., the audio-visual results are better than the results from a single modality. 2) CEOA aligns the embeddings of audio events and related visual objects on a fine-grained level, and the SF effectively integrates both; 3) Compared with other large-scale integrated systems, the proposed model shows competitive performance, even without using additional datasets and data augmentation tricks. 以往的场景分类工作主要基于音频或视觉信号，而人类通过多种感官来感知环境场景。最近关于视听场景分类的研究分别对目标数据集上的大规模音频和图像预训练模型进行微调，然后融合音频模型和视觉模型的中间表示，或者融合两个模型在剪辑级别的粗粒度决策。这些方法忽略了视听场景（AVS）中详细的音频事件和视觉对象，而人类经常通过其中的音频事件和视觉对象以及它们之间的一致性来识别不同的场景。为了利用AVS中音频事件和视觉对象的细粒度信息，并协调音频事件和视觉对象之间的隐式关系，本文提出了一种配备对比事件对象对齐（CEOA）和基于语义的融合（SF）的AVSC多分支模型。 CEOA 旨在通过比较视听事件-对象对之间的差异来对齐音频事件和视觉对象的学习嵌入。然后，与某些音频事件相关的视觉对象（反之亦然）通过交叉注意力得到强调，并经过 SF 进行语义级融合。实验表明：1）所提出的配备CEOA和SF的AVSC模型优于纯音频和纯视觉模型的结果，即视听结果优于单一模态的结果。 2）CEOA在细粒度的层面上对齐音频事件和相关视觉对象的嵌入，而SF有效地整合了两者； 3）与其他大规模集成系统相比，即使不使用额外的数据集和数据增强技巧，所提出的模型也显示出有竞争力的性能。 本文提出一种多分支模型，通过对比事件-物体对齐（CEOA）和语义融合（SF）方法，实现音频-视觉场景分类（AVSC）。 Yuanbo Hou,Bo Kang,Dick Botteldooren cs.SD,cs.MM,eess.AS,eess.IV

title: A Feature-space Multimodal Data Augmentation Technique for Text-video Retrieval
title_zh: 用于文本视频检索的特征空间多模态数据增强技术
comment: Accepted for presentation at 30th ACM International Conference on Multimedia (ACM MM)
comments: Accepted for presentation at 30th ACM International Conference on Multimedia (ACM MM)
abstract: Every hour, huge amounts of visual contents are posted on social media and user-generated content platforms. To find relevant videos by means of a natural language query, text-video retrieval methods have received increased attention over the past few years. Data augmentation techniques were introduced to increase the performance on unseen test examples by creating new training samples with the application of semantics-preserving techniques, such as color space or geometric transformations on images. Yet, these techniques are usually applied on raw data, leading to more resource-demanding solutions and also requiring the shareability of the raw data, which may not always be true, e.g. copyright issues with clips from movies or TV series. To address this shortcoming, we propose a multimodal data augmentation technique which works in the feature space and creates new videos and captions by mixing semantically similar samples. We experiment our solution on a large scale public dataset, EPIC-Kitchens-100, and achieve considerable improvements over a baseline method, improved state-of-the-art performance, while at the same time performing multiple ablation studies. We release code and pretrained models on Github at https://github.com/aranciokov/FSMMDA_VideoRetrieval.
summary: Every hour, huge amounts of visual contents are posted on social media and user-generated content platforms. To find relevant videos by means of a natural language query, text-video retrieval methods have received increased attention over the past few years. Data augmentation techniques were introduced to increase the performance on unseen test examples by creating new training samples with the application of semantics-preserving techniques, such as color space or geometric transformations on images. Yet, these techniques are usually applied on raw data, leading to more resource-demanding solutions and also requiring the shareability of the raw data, which may not always be true, e.g. copyright issues with clips from movies or TV series. To address this shortcoming, we propose a multimodal data augmentation technique which works in the feature space and creates new videos and captions by mixing semantically similar samples. We experiment our solution on a large scale public dataset, EPIC-Kitchens-100, and achieve considerable improvements over a baseline method, improved state-of-the-art performance, while at the same time performing multiple ablation studies. We release code and pretrained models on Github at https://github.com/aranciokov/FSMMDA_VideoRetrieval.
abstract_zh: 每小时，社交媒体和用户生成内容平台上都会发布大量视觉内容。为了通过自然语言查询来查找相关视频，文本视频检索方法在过去几年中受到了越来越多的关注。引入数据增强技术，通过应用语义保留技术（例如图像上的颜色空间或几何变换）创建新的训练样本，来提高未见过的测试示例的性能。然而，这些技术通常应用于原始数据，导致需要更多资源的解决方案，并且还需要原始数据的可共享性，这可能并不总是正确的，例如电影或电视剧剪辑的版权问题。为了解决这个缺点，我们提出了一种多模态数据增强技术，该技术在特征空间中工作，并通过混合语义相似的样本来创建新的视频和字幕。我们在大规模公共数据集 EPIC-Kitchens-100 上对我们的解决方案进行了实验，并在基线方法的基础上取得了相当大的改进，提高了最先进的性能，同时进行了多项消融研究。我们在 Github 上发布了代码和预训练模型：https://github.com/aranciokov/FSMMDA_VideoRetrieval。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于特征空间的多模态数据增强技术，用于提升文本-视频检索性能。
AI.motivation: 现有数据增强方法在原始数据上操作导致资源消耗高且存在版权问题，需更高效且无需原始数据的方法。
AI.method: 在特征空间中混合语义相似样本生成新视频及字幕，无需处理原始数据。
AI.result: 在EPIC-Kitchens-100数据集上显著优于基线方法，提升检索性能并验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升文本-视频检索性能，且具有资源高效和版权友好优势。

title: Learning Shape Control of Elastoplastic Deformable Linear Objects
title_zh: 学习弹塑性可变形线性物体的形状控制
comment: ef:2021 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), pp. 4438-4444
comments: ef:2021 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), pp. 4438-4444
abstract: Deformable object manipulation tasks have long been regarded as challenging robotic problems. However, until recently very little work has been done on the subject, with most robotic manipulation methods being developed for rigid objects. Deformable objects are more difficult to model and simulate, which has limited the use of model-free Reinforcement Learning (RL) strategies, due to their need for large amounts of data that can only be satisfied in simulation. This paper proposes a new shape control task for Deformable Linear Objects (DLOs). More notably, we present the first study on the effects of elastoplastic properties on this type of problem. Objects with elastoplasticity such as metal wires, are found in various applications and are challenging to manipulate due to their nonlinear behavior. We first highlight the challenges of solving such a manipulation task from an RL perspective, particularly in defining the reward. Then, based on concepts from differential geometry, we propose an intrinsic shape representation using discrete curvature and torsion. Finally, we show through an empirical study that in order to successfully solve the proposed task using Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG), the reward needs to include intrinsic information about the shape of the DLO.
summary: Deformable object manipulation tasks have long been regarded as challenging robotic problems. However, until recently very little work has been done on the subject, with most robotic manipulation methods being developed for rigid objects. Deformable objects are more difficult to model and simulate, which has limited the use of model-free Reinforcement Learning (RL) strategies, due to their need for large amounts of data that can only be satisfied in simulation. This paper proposes a new shape control task for Deformable Linear Objects (DLOs). More notably, we present the first study on the effects of elastoplastic properties on this type of problem. Objects with elastoplasticity such as metal wires, are found in various applications and are challenging to manipulate due to their nonlinear behavior. We first highlight the challenges of solving such a manipulation task from an RL perspective, particularly in defining the reward. Then, based on concepts from differential geometry, we propose an intrinsic shape representation using discrete curvature and torsion. Finally, we show through an empirical study that in order to successfully solve the proposed task using Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG), the reward needs to include intrinsic information about the shape of the DLO.
abstract_zh: 长期以来，可变形物体操纵任务一直被认为是具有挑战性的机器人问题。然而，直到最近，这方面的工作还很少，大多数机器人操纵方法都是针对刚性物体开发的。可变形物体更难以建模和模拟，这限制了无模型强化学习（RL）策略的使用，因为它们需要大量数据，而这些数据只能在模拟中得到满足。本文提出了可变形线性物体（DLO）的新形状控制任务。更值得注意的是，我们首次研究了弹塑性特性对此类问题的影响。具有弹塑性的物体（例如金属线）存在于各种应用中，并且由于其非线性行为而难以操纵。我们首先强调从强化学习的角度解决此类操纵任务的挑战，特别是在定义奖励方面。然后，基于微分几何的概念，我们提出了使用离散曲率和扭转的内在形状表示。最后，我们通过实证研究表明，为了使用深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）成功解决所提出的任务，奖励需要包含有关 DLO 形状的内在信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对具有弹性-塑性特性的可变形线性物体（DLO）的形状控制任务，并首次研究了弹性-塑性属性对这类问题的影响。
AI.motivation: 可变形物体操作是机器人领域的挑战性问题，传统方法多针对刚体。弹性-塑性物体（如金属丝）因非线性行为难以建模，且现有强化学习方法在奖励函数设计上存在不足。
AI.method: 基于微分几何理论，提出使用离散曲率和挠率的内在形状表示，并结合深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）算法进行训练。
AI.result: 实证表明，DDPG算法要成功解决该任务，奖励函数需包含DLO形状的内在信息，验证了所提方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次将弹性-塑性特性纳入DLO形状控制研究，提出了基于几何特征的内在表示方法，为复杂变形物体的控制提供了新思路。

title: Evaluation and comparison of eight popular Lidar and Visual SLAM algorithms
title_zh: 八种流行的激光雷达和视觉SLAM算法的评估和比较
abstract: In this paper, we evaluate eight popular and open-source 3D Lidar and visual SLAM (Simultaneous Localization and Mapping) algorithms, namely LOAM, Lego LOAM, LIO SAM, HDL Graph, ORB SLAM3, Basalt VIO, and SVO2. We have devised experiments both indoor and outdoor to investigate the effect of the following items: i) effect of mounting positions of the sensors, ii) effect of terrain type and vibration, iii) effect of motion (variation in linear and angular speed). We compare their performance in terms of relative and absolute pose error. We also provide comparison on their required computational resources. We thoroughly analyse and discuss the results and identify the best performing system for the environment cases with our multi-camera and multi-Lidar indoor and outdoor datasets. We hope our findings help one to choose a sensor and the corresponding SLAM algorithm combination suiting their needs, based on their target environment.
summary: In this paper, we evaluate eight popular and open-source 3D Lidar and visual SLAM (Simultaneous Localization and Mapping) algorithms, namely LOAM, Lego LOAM, LIO SAM, HDL Graph, ORB SLAM3, Basalt VIO, and SVO2. We have devised experiments both indoor and outdoor to investigate the effect of the following items: i) effect of mounting positions of the sensors, ii) effect of terrain type and vibration, iii) effect of motion (variation in linear and angular speed). We compare their performance in terms of relative and absolute pose error. We also provide comparison on their required computational resources. We thoroughly analyse and discuss the results and identify the best performing system for the environment cases with our multi-camera and multi-Lidar indoor and outdoor datasets. We hope our findings help one to choose a sensor and the corresponding SLAM algorithm combination suiting their needs, based on their target environment.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们评估了八种流行的开源 3D 激光雷达和视觉 SLAM（同时定位和建图）算法，即 LOAM、Lego LOAM、LIO SAM、HDL Graph、ORB SLAM3、Basalt VIO 和 SVO2。我们设计了室内和室外实验来研究以下因素的影响：i）传感器安装位置的影响，ii）地形类型和振动的影响，iii）运动的影响（线速度和角速度的变化）。我们根据相对和绝对姿态误差来比较它们的性能。我们还提供了他们所需的计算资源的比较。我们彻底分析和讨论结果，并利用我们的多摄像头和多激光雷达室内和室外数据集确定适合环境案例的最佳性能系统。我们希望我们的研究结果能够帮助人们根据目标环境选择适合其需求的传感器和相应的 SLAM 算法组合。

AI.tldr: 评估和比较八种流行的3D LiDAR和视觉SLAM算法在不同环境下的性能。
AI.motivation: 不同环境和应用场景需要选择合适的SLAM算法，但现有研究缺乏系统性的对比分析，需为用户提供选型依据。
AI.method: 设计室内外实验，测试传感器安装位置、地形类型及振动、运动变化等因素，比较算法位姿误差和计算资源需求。
AI.result: 分析各因素对算法性能的影响，识别出不同环境下的最佳SLAM系统组合。
AI.conclusion: 通过实验结果帮助用户根据目标环境选择合适的传感器与SLAM算法组合。

search_text: Evaluation and comparison of eight popular Lidar and Visual SLAM algorithms 八种流行的激光雷达和视觉SLAM算法的评估和比较 In this paper, we evaluate eight popular and open-source 3D Lidar and visual SLAM (Simultaneous Localization and Mapping) algorithms, namely LOAM, Lego LOAM, LIO SAM, HDL Graph, ORB SLAM3, Basalt VIO, and SVO2. We have devised experiments both indoor and outdoor to investigate the effect of the following items: i) effect of mounting positions of the sensors, ii) effect of terrain type and vibration, iii) effect of motion (variation in linear and angular speed). We compare their performance in terms of relative and absolute pose error. We also provide comparison on their required computational resources. We thoroughly analyse and discuss the results and identify the best performing system for the environment cases with our multi-camera and multi-Lidar indoor and outdoor datasets. We hope our findings help one to choose a sensor and the corresponding SLAM algorithm combination suiting their needs, based on their target environment. 在本文中，我们评估了八种流行的开源 3D 激光雷达和视觉 SLAM（同时定位和建图）算法，即 LOAM、Lego LOAM、LIO SAM、HDL Graph、ORB SLAM3、Basalt VIO 和 SVO2。我们设计了室内和室外实验来研究以下因素的影响：i）传感器安装位置的影响，ii）地形类型和振动的影响，iii）运动的影响（线速度和角速度的变化）。我们根据相对和绝对姿态误差来比较它们的性能。我们还提供了他们所需的计算资源的比较。我们彻底分析和讨论结果，并利用我们的多摄像头和多激光雷达室内和室外数据集确定适合环境案例的最佳性能系统。我们希望我们的研究结果能够帮助人们根据目标环境选择适合其需求的传感器和相应的 SLAM 算法组合。 评估和比较八种流行的3D LiDAR和视觉SLAM算法在不同环境下的性能。 Bharath Garigipati,Nataliya Strokina,Reza Ghabcheloo cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Linda Lastrico,Luca Garello,Francesco Rea,Nicoletta Noceti,Fulvio Mastrogiovanni,Alessandra Sciutti,Alessandro Carfi
title: Robots with Different Embodiments Can Express and Influence Carefulness in Object Manipulation
title_zh: 具有不同实施例的机器人可以表达并影响物体操作的谨慎性
comment: Proceedings of the IEEE International Conference on Development and Learning (ICDL 2022) - preprint version, published version available at https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/9962196
comments: Proceedings of the IEEE International Conference on Development and Learning (ICDL 2022) - preprint version, published version available at https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/9962196
abstract: Humans have an extraordinary ability to communicate and read the properties of objects by simply watching them being carried by someone else. This level of communicative skills and interpretation, available to humans, is essential for collaborative robots if they are to interact naturally and effectively. For example, suppose a robot is handing over a fragile object. In that case, the human who receives it should be informed of its fragility in advance, through an immediate and implicit message, i.e., by the direct modulation of the robot's action. This work investigates the perception of object manipulations performed with a communicative intent by two robots with different embodiments (an iCub humanoid robot and a Baxter robot). We designed the robots' movements to communicate carefulness or not during the transportation of objects. We found that not only this feature is correctly perceived by human observers, but it can elicit as well a form of motor adaptation in subsequent human object manipulations. In addition, we get an insight into which motion features may induce to manipulate an object more or less carefully.
summary: Humans have an extraordinary ability to communicate and read the properties of objects by simply watching them being carried by someone else. This level of communicative skills and interpretation, available to humans, is essential for collaborative robots if they are to interact naturally and effectively. For example, suppose a robot is handing over a fragile object. In that case, the human who receives it should be informed of its fragility in advance, through an immediate and implicit message, i.e., by the direct modulation of the robot's action. This work investigates the perception of object manipulations performed with a communicative intent by two robots with different embodiments (an iCub humanoid robot and a Baxter robot). We designed the robots' movements to communicate carefulness or not during the transportation of objects. We found that not only this feature is correctly perceived by human observers, but it can elicit as well a form of motor adaptation in subsequent human object manipulations. In addition, we get an insight into which motion features may induce to manipulate an object more or less carefully.
abstract_zh: 人类具有非凡的能力，可以通过观察别人携带的物体来进行交流和解读物体的属性。如果协作机器人要自然有效地进行交互，人类拥有的这种水平的沟通技巧和解释能力对于协作机器人来说至关重要。例如，假设机器人正在移交易碎物品。在这种情况下，接收它的人应该通过立即和隐含的消息，即通过机器人动作的直接调制，提前告知其脆弱性。这项工作研究了两个具有不同实施例的机器人（iCub 人形机器人和 Baxter 机器人）以交流意图执行的对象操作的感知。我们设计机器人的动作来传达物体运输过程中是否小心。我们发现，这一特征不仅能够被人类观察者正确感知，而且还可以在随后的人类物体操作中引发某种形式的运动适应。此外，我们还深入了解哪些运动特征可能会导致或多或少仔细地操纵对象。

AI.tldr: 研究不同形态的机器人通过物体操作动作传达谨慎性，并观察人类是否能感知并调整自身操作。
AI.motivation: 协作机器人需要通过非语言方式（如动作）有效传达物体属性，以促进人类与机器人之间的自然协作。
AI.method: 使用iCub和Baxter机器人设计不同动作来传达谨慎性，通过实验观察人类对机器人动作的感知及后续操作的适应性调整。
AI.result: 人类能够准确感知机器人动作传达的谨慎性，并据此调整自身操作，同时识别出影响谨慎性的关键运动特征。
AI.conclusion: 机器人可通过动作有效传达谨慎性信息，影响人类操作行为，为机器人与人类协作提供新方法。

title: AstroVision: Towards Autonomous Feature Detection and Description for Missions to Small Bodies Using Deep Learning
title_zh: AstroVision：利用深度学习实现小型物体任务的自主特征检测和描述
abstract: Missions to small celestial bodies rely heavily on optical feature tracking for characterization of and relative navigation around the target body. While deep learning has led to great advancements in feature detection and description, training and validating data-driven models for space applications is challenging due to the limited availability of large-scale, annotated datasets. This paper introduces AstroVision, a large-scale dataset comprised of 115,970 densely annotated, real images of 16 different small bodies captured during past and ongoing missions. We leverage AstroVision to develop a set of standardized benchmarks and conduct an exhaustive evaluation of both handcrafted and data-driven feature detection and description methods. Next, we employ AstroVision for end-to-end training of a state-of-the-art, deep feature detection and description network and demonstrate improved performance on multiple benchmarks. The full benchmarking pipeline and the dataset will be made publicly available to facilitate the advancement of computer vision algorithms for space applications.
summary: Missions to small celestial bodies rely heavily on optical feature tracking for characterization of and relative navigation around the target body. While deep learning has led to great advancements in feature detection and description, training and validating data-driven models for space applications is challenging due to the limited availability of large-scale, annotated datasets. This paper introduces AstroVision, a large-scale dataset comprised of 115,970 densely annotated, real images of 16 different small bodies captured during past and ongoing missions. We leverage AstroVision to develop a set of standardized benchmarks and conduct an exhaustive evaluation of both handcrafted and data-driven feature detection and description methods. Next, we employ AstroVision for end-to-end training of a state-of-the-art, deep feature detection and description network and demonstrate improved performance on multiple benchmarks. The full benchmarking pipeline and the dataset will be made publicly available to facilitate the advancement of computer vision algorithms for space applications.
abstract_zh: 小天体任务在很大程度上依赖于光学特征跟踪来表征目标天体以及围绕目标天体进行相对导航。虽然深度学习在特征检测和描述方面取得了巨大进步，但由于大规模带注释的数据集的可用性有限，训练和验证空间应用的数据驱动模型仍然具有挑战性。本文介绍了 AstroVision，这是一个大型数据集，由在过去和正在进行的任务中捕获的 16 个不同小物体的 115,970 张密集注释的真实图像组成。我们利用 AstroVision 开发一套标准化基准，并对手工和数据驱动的特征检测和描述方法进行详尽的评估。接下来，我们使用 AstroVision 对最先进的深度特征检测和描述网络进行端到端训练，并在多个基准测试中展示改进的性能。完整的基准测试流程和数据集将公开，以促进空间应用计算机视觉算法的进步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AstroVision数据集并评估深度学习方法，以提升小天体任务中的特征检测与描述性能。
AI.motivation: 小天体任务依赖光学特征跟踪，但缺乏大规模标注数据导致深度学习模型训练困难。
AI.method: 构建包含115,970张标注图像的AstroVision数据集，制定标准化基准，对比传统与数据驱动方法，并训练端到端深度网络。
AI.result: 深度网络在多项基准中表现优于传统方法，数据集与评估流程已公开。
AI.conclusion: AstroVision为小天体任务的计算机视觉算法研究提供了关键资源与基准支持。

The full benchmarking pipeline and the dataset will be made publicly available to facilitate the advancement of computer vision algorithms for space applications. 小天体任务在很大程度上依赖于光学特征跟踪来表征目标天体以及围绕目标天体进行相对导航。虽然深度学习在特征检测和描述方面取得了巨大进步，但由于大规模带注释的数据集的可用性有限，训练和验证空间应用的数据驱动模型仍然具有挑战性。本文介绍了 AstroVision，这是一个大型数据集，由在过去和正在进行的任务中捕获的 16 个不同小物体的 115,970 张密集注释的真实图像组成。我们利用 AstroVision 开发一套标准化基准，并对手工和数据驱动的特征检测和描述方法进行详尽的评估。接下来，我们使用 AstroVision 对最先进的深度特征检测和描述网络进行端到端训练，并在多个基准测试中展示改进的性能。完整的基准测试流程和数据集将公开，以促进空间应用计算机视觉算法的进步。 本文提出AstroVision数据集并评估深度学习方法，以提升小天体任务中的特征检测与描述性能。 Travis Driver,Katherine Skinner,Mehregan Dor,Panagiotis Tsiotras astro-ph.IM,astro-ph.EP,cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Ziyi Wang,Bo Lu,Yonghao Long,Fangxun Zhong,Tak-Hong Cheung,Qi Dou,Yunhui Liu
title: AutoLaparo: A New Dataset of Integrated Multi-tasks for Image-guided Surgical Automation in Laparoscopic Hysterectomy
title_zh: AutoLaparo：用于腹腔镜子宫切除术图像引导手术自动化的集成多任务新数据集
comment: Accepted at MICCAI 2022
comments: Accepted at MICCAI 2022
abstract: Computer-assisted minimally invasive surgery has great potential in benefiting modern operating theatres. The video data streamed from the endoscope provides rich information to support context-awareness for next-generation intelligent surgical systems. To achieve accurate perception and automatic manipulation during the procedure, learning based technique is a promising way, which enables advanced image analysis and scene understanding in recent years. However, learning such models highly relies on large-scale, high-quality, and multi-task labelled data. This is currently a bottleneck for the topic, as available public dataset is still extremely limited in the field of CAI. In this paper, we present and release the first integrated dataset (named AutoLaparo) with multiple image-based perception tasks to facilitate learning-based automation in hysterectomy surgery. Our AutoLaparo dataset is developed based on full-length videos of entire hysterectomy procedures. Specifically, three different yet highly correlated tasks are formulated in the dataset, including surgical workflow recognition, laparoscope motion prediction, and instrument and key anatomy segmentation. In addition, we provide experimental results with state-of-the-art models as reference benchmarks for further model developments and evaluations on this dataset. The dataset is available at https://autolaparo.github.io.
summary: Computer-assisted minimally invasive surgery has great potential in benefiting modern operating theatres. The video data streamed from the endoscope provides rich information to support context-awareness for next-generation intelligent surgical systems. To achieve accurate perception and automatic manipulation during the procedure, learning based technique is a promising way, which enables advanced image analysis and scene understanding in recent years. However, learning such models highly relies on large-scale, high-quality, and multi-task labelled data. This is currently a bottleneck for the topic, as available public dataset is still extremely limited in the field of CAI. In this paper, we present and release the first integrated dataset (named AutoLaparo) with multiple image-based perception tasks to facilitate learning-based automation in hysterectomy surgery. Our AutoLaparo dataset is developed based on full-length videos of entire hysterectomy procedures. Specifically, three different yet highly correlated tasks are formulated in the dataset, including surgical workflow recognition, laparoscope motion prediction, and instrument and key anatomy segmentation. In addition, we provide experimental results with state-of-the-art models as reference benchmarks for further model developments and evaluations on this dataset. The dataset is available at https://autolaparo.github.io.
abstract_zh: 计算机辅助微创手术在造福现代手术室方面具有巨大潜力。从内窥镜流式传输的视频数据提供了丰富的信息，以支持下一代智能手术系统的情境感知。为了在过程中实现准确的感知和自动操作，基于学习的技术是一种有前途的方法，近年来它使得先进的图像分析和场景理解成为可能。然而，学习此类模型高度依赖于大规模、高质量、多任务的标记数据。这是目前该主题的瓶颈，因为 CAI 领域可用的公共数据集仍然极其有限。在本文中，我们提出并发布了第一个集成数据集（名为 AutoLaparo），其中包含多个基于图像的感知任务，以促进子宫切除手术中基于学习的自动化。我们的 AutoLaparo 数据集是根据整个子宫切除手术的完整视频开发的。具体来说，数据集中制定了三个不同但高度相关的任务，包括手术流程识别、腹腔镜运动预测以及器械和关键解剖分割。此外，我们还提供了最先进模型的实验结果，作为进一步模型开发和评估该数据集的参考基准。该数据集可在 https://autolaparo.github.io 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并发布了首个集成多任务的AutoLaparo数据集，用于促进腹腔镜子宫切除术中基于学习的手术自动化。
AI.motivation: 当前计算机辅助手术领域缺乏大规模、高质量的多任务标注数据，严重制约了基于学习的自动化技术发展。
AI.method: 基于完整手术过程的视频数据构建数据集，包含三个高度关联的任务：手术流程识别、腹腔镜运动预测及器械与关键解剖结构分割，并提供前沿模型的实验基准。
AI.result: 发布AutoLaparo数据集（含完整标注）及对应基准实验结果，为后续模型研发与评估提供数据支持。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集有效解决了领域内数据稀缺问题，为下一代智能手术系统的感知与自动化操作研究奠定基础。

title: Texture features in medical image analysis: a survey
title_zh: 医学图像分析中的纹理特征：一项调查
abstract: The texture is defined as spatial structure of the intensities of the pixels in an image that is repeated periodically in the whole image or regions, and makes the concept of the image. Texture, color and shape are three main components which are used by human visual system to recognize image contents. In this paper, first of all, efficient and updated texture analysis operators are survived with details. Next, some state-of-the-art methods are survived that use texture analysis in medical applications and disease diagnosis. Finally, different approaches are compared in terms of accuracy, dataset, application, etc. Results demonstrate that texture features separately or in joint of different feature sets such as deep, color or shape features provide high accuracy in medical image classification.
summary: The texture is defined as spatial structure of the intensities of the pixels in an image that is repeated periodically in the whole image or regions, and makes the concept of the image. Texture, color and shape are three main components which are used by human visual system to recognize image contents. In this paper, first of all, efficient and updated texture analysis operators are survived with details. Next, some state-of-the-art methods are survived that use texture analysis in medical applications and disease diagnosis. Finally, different approaches are compared in terms of accuracy, dataset, application, etc. Results demonstrate that texture features separately or in joint of different feature sets such as deep, color or shape features provide high accuracy in medical image classification.
abstract_zh: 纹理被定义为图像中像素强度的空间结构，在整个图像或区域中周期性重复，并构成图像的概念。纹理、颜色和形状是人类视觉系统识别图像内容的三个主要组成部分。在本文中，首先，高效且更新的纹理分析算子在细节上得以保留。接下来，一些在医学应用和疾病诊断中使用纹理分析的最先进的方法得以保留。最后，从准确性、数据集、应用等方面对不同方法进行比较。结果表明，单独的纹理特征或与不同特征集（例如深度、颜色或形状特征）联合的纹理特征在医学图像分类中提供了高精度。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了医学图像分析中纹理特征的应用，比较了不同方法的性能，并验证了纹理特征在疾病诊断中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 纹理特征作为图像的重要组成部分，在医学图像分析中具有关键作用，但其方法和应用需要系统梳理和比较以提升诊断准确性。
AI.method: 通过回顾高效纹理分析算子，总结医学图像分析中的最新技术，并从准确性、数据集等维度对比不同方法的性能。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，纹理特征单独使用或与深度学习、颜色、形状等特征结合，可显著提升医学图像分类的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 纹理特征在医学图像分析中具有重要价值，未来需结合多模态特征并开发标准化数据集以进一步提升诊断效果。

title: SmartControllerJS: A JavaScript library to turn smartphones into controllers for web-based interactive experiments
title_zh: SmartControllerJS：一个 JavaScript 库，可将智能手机转变为基于 Web 的交互式实验的控制器
abstract: We introduce SmartControllerJS, a new JavaScript library for fast, cost-effective designing of web applications controlled via everyday smartphones. At its core, SmartControllerJS establishes a connection between two webpages, one page running on a desktop browser and the other on the user's smartphone. The smartphone webpage loads a controller interface allowing users to control a web application running on their computer's browser. The SmartControllerJS framework enables fast iteration loops when designing interactive user experiments because it has minimal friction and allows for scaling, while having no running costs. We first describe how this library is built, how it can be used, and provide interactive examples. We then present two games designed for public screens along with results from user studies evaluating acceptability and ease of use. Finally, we implement a custom controller based on user feedback and introduce connection monitoring tools. We believe SmartControllerJS can accelerate the design of interactive experiments for researchers in Human-Computer Interaction, and be a useful tool for educational projects. All our code is available at https://github.com/SmartControllerJS and links to all demos can be found in Table I. To explore our demos, we recommend reading this work on a desktop computer with your smartphone in hand.
summary: We introduce SmartControllerJS, a new JavaScript library for fast, cost-effective designing of web applications controlled via everyday smartphones. At its core, SmartControllerJS establishes a connection between two webpages, one page running on a desktop browser and the other on the user's smartphone. The smartphone webpage loads a controller interface allowing users to control a web application running on their computer's browser. The SmartControllerJS framework enables fast iteration loops when designing interactive user experiments because it has minimal friction and allows for scaling, while having no running costs. We first describe how this library is built, how it can be used, and provide interactive examples. We then present two games designed for public screens along with results from user studies evaluating acceptability and ease of use. Finally, we implement a custom controller based on user feedback and introduce connection monitoring tools. We believe SmartControllerJS can accelerate the design of interactive experiments for researchers in Human-Computer Interaction, and be a useful tool for educational projects. All our code is available at https://github.com/SmartControllerJS and links to all demos can be found in Table I. To explore our demos, we recommend reading this work on a desktop computer with your smartphone in hand.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 SmartControllerJS，这是一个新的 JavaScript 库，用于快速、经济高效地设计通过日常智能手机控制的 Web 应用程序。 SmartControllerJS 的核心是在两个网页之间建立连接，一个页面在桌面浏览器上运行，另一个页面在用户的智能手机上运行。智能手机网页加载控制器界面，允许用户控制在计算机浏览器上运行的网络应用程序。 SmartControllerJS 框架在设计交互式用户实验时支持快速迭代循环，因为它具有最小的摩擦并允许扩展，同时没有运行成本。我们首先描述这个库是如何构建的，如何使用它，并提供交互式示例。然后，我们展示了两款专为公共屏幕设计的游戏，以及评估可接受性和易用性的用户研究结果。最后，我们根据用户反馈实现了自定义控制器并引入了连接监控工具。我们相信 SmartControllerJS 可以加速人机交互研究人员的交互实验设计，并成为教育项目的有用工具。我们所有的代码都可以在 https://github.com/SmartControllerJS 上找到，所有演示的链接可以在表 I 中找到。要探索我们的演示，我们建议您在手持智能手机的台式计算机上阅读本文。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为SmartControllerJS的JavaScript库，通过智能手机将桌面浏览器中的网页应用转化为交互式实验控制器。
AI.motivation: 传统交互实验设计存在成本高、迭代周期长等问题，需一种低成本、易用的解决方案以加速人机交互研究和教育项目开发。
AI.method: 构建双网页通信框架，通过智能手机加载控制界面与桌面端应用交互，并提供示例游戏、用户研究及连接监测工具验证有效性。
AI.result: 开发出支持实时控制的库，通过用户研究验证其易用性，基于反馈优化控制器设计，并开源代码供研究者使用。
AI.conclusion: SmartControllerJS为交互实验设计提供了高效、低成本的工具，可广泛应用于人机交互研究及教育场景。

search_text: SmartControllerJS: A JavaScript library to turn smartphones into controllers for web-based interactive experiments SmartControllerJS：一个 JavaScript 库，可将智能手机转变为基于 Web 的交互式实验的控制器 We introduce SmartControllerJS, a new JavaScript library for fast, cost-effective designing of web applications controlled via everyday smartphones. At its core, SmartControllerJS establishes a connection between two webpages, one page running on a desktop browser and the other on the user's smartphone. The smartphone webpage loads a controller interface allowing users to control a web application running on their computer's browser. The SmartControllerJS framework enables fast iteration loops when designing interactive user experiments because it has minimal friction and allows for scaling, while having no running costs. We first describe how this library is built, how it can be used, and provide interactive examples. We then present two games designed for public screens along with results from user studies evaluating acceptability and ease of use. Finally, we implement a custom controller based on user feedback and introduce connection monitoring tools. We believe SmartControllerJS can accelerate the design of interactive experiments for researchers in Human-Computer Interaction, and be a useful tool for educational projects. All our code is available at https://github.com/SmartControllerJS and links to all demos can be found in Table I. To explore our demos, we recommend reading this work on a desktop computer with your smartphone in hand. 我们推出了 SmartControllerJS，这是一个新的 JavaScript 库，用于快速、经济高效地设计通过日常智能手机控制的 Web 应用程序。 SmartControllerJS 的核心是在两个网页之间建立连接，一个页面在桌面浏览器上运行，另一个页面在用户的智能手机上运行。智能手机网页加载控制器界面，允许用户控制在计算机浏览器上运行的网络应用程序。 SmartControllerJS 框架在设计交互式用户实验时支持快速迭代循环，因为它具有最小的摩擦并允许扩展，同时没有运行成本。我们首先描述这个库是如何构建的，如何使用它，并提供交互式示例。然后，我们展示了两款专为公共屏幕设计的游戏，以及评估可接受性和易用性的用户研究结果。最后，我们根据用户反馈实现了自定义控制器并引入了连接监控工具。我们相信 SmartControllerJS 可以加速人机交互研究人员的交互实验设计，并成为教育项目的有用工具。我们所有的代码都可以在 https://github.com/SmartControllerJS 上找到，所有演示的链接可以在表 I 中找到。要探索我们的演示，我们建议您在手持智能手机的台式计算机上阅读本文。 本文介绍了一个名为SmartControllerJS的JavaScript库，通过智能手机将桌面浏览器中的网页应用转化为交互式实验控制器。 Emma Poliakova,Fraser Dempster,Abubakr Mahmood,Jonathan Grizou cs.HC

authors_text: Ramin Ayanzadeh,John E Dorband,Milton Halem,Tim Finin
title: Quantum-Assisted Greedy Algorithms
title_zh: 量子辅助贪婪算法
comment: in Proceedings of the 2022 International Geoscience and Remote Sensing Symposium (IGARSS)
comments: in Proceedings of the 2022 International Geoscience and Remote Sensing Symposium (IGARSS)
abstract: We show how to leverage quantum annealers (QAs) to better select candidates in greedy algorithms. Unlike conventional greedy algorithms that employ problem-specific heuristics for making locally optimal choices at each stage, we use QAs that sample from the ground state of problem-dependent Hamiltonians at cryogenic temperatures and use retrieved samples to estimate the probability distribution of problem variables. More specifically, we look at each spin of the Ising model as a random variable and contract all problem variables whose corresponding uncertainties are negligible. Our empirical results on a D-Wave 2000Q quantum processor demonstrate that the proposed quantum-assisted greedy algorithm (QAGA) scheme can find notably better solutions compared to the state-of-the-art techniques in the realm of quantum annealing
summary: We show how to leverage quantum annealers (QAs) to better select candidates in greedy algorithms. Unlike conventional greedy algorithms that employ problem-specific heuristics for making locally optimal choices at each stage, we use QAs that sample from the ground state of problem-dependent Hamiltonians at cryogenic temperatures and use retrieved samples to estimate the probability distribution of problem variables. More specifically, we look at each spin of the Ising model as a random variable and contract all problem variables whose corresponding uncertainties are negligible. Our empirical results on a D-Wave 2000Q quantum processor demonstrate that the proposed quantum-assisted greedy algorithm (QAGA) scheme can find notably better solutions compared to the state-of-the-art techniques in the realm of quantum annealing
abstract_zh: 我们展示了如何利用量子退火器（QA）在贪婪算法中更好地选择候选者。与传统的贪婪算法不同，传统的贪婪算法采用特定于问题的启发式方法在每个阶段做出局部最优选择，我们使用的 QA 是在低温下从问题相关的哈密顿量的基态中进行采样，并使用检索到的样本来估计问题变量的概率分布。更具体地说，我们将伊辛模型的每个自旋视为随机变量，并收缩相应不确定性可忽略不计的所有问题变量。我们在 D-Wave 2000Q 量子处理器上的实证结果表明，与量子退火领域的最先进技术相比，所提出的量子辅助贪婪算法 (QAGA) 方案可以找到更好的解决方案

AI.motivation: 传统贪心算法依赖启发式方法易陷入局部最优，量子退火可能提供更优解
AI.method: 利用量子退火器在低温下采样哈密顿量基态，估计变量概率分布，并收缩低不确定度变量
AI.result: 在D-Wave 2000Q实验中，QAGA相比现有量子退火技术找到更优解
AI.conclusion: 量子辅助贪心算法有效，展示了量子计算在优化问题中的潜力

title: Template matching with white balance adjustment under multiple illuminants
title_zh: 多光源下的模板匹配与白平衡调整
comment: \c{opyright} 2022 IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted. abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel template matching method with a white balancing adjustment, called N-white balancing, which was proposed for multi-illuminant scenes. To reduce the influence of lighting effects, N-white balancing is applied to images for multi-illumination color constancy, and then a template matching method is carried out by using adjusted images. In experiments, the effectiveness of the proposed method is demonstrated to be effective in object detection tasks under various illumination conditions.
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel template matching method with a white balancing adjustment, called N-white balancing, which was proposed for multi-illuminant scenes. To reduce the influence of lighting effects, N-white balancing is applied to images for multi-illumination color constancy, and then a template matching method is carried out by using adjusted images. In experiments, the effectiveness of the proposed method is demonstrated to be effective in object detection tasks under various illumination conditions.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种带有白平衡调整的新型模板匹配方法，称为N-白平衡，该方法是针对多光源场景而提出的。为了减少光照效果的影响，对图像进行N白平衡以实现多照明色彩恒常性，然后利用调整后的图像进行模板匹配方法。在实验中，该方法的有效性被证明在各种光照条件下的目标检测任务中是有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种适用于多光源场景的模板匹配方法，通过白平衡调整提升目标检测准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统模板匹配方法在多光源环境下易受光照影响，导致匹配效果下降，需改进颜色恒定性以适应复杂光照条件。
AI.method: 提出N-white balancing方法进行多光源颜色恒定调整，再基于校正后的图像执行模板匹配。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法在多种光照条件下均能有效提升目标检测任务的性能。
AI.conclusion: 结合白平衡调整的模板匹配方法能有效降低光照干扰，增强多光源场景下的匹配鲁棒性。

title: SSformer: A Lightweight Transformer for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: SSformer：用于语义分割的轻量级 Transformer
abstract: It is well believed that Transformer performs better in semantic segmentation compared to convolutional neural networks. Nevertheless, the original Vision Transformer may lack of inductive biases of local neighborhoods and possess a high time complexity. Recently, Swin Transformer sets a new record in various vision tasks by using hierarchical architecture and shifted windows while being more efficient. However, as Swin Transformer is specifically designed for image classification, it may achieve suboptimal performance on dense prediction-based segmentation task. Further, simply combing Swin Transformer with existing methods would lead to the boost of model size and parameters for the final segmentation model. In this paper, we rethink the Swin Transformer for semantic segmentation, and design a lightweight yet effective transformer model, called SSformer. In this model, considering the inherent hierarchical design of Swin Transformer, we propose a decoder to aggregate information from different layers, thus obtaining both local and global attentions. Experimental results show the proposed SSformer yields comparable mIoU performance with state-of-the-art models, while maintaining a smaller model size and lower compute.
summary: It is well believed that Transformer performs better in semantic segmentation compared to convolutional neural networks. Nevertheless, the original Vision Transformer may lack of inductive biases of local neighborhoods and possess a high time complexity. Recently, Swin Transformer sets a new record in various vision tasks by using hierarchical architecture and shifted windows while being more efficient. However, as Swin Transformer is specifically designed for image classification, it may achieve suboptimal performance on dense prediction-based segmentation task. Further, simply combing Swin Transformer with existing methods would lead to the boost of model size and parameters for the final segmentation model. In this paper, we rethink the Swin Transformer for semantic segmentation, and design a lightweight yet effective transformer model, called SSformer. In this model, considering the inherent hierarchical design of Swin Transformer, we propose a decoder to aggregate information from different layers, thus obtaining both local and global attentions. Experimental results show the proposed SSformer yields comparable mIoU performance with state-of-the-art models, while maintaining a smaller model size and lower compute.
abstract_zh: 人们普遍认为，与卷积神经网络相比，Transformer 在语义分割方面表现更好。然而，原始的 Vision Transformer 可能缺乏局部邻域的归纳偏差，并且具有较高的时间复杂度。最近，Swin Transformer 通过使用分层架构和移动窗口，同时提高了效率，在各种视觉任务中创下了新记录。然而，由于 Swin Transformer 是专门为图像分类而设计的，因此它可能在基于密集预测的分割任务上实现次优性能。此外，简单地将 Swin Transformer 与现有方法相结合将导致最终分割模型的模型大小和参数的增加。在本文中，我们重新思考用于语义分割的 Swin Transformer，并设计了一个轻量级但有效的 Transformer 模型，称为 SSformer。在该模型中，考虑到 Swin Transformer 固有的分层设计，我们提出了一个解码器来聚合来自不同层的信息，从而获得局部和全局注意力。实验结果表明，所提出的 SSformer 产生与最先进模型相当的 mIoU 性能，同时保持较小的模型大小和较低的计算量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级Transformer模型SSformer，用于语义分割任务。
AI.motivation: 传统Vision Transformer缺乏局部归纳偏置且计算复杂度高，Swin Transformer虽在分类任务表现优异，但直接用于分割时可能性能不足且模型规模增大。
AI.method: 基于Swin Transformer的层次结构设计解码器，聚合多层信息以获取局部与全局注意力机制。
AI.result: SSformer在保持较小模型尺寸和较低计算量的同时，达到与现有最先进模型相当的mIoU性能。
AI.conclusion: SSformer通过优化结构设计，在语义分割任务中实现了性能与效率的平衡。

search_text: SSformer: A Lightweight Transformer for Semantic Segmentation SSformer：用于语义分割的轻量级 Transformer It is well believed that Transformer performs better in semantic segmentation compared to convolutional neural networks. Nevertheless, the original Vision Transformer may lack of inductive biases of local neighborhoods and possess a high time complexity. Recently, Swin Transformer sets a new record in various vision tasks by using hierarchical architecture and shifted windows while being more efficient. However, as Swin Transformer is specifically designed for image classification, it may achieve suboptimal performance on dense prediction-based segmentation task. Further, simply combing Swin Transformer with existing methods would lead to the boost of model size and parameters for the final segmentation model. In this paper, we rethink the Swin Transformer for semantic segmentation, and design a lightweight yet effective transformer model, called SSformer. In this model, considering the inherent hierarchical design of Swin Transformer, we propose a decoder to aggregate information from different layers, thus obtaining both local and global attentions. Experimental results show the proposed SSformer yields comparable mIoU performance with state-of-the-art models, while maintaining a smaller model size and lower compute. 人们普遍认为，与卷积神经网络相比，Transformer 在语义分割方面表现更好。然而，原始的 Vision Transformer 可能缺乏局部邻域的归纳偏差，并且具有较高的时间复杂度。最近，Swin Transformer 通过使用分层架构和移动窗口，同时提高了效率，在各种视觉任务中创下了新记录。然而，由于 Swin Transformer 是专门为图像分类而设计的，因此它可能在基于密集预测的分割任务上实现次优性能。此外，简单地将 Swin Transformer 与现有方法相结合将导致最终分割模型的模型大小和参数的增加。在本文中，我们重新思考用于语义分割的 Swin Transformer，并设计了一个轻量级但有效的 Transformer 模型，称为 SSformer。在该模型中，考虑到 Swin Transformer 固有的分层设计，我们提出了一个解码器来聚合来自不同层的信息，从而获得局部和全局注意力。实验结果表明，所提出的 SSformer 产生与最先进模型相当的 mIoU 性能，同时保持较小的模型大小和较低的计算量。 本文提出一种轻量级Transformer模型SSformer，用于语义分割任务。 Wentao Shi,Jing Xu,Pan Gao cs.CV

title: Supervised and Reinforcement Learning from Observations in Reconnaissance Blind Chess
title_zh: 侦察盲棋观察中的监督学习和强化学习
comment: 4 Pages, IEEE Conference on Games 2022 short paper
comments: 4 Pages, IEEE Conference on Games 2022 short paper
abstract: In this work, we adapt a training approach inspired by the original AlphaGo system to play the imperfect information game of Reconnaissance Blind Chess. Using only the observations instead of a full description of the game state, we first train a supervised agent on publicly available game records. Next, we increase the performance of the agent through self-play with the on-policy reinforcement learning algorithm Proximal Policy Optimization. We do not use any search to avoid problems caused by the partial observability of game states and only use the policy network to generate moves when playing. With this approach, we achieve an ELO of 1330 on the RBC leaderboard, which places our agent at position 27 at the time of this writing. We see that self-play significantly improves performance and that the agent plays acceptably well without search and without making assumptions about the true game state.
summary: In this work, we adapt a training approach inspired by the original AlphaGo system to play the imperfect information game of Reconnaissance Blind Chess. Using only the observations instead of a full description of the game state, we first train a supervised agent on publicly available game records. Next, we increase the performance of the agent through self-play with the on-policy reinforcement learning algorithm Proximal Policy Optimization. We do not use any search to avoid problems caused by the partial observability of game states and only use the policy network to generate moves when playing. With this approach, we achieve an ELO of 1330 on the RBC leaderboard, which places our agent at position 27 at the time of this writing. We see that self-play significantly improves performance and that the agent plays acceptably well without search and without making assumptions about the true game state.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们采用了受原始 AlphaGo 系统启发的训练方法来玩侦察盲棋的不完美信息游戏。我们仅使用观察结果而不是游戏状态的完整描述，首先根据公开的游戏记录训练受监督的代理。接下来，我们通过策略强化学习算法近端策略优化的自我对弈来提高代理的性能。我们不使用任何搜索来避免游戏状态的部分可观察性引起的问题，仅使用策略网络在玩游戏时生成动作。通过这种方法，我们在 RBC 排行榜上获得了 1330 的 ELO，在撰写本文时，我们的代理排名第 27 位。我们看到自我对弈显着提高了性能，并且代理在无需搜索且无需对真实游戏状态做出假设的情况下表现得可以接受。

AI.tldr: 本文将AlphaGo的训练方法应用于侦察盲棋（RBC），通过监督学习和强化学习训练智能体，仅使用观察数据而非完整棋盘状态。
AI.motivation: 侦察盲棋存在部分可观测性问题，传统搜索算法难以直接应用，需探索基于观察数据的训练方法以提升智能体性能。
AI.method: 首先使用公开游戏记录训练监督学习模型，再通过自博弈与近端策略优化（PPO）算法进行强化学习，全程不依赖搜索和真实状态假设。
AI.result: 智能体在RBC排行榜达到1330分（排名第27），验证了自博弈有效性和无需搜索的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 自博弈显著提升性能，仅依赖观察数据和策略网络即可在部分可观测环境中实现良好表现。

authors_text: Mrudang Mathur,Josef M. Brozovich,Manuel K. Rausch
title: A Brief Note on Building Augmented Reality Models for Scientific Visualization
title_zh: 关于构建科学可视化增强现实模型的简要说明
abstract: Augmented reality (AR) has revolutionized the video game industry by providing interactive, three-dimensional visualization. Interestingly, AR technology has only been sparsely used in scientific visualization. This is, at least in part, due to the significant technical challenges previously associated with creating and accessing such models. To ease access to AR for the scientific community, we introduce a novel visualization pipeline with which they can create and render AR models. We demonstrate our pipeline by means of finite element results, but note that our pipeline is generally applicable to data that may be represented through meshed surfaces. Specifically, we use two open-source software packages, ParaView and Blender. The models are then rendered through the <model-viewer> platform, which we access through Android and iOS smartphones. To demonstrate our pipeline, we build AR models from static and time-series results of finite element simulations discretized with continuum, shell, and beam elements. Moreover, we openly provide python scripts to automate this process. Thus, others may use our framework to create and render AR models for their own research and teaching activities.
summary: Augmented reality (AR) has revolutionized the video game industry by providing interactive, three-dimensional visualization. Interestingly, AR technology has only been sparsely used in scientific visualization. This is, at least in part, due to the significant technical challenges previously associated with creating and accessing such models. To ease access to AR for the scientific community, we introduce a novel visualization pipeline with which they can create and render AR models. We demonstrate our pipeline by means of finite element results, but note that our pipeline is generally applicable to data that may be represented through meshed surfaces. Specifically, we use two open-source software packages, ParaView and Blender. The models are then rendered through the <model-viewer> platform, which we access through Android and iOS smartphones. To demonstrate our pipeline, we build AR models from static and time-series results of finite element simulations discretized with continuum, shell, and beam elements. Moreover, we openly provide python scripts to automate this process. Thus, others may use our framework to create and render AR models for their own research and teaching activities.
abstract_zh: 增强现实 (AR) 通过提供交互式三维可视化，彻底改变了视频游戏行业。有趣的是，AR 技术在科学可视化中的应用很少。这至少部分是由于之前与创建和访问此类模型相关的重大技术挑战。为了方便科学界使用 AR，我们引入了一种新颖的可视化管道，他们可以用它来创建和渲染 AR 模型。我们通过有限元结果演示我们的管道，但请注意，我们的管道通常适用于可以通过网格表面表示的数据。具体来说，我们使用两个开源软件包：ParaView 和 Blender。然后，模型通过 <model-viewer> 平台进行渲染，我们可以通过 Android 和 iOS 智能手机访问该平台。为了演示我们的流程，我们根据连续体、壳和梁单元离散化的有限元模拟的静态和时间序列结果构建了 AR 模型。此外，我们公开提供 python 脚本来自动化此过程。因此，其他人可以使用我们的框架为他们自己的研究和教学活动创建和渲染 AR 模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的可视化流程，帮助科学界创建和渲染增强现实（AR）模型，以促进科学可视化。
AI.motivation: 尽管AR技术在游戏行业广泛应用，但科学可视化领域对其应用较少，主要受限于技术挑战和模型创建的复杂性。
AI.method: 结合开源软件ParaView和Blender处理数据并生成模型，通过<model-viewer>平台在智能手机上渲染AR模型，并提供自动化Python脚本。
AI.result: 成功构建了基于有限元模拟结果的AR模型，支持静态和时序数据，并开放了自动化工具供他人使用。
AI.conclusion: 该框架降低了AR模型开发门槛，为科研和教学提供了便捷的工具，推动AR在科学可视化中的应用。

authors_text: Ziping Yu,Hongbo Huang,Weijun Chen,Yongxin Su,Yahui Liu,Xiuying Wang
title: YOLO-FaceV2: A Scale and Occlusion Aware Face Detector
title_zh: YOLO-FaceV2：尺度和遮挡感知人脸检测器
abstract: In recent years, face detection algorithms based on deep learning have made great progress. These algorithms can be generally divided into two categories, i.e. two-stage detector like Faster R-CNN and one-stage detector like YOLO. Because of the better balance between accuracy and speed, one-stage detectors have been widely used in many applications. In this paper, we propose a real-time face detector based on the one-stage detector YOLOv5, named YOLO-FaceV2. We design a Receptive Field Enhancement module called RFE to enhance receptive field of small face, and use NWD Loss to make up for the sensitivity of IoU to the location deviation of tiny objects. For face occlusion, we present an attention module named SEAM and introduce Repulsion Loss to solve it. Moreover, we use a weight function Slide to solve the imbalance between easy and hard samples and use the information of the effective receptive field to design the anchor. The experimental results on WiderFace dataset show that our face detector outperforms YOLO and its variants can be find in all easy, medium and hard subsets. Source code in https://github.com/Krasjet-Yu/YOLO-FaceV2

These algorithms can be generally divided into two categories, i.e. two-stage detector like Faster R-CNN and one-stage detector like YOLO. Because of the better balance between accuracy and speed, one-stage detectors have been widely used in many applications. In this paper, we propose a real-time face detector based on the one-stage detector YOLOv5, named YOLO-FaceV2. We design a Receptive Field Enhancement module called RFE to enhance receptive field of small face, and use NWD Loss to make up for the sensitivity of IoU to the location deviation of tiny objects. For face occlusion, we present an attention module named SEAM and introduce Repulsion Loss to solve it. Moreover, we use a weight function Slide to solve the imbalance between easy and hard samples and use the information of the effective receptive field to design the anchor. The experimental results on WiderFace dataset show that our face detector outperforms YOLO and its variants can be find in all easy, medium and hard subsets. abstract_zh: 近年来，基于深度学习的人脸检测算法取得了长足的进步。这些算法通常可以分为两类，即像 Faster R-CNN 这样的两级检测器和像 YOLO 这样的一级检测器。由于精度和速度之间具有更好的平衡，一级探测器已广泛应用于许多应用中。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于单级检测器YOLOv5的实时人脸检测器，命名为YOLO-FaceV2。我们设计了一个称为 RFE 的感受野增强模块来增强小脸的感受野，并使用 NWD Loss 来弥补 IoU 对微小物体位置偏差的敏感性。对于人脸遮挡，我们提出了一个名为 SEAM 的注意力模块，并引入 Repulsion Loss 来解决它。此外，我们使用权重函数Slide来解决简单样本和困难样本之间的不平衡，并使用有效感受野的信息来设计锚点。 WiderFace 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的人脸检测器优于 YOLO，并且它的变体可以在所有简单、中等和困难子集中找到。源代码位于 https://github.com/Krasjet-Yu/YOLO-FaceV2

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于YOLOv5的实时人脸检测器YOLO-FaceV2，重点解决小尺度人脸检测和遮挡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有单阶段检测器在小尺度人脸和遮挡场景下存在检测精度不足的问题，需针对性优化。
AI.method: 设计RFE模块增强小尺度人脸感受野，采用NWD Loss优化位置偏差；引入SEAM注意力模块和Repulsion Loss缓解遮挡影响；通过Slide权重函数平衡样本难度并优化锚点设计。
AI.result: 在WiderFace数据集的易/中/难子集上均优于YOLO系列及其他对比方法。
AI.conclusion: YOLO-FaceV2通过多模块协同优化，在尺度适应性和遮挡鲁棒性上取得显著提升，具有实际应用价值。

title: Character Generation through Self-Supervised Vectorization
title_zh: 通过自监督矢量化生成字符
abstract: The prevalent approach in self-supervised image generation is to operate on pixel level representations. While this approach can produce high quality images, it cannot benefit from the simplicity and innate quality of vectorization. Here we present a drawing agent that operates on stroke-level representation of images. At each time step, the agent first assesses the current canvas and decides whether to stop or keep drawing. When a 'draw' decision is made, the agent outputs a program indicating the stroke to be drawn. As a result, it produces a final raster image by drawing the strokes on a canvas, using a minimal number of strokes and dynamically deciding when to stop. We train our agent through reinforcement learning on MNIST and Omniglot datasets for unconditional generation and parsing (reconstruction) tasks. We utilize our parsing agent for exemplar generation and type conditioned concept generation in Omniglot challenge without any further training. We present successful results on all three generation tasks and the parsing task. Crucially, we do not need any stroke-level or vector supervision; we only use raster images for training.
summary: The prevalent approach in self-supervised image generation is to operate on pixel level representations. While this approach can produce high quality images, it cannot benefit from the simplicity and innate quality of vectorization. Here we present a drawing agent that operates on stroke-level representation of images. At each time step, the agent first assesses the current canvas and decides whether to stop or keep drawing. When a 'draw' decision is made, the agent outputs a program indicating the stroke to be drawn. As a result, it produces a final raster image by drawing the strokes on a canvas, using a minimal number of strokes and dynamically deciding when to stop. We train our agent through reinforcement learning on MNIST and Omniglot datasets for unconditional generation and parsing (reconstruction) tasks. We utilize our parsing agent for exemplar generation and type conditioned concept generation in Omniglot challenge without any further training. We present successful results on all three generation tasks and the parsing task. Crucially, we do not need any stroke-level or vector supervision; we only use raster images for training.
abstract_zh: 自监督图像生成的流行方法是对像素级表示进行操作。虽然这种方法可以生成高质量的图像，但它无法从矢量化的简单性和固有质量中受益。在这里，我们提出了一个对图像的笔画级表示进行操作的绘图代理。在每个时间步，代理首先评估当前画布并决定是停止还是继续绘制。当做出“绘制”决定时，代理输出一个程序，指示要绘制的笔画。因此，它通过在画布上绘制笔画、使用最少数量的笔画并动态决定何时停止来生成最终的光栅图像。我们通过 MNIST 和 Omniglot 数据集上的强化学习来训练我们的代理，以实现无条件生成和解析（重建）任务。我们利用解析代理在 Omniglot 挑战中生成示例和类型条件概念生成，无需任何进一步的训练。我们在所有三个生成任务和解析任务上都取得了成功的结果。至关重要的是，我们不需要任何中风级别或矢量监督；我们只使用光栅图像进行训练。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于自监督学习的笔画级图像生成方法，用于字符生成。
AI.motivation: 传统像素级自监督生成无法利用向量化的简洁性，需更高效的方法。
AI.method: 采用强化学习训练绘图代理，基于光栅图像进行自监督，动态决策绘制笔画，无需笔画级标注。
AI.result: 在MNIST和Omniglot数据集的生成与解析任务中均取得成功，无需额外训练即可处理示例生成和类型条件生成。
AI.conclusion: 证明自监督向量化在字符生成中的有效性，无需人工标注，展示了其在生成任务中的潜力。

authors_text: Lina María Amaya-Mejía,Nicolás Duque-Suárez,Daniel Jaramillo-Ramírez,Carol Martinez
title: Vision-Based Safety System for Barrierless Human-Robot Collaboration
title_zh: 基于视觉的无障碍人机协作安全系统
comment: Accepted for publication at the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
comments: Accepted for publication at the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
abstract: Human safety has always been the main priority when working near an industrial robot. With the rise of Human-Robot Collaborative environments, physical barriers to avoiding collisions have been disappearing, increasing the risk of accidents and the need for solutions that ensure a safe Human-Robot Collaboration. This paper proposes a safety system that implements Speed and Separation Monitoring (SSM) type of operation. For this, safety zones are defined in the robot's workspace following current standards for industrial collaborative robots. A deep learning-based computer vision system detects, tracks, and estimates the 3D position of operators close to the robot. The robot control system receives the operator's 3D position and generates 3D representations of them in a simulation environment. Depending on the zone where the closest operator was detected, the robot stops or changes its operating speed. Three different operation modes in which the human and robot interact are presented. Results show that the vision-based system can correctly detect and classify in which safety zone an operator is located and that the different proposed operation modes ensure that the robot's reaction and stop time are within the required time limits to guarantee safety.
summary: Human safety has always been the main priority when working near an industrial robot. With the rise of Human-Robot Collaborative environments, physical barriers to avoiding collisions have been disappearing, increasing the risk of accidents and the need for solutions that ensure a safe Human-Robot Collaboration. This paper proposes a safety system that implements Speed and Separation Monitoring (SSM) type of operation. For this, safety zones are defined in the robot's workspace following current standards for industrial collaborative robots. A deep learning-based computer vision system detects, tracks, and estimates the 3D position of operators close to the robot. The robot control system receives the operator's 3D position and generates 3D representations of them in a simulation environment. Depending on the zone where the closest operator was detected, the robot stops or changes its operating speed. Three different operation modes in which the human and robot interact are presented. Results show that the vision-based system can correctly detect and classify in which safety zone an operator is located and that the different proposed operation modes ensure that the robot's reaction and stop time are within the required time limits to guarantee safety.
abstract_zh: 在工业机器人附近工作时，人身安全始终是首要任务。随着人机协作环境的兴起，避免碰撞的物理障碍已经消失，从而增加了事故风险以及确保安全人机协作的解决方案的需求。本文提出了一种实施速度和间隔监控（SSM）类型操作的安全系统。为此，按照工业协作机器人的现行标准在机器人的工作空间中定义了安全区域。基于深度学习的计算机视觉系统可检测、跟踪和估计靠近机器人的操作员的 3D 位置。机器人控制系统接收操作员的 3D 位置并在模拟环境中生成他们的 3D 表示。根据检测到最近操作员的区域，机器人会停止或改变其运行速度。提出了人与机器人交互的三种不同操作模式。结果表明，基于视觉的系统可以正确检测和分类操作员所在的安全区域，并且所提出的不同操作模式确保机器人的反应和停止时间在保证安全所需的时限内。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉的安全系统，用于无屏障的人机协作环境，以确保操作人员的安全。
AI.motivation: 随着人机协作环境的兴起，传统物理屏障逐渐消失，增加了事故风险，因此需要新的解决方案来保证人机协作的安全性。
AI.method: 该系统采用基于深度学习的计算机视觉技术检测、跟踪并估计操作人员的3D位置，并在仿真环境中生成其3D表示。根据操作人员所在的安全区域，机器人控制系统会调整其运行速度或停止。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，基于视觉的系统能够正确检测并分类操作人员所在的安全区域，并且提出的不同操作模式确保了机器人的反应和停止时间在安全所需的时间范围内。
AI.conclusion: 该视觉安全系统有效提升了无屏障人机协作环境下的安全性，能够准确识别操作人员位置并及时调整机器人行为。

ai_content_json.method: 该系统采用基于深度学习的计算机视觉技术检测、跟踪并估计操作人员的3D位置，并在仿真环境中生成其3D表示。根据操作人员所在的安全区域，机器人控制系统会调整其运行速度或停止。
ai_content_json.result: 实验结果表明，基于视觉的系统能够正确检测并分类操作人员所在的安全区域，并且提出的不同操作模式确保了机器人的反应和停止时间在安全所需的时间范围内。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该视觉安全系统有效提升了无屏障人机协作环境下的安全性，能够准确识别操作人员位置并及时调整机器人行为。

conclusion: 该视觉安全系统有效提升了无屏障人机协作环境下的安全性，能够准确识别操作人员位置并及时调整机器人行为。
search_text: Vision-Based Safety System for Barrierless Human-Robot Collaboration 基于视觉的无障碍人机协作安全系统 Human safety has always been the main priority when working near an industrial robot. With the rise of Human-Robot Collaborative environments, physical barriers to avoiding collisions have been disappearing, increasing the risk of accidents and the need for solutions that ensure a safe Human-Robot Collaboration. This paper proposes a safety system that implements Speed and Separation Monitoring (SSM) type of operation. For this, safety zones are defined in the robot's workspace following current standards for industrial collaborative robots. A deep learning-based computer vision system detects, tracks, and estimates the 3D position of operators close to the robot. The robot control system receives the operator's 3D position and generates 3D representations of them in a simulation environment. Depending on the zone where the closest operator was detected, the robot stops or changes its operating speed. Three different operation modes in which the human and robot interact are presented. Results show that the vision-based system can correctly detect and classify in which safety zone an operator is located and that the different proposed operation modes ensure that the robot's reaction and stop time are within the required time limits to guarantee safety. 在工业机器人附近工作时，人身安全始终是首要任务。随着人机协作环境的兴起，避免碰撞的物理障碍已经消失，从而增加了事故风险以及确保安全人机协作的解决方案的需求。本文提出了一种实施速度和间隔监控（SSM）类型操作的安全系统。为此，按照工业协作机器人的现行标准在机器人的工作空间中定义了安全区域。基于深度学习的计算机视觉系统可检测、跟踪和估计靠近机器人的操作员的 3D 位置。机器人控制系统接收操作员的 3D 位置并在模拟环境中生成他们的 3D 表示。根据检测到最近操作员的区域，机器人会停止或改变其运行速度。提出了人与机器人交互的三种不同操作模式。结果表明，基于视觉的系统可以正确检测和分类操作员所在的安全区域，并且所提出的不同操作模式确保机器人的反应和停止时间在保证安全所需的时限内。 本文提出了一种基于视觉的安全系统，用于无屏障的人机协作环境，以确保操作人员的安全。 Lina María Amaya-Mejía,Nicolás Duque-Suárez,Daniel Jaramillo-Ramírez,Carol Martinez cs.RO,cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.SY

title: Maintaining Performance with Less Data
title_zh: 用更少的数据保持性能
comment: 12 pages, 8 figures, 11 tables
comments: 12 pages, 8 figures, 11 tables
abstract: We propose a novel method for training a neural network for image classification to reduce input data dynamically, in order to reduce the costs of training a neural network model. As Deep Learning tasks become more popular, their computational complexity increases, leading to more intricate algorithms and models which have longer runtimes and require more input data. The result is a greater cost on time, hardware, and environmental resources. By using data reduction techniques, we reduce the amount of work performed, and therefore the environmental impact of AI techniques, and with dynamic data reduction we show that accuracy may be maintained while reducing runtime by up to 50%, and reducing carbon emission proportionally.
summary: We propose a novel method for training a neural network for image classification to reduce input data dynamically, in order to reduce the costs of training a neural network model. As Deep Learning tasks become more popular, their computational complexity increases, leading to more intricate algorithms and models which have longer runtimes and require more input data. The result is a greater cost on time, hardware, and environmental resources. By using data reduction techniques, we reduce the amount of work performed, and therefore the environmental impact of AI techniques, and with dynamic data reduction we show that accuracy may be maintained while reducing runtime by up to 50%, and reducing carbon emission proportionally.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种训练图像分类神经网络的新方法，以动态减少输入数据，从而降低训练神经网络模型的成本。随着深度学习任务变得越来越流行，其计算复杂性不断增加，导致算法和模型更加复杂，运行时间更长，需要更多输入数据。结果是时间、硬件和环境资源的成本更高。通过使用数据缩减技术，我们减少了所执行的工作量，从而减少了人工智能技术对环境的影响，并且通过动态数据缩减，我们表明可以在保持准确性的同时将运行时间减少多达 50%，并按比例减少碳排放。

AI.tldr: 提出一种动态减少输入数据的方法，以降低神经网络训练成本，同时保持图像分类准确率。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型训练面临计算复杂度高、耗时长及环境资源消耗大的问题，亟需通过数据减少技术降低训练成本。
AI.method: 采用动态数据减少技术，在训练过程中实时调整输入数据量，减少计算工作量及环境影响。
AI.result: 在保持模型准确率的前提下，将训练时间减少50%，碳排放量同步降低。
AI.conclusion: 动态数据减少方法能有效平衡模型性能与训练成本，为可持续AI发展提供可行方案。

title: Gradient-based Uncertainty for Monocular Depth Estimation
title_zh: 基于梯度的单眼深度估计的不确定性
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2022
comments: Accepted to ECCV 2022
abstract: In monocular depth estimation, disturbances in the image context, like moving objects or reflecting materials, can easily lead to erroneous predictions. For that reason, uncertainty estimates for each pixel are necessary, in particular for safety-critical applications such as automated driving. We propose a post hoc uncertainty estimation approach for an already trained and thus fixed depth estimation model, represented by a deep neural network. The uncertainty is estimated with the gradients which are extracted with an auxiliary loss function. To avoid relying on ground-truth information for the loss definition, we present an auxiliary loss function based on the correspondence of the depth prediction for an image and its horizontally flipped counterpart. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art uncertainty estimation results on the KITTI and NYU Depth V2 benchmarks without the need to retrain the neural network. Models and code are publicly available at https://github.com/jhornauer/GrUMoDepth.
summary: In monocular depth estimation, disturbances in the image context, like moving objects or reflecting materials, can easily lead to erroneous predictions. For that reason, uncertainty estimates for each pixel are necessary, in particular for safety-critical applications such as automated driving. We propose a post hoc uncertainty estimation approach for an already trained and thus fixed depth estimation model, represented by a deep neural network. The uncertainty is estimated with the gradients which are extracted with an auxiliary loss function. To avoid relying on ground-truth information for the loss definition, we present an auxiliary loss function based on the correspondence of the depth prediction for an image and its horizontally flipped counterpart. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art uncertainty estimation results on the KITTI and NYU Depth V2 benchmarks without the need to retrain the neural network. Models and code are publicly available at https://github.com/jhornauer/GrUMoDepth.
abstract_zh: 在单目深度估计中，图像上下文中的干扰（例如移动物体或反射材料）很容易导致错误的预测。因此，有必要对每个像素进行不确定性估计，特别是对于自动驾驶等安全关键型应用。我们针对已经训练好的固定深度估计模型（由深度神经网络表示）提出了一种事后不确定性估计方法。不确定性是通过辅助损失函数提取的梯度来估计的。为了避免依赖真实信息来定义损失，我们提出了一种基于图像深度预测与其水平翻转对应部分的对应关系的辅助损失函数。我们的方法在 KITTI 和 NYU Depth V2 基准上实现了最先进的不确定性估计结果，而无需重新训练神经网络。模型和代码可在 https://github.com/jhornauer/GrUMoDepth 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于梯度的单目深度估计不确定性评估方法，无需重新训练模型即可实现高精度的像素级不确定性预测。
AI.motivation: 单目深度估计中，图像中的动态物体或反光材质等干扰因素易导致预测错误，而安全关键场景（如自动驾驶）亟需可靠的不确定性评估机制。
AI.method: 通过辅助损失函数提取梯度信息，利用图像与其水平翻转版本的深度预测一致性构建不确定性估计框架，避免依赖真实标注数据。
AI.result: 在KITTI和NYU Depth V2基准测试中取得最先进的不确定性估计效果，且无需重新训练原有深度估计模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为单目深度估计提供了高效且无需微调的不确定性评估方案，可有效提升自动驾驶等安全关键系统的可靠性。

title: OrderedCuts: A new approach for computing Gomory-Hu tree
title_zh: OrderedCuts：一种计算 Gomory-Hu 树的新方法
abstract: The Gomory-Hu tree, or a cut tree, is a classic data structure that stores minimum $s$-$t$ cuts of an undirected weighted graph for all pairs of nodes $(s,t)$. We propose a new approach for computing the cut tree based on a reduction to the problem that we call {\tt OrderedCuts}. Given a sequence of nodes $s,v_1,\ldots,v_\ell$, its goal is to compute minimum $\{s,v_1,\ldots,v_{i-1}\}$-$v_i$ cuts for all $i\in[\ell]$. We show that the cut tree can be computed by $\tilde O(1)$ calls to {\tt OrderedCuts}. We also establish new results for {\tt OrderedCuts} that may be of independent interest. First, we prove that all $\ell$ cuts can be stored compactly with $O(n)$ space in a data structure that we call an {\em {\tt OC} tree}. Second, we prove results that allow divide-and-conquer algorithms for computing OC tree. Finally, we describe a practical implementation based on {\tt OrderedCuts}, and compare it experimentally with two existing implementations of the classical Gomory-Hu tree algorithm as well as with our implementations. The results suggest that the {\tt OrderedCuts}-based approach is the most robust: on many family of problems it outperforms other algorithms by 1-2 orders of magnitude, and is never slower by more than a small factor. Our implementation is publicly available at https://pub.ist.ac.at/~vnk/software.html.
summary: The Gomory-Hu tree, or a cut tree, is a classic data structure that stores minimum $s$-$t$ cuts of an undirected weighted graph for all pairs of nodes $(s,t)$. We propose a new approach for computing the cut tree based on a reduction to the problem that we call {\tt OrderedCuts}. Given a sequence of nodes $s,v_1,\ldots,v_\ell$, its goal is to compute minimum $\{s,v_1,\ldots,v_{i-1}\}$-$v_i$ cuts for all $i\in[\ell]$. We show that the cut tree can be computed by $\tilde O(1)$ calls to {\tt OrderedCuts}. We also establish new results for {\tt OrderedCuts} that may be of independent interest. First, we prove that all $\ell$ cuts can be stored compactly with $O(n)$ space in a data structure that we call an {\em {\tt OC} tree}. Second, we prove results that allow divide-and-conquer algorithms for computing OC tree. Finally, we describe a practical implementation based on {\tt OrderedCuts}, and compare it experimentally with two existing implementations of the classical Gomory-Hu tree algorithm as well as with our implementations. The results suggest that the {\tt OrderedCuts}-based approach is the most robust: on many family of problems it outperforms other algorithms by 1-2 orders of magnitude, and is never slower by more than a small factor. Our implementation is publicly available at https://pub.ist.ac.at/~vnk/software.html.
abstract_zh: Gomory-Hu 树或割树是一种经典的数据结构，它存储所有节点对 $(s,t)$ 的无向加权图的最小 $s$-$t$ 割。我们提出了一种基于问题简化来计算割树的新方法，我们称之为 {\tt OrderedCuts}。给定节点序列 $s,v_1,\ldots,v_\ell$，其目标是计算所有 $i\in[\ell]$ 的最小 $\{s,v_1,\ldots,v_{i-1}\}$-$v_i$ 切割。我们证明了割树可以通过调用 {\tt OrderedCuts} 来计算 $\tilde O(1)$。我们还为 {\tt OrderedCuts} 建立了可能具有独立兴趣的新结果。首先，我们证明所有 $\ell$ 切割都可以用 $O(n)$ 空间紧凑地存储在我们称为 {\em {\tt OC} 树}的数据结构中。其次，我们证明了允许使用分而治之算法来计算 OC 树的结果。最后，我们描述了基于 {\tt OrderedCuts} 的实际实现，并通过实验将其与经典 Gomory-Hu 树算法的两个现有实现以及我们的实现进行比较。结果表明，基于 {\tt OrderedCuts} 的方法是最稳健的：在许多问题系列上，它的性能比其他算法高出 1-2 个数量级，并且速度永远不会超过一个小因素。我们的实现可在 https://pub.ist.ac.at/~vnk/software.html 上公开获得。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于OrderedCuts新方法的Gomory-Hu树计算方法，通过减少计算复杂度来提高效率。
AI.motivation: 传统Gomory-Hu树算法在处理大规模图数据时存在效率瓶颈，需寻找更高效的计算方法。
AI.method: 将Gomory-Hu树问题转化为OrderedCuts问题，设计OC树数据结构并结合分治算法实现高效计算。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个问题集上比现有算法快1-2个数量级，且稳定性更优，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: OrderedCuts方法为最小割计算提供了更高效且稳健的解决方案，具有实际应用价值。
