search_text: OrderedCuts: A new approach for computing Gomory-Hu tree OrderedCuts：一种计算 Gomory-Hu 树的新方法 The Gomory-Hu tree, or a cut tree, is a classic data structure that stores minimum $s$-$t$ cuts of an undirected weighted graph for all pairs of nodes $(s,t)$. We propose a new approach for computing the cut tree based on a reduction to the problem that we call {\tt OrderedCuts}. Given a sequence of nodes $s,v_1,\ldots,v_\ell$, its goal is to compute minimum $\{s,v_1,\ldots,v_{i-1}\}$-$v_i$ cuts for all $i\in[\ell]$. We show that the cut tree can be computed by $\tilde O(1)$ calls to {\tt OrderedCuts}. We also establish new results for {\tt OrderedCuts} that may be of independent interest. First, we prove that all $\ell$ cuts can be stored compactly with $O(n)$ space in a data structure that we call an {\em {\tt OC} tree}. Second, we prove results that allow divide-and-conquer algorithms for computing OC tree. Finally, we describe a practical implementation based on {\tt OrderedCuts}, and compare it experimentally with two existing implementations of the classical Gomory-Hu tree algorithm as well as with our implementations. The results suggest that the {\tt OrderedCuts}-based approach is the most robust: on many family of problems it outperforms other algorithms by 1-2 orders of magnitude, and is never slower by more than a small factor. Our implementation is publicly available at https://pub.ist.ac.at/~vnk/software.html. title: Convolutional Fine-Grained Classification with Self-Supervised Target Relation Regularization
title_zh: 具有自监督目标关系正则化的卷积细粒度分类
comment: Accepted by TIP, 15 pages, 8 figures, 11 tables
comments: Accepted by TIP, 15 pages, 8 figures, 11 tables
abstract: Fine-grained visual classification can be addressed by deep representation learning under supervision of manually pre-defined targets (e.g., one-hot or the Hadamard codes). Such target coding schemes are less flexible to model inter-class correlation and are sensitive to sparse and imbalanced data distribution as well. In light of this, this paper introduces a novel target coding scheme -- dynamic target relation graphs (DTRG), which, as an auxiliary feature regularization, is a self-generated structural output to be mapped from input images. Specifically, online computation of class-level feature centers is designed to generate cross-category distance in the representation space, which can thus be depicted by a dynamic graph in a non-parametric manner. Explicitly minimizing intra-class feature variations anchored on those class-level centers can encourage learning of discriminative features. Moreover, owing to exploiting inter-class dependency, the proposed target graphs can alleviate data sparsity and imbalanceness in representation learning. Inspired by recent success of the mixup style data augmentation, this paper introduces randomness into soft construction of dynamic target relation graphs to further explore relation diversity of target classes. Experimental results can demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on a number of diverse benchmarks of multiple visual classification tasks, especially achieving the state-of-the-art performance on popular fine-grained object benchmarks and superior robustness against sparse and imbalanced data. Source codes are made publicly available at https://github.com/AkonLau/DTRG.
summary: Fine-grained visual classification can be addressed by deep representation learning under supervision of manually pre-defined targets (e.g., one-hot or the Hadamard codes). Such target coding schemes are less flexible to model inter-class correlation and are sensitive to sparse and imbalanced data distribution as well. In light of this, this paper introduces a novel target coding scheme -- dynamic target relation graphs (DTRG), which, as an auxiliary feature regularization, is a self-generated structural output to be mapped from input images. Specifically, online computation of class-level feature centers is designed to generate cross-category distance in the representation space, which can thus be depicted by a dynamic graph in a non-parametric manner. Explicitly minimizing intra-class feature variations anchored on those class-level centers can encourage learning of discriminative features. Moreover, owing to exploiting inter-class dependency, the proposed target graphs can alleviate data sparsity and imbalanceness in representation learning. Inspired by recent success of the mixup style data augmentation, this paper introduces randomness into soft construction of dynamic target relation graphs to further explore relation diversity of target classes. Experimental results can demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on a number of diverse benchmarks of multiple visual classification tasks, especially achieving the state-of-the-art performance on popular fine-grained object benchmarks and superior robustness against sparse and imbalanced data. Source codes are made publicly available at https://github.com/AkonLau/DTRG.
abstract_zh: 细粒度视觉分类可以通过在手动预定义目标（例如 one-hot 或 Hadamard 代码）的监督下进行深度表示学习来解决。这种目标编码方案在建模类间相关性方面不太灵活，并且对稀疏和不平衡的数据分布也很敏感。鉴于此，本文提出了一种新颖的目标编码方案——动态目标关系图（DTRG），它作为辅助特征正则化，是从输入图像映射的自生成结构输出。具体来说，类级特征中心的在线计算旨在生成表示空间中的跨类别距离，从而可以通过动态图以非参数方式来描述。明确最小化基于这些类级别中心的类内特征变化可以鼓励对判别性特征的学习。此外，由于利用类间依赖性，所提出的目标图可以减轻表示学习中的数据稀疏性和不平衡性。受最近混合式数据增强成功的启发，本文将随机性引入动态目标关系图的软构造中，以进一步探索目标类别的关系多样性。实验结果可以证明我们的方法在多个视觉分类任务的许多不同基准上的有效性，特别是在流行的细粒度对象基准上实现了最先进的性能，并对稀疏和不平衡数据具有卓越的鲁棒性。源代码在 https://github.com/AkonLau/DTRG 上公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督目标关系正则化的卷积细粒度分类方法，通过动态目标关系图（DTRG）提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 传统目标编码方案（如独热编码）在建模类间相关性及处理稀疏、不平衡数据时存在灵活性不足的问题。
AI.method: 设计动态目标关系图（DTRG）作为辅助正则化项，通过在线计算类中心生成跨类距离图，结合非参数化结构映射与混合增强策略优化特征表示。
AI.result: 在多个视觉分类基准测试中取得SOTA性能，尤其在细粒度物体分类任务中展现对稀疏和不平衡数据的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: DTRG通过挖掘类间依赖关系有效缓解数据分布问题，为细粒度分类提供了一种灵活且强大的自监督正则化框架。

title: Adaptive Domain Generalization via Online Disagreement Minimization
title_zh: 通过在线分歧最小化的自适应域泛化
comment: 11 pages, 4 figures
comments: 11 pages, 4 figures
abstract: Deep neural networks suffer from significant performance deterioration when there exists distribution shift between deployment and training. Domain Generalization (DG) aims to safely transfer a model to unseen target domains by only relying on a set of source domains. Although various DG approaches have been proposed, a recent study named DomainBed, reveals that most of them do not beat the simple Empirical Risk Minimization (ERM). To this end, we propose a general framework that is orthogonal to existing DG algorithms and could improve their performance consistently. Unlike previous DG works that stake on a static source model to be hopefully a universal one, our proposed AdaODM adaptively modifies the source model at test time for different target domains. Specifically, we create multiple domain-specific classifiers upon a shared domain-generic feature extractor. The feature extractor and classifiers are trained in an adversarial way, where the feature extractor embeds the input samples into a domain-invariant space, and the multiple classifiers capture the distinct decision boundaries that each of them relates to a specific source domain. During testing, distribution differences between target and source domains could be effectively measured by leveraging prediction disagreement among source classifiers. By fine-tuning source models to minimize the disagreement at test time, target domain features are well aligned to the invariant feature space. We verify AdaODM on two popular DG methods, namely ERM and CORAL, and four DG benchmarks, namely VLCS, PACS, OfficeHome, and TerraIncognita. The results show AdaODM stably improves the generalization capacity on unseen domains and achieves state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Deep neural networks suffer from significant performance deterioration when there exists distribution shift between deployment and training. Domain Generalization (DG) aims to safely transfer a model to unseen target domains by only relying on a set of source domains. Although various DG approaches have been proposed, a recent study named DomainBed, reveals that most of them do not beat the simple Empirical Risk Minimization (ERM). To this end, we propose a general framework that is orthogonal to existing DG algorithms and could improve their performance consistently. Unlike previous DG works that stake on a static source model to be hopefully a universal one, our proposed AdaODM adaptively modifies the source model at test time for different target domains. Specifically, we create multiple domain-specific classifiers upon a shared domain-generic feature extractor. The feature extractor and classifiers are trained in an adversarial way, where the feature extractor embeds the input samples into a domain-invariant space, and the multiple classifiers capture the distinct decision boundaries that each of them relates to a specific source domain. During testing, distribution differences between target and source domains could be effectively measured by leveraging prediction disagreement among source classifiers. By fine-tuning source models to minimize the disagreement at test time, target domain features are well aligned to the invariant feature space. We verify AdaODM on two popular DG methods, namely ERM and CORAL, and four DG benchmarks, namely VLCS, PACS, OfficeHome, and TerraIncognita. The results show AdaODM stably improves the generalization capacity on unseen domains and achieves state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 当部署和训练之间存在分布变化时，深度神经网络的性能会显着下降。域泛化（DG）旨在仅依赖一组源域，将模型安全地转移到看不见的目标域。尽管已经提出了各种 DG 方法，但最近一项名为 DomainBed 的研究表明，其中大多数方法都无法击败简单的经验风险最小化 (ERM)。为此，我们提出了一个与现有 DG 算法正交的通用框架，可以持续提高其性能。与之前的 DG 工作不同，我们提出的 AdaODM 在测试时针对不同的目标域自适应地修改源模型。具体来说，我们在共享的域通用特征提取器上创建多个特定于域的分类器。特征提取器和分类器以对抗方式进行训练，其中特征提取器将输入样本嵌入到域不变空间中，并且多个分类器捕获每个分类器与特定源域相关的不同决策边界。在测试过程中，可以通过利用源分类器之间的预测差异来有效测量目标域和源域之间的分布差异。通过微调源模型以尽量减少测试时的不一致，目标域特征与不变特征空间很好地对齐。我们在两种流行的 DG 方法（即 ERM 和 CORAL）以及四种 DG 基准（即 VLCS、PACS、OfficeHome 和 TerraIncognita）上验证了 AdaODM。结果表明，AdaODM 稳定地提高了未见领域的泛化能力，并实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AdaODM的自适应领域泛化框架，通过在线最小化预测分歧来提升模型在未见目标领域的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有领域泛化方法在DomainBed基准测试中难以超越简单的经验风险最小化（ERM），需设计一种通用框架以提升模型性能。
AI.method: 构建共享领域不变特征提取器与多个领域特定分类器，通过对抗训练使特征提取器生成领域不变特征，分类器捕捉各自领域的决策边界。测试时通过最小化源分类器预测分歧来对齐目标领域特征。
AI.result: 在VLCS、PACS等四个基准数据集上验证，AdaODM稳定提升未见领域性能，达到当时最优效果。
AI.conclusion: AdaODM通过在线分歧最小化有效对齐领域特征，为领域泛化提供了通用且有效的改进方案。

search_text: Adaptive Domain Generalization via Online Disagreement Minimization 通过在线分歧最小化的自适应域泛化 Deep neural networks suffer from significant performance deterioration when there exists distribution shift between deployment and training. Domain Generalization (DG) aims to safely transfer a model to unseen target domains by only relying on a set of source domains. Although various DG approaches have been proposed, a recent study named DomainBed, reveals that most of them do not beat the simple Empirical Risk Minimization (ERM). To this end, we propose a general framework that is orthogonal to existing DG algorithms and could improve their performance consistently. Unlike previous DG works that stake on a static source model to be hopefully a universal one, our proposed AdaODM adaptively modifies the source model at test time for different target domains. Specifically, we create multiple domain-specific classifiers upon a shared domain-generic feature extractor. The feature extractor and classifiers are trained in an adversarial way, where the feature extractor embeds the input samples into a domain-invariant space, and the multiple classifiers capture the distinct decision boundaries that each of them relates to a specific source domain. During testing, distribution differences between target and source domains could be effectively measured by leveraging prediction disagreement among source classifiers. By fine-tuning source models to minimize the disagreement at test time, target domain features are well aligned to the invariant feature space. We verify AdaODM on two popular DG methods, namely ERM and CORAL, and four DG benchmarks, namely VLCS, PACS, OfficeHome, and TerraIncognita. The results show AdaODM stably improves the generalization capacity on unseen domains and achieves state-of-the-art performance. 当部署和训练之间存在分布变化时，深度神经网络的性能会显着下降。域泛化（DG）旨在仅依赖一组源域，将模型安全地转移到看不见的目标域。尽管已经提出了各种 DG 方法，但最近一项名为 DomainBed 的研究表明，其中大多数方法都无法击败简单的经验风险最小化 (ERM)。为此，我们提出了一个与现有 DG 算法正交的通用框架，可以持续提高其性能。与之前的 DG 工作不同，我们提出的 AdaODM 在测试时针对不同的目标域自适应地修改源模型。具体来说，我们在共享的域通用特征提取器上创建多个特定于域的分类器。特征提取器和分类器以对抗方式进行训练，其中特征提取器将输入样本嵌入到域不变空间中，并且多个分类器捕获每个分类器与特定源域相关的不同决策边界。在测试过程中，可以通过利用源分类器之间的预测差异来有效测量目标域和源域之间的分布差异。通过微调源模型以尽量减少测试时的不一致，目标域特征与不变特征空间很好地对齐。我们在两种流行的 DG 方法（即 ERM 和 CORAL）以及四种 DG 基准（即 VLCS、PACS、OfficeHome 和 TerraIncognita）上验证了 AdaODM。结果表明，AdaODM 稳定地提高了未见领域的泛化能力，并实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出了一种名为AdaODM的自适应领域泛化框架，通过在线最小化预测分歧来提升模型在未见目标领域的泛化能力。 Xin Zhang,Ying-Cong Chen cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Nouar AlDahoul,Hezerul Abdul Karim,Shaira Limson Kee,Myles Joshua Toledo Tan
title: Localization and Classification of Parasitic Eggs in Microscopic Images Using an EfficientDet Detector
title_zh: 使用 EfficientDet 探测器对显微图像中的寄生虫卵进行定位和分类
comment: 6 pages, 7 figures, to be published in IEEE International Conference on Image Processing 2022
comments: 6 pages, 7 figures, to be published in IEEE International Conference on Image Processing 2022
abstract: IPIs caused by protozoan and helminth parasites are among the most common infections in humans in LMICs. They are regarded as a severe public health concern, as they cause a wide array of potentially detrimental health conditions. Researchers have been developing pattern recognition techniques for the automatic identification of parasite eggs in microscopic images. Existing solutions still need improvements to reduce diagnostic errors and generate fast, efficient, and accurate results. Our paper addresses this and proposes a multi-modal learning detector to localize parasitic eggs and categorize them into 11 categories. The experiments were conducted on the novel Chula-ParasiteEgg-11 dataset that was used to train both EfficientDet model with EfficientNet-v2 backbone and EfficientNet-B7+SVM. The dataset has 11,000 microscopic training images from 11 categories. Our results show robust performance with an accuracy of 92%, and an F1 score of 93%. Additionally, the IOU distribution illustrates the high localization capability of the detector.
summary: IPIs caused by protozoan and helminth parasites are among the most common infections in humans in LMICs. They are regarded as a severe public health concern, as they cause a wide array of potentially detrimental health conditions. Researchers have been developing pattern recognition techniques for the automatic identification of parasite eggs in microscopic images. Existing solutions still need improvements to reduce diagnostic errors and generate fast, efficient, and accurate results. Our paper addresses this and proposes a multi-modal learning detector to localize parasitic eggs and categorize them into 11 categories. The experiments were conducted on the novel Chula-ParasiteEgg-11 dataset that was used to train both EfficientDet model with EfficientNet-v2 backbone and EfficientNet-B7+SVM. The dataset has 11,000 microscopic training images from 11 categories. Our results show robust performance with an accuracy of 92%, and an F1 score of 93%. Additionally, the IOU distribution illustrates the high localization capability of the detector.
abstract_zh: 由原生动物和蠕虫寄生虫引起的 IPI 是中低收入国家中最常见的人类感染之一。它们被视为严重的公共卫生问题，因为它们会导致一系列潜在的有害健康状况。研究人员一直在开发模式识别技术，用于自动识别显微图像中的寄生虫卵。现有解决方案仍需要改进，以减少诊断错误并生成快速、高效和准确的结果。我们的论文解决了这个问题，并提出了一种多模式学习检测器来定位寄生卵并将其分为 11 类。实验在新颖的 Chula-ParasiteEgg-11 数据集上进行，该数据集用于训练具有 EfficientNet-v2 主干的 EfficientDet 模型和 EfficientNet-B7+SVM。该数据集包含来自 11 个类别的 11,000 张微观训练图像。我们的结果显示出稳健的性能，准确度为 92%，F1 分数为 93%。此外，IOU 分布说明了检测器的高定位能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于EfficientDet检测器的多模态学习方法，用于显微镜图像中寄生虫卵的定位与分类。
AI.motivation: 寄生虫感染在低收入和中等收入国家广泛存在，现有自动识别技术存在诊断误差大、效率低的问题，需改进以提升准确性和速度。
AI.method: 采用EfficientDet模型结合EfficientNet-v2主干网络及EfficientNet-B7+SVM方法，在包含11,000张图像的Chula-ParasiteEgg-11数据集上训练模型。
AI.result: 实验结果显示模型准确率达92%，F1分数为93%，且具有高定位能力（IOU分布表现优异）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在寄生虫卵检测任务中表现出色，为公共卫生领域提供高效准确的诊断工具，有助于改善低资源地区的医疗条件。

authors_text: Vladimir Petrik,Mohammad Nomaan Qureshi,Josef Sivic,Makarand Tapaswi
title: Learning Object Manipulation Skills from Video via Approximate Differentiable Physics
title_zh: 通过近似可微物理从视频中学习对象操作技能
comment: Accepted for IROS2022, code at https://github.com/petrikvladimir/video_skills_learning_with_approx_physics, project page at https://data.ciirc.cvut.cz/public/projects/2022Real2SimPhysics/
comments: Accepted for IROS2022, code at https://github.com/petrikvladimir/video_skills_learning_with_approx_physics, project page at https://data.ciirc.cvut.cz/public/projects/2022Real2SimPhysics/
abstract: We aim to teach robots to perform simple object manipulation tasks by watching a single video demonstration. Towards this goal, we propose an optimization approach that outputs a coarse and temporally evolving 3D scene to mimic the action demonstrated in the input video. Similar to previous work, a differentiable renderer ensures perceptual fidelity between the 3D scene and the 2D video. Our key novelty lies in the inclusion of a differentiable approach to solve a set of Ordinary Differential Equations (ODEs) that allows us to approximately model laws of physics such as gravity, friction, and hand-object or object-object interactions. This not only enables us to dramatically improve the quality of estimated hand and object states, but also produces physically admissible trajectories that can be directly translated to a robot without the need for costly reinforcement learning. We evaluate our approach on a 3D reconstruction task that consists of 54 video demonstrations sourced from 9 actions such as pull something from right to left or put something in front of something. Our approach improves over previous state-of-the-art by almost 30%, demonstrating superior quality on especially challenging actions involving physical interactions of two objects such as put something onto something. Finally, we showcase the learned skills on a Franka Emika Panda robot.
summary: We aim to teach robots to perform simple object manipulation tasks by watching a single video demonstration. Towards this goal, we propose an optimization approach that outputs a coarse and temporally evolving 3D scene to mimic the action demonstrated in the input video. Similar to previous work, a differentiable renderer ensures perceptual fidelity between the 3D scene and the 2D video. Our key novelty lies in the inclusion of a differentiable approach to solve a set of Ordinary Differential Equations (ODEs) that allows us to approximately model laws of physics such as gravity, friction, and hand-object or object-object interactions. This not only enables us to dramatically improve the quality of estimated hand and object states, but also produces physically admissible trajectories that can be directly translated to a robot without the need for costly reinforcement learning. We evaluate our approach on a 3D reconstruction task that consists of 54 video demonstrations sourced from 9 actions such as pull something from right to left or put something in front of something. Our approach improves over previous state-of-the-art by almost 30%, demonstrating superior quality on especially challenging actions involving physical interactions of two objects such as put something onto something. Finally, we showcase the learned skills on a Franka Emika Panda robot.
abstract_zh: 我们的目标是通过观看单个视频演示来教机器人执行简单的物体操作任务。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种优化方法，可以输出粗略且随时间变化的 3D 场景，以模仿输入视频中演示的动作。与之前的工作类似，可微渲染器确保 3D 场景和 2D 视频之间的感知保真度。我们的主要新颖之处在于包含了一种可微分的方法来求解一组常微分方程（ODE），该方法使我们能够近似模拟物理定律，例如重力、摩擦力以及手与物体或物体与物体的相互作用。这不仅使我们能够显着提高估计的手和物体状态的质量，而且还可以产生物理上可接受的轨迹，可以直接转换为机器人，而不需要昂贵的强化学习。我们在 3D 重建任务上评估我们的方法，该任务由 54 个视频演示组成，这些视频演示来自 9 个动作，例如从右向左拉某物或将某物放在某物前面。我们的方法比之前最先进的方法提高了近 30%，在涉及两个物体物理交互的特别具有挑战性的动作（例如将某物放到某物上）方面展示了卓越的质量。最后，我们展示了在 Franka Emika Panda 机器人上学到的技能。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过观看单个视频演示，教会机器人执行简单的物体操作任务，提出了一种优化方法生成三维场景并模拟视频中的动作。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖大量数据或强化学习，成本高昂且效率低。本文希望通过单视频学习实现物理交互任务，提升机器人操作的物理合理性与准确性。
AI.method: 结合可微分渲染器和常微分方程（ODE）求解器，通过优化生成三维场景，模拟重力、摩擦力及物体间交互等物理规律，无需强化学习即可生成可执行轨迹。
AI.result: 在包含54个视频演示的3D重建任务中，方法较现有最佳技术提升近30%，尤其在双物体交互任务（如放置物体）中表现优异，并成功应用于Franka Emika Panda机器人。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过单视频学习物理交互任务，显著提升了三维重建与机器人操作的准确性，为低成本高效机器人技能学习提供了新思路。

ai_content_json.method: 结合可微分渲染器和常微分方程（ODE）求解器，通过优化生成三维场景，模拟重力、摩擦力及物体间交互等物理规律，无需强化学习即可生成可执行轨迹。
ai_content_json.result: 在包含54个视频演示的3D重建任务中，方法较现有最佳技术提升近30%，尤其在双物体交互任务（如放置物体）中表现优异，并成功应用于Franka Emika Panda机器人。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法通过单视频学习物理交互任务，显著提升了三维重建与机器人操作的准确性，为低成本高效机器人技能学习提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文旨在通过观看单个视频演示，教会机器人执行简单的物体操作任务，提出了一种优化方法生成三维场景并模拟视频中的动作。
motivation: 传统方法依赖大量数据或强化学习，成本高昂且效率低。本文希望通过单视频学习实现物理交互任务，提升机器人操作的物理合理性与准确性。
method: 结合可微分渲染器和常微分方程（ODE）求解器，通过优化生成三维场景，模拟重力、摩擦力及物体间交互等物理规律，无需强化学习即可生成可执行轨迹。
result: 在包含54个视频演示的3D重建任务中，方法较现有最佳技术提升近30%，尤其在双物体交互任务（如放置物体）中表现优异，并成功应用于Franka Emika Panda机器人。
conclusion: 该方法通过单视频学习物理交互任务，显著提升了三维重建与机器人操作的准确性，为低成本高效机器人技能学习提供了新思路。
search_text: Learning Object Manipulation Skills from Video via Approximate Differentiable Physics 通过近似可微物理从视频中学习对象操作技能 We aim to teach robots to perform simple object manipulation tasks by watching a single video demonstration. Towards this goal, we propose an optimization approach that outputs a coarse and temporally evolving 3D scene to mimic the action demonstrated in the input video. Similar to previous work, a differentiable renderer ensures perceptual fidelity between the 3D scene and the 2D video. Our key novelty lies in the inclusion of a differentiable approach to solve a set of Ordinary Differential Equations (ODEs) that allows us to approximately model laws of physics such as gravity, friction, and hand-object or object-object interactions. This not only enables us to dramatically improve the quality of estimated hand and object states, but also produces physically admissible trajectories that can be directly translated to a robot without the need for costly reinforcement learning. We evaluate our approach on a 3D reconstruction task that consists of 54 video demonstrations sourced from 9 actions such as pull something from right to left or put something in front of something. Our approach improves over previous state-of-the-art by almost 30%, demonstrating superior quality on especially challenging actions involving physical interactions of two objects such as put something onto something. Finally, we showcase the learned skills on a Franka Emika Panda robot. 我们的目标是通过观看单个视频演示来教机器人执行简单的物体操作任务。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种优化方法，可以输出粗略且随时间变化的 3D 场景，以模仿输入视频中演示的动作。与之前的工作类似，可微渲染器确保 3D 场景和 2D 视频之间的感知保真度。我们的主要新颖之处在于包含了一种可微分的方法来求解一组常微分方程（ODE），该方法使我们能够近似模拟物理定律，例如重力、摩擦力以及手与物体或物体与物体的相互作用。这不仅使我们能够显着提高估计的手和物体状态的质量，而且还可以产生物理上可接受的轨迹，可以直接转换为机器人，而不需要昂贵的强化学习。我们在 3D 重建任务上评估我们的方法，该任务由 54 个视频演示组成，这些视频演示来自 9 个动作，例如从右向左拉某物或将某物放在某物前面。我们的方法比之前最先进的方法提高了近 30%，在涉及两个物体物理交互的特别具有挑战性的动作（例如将某物放到某物上）方面展示了卓越的质量。最后，我们展示了在 Franka Emika Panda 机器人上学到的技能。 本文旨在通过观看单个视频演示，教会机器人执行简单的物体操作任务，提出了一种优化方法生成三维场景并模拟视频中的动作。 Vladimir Petrik,Mohammad Nomaan Qureshi,Josef Sivic,Makarand Tapaswi cs.RO,cs.CV,cs.LG

title: PolarMOT: How Far Can Geometric Relations Take Us in 3D Multi-Object Tracking?
title_zh: PolarMOT：几何关系可以让我们在 3D 多目标跟踪中走多远？
comment: ECCV 2022, 17 pages, 5 pages of supplementary, 3 figures
comments: ECCV 2022, 17 pages, 5 pages of supplementary, 3 figures
abstract: Most (3D) multi-object tracking methods rely on appearance-based cues for data association. By contrast, we investigate how far we can get by only encoding geometric relationships between objects in 3D space as cues for data-driven data association. We encode 3D detections as nodes in a graph, where spatial and temporal pairwise relations among objects are encoded via localized polar coordinates on graph edges. This representation makes our geometric relations invariant to global transformations and smooth trajectory changes, especially under non-holonomic motion. This allows our graph neural network to learn to effectively encode temporal and spatial interactions and fully leverage contextual and motion cues to obtain final scene interpretation by posing data association as edge classification. We establish a new state-of-the-art on nuScenes dataset and, more importantly, show that our method, PolarMOT, generalizes remarkably well across different locations (Boston, Singapore, Karlsruhe) and datasets (nuScenes and KITTI).
summary: Most (3D) multi-object tracking methods rely on appearance-based cues for data association. By contrast, we investigate how far we can get by only encoding geometric relationships between objects in 3D space as cues for data-driven data association. We encode 3D detections as nodes in a graph, where spatial and temporal pairwise relations among objects are encoded via localized polar coordinates on graph edges. This representation makes our geometric relations invariant to global transformations and smooth trajectory changes, especially under non-holonomic motion. This allows our graph neural network to learn to effectively encode temporal and spatial interactions and fully leverage contextual and motion cues to obtain final scene interpretation by posing data association as edge classification. We establish a new state-of-the-art on nuScenes dataset and, more importantly, show that our method, PolarMOT, generalizes remarkably well across different locations (Boston, Singapore, Karlsruhe) and datasets (nuScenes and KITTI).
abstract_zh: 大多数 (3D) 多对象跟踪方法依赖于基于外观的数据关联线索。相比之下，我们研究了仅将 3D 空间中对象之间的几何关系编码为数据驱动的数据关联的线索，我们能走多远。我们将 3D 检测编码为图中的节点，其中对象之间的空间和时间成对关系通过图边缘上的局部极坐标进行编码。这种表示使得我们的几何关系对于全局变换和平滑轨迹变化具有不变性，特别是在非完整运动下。这使得我们的图神经网络能够学习有效地编码时间和空间交互，并充分利用上下文和运动线索，通过将数据关联作为边缘分类来获得最终的场景解释。我们在 nuScenes 数据集上建立了一个新的最先进技术，更重要的是，表明我们的方法 PolarMOT 在不同地点（波士顿、新加坡、卡尔斯鲁厄）和数据集（nuScenes 和 KITTI）之间具有非常好的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PolarMOT方法，通过仅编码3D空间中物体间的几何关系，实现无需外观特征的3D多目标跟踪。
AI.motivation: 现有3D多目标跟踪方法依赖外观特征进行数据关联，但作者旨在探索仅利用几何关系能否实现更鲁棒的跟踪，尤其在不同场景和数据集间具有良好泛化性。
AI.method: 将3D检测结果编码为图节点，通过图边上的局部极坐标表示物体间时空关系，利用图神经网络进行边分类实现数据关联，使几何关系对全局变换和非完整运动具有不变性。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上达到新SOTA，并在波士顿、新加坡等不同地点及KITTI数据集上展现显著泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 几何关系编码能有效替代外观特征，PolarMOT通过图神经网络实现时空交互建模，在多场景下表现出色，证明了几何线索在3D跟踪中的潜力。

authors_text: Tim Frommknecht,Pedro Alves Zipf,Quanfu Fan,Nina Shvetsova,Hilde Kuehne
title: Augmentation Learning for Semi-Supervised Classification
title_zh: 半监督分类的增强学习
comment: Accepted to GCPR 2022, 13 pages with 4 figures
comments: Accepted to GCPR 2022, 13 pages with 4 figures
abstract: Recently, a number of new Semi-Supervised Learning methods have emerged. As the accuracy for ImageNet and similar datasets increased over time, the performance on tasks beyond the classification of natural images is yet to be explored. Most Semi-Supervised Learning methods rely on a carefully manually designed data augmentation pipeline that is not transferable for learning on images of other domains. In this work, we propose a Semi-Supervised Learning method that automatically selects the most effective data augmentation policy for a particular dataset. We build upon the Fixmatch method and extend it with meta-learning of augmentations. The augmentation is learned in additional training before the classification training and makes use of bi-level optimization, to optimize the augmentation policy and maximize accuracy. We evaluate our approach on two domain-specific datasets, containing satellite images and hand-drawn sketches, and obtain state-of-the-art results. We further investigate in an ablation the different parameters relevant for learning augmentation policies and show how policy learning can be used to adapt augmentations to datasets beyond ImageNet.
summary: Recently, a number of new Semi-Supervised Learning methods have emerged. As the accuracy for ImageNet and similar datasets increased over time, the performance on tasks beyond the classification of natural images is yet to be explored. Most Semi-Supervised Learning methods rely on a carefully manually designed data augmentation pipeline that is not transferable for learning on images of other domains. In this work, we propose a Semi-Supervised Learning method that automatically selects the most effective data augmentation policy for a particular dataset. We build upon the Fixmatch method and extend it with meta-learning of augmentations. The augmentation is learned in additional training before the classification training and makes use of bi-level optimization, to optimize the augmentation policy and maximize accuracy. We evaluate our approach on two domain-specific datasets, containing satellite images and hand-drawn sketches, and obtain state-of-the-art results. We further investigate in an ablation the different parameters relevant for learning augmentation policies and show how policy learning can be used to adapt augmentations to datasets beyond ImageNet.
abstract_zh: 最近，出现了许多新的半监督学习方法。随着 ImageNet 和类似数据集的准确性随着时间的推移而提高，自然图像分类之外的任务性能还有待探索。大多数半监督学习方法依赖于精心手动设计的数据增强管道，该管道不可用于其他领域图像的学习。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种半监督学习方法，可以自动为特定数据集选择最有效的数据增强策略。我们以 Fixmatch 方法为基础，并通过增强的元学习对其进行扩展。增强是在分类训练之前的额外训练中学习的，并利用双层优化来优化增强策略并最大化准确性。我们在两个特定领域的数据集（包含卫星图像和手绘草图）上评估我们的方法，并获得最先进的结果。我们在消融中进一步研究了与学习增强策略相关的不同参数，并展示了如何使用策略学习来使增强适应 ImageNet 之外的数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种半监督分类方法，能够自动选择最适合特定数据集的数据增强策略。
AI.motivation: 现有的半监督学习方法依赖于手动设计的数据增强流程，这些流程难以适应其他领域图像的学习任务，因此需要一种自动选择最佳数据增强策略的方法。
AI.method: 本文基于Fixmatch方法，并引入元学习来优化数据增强策略。增强策略在分类训练前通过双层优化进行学习，以最大化分类准确性。
AI.result: 在卫星图像和手绘草图两个特定领域的数据集上，该方法取得了最先进的结果。
AI.conclusion: 该研究展示了如何通过策略学习适应不同数据集的增强方法，为半监督学习提供了新的思路。

We further investigate in an ablation the different parameters relevant for learning augmentation policies and show how policy learning can be used to adapt augmentations to datasets beyond ImageNet. 最近，出现了许多新的半监督学习方法。随着 ImageNet 和类似数据集的准确性随着时间的推移而提高，自然图像分类之外的任务性能还有待探索。大多数半监督学习方法依赖于精心手动设计的数据增强管道，该管道不可用于其他领域图像的学习。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种半监督学习方法，可以自动为特定数据集选择最有效的数据增强策略。我们以 Fixmatch 方法为基础，并通过增强的元学习对其进行扩展。增强是在分类训练之前的额外训练中学习的，并利用双层优化来优化增强策略并最大化准确性。我们在两个特定领域的数据集（包含卫星图像和手绘草图）上评估我们的方法，并获得最先进的结果。我们在消融中进一步研究了与学习增强策略相关的不同参数，并展示了如何使用策略学习来使增强适应 ImageNet 之外的数据集。 本文提出了一种半监督分类方法，能够自动选择最适合特定数据集的数据增强策略。 Tim Frommknecht,Pedro Alves Zipf,Quanfu Fan,Nina Shvetsova,Hilde Kuehne cs.CV

authors_text: Juncheng Li,Junlin Xie,Linchao Zhu,Long Qian,Siliang Tang,Wenqiao Zhang,Haochen Shi,Shengyu Zhang,Longhui Wei,Qi Tian,Yueting Zhuang
title: Dilated Context Integrated Network with Cross-Modal Consensus for Temporal Emotion Localization in Videos
title_zh: 具有跨模态共识的扩张上下文集成网络，用于视频中的时间情感定位
comment: Accepted by ACM Multimedia 2022
comments: Accepted by ACM Multimedia 2022
abstract: Understanding human emotions is a crucial ability for intelligent robots to provide better human-robot interactions. The existing works are limited to trimmed video-level emotion classification, failing to locate the temporal window corresponding to the emotion. In this paper, we introduce a new task, named Temporal Emotion Localization in videos~(TEL), which aims to detect human emotions and localize their corresponding temporal boundaries in untrimmed videos with aligned subtitles. TEL presents three unique challenges compared to temporal action localization: 1) The emotions have extremely varied temporal dynamics; 2) The emotion cues are embedded in both appearances and complex plots; 3) The fine-grained temporal annotations are complicated and labor-intensive. To address the first two challenges, we propose a novel dilated context integrated network with a coarse-fine two-stream architecture. The coarse stream captures varied temporal dynamics by modeling multi-granularity temporal contexts. The fine stream achieves complex plots understanding by reasoning the dependency between the multi-granularity temporal contexts from the coarse stream and adaptively integrates them into fine-grained video segment features. To address the third challenge, we introduce a cross-modal consensus learning paradigm, which leverages the inherent semantic consensus between the aligned video and subtitle to achieve weakly-supervised learning. We contribute a new testing set with 3,000 manually-annotated temporal boundaries so that future research on the TEL problem can be quantitatively evaluated. Extensive experiments show the effectiveness of our approach on temporal emotion localization. The repository of this work is at https://github.com/YYJMJC/Temporal-Emotion-Localization-in-Videos.

The existing works are limited to trimmed video-level emotion classification, failing to locate the temporal window corresponding to the emotion. TEL presents three unique challenges compared to temporal action localization: 1) The emotions have extremely varied temporal dynamics; 2) The emotion cues are embedded in both appearances and complex plots; 3) The fine-grained temporal annotations are complicated and labor-intensive. To address the first two challenges, we propose a novel dilated context integrated network with a coarse-fine two-stream architecture. The coarse stream captures varied temporal dynamics by modeling multi-granularity temporal contexts. The fine stream achieves complex plots understanding by reasoning the dependency between the multi-granularity temporal contexts from the coarse stream and adaptively integrates them into fine-grained video segment features. To address the third challenge, we introduce a cross-modal consensus learning paradigm, which leverages the inherent semantic consensus between the aligned video and subtitle to achieve weakly-supervised learning. We contribute a new testing set with 3,000 manually-annotated temporal boundaries so that future research on the TEL problem can be quantitatively evaluated. Extensive experiments show the effectiveness of our approach on temporal emotion localization. The repository of this work is at https://github.com/YYJMJC/Temporal-Emotion-Localization-in-Videos.
abstract_zh: 理解人类情感是智能机器人提供更好的人机交互的关键能力。现有的工作仅限于修剪视频级情感分类，未能定位与情感对应的时间窗口。在本文中，我们引入了一项新任务，名为视频中的时间情感定位（TEL），其目的是检测人类情感并在具有对齐字幕的未修剪视频中定位其相应的时间边界。与时间动作定位相比，TEL 提出了三个独特的挑战：1）情绪具有极其不同的时间动态； 2）情感线索既嵌入外表，又嵌入复杂的情节； 3）细粒度的时间标注复杂且费力。为了解决前两个挑战，我们提出了一种具有粗细双流架构的新型扩张上下文集成网络。粗流通过对多粒度时间上下文进行建模来捕获不同的时间动态。细流通过推理来自粗流的多粒度时间上下文之间的依赖性，并将它们自适应地集成到细粒度的视频片段特征中，实现复杂的图理解。为了解决第三个挑战，我们引入了跨模态共识学习范式，该范式利用对齐视频和字幕之间固有的语义共识来实现弱监督学习。我们贡献了一个新的测试集，其中包含 3,000 个手动注释的时间边界，以便可以定量评估未来对 TEL 问题的研究。大量的实验证明了我们的方法在时间情感定位方面的有效性。这项工作的存储库位于 https://github.com/YYJMJC/Temporal-Emotion-Localization-in-Videos。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Temporal Emotion Localization (TEL)的新任务，旨在检测视频中的人类情绪并定位其对应的时间边界。
AI.motivation: 现有研究局限于视频级别的整体情绪分类，无法定位具体时间窗口。TEL面临情绪时间动态变化、多模态线索融合及精细标注困难三大挑战。
AI.method: 设计了包含粗细双流架构的扩张上下文集成网络：粗流通过多粒度时间上下文建模捕捉动态变化，细流通过跨粒度依赖推理理解复杂情节；引入跨模态共识学习，利用视频与字幕的语义一致性实现弱监督学习。
AI.result: 构建了包含3000个手动标注时间边界的新数据集，实验验证了方法在时间情绪定位任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了TEL任务的核心挑战，并为后续研究提供了可量化评估的数据集基础。

authors_text: Ajinkya Gaikwad,Hitendra Kumar,Soumen Maity,Saket Saurabh,Shuvam Kant Tripathi
title: Maximum Minimal Feedback Vertex Set: A Parameterized Perspective
title_zh: 最大最小反馈顶点集：参数化视角
abstract: In this paper we study a maximization version of the classical Feedback Vertex Set (FVS) problem, namely, the Max Min FVS problem, in the realm of parameterized complexity. In this problem, given an undirected graph $G$, a positive integer $k$, the question is to check whether $G$ has a minimal feedback vertex set of size at least $k$. We obtain following results for Max Min FVS. 1) We first design a fixed parameter tractable (FPT) algorithm for Max Min FVS running in time $10^kn^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$. 2) Next, we consider the problem parameterized by the vertex cover number of the input graph (denoted by $\mathsf{vc}(G)$), and design an algorithm with running time $2^{\mathcal{O}(\mathsf{vc}(G)\log \mathsf{vc}(G))}n^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$. We complement this result by showing that the problem parameterized by $\mathsf{vc}(G)$ does not admit a polynomial compression unless coNP $\subseteq$ NP/poly. 3) Finally, we give an FPT-approximation scheme (fpt-AS) parameterized by $\mathsf{vc}(G)$. That is, we design an algorithm that for every $ε>0$, runs in time $2^{\mathcal{O}\left(\frac{\mathsf{vc}(G)}ε\right)} n^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$ and returns a minimal feedback vertex set of size at least $(1-ε){\sf opt}$.
summary: In this paper we study a maximization version of the classical Feedback Vertex Set (FVS) problem, namely, the Max Min FVS problem, in the realm of parameterized complexity. In this problem, given an undirected graph $G$, a positive integer $k$, the question is to check whether $G$ has a minimal feedback vertex set of size at least $k$. We obtain following results for Max Min FVS. 1) We first design a fixed parameter tractable (FPT) algorithm for Max Min FVS running in time $10^kn^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$. 2) Next, we consider the problem parameterized by the vertex cover number of the input graph (denoted by $\mathsf{vc}(G)$), and design an algorithm with running time $2^{\mathcal{O}(\mathsf{vc}(G)\log \mathsf{vc}(G))}n^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$. We complement this result by showing that the problem parameterized by $\mathsf{vc}(G)$ does not admit a polynomial compression unless coNP $\subseteq$ NP/poly. 3) Finally, we give an FPT-approximation scheme (fpt-AS) parameterized by $\mathsf{vc}(G)$. That is, we design an algorithm that for every $ε>0$, runs in time $2^{\mathcal{O}\left(\frac{\mathsf{vc}(G)}ε\right)} n^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$ and returns a minimal feedback vertex set of size at least $(1-ε){\sf opt}$.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了参数化复杂性领域中经典反馈顶点集（FVS）问题的最大化版本，即最大最小 FVS 问题。在这个问题中，给定一个无向图 $G$，一个正整数 $k$，问题是检查 $G$ 是否具有大小至少为 $k$ 的最小反馈顶点集。我们获得以下 Max Min FVS 结果。 1) 我们首先为 Max Min FVS 设计一个固定参数易处理（FPT）算法，运行时间为 $10^kn^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$。 2) 接下来，我们考虑由输入图的顶点覆盖数参数化的问题（用$\mathsf{vc}(G)$表示），并设计一个运行时间为$2^{\mathcal{O}(\mathsf{vc}(G)\log \mathsf{vc}(G))}n^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$的算法。我们通过证明由 $\mathsf{vc}(G)$ 参数化的问题不承认多项式压缩除非 coNP $\subseteq$ NP/poly 来补充这个结果。 3）最后，我们给出一个由 $\mathsf{vc}(G)$ 参数化的 FPT 近似方案（fpt-AS）。也就是说，我们设计一个算法，对于每个 $ε>0$，在时间 $2^{\mathcal{O}\left(\frac{\mathsf{vc}(G)}ε\right)} n^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$ 中运行，并返回大小至少为 $(1-ε){\sf opt}$ 的最小反馈顶点集。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了反馈顶点集问题的极大极小版本（Max Min FVS）的参数化复杂性，提出了多项式时间算法和参数化算法。
AI.motivation: 反馈顶点集问题在图论中具有重要应用，但其极小化问题的求解复杂度较高。本文旨在探索该问题在参数化框架下的求解效率及复杂性界限。
AI.method: 设计固定参数多项式时间算法（FPT），基于顶点覆盖数参数化并结合压缩技术，以及构造FPT近似方案。
AI.result: 提出时间复杂度为$10^kn^{\\mathcal{O}(1)}$的FPT算法；基于顶点覆盖数的算法时间复杂度为$2^{\\mathcal{O}(\\mathsf{vc}(G)\\log \\mathsf{vc}(G))}n^{\\mathcal{O}(1)}$，并证明该参数化问题不存在多项式压缩；进一步设计了FPT近似方案。
AI.conclusion: 本文为Max Min FVS问题提供了参数化算法及复杂性分析，揭示了顶点覆盖数作为参数的有效性，并建立了近似与精确解之间的关系。

search_text: Maximum Minimal Feedback Vertex Set: A Parameterized Perspective 最大最小反馈顶点集：参数化视角 In this paper we study a maximization version of the classical Feedback Vertex Set (FVS) problem, namely, the Max Min FVS problem, in the realm of parameterized complexity. In this problem, given an undirected graph $G$, a positive integer $k$, the question is to check whether $G$ has a minimal feedback vertex set of size at least $k$. We obtain following results for Max Min FVS. 1) We first design a fixed parameter tractable (FPT) algorithm for Max Min FVS running in time $10^kn^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$. 2) Next, we consider the problem parameterized by the vertex cover number of the input graph (denoted by $\mathsf{vc}(G)$), and design an algorithm with running time $2^{\mathcal{O}(\mathsf{vc}(G)\log \mathsf{vc}(G))}n^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$. We complement this result by showing that the problem parameterized by $\mathsf{vc}(G)$ does not admit a polynomial compression unless coNP $\subseteq$ NP/poly. 3) Finally, we give an FPT-approximation scheme (fpt-AS) parameterized by $\mathsf{vc}(G)$. That is, we design an algorithm that for every $ε>0$, runs in time $2^{\mathcal{O}\left(\frac{\mathsf{vc}(G)}ε\right)} n^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$ and returns a minimal feedback vertex set of size at least $(1-ε){\sf opt}$. 在本文中，我们研究了参数化复杂性领域中经典反馈顶点集（FVS）问题的最大化版本，即最大最小 FVS 问题。在这个问题中，给定一个无向图 $G$，一个正整数 $k$，问题是检查 $G$ 是否具有大小至少为 $k$ 的最小反馈顶点集。我们获得以下 Max Min FVS 结果。 1) 我们首先为 Max Min FVS 设计一个固定参数易处理（FPT）算法，运行时间为 $10^kn^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$。 2) 接下来，我们考虑由输入图的顶点覆盖数参数化的问题（用$\mathsf{vc}(G)$表示），并设计一个运行时间为$2^{\mathcal{O}(\mathsf{vc}(G)\log \mathsf{vc}(G))}n^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$的算法。我们通过证明由 $\mathsf{vc}(G)$ 参数化的问题不承认多项式压缩除非 coNP $\subseteq$ NP/poly 来补充这个结果。 3）最后，我们给出一个由 $\mathsf{vc}(G)$ 参数化的 FPT 近似方案（fpt-AS）。也就是说，我们设计一个算法，对于每个 $ε>0$，在时间 $2^{\mathcal{O}\left(\frac{\mathsf{vc}(G)}ε\right)} n^{\mathcal{O}(1)}$ 中运行，并返回大小至少为 $(1-ε){\sf opt}$ 的最小反馈顶点集。 本文研究了反馈顶点集问题的极大极小版本（Max Min FVS）的参数化复杂性，提出了多项式时间算法和参数化算法。 Ajinkya Gaikwad,Hitendra Kumar,Soumen Maity,Saket Saurabh,Shuvam Kant Tripathi cs.DS

authors_text: Mengmeng Xu,Cheng-Yang Fu,Yanghao Li,Bernard Ghanem,Juan-Manuel Perez-Rua,Tao Xiang
title: Negative Frames Matter in Egocentric Visual Query 2D Localization
title_zh: 负框架在以自我为中心的视觉查询 2D 本地化中很重要
comment: First place winning solution for VQ2D task in CVPR-2022 Ego4D Challenge. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/vq2d_cvpr
comments: First place winning solution for VQ2D task in CVPR-2022 Ego4D Challenge. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/vq2d_cvpr
abstract: The recently released Ego4D dataset and benchmark significantly scales and diversifies the first-person visual perception data. In Ego4D, the Visual Queries 2D Localization task aims to retrieve objects appeared in the past from the recording in the first-person view. This task requires a system to spatially and temporally localize the most recent appearance of a given object query, where query is registered by a single tight visual crop of the object in a different scene. Our study is based on the three-stage baseline introduced in the Episodic Memory benchmark. The baseline solves the problem by detection and tracking: detect the similar objects in all the frames, then run a tracker from the most confident detection result. In the VQ2D challenge, we identified two limitations of the current baseline. (1) The training configuration has redundant computation. Although the training set has millions of instances, most of them are repetitive and the number of unique object is only around 14.6k. The repeated gradient computation of the same object lead to an inefficient training; (2) The false positive rate is high on background frames. This is due to the distribution gap between training and evaluation. During training, the model is only able to see the clean, stable, and labeled frames, but the egocentric videos also have noisy, blurry, or unlabeled background frames. To this end, we developed a more efficient and effective solution. Concretely, we bring the training loop from ~15 days to less than 24 hours, and we achieve 0.17% spatial-temporal AP, which is 31% higher than the baseline. Our solution got the first ranking on the public leaderboard. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/vq2d_cvpr.

abstract_zh: 最近发布的 Ego4D 数据集和基准测试显着扩展了第一人称视觉感知数据并使其多样化。在 Ego4D 中，视觉查询 2D 本地化任务旨在从第一人称视角的记录中检索过去出现的对象。此任务需要一个系统在空间和时间上定位给定对象查询的最近出现，其中查询是通过不同场景中对象的单个紧密视觉裁剪来注册的。我们的研究基于情节记忆基准测试中引入的三阶段基线。基线通过检测和跟踪来解决问题：检测所有帧中的相似对象，然后根据最可信的检测结果运行跟踪器。在 VQ2D 挑战中，我们确定了当前基线的两个局限性。 (1)训练配置存在冗余计算。尽管训练集有数百万个实例，但其中大部分都是重复的，并且唯一对象的数量只有 14.6k 左右。同一物体的重复梯度计算导致训练效率低下； (2)背景帧误报率较高。这是由于培训和评估之间的分配差距造成的。在训练过程中，模型只能看到干净、稳定和标记的帧，但以自我为中心的视频也有噪声、模糊或未标记的背景帧。为此，我们制定了更加高效、有效的解决方案。具体来说，我们将训练循环从约 15 天缩短到不到 24 小时，并且我们实现了 0.17% 的时空 AP，比基线高出 31%。我们的解决方案在公共排行榜上排名第一。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/facebookresearch/vq2d_cvpr 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在第一视角视频中通过视觉查询进行二维定位的任务，旨在从历史记录中检索特定对象的最新出现位置。
AI.motivation: 现有基线方法存在训练效率低和背景帧误检率高的问题，需优化计算冗余并缩小训练与评估的数据分布差距。
AI.method: 通过减少重复对象梯度计算提升训练效率，并引入背景帧过滤策略，将训练时间从15天缩短至24小时以内。
AI.result: 在VQ2D挑战赛中取得0.17%时空AP指标，较基线提升31%，位列公开榜单首位。
AI.conclusion: 提出的高效训练与误检抑制方法有效解决了第一视角视频对象定位的核心挑战。

authors_text: Manisha Das Chaity,Masud An Nur Islam Fahim
title: Decay2Distill: Leveraging spatial perturbation and regularization for self-supervised image denoising
title_zh: Decay2Distill：利用空间扰动和正则化进行自监督图像去噪
abstract: Unpaired image denoising has achieved promising development over the last few years. Regardless of the performance, methods tend to heavily rely on underlying noise properties or any assumption which is not always practical. Alternatively, if we can ground the problem from a structural perspective rather than noise statistics, we can achieve a more robust solution. with such motivation, we propose a self-supervised denoising scheme that is unpaired and relies on spatial degradation followed by a regularized refinement. Our method shows considerable improvement over previous methods and exhibited consistent performance over different data domains.
summary: Unpaired image denoising has achieved promising development over the last few years. Regardless of the performance, methods tend to heavily rely on underlying noise properties or any assumption which is not always practical. Alternatively, if we can ground the problem from a structural perspective rather than noise statistics, we can achieve a more robust solution. with such motivation, we propose a self-supervised denoising scheme that is unpaired and relies on spatial degradation followed by a regularized refinement. Our method shows considerable improvement over previous methods and exhibited consistent performance over different data domains.
abstract_zh: 未配对图像去噪在过去几年中取得了有希望的发展。无论性能如何，方法往往严重依赖于潜在的噪声属性或任何并不总是实用的假设。或者，如果我们能够从结构角度而不是噪声统计角度来解决问题，我们就可以实现更稳健的解决方案。出于这样的动机，我们提出了一种自监督去噪方案，该方案是不配对的，并且依赖于空间退化，然后进行正则化细化。我们的方法比以前的方法显示出相当大的改进，并且在不同的数据域上表现出一致的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需配对数据的自监督图像去噪方法，通过空间退化和正则化精炼实现更鲁棒的去噪效果。
AI.motivation: 现有去噪方法过度依赖噪声统计特性或先验假设，缺乏对图像结构特性的直接建模，导致实际应用中鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 设计空间扰动退化模块与正则化精炼模块，通过自监督学习框架实现无配对数据下的图像结构修复。
AI.result: 在多个数据域上均取得优于现有方法的去噪性能，且对噪声类型和强度具有更强的适应性。
AI.conclusion: 从结构视角出发的自监督去噪框架能有效突破传统噪声统计建模的局限性，为实际应用提供更可靠的解决方案。

title: PalQuant: Accelerating High-precision Networks on Low-precision Accelerators
title_zh: PalQuant：在低精度加速器上加速高精度网络
comment: accepted by ECCV2022
comments: accepted by ECCV2022
abstract: Recently low-precision deep learning accelerators (DLAs) have become popular due to their advantages in chip area and energy consumption, yet the low-precision quantized models on these DLAs bring in severe accuracy degradation. One way to achieve both high accuracy and efficient inference is to deploy high-precision neural networks on low-precision DLAs, which is rarely studied. In this paper, we propose the PArallel Low-precision Quantization (PalQuant) method that approximates high-precision computations via learning parallel low-precision representations from scratch. In addition, we present a novel cyclic shuffle module to boost the cross-group information communication between parallel low-precision groups. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PalQuant has superior performance to state-of-the-art quantization methods in both accuracy and inference speed, e.g., for ResNet-18 network quantization, PalQuant can obtain 0.52\% higher accuracy and 1.78$\times$ speedup simultaneously over their 4-bit counter-part on a state-of-the-art 2-bit accelerator. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/huqinghao/PalQuant}.
summary: Recently low-precision deep learning accelerators (DLAs) have become popular due to their advantages in chip area and energy consumption, yet the low-precision quantized models on these DLAs bring in severe accuracy degradation. One way to achieve both high accuracy and efficient inference is to deploy high-precision neural networks on low-precision DLAs, which is rarely studied. In this paper, we propose the PArallel Low-precision Quantization (PalQuant) method that approximates high-precision computations via learning parallel low-precision representations from scratch. In addition, we present a novel cyclic shuffle module to boost the cross-group information communication between parallel low-precision groups. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PalQuant has superior performance to state-of-the-art quantization methods in both accuracy and inference speed, e.g., for ResNet-18 network quantization, PalQuant can obtain 0.52\% higher accuracy and 1.78$\times$ speedup simultaneously over their 4-bit counter-part on a state-of-the-art 2-bit accelerator. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/huqinghao/PalQuant}.
abstract_zh: 近年来，低精度深度学习加速器（DLA）因其在芯片面积和能耗方面的优势而受到欢迎，但这些DLA上的低精度量化模型带来了严重的精度下降。实现高精度和高效推理的一种方法是在低精度 DLA 上部署高精度神经网络，但这方面的研究很少。在本文中，我们提出了并行低精度量化（PalQuant）方法，该方法通过从头开始学习并行低精度表示来近似高精度计算。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的循环洗牌模块来促进并行低精度组之间的跨组信息通信。大量实验表明，PalQuant 在精度和推理速度方面均优于最先进的量化方法，例如，对于 ResNet-18 网络量化，PalQuant 可以在最先进的 2 位加速器上比 4 位对应方法同时获得 0.52% 的更高准确度和 1.78$\times$ 加速。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/huqinghao/PalQuant} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PalQuant的方法，旨在在低精度加速器上加速高精度网络的推理。
AI.motivation: 由于低精度深度学习加速器在芯片面积和能耗方面的优势而受到关注，但低精度量化模型会导致严重的精度下降。如何在低精度加速器上部署高精度网络仍是一个未被充分研究的问题。
AI.method: 本文提出了并行低精度量化（PalQuant）方法，通过从头学习并行低精度表示来近似高精度计算，并引入了一种新的循环洗牌模块，以增强并行低精度组之间的跨组信息通信。
AI.result: 实验表明，PalQuant在精度和推理速度方面优于最先进的量化方法。例如，在ResNet-18网络量化上，PalQuant在最先进的2位加速器上比4位版本的精度高出0.52%，速度提高了1.78倍。
AI.conclusion: PalQuant方法在保持高精度的同时显著提高了低精度加速器上的推理速度，具有较高的应用价值。

search_text: PalQuant: Accelerating High-precision Networks on Low-precision Accelerators PalQuant：在低精度加速器上加速高精度网络 Recently low-precision deep learning accelerators (DLAs) have become popular due to their advantages in chip area and energy consumption, yet the low-precision quantized models on these DLAs bring in severe accuracy degradation. One way to achieve both high accuracy and efficient inference is to deploy high-precision neural networks on low-precision DLAs, which is rarely studied. In this paper, we propose the PArallel Low-precision Quantization (PalQuant) method that approximates high-precision computations via learning parallel low-precision representations from scratch. In addition, we present a novel cyclic shuffle module to boost the cross-group information communication between parallel low-precision groups. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PalQuant has superior performance to state-of-the-art quantization methods in both accuracy and inference speed, e.g., for ResNet-18 network quantization, PalQuant can obtain 0.52\% higher accuracy and 1.78$\times$ speedup simultaneously over their 4-bit counter-part on a state-of-the-art 2-bit accelerator. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/huqinghao/PalQuant}. 近年来，低精度深度学习加速器（DLA）因其在芯片面积和能耗方面的优势而受到欢迎，但这些DLA上的低精度量化模型带来了严重的精度下降。实现高精度和高效推理的一种方法是在低精度 DLA 上部署高精度神经网络，但这方面的研究很少。在本文中，我们提出了并行低精度量化（PalQuant）方法，该方法通过从头开始学习并行低精度表示来近似高精度计算。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的循环洗牌模块来促进并行低精度组之间的跨组信息通信。大量实验表明，PalQuant 在精度和推理速度方面均优于最先进的量化方法，例如，对于 ResNet-18 网络量化，PalQuant 可以在最先进的 2 位加速器上比 4 位对应方法同时获得 0.52% 的更高准确度和 1.78$\times$ 加速。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/huqinghao/PalQuant} 获取。 本文提出了一种名为PalQuant的方法，旨在在低精度加速器上加速高精度网络的推理。 Qinghao Hu,Gang Li,Qiman Wu,Jian Cheng cs.CV

title: The SJTU System for Short-duration Speaker Verification Challenge 2021
title_zh: 2021年上海交通大学短期说话人验证挑战赛系统
comment: Published by Interspeech 2021
comments: Published by Interspeech 2021
abstract: This paper presents the SJTU system for both text-dependent and text-independent tasks in short-duration speaker verification (SdSV) challenge 2021. In this challenge, we explored different strong embedding extractors to extract robust speaker embedding. For text-independent task, language-dependent adaptive snorm is explored to improve the system performance under the cross-lingual verification condition. For text-dependent task, we mainly focus on the in-domain fine-tuning strategies based on the model pre-trained on large-scale out-of-domain data. In order to improve the distinction between different speakers uttering the same phrase, we proposed several novel phrase-aware fine-tuning strategies and phrase-aware neural PLDA. With such strategies, the system performance is further improved. Finally, we fused the scores of different systems, and our fusion systems achieved 0.0473 in Task1 (rank 3) and 0.0581 in Task2 (rank 8) on the primary evaluation metric.
summary: This paper presents the SJTU system for both text-dependent and text-independent tasks in short-duration speaker verification (SdSV) challenge 2021. In this challenge, we explored different strong embedding extractors to extract robust speaker embedding. For text-independent task, language-dependent adaptive snorm is explored to improve the system performance under the cross-lingual verification condition. For text-dependent task, we mainly focus on the in-domain fine-tuning strategies based on the model pre-trained on large-scale out-of-domain data. In order to improve the distinction between different speakers uttering the same phrase, we proposed several novel phrase-aware fine-tuning strategies and phrase-aware neural PLDA. With such strategies, the system performance is further improved. Finally, we fused the scores of different systems, and our fusion systems achieved 0.0473 in Task1 (rank 3) and 0.0581 in Task2 (rank 8) on the primary evaluation metric.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了上海交通大学系统在 2021 年短时说话人验证（SdSV）挑战赛中用于文本相关和文本无关任务的系统。在本次挑战赛中，我们探索了不同的强嵌入提取器来提取鲁棒的说话人嵌入。对于与文本无关的任务，探索了与语言相关的自适应snorm，以提高跨语言验证条件下的系统性能。对于文本相关的任务，我们主要关注基于大规模域外数据预训练的模型的域内微调策略。为了提高不同说话者说出相同短语的区别，我们提出了几种新颖的短语感知微调策略和短语感知神经 PLDA。通过这样的策略，系统性能进一步提高。最后，我们融合了不同系统的分数，我们的融合系统在主要评估指标上在任务 1（排名 3）中取得了 0.0473 的成绩，在任务 2（排名 8）中取得了 0.0581 的成绩。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了上海交通大学（SJTU）在2021年短时长说话人验证挑战赛中针对文本相关和文本无关任务的系统设计与实现。
AI.motivation: 短时长说话人验证面临数据量少、跨语言验证条件下的鲁棒性不足及文本相关任务中同句不同说话人区分困难等挑战，需探索更有效的嵌入提取与优化策略。
AI.method: 采用强嵌入提取器生成鲁棒说话人嵌入；文本无关任务引入语言自适应snorm；文本相关任务通过领域内微调及新型短语感知微调策略与神经PLDA提升区分度；最终融合多系统得分。
AI.result: 在主要评估指标上，系统在任务1（文本相关）取得0.0473 EER（排名第3），任务2（文本无关）取得0.0581 EER（排名第8）。
AI.conclusion: 通过嵌入优化、跨语言自适应及短语感知策略的融合，系统有效提升了短时长说话人验证性能，尤其在文本相关任务中表现突出。

title: Self-Supervised Speaker Verification Using Dynamic Loss-Gate and Label Correction
title_zh: 使用动态损耗门和标签校正进行自监督说话人验证
comment: Accepted by Interspeech 2022
comments: Accepted by Interspeech 2022
abstract: For self-supervised speaker verification, the quality of pseudo labels decides the upper bound of the system due to the massive unreliable labels. In this work, we propose dynamic loss-gate and label correction (DLG-LC) to alleviate the performance degradation caused by unreliable estimated labels. In DLG, we adopt Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) to dynamically model the loss distribution and use the estimated GMM to distinguish the reliable and unreliable labels automatically. Besides, to better utilize the unreliable data instead of dropping them directly, we correct the unreliable label with model predictions. Moreover, we apply the negative-pairs-free DINO framework in our experiments for further improvement. Compared to the best-known speaker verification system with self-supervised learning, our proposed DLG-LC converges faster and achieves 11.45%, 18.35% and 15.16% relative improvement on Vox-O, Vox-E and Vox-H trials of Voxceleb1 evaluation dataset.
summary: For self-supervised speaker verification, the quality of pseudo labels decides the upper bound of the system due to the massive unreliable labels. In this work, we propose dynamic loss-gate and label correction (DLG-LC) to alleviate the performance degradation caused by unreliable estimated labels. In DLG, we adopt Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) to dynamically model the loss distribution and use the estimated GMM to distinguish the reliable and unreliable labels automatically. Besides, to better utilize the unreliable data instead of dropping them directly, we correct the unreliable label with model predictions. Moreover, we apply the negative-pairs-free DINO framework in our experiments for further improvement. Compared to the best-known speaker verification system with self-supervised learning, our proposed DLG-LC converges faster and achieves 11.45%, 18.35% and 15.16% relative improvement on Vox-O, Vox-E and Vox-H trials of Voxceleb1 evaluation dataset.
abstract_zh: 对于自监督说话人验证，由于存在大量不可靠标签，伪标签的质量决定了系统的上限。在这项工作中，我们提出动态损失门和标签校正（DLG-LC）来减轻由不可靠的估计标签引起的性能下降。在DLG中，我们采用高斯混合模型（GMM）对损失分布进行动态建模，并使用估计的GMM自动区分可靠和不可靠的标签。此外，为了更好地利用不可靠的数据而不是直接丢弃它们，我们通过模型预测来纠正不可靠的标签。此外，我们在实验中应用了无负对的 DINO 框架来进一步改进。与最著名的自监督学习说话人验证系统相比，我们提出的 DLG-LC 收敛速度更快，并且在 Voxceleb1 评估数据集的 Vox-O、Vox-E 和 Vox-H 试验中实现了 11.45%、18.35% 和 15.16% 的相对改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自监督说话人验证方法，通过动态损失门控和标签校正来提高系统性能。
AI.motivation: 在自监督说话人验证中，伪标签的质量决定了系统的上限，而大量不可靠的标签会导致性能下降，因此需要改进标签处理方法。
AI.method: 本文提出了动态损失门控（DLG）和标签校正（LC）方法，利用高斯混合模型动态建模损失分布，并自动区分可靠和不可靠标签。同时，通过模型预测对不可靠标签进行校正，并应用了无负样本对的DINO框架。
AI.result: 与当前最佳的自监督学习说话人验证系统相比，所提方法收敛更快，在Voxceleb1数据集的Vox-O、Vox-E和Vox-H测试中分别实现了11.45%、18.35%和15.16%的相对性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 动态损失门控和标签校正方法有效缓解了不可靠标签带来的性能下降问题，提升了自监督说话人验证的性能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种自监督说话人验证方法，通过动态损失门控和标签校正来提高系统性能。
ai_content.motivation: 在自监督说话人验证中，伪标签的质量决定了系统的上限，而大量不可靠的标签会导致性能下降，因此需要改进标签处理方法。
ai_content.method: 本文提出了动态损失门控（DLG）和标签校正（LC）方法，利用高斯混合模型动态建模损失分布，并自动区分可靠和不可靠标签。同时，通过模型预测对不可靠标签进行校正，并应用了无负样本对的DINO框架。
ai_content.result: 与当前最佳的自监督学习说话人验证系统相比，所提方法收敛更快，在Voxceleb1数据集的Vox-O、Vox-E和Vox-H测试中分别实现了11.45%、18.35%和15.16%的相对性能提升。
ai_content.conclusion: 动态损失门控和标签校正方法有效缓解了不可靠标签带来的性能下降问题，提升了自监督说话人验证的性能。

search_text: Self-Supervised Speaker Verification Using Dynamic Loss-Gate and Label Correction 使用动态损耗门和标签校正进行自监督说话人验证 For self-supervised speaker verification, the quality of pseudo labels decides the upper bound of the system due to the massive unreliable labels. In this work, we propose dynamic loss-gate and label correction (DLG-LC) to alleviate the performance degradation caused by unreliable estimated labels. In DLG, we adopt Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) to dynamically model the loss distribution and use the estimated GMM to distinguish the reliable and unreliable labels automatically. Besides, to better utilize the unreliable data instead of dropping them directly, we correct the unreliable label with model predictions. Moreover, we apply the negative-pairs-free DINO framework in our experiments for further improvement. Compared to the best-known speaker verification system with self-supervised learning, our proposed DLG-LC converges faster and achieves 11.45%, 18.35% and 15.16% relative improvement on Vox-O, Vox-E and Vox-H trials of Voxceleb1 evaluation dataset. 对于自监督说话人验证，由于存在大量不可靠标签，伪标签的质量决定了系统的上限。在这项工作中，我们提出动态损失门和标签校正（DLG-LC）来减轻由不可靠的估计标签引起的性能下降。在DLG中，我们采用高斯混合模型（GMM）对损失分布进行动态建模，并使用估计的GMM自动区分可靠和不可靠的标签。此外，为了更好地利用不可靠的数据而不是直接丢弃它们，我们通过模型预测来纠正不可靠的标签。此外，我们在实验中应用了无负对的 DINO 框架来进一步改进。与最著名的自监督学习说话人验证系统相比，我们提出的 DLG-LC 收敛速度更快，并且在 Voxceleb1 评估数据集的 Vox-O、Vox-E 和 Vox-H 试验中实现了 11.45%、18.35% 和 15.16% 的相对改进。 本文提出了一种自监督说话人验证方法，通过动态损失门控和标签校正来提高系统性能。 Bing Han,Zhengyang Chen,Yanmin Qian cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Xiangrui Zhao,Sheng Yang,Tianxin Huang,Jun Chen,Teng Ma,Mingyang Li,Yong Liu
title: SuperLine3D: Self-supervised Line Segmentation and Description for LiDAR Point Cloud
title_zh: SuperLine3D：LiDAR 点云的自监督线分割和描述
comment: 17 pages, ECCV 2022 Accepted
comments: 17 pages, ECCV 2022 Accepted
abstract: Poles and building edges are frequently observable objects on urban roads, conveying reliable hints for various computer vision tasks. To repetitively extract them as features and perform association between discrete LiDAR frames for registration, we propose the first learning-based feature segmentation and description model for 3D lines in LiDAR point cloud. To train our model without the time consuming and tedious data labeling process, we first generate synthetic primitives for the basic appearance of target lines, and build an iterative line auto-labeling process to gradually refine line labels on real LiDAR scans. Our segmentation model can extract lines under arbitrary scale perturbations, and we use shared EdgeConv encoder layers to train the two segmentation and descriptor heads jointly. Base on the model, we can build a highly-available global registration module for point cloud registration, in conditions without initial transformation hints. Experiments have demonstrated that our line-based registration method is highly competitive to state-of-the-art point-based approaches. Our code is available at https://github.com/zxrzju/SuperLine3D.git.
summary: Poles and building edges are frequently observable objects on urban roads, conveying reliable hints for various computer vision tasks. To repetitively extract them as features and perform association between discrete LiDAR frames for registration, we propose the first learning-based feature segmentation and description model for 3D lines in LiDAR point cloud. To train our model without the time consuming and tedious data labeling process, we first generate synthetic primitives for the basic appearance of target lines, and build an iterative line auto-labeling process to gradually refine line labels on real LiDAR scans. Our segmentation model can extract lines under arbitrary scale perturbations, and we use shared EdgeConv encoder layers to train the two segmentation and descriptor heads jointly. Base on the model, we can build a highly-available global registration module for point cloud registration, in conditions without initial transformation hints. Experiments have demonstrated that our line-based registration method is highly competitive to state-of-the-art point-based approaches. Our code is available at https://github.com/zxrzju/SuperLine3D.git.
abstract_zh: 电线杆和建筑物边缘是城市道路上经常观察到的物体，为各种计算机视觉任务提供可靠的提示。为了重复提取它们作为特征并执行离散 LiDAR 帧之间的关联以进行配准，我们提出了第一个基于学习的 LiDAR 点云中 3D 线的特征分割和描述模型。为了在没有耗时且繁琐的数据标记过程的情况下训练我们的模型，我们首先为目标线的基本外观生成合成图元，并构建迭代线自动标记过程以逐步细化真实 LiDAR 扫描上的线标签。我们的分割模型可以在任意尺度扰动下提取线条，并且我们使用共享的 EdgeConv 编码器层来联合训练两个分割和描述符头。基于该模型，我们可以在没有初始转换提示的情况下构建一个高可用的全局点云配准模块。实验表明，我们的基于线的配准方法与最先进的基于点的方法相比具有很强的竞争力。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/zxrzju/SuperLine3D.git 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自监督学习的3D线分割与描述模型SuperLine3D，用于LiDAR点云的特征提取与点云注册。
AI.motivation: 传统LiDAR点云处理依赖人工标注数据耗时费力，且现有方法难以有效提取城市道路中的杆、建筑边缘等关键线特征用于注册任务。
AI.method: 通过生成合成线形基元与迭代自动标注机制减少人工标注依赖，采用共享EdgeConv编码器联合训练分割与描述头，并构建无需初始变换的全局注册模块。
AI.result: 实验表明该线基注册方法性能可与最先进的点基方法媲美，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: SuperLine3D实现了LiDAR点云中线特征的自监督学习，为点云注册提供了高效且准确的解决方案。

authors_text: Kwanyong Park,Sanghyun Woo,Seoung Wug Oh,In So Kweon,Joon-Young Lee
title: Per-Clip Video Object Segmentation
title_zh: 每个剪辑视频对象分割
comment: CVPR 2022; Code is available at https://github.com/pkyong95/PCVOS
comments: CVPR 2022; Code is available at https://github.com/pkyong95/PCVOS
abstract: Recently, memory-based approaches show promising results on semi-supervised video object segmentation. These methods predict object masks frame-by-frame with the help of frequently updated memory of the previous mask. Different from this per-frame inference, we investigate an alternative perspective by treating video object segmentation as clip-wise mask propagation. In this per-clip inference scheme, we update the memory with an interval and simultaneously process a set of consecutive frames (i.e. clip) between the memory updates. The scheme provides two potential benefits: accuracy gain by clip-level optimization and efficiency gain by parallel computation of multiple frames. To this end, we propose a new method tailored for the per-clip inference. Specifically, we first introduce a clip-wise operation to refine the features based on intra-clip correlation. In addition, we employ a progressive matching mechanism for efficient information-passing within a clip. With the synergy of two modules and a newly proposed per-clip based training, our network achieves state-of-the-art performance on Youtube-VOS 2018/2019 val (84.6% and 84.6%) and DAVIS 2016/2017 val (91.9% and 86.1%). Furthermore, our model shows a great speed-accuracy trade-off with varying memory update intervals, which leads to huge flexibility.
summary: Recently, memory-based approaches show promising results on semi-supervised video object segmentation. These methods predict object masks frame-by-frame with the help of frequently updated memory of the previous mask. Different from this per-frame inference, we investigate an alternative perspective by treating video object segmentation as clip-wise mask propagation. In this per-clip inference scheme, we update the memory with an interval and simultaneously process a set of consecutive frames (i.e. clip) between the memory updates. The scheme provides two potential benefits: accuracy gain by clip-level optimization and efficiency gain by parallel computation of multiple frames. To this end, we propose a new method tailored for the per-clip inference. Specifically, we first introduce a clip-wise operation to refine the features based on intra-clip correlation. In addition, we employ a progressive matching mechanism for efficient information-passing within a clip. With the synergy of two modules and a newly proposed per-clip based training, our network achieves state-of-the-art performance on Youtube-VOS 2018/2019 val (84.6% and 84.6%) and DAVIS 2016/2017 val (91.9% and 86.1%). Furthermore, our model shows a great speed-accuracy trade-off with varying memory update intervals, which leads to huge flexibility.
abstract_zh: 最近，基于记忆的方法在半监督视频对象分割方面显示出了有希望的结果。这些方法借助频繁更新的前一个掩模的内存来逐帧预测对象掩模。与这种每帧推断不同，我们通过将视频对象分割视为剪辑式掩模传播来研究替代视角。在这个每剪辑推理方案中，我们以一定间隔更新内存，并在内存更新之间同时处理一组连续帧（即剪辑）。该方案提供了两个潜在的好处：通过剪辑级优化提高精度，通过多帧并行计算提高效率。为此，我们提出了一种针对每个剪辑推理量身定制的新方法。具体来说，我们首先引入基于剪辑内相关性的剪辑操作来细化特征。此外，我们采用渐进匹配机制来在剪辑内实现高效的信息传递。通过两个模块的协同作用和新提出的基于每个剪辑的训练，我们的网络在 Youtube-VOS 2018/2019 val（84.6% 和 84.6%）和 DAVIS 2016/2017 val（91.9% 和 86.1%）上实现了最先进的性能。此外，我们的模型显示了不同内存更新间隔的速度与精度之间的巨大权衡，这带来了巨大的灵活性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于片段（per-clip）的视频对象分割方法，通过将视频分割任务从逐帧处理转变为片段级掩码传播，提升分割精度与计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于内存的半监督视频分割方法逐帧预测掩码，存在计算效率低、难以利用片段内帧间关联的问题。本文通过片段级优化与并行计算，旨在实现更高效且精准的分割。
AI.method: 提出片段级特征优化模块（利用片段内帧间相关性）与渐进匹配机制（高效传递片段内信息），结合片段级训练策略，实现并行处理连续帧的分割任务。
AI.result: 在YouTube-VOS 2018/2019验证集上达到84.6%的分割精度，在DAVIS 2016/2017验证集上达到91.9%和86.1%，并展示出灵活的速度-精度权衡能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过片段级处理与模块设计，本文方法在多个基准数据集上达到SOTA性能，验证了片段级推理在视频分割任务中的有效性与灵活性。

method: 提出片段级特征优化模块（利用片段内帧间相关性）与渐进匹配机制（高效传递片段内信息），结合片段级训练策略，实现并行处理连续帧的分割任务。
result: 在YouTube-VOS 2018/2019验证集上达到84.6%的分割精度，在DAVIS 2016/2017验证集上达到91.9%和86.1%，并展示出灵活的速度-精度权衡能力。
conclusion: 通过片段级处理与模块设计，本文方法在多个基准数据集上达到SOTA性能，验证了片段级推理在视频分割任务中的有效性与灵活性。
search_text: Per-Clip Video Object Segmentation 每个剪辑视频对象分割 Recently, memory-based approaches show promising results on semi-supervised video object segmentation. These methods predict object masks frame-by-frame with the help of frequently updated memory of the previous mask. Different from this per-frame inference, we investigate an alternative perspective by treating video object segmentation as clip-wise mask propagation. In this per-clip inference scheme, we update the memory with an interval and simultaneously process a set of consecutive frames (i.e. clip) between the memory updates. The scheme provides two potential benefits: accuracy gain by clip-level optimization and efficiency gain by parallel computation of multiple frames. To this end, we propose a new method tailored for the per-clip inference. Specifically, we first introduce a clip-wise operation to refine the features based on intra-clip correlation. In addition, we employ a progressive matching mechanism for efficient information-passing within a clip. With the synergy of two modules and a newly proposed per-clip based training, our network achieves state-of-the-art performance on Youtube-VOS 2018/2019 val (84.6% and 84.6%) and DAVIS 2016/2017 val (91.9% and 86.1%). Furthermore, our model shows a great speed-accuracy trade-off with varying memory update intervals, which leads to huge flexibility. 最近，基于记忆的方法在半监督视频对象分割方面显示出了有希望的结果。这些方法借助频繁更新的前一个掩模的内存来逐帧预测对象掩模。与这种每帧推断不同，我们通过将视频对象分割视为剪辑式掩模传播来研究替代视角。在这个每剪辑推理方案中，我们以一定间隔更新内存，并在内存更新之间同时处理一组连续帧（即剪辑）。该方案提供了两个潜在的好处：通过剪辑级优化提高精度，通过多帧并行计算提高效率。为此，我们提出了一种针对每个剪辑推理量身定制的新方法。具体来说，我们首先引入基于剪辑内相关性的剪辑操作来细化特征。此外，我们采用渐进匹配机制来在剪辑内实现高效的信息传递。通过两个模块的协同作用和新提出的基于每个剪辑的训练，我们的网络在 Youtube-VOS 2018/2019 val（84.6% 和 84.6%）和 DAVIS 2016/2017 val（91.9% 和 86.1%）上实现了最先进的性能。此外，我们的模型显示了不同内存更新间隔的速度与精度之间的巨大权衡，这带来了巨大的灵活性。 本文提出了一种基于片段（per-clip）的视频对象分割方法，通过将视频分割任务从逐帧处理转变为片段级掩码传播，提升分割精度与计算效率。 Kwanyong Park,Sanghyun Woo,Seoung Wug Oh,In So Kweon,Joon-Young Lee cs.CV

title: Zero-Shot Style Transfer for Gesture Animation driven by Text and Speech using Adversarial Disentanglement of Multimodal Style Encoding
title_zh: 使用多模态编码的对抗性解开，实现由文本和语音驱动的手势动画的零射击风格迁移
abstract: Modeling virtual agents with behavior style is one factor for personalizing human agent interaction. We propose an efficient yet effective machine learning approach to synthesize gestures driven by prosodic features and text in the style of different speakers including those unseen during training. Our model performs zero shot multimodal style transfer driven by multimodal data from the PATS database containing videos of various speakers. We view style as being pervasive while speaking, it colors the communicative behaviors expressivity while speech content is carried by multimodal signals and text. This disentanglement scheme of content and style allows us to directly infer the style embedding even of speaker whose data are not part of the training phase, without requiring any further training or fine tuning. The first goal of our model is to generate the gestures of a source speaker based on the content of two audio and text modalities. The second goal is to condition the source speaker predicted gestures on the multimodal behavior style embedding of a target speaker. The third goal is to allow zero shot style transfer of speakers unseen during training without retraining the model. Our system consists of: (1) a speaker style encoder network that learns to generate a fixed dimensional speaker embedding style from a target speaker multimodal data and (2) a sequence to sequence synthesis network that synthesizes gestures based on the content of the input modalities of a source speaker and conditioned on the speaker style embedding. We evaluate that our model can synthesize gestures of a source speaker and transfer the knowledge of target speaker style variability to the gesture generation task in a zero shot setup. We convert the 2D gestures to 3D poses and produce 3D animations. We conduct objective and subjective evaluations to validate our approach and compare it with a baseline.
summary: Modeling virtual agents with behavior style is one factor for personalizing human agent interaction. We propose an efficient yet effective machine learning approach to synthesize gestures driven by prosodic features and text in the style of different speakers including those unseen during training. Our model performs zero shot multimodal style transfer driven by multimodal data from the PATS database containing videos of various speakers. We view style as being pervasive while speaking, it colors the communicative behaviors expressivity while speech content is carried by multimodal signals and text. This disentanglement scheme of content and style allows us to directly infer the style embedding even of speaker whose data are not part of the training phase, without requiring any further training or fine tuning. The first goal of our model is to generate the gestures of a source speaker based on the content of two audio and text modalities. The second goal is to condition the source speaker predicted gestures on the multimodal behavior style embedding of a target speaker. The third goal is to allow zero shot style transfer of speakers unseen during training without retraining the model. Our system consists of: (1) a speaker style encoder network that learns to generate a fixed dimensional speaker embedding style from a target speaker multimodal data and (2) a sequence to sequence synthesis network that synthesizes gestures based on the content of the input modalities of a source speaker and conditioned on the speaker style embedding. We evaluate that our model can synthesize gestures of a source speaker and transfer the knowledge of target speaker style variability to the gesture generation task in a zero shot setup. We convert the 2D gestures to 3D poses and produce 3D animations. We conduct objective and subjective evaluations to validate our approach and compare it with a baseline.
abstract_zh: 用行为风格对虚拟代理进行建模是个性化人类代理交互的因素之一。我们提出了一种高效且有效的机器学习方法来合成由韵律特征和不同说话者风格的文本驱动的手势，包括训练期间看不见的说话者。我们的模型执行零镜头多模态风格传输，由来自包含各种演讲者视频的 PATS 数据库的多模态数据驱动。我们认为风格在说话时是普遍存在的，它影响着交流行为的表现力，而语音内容则由多模态信号和文本承载。这种内容和风格的解开方案使我们能够直接推断其数据不属于训练阶段的说话者的风格嵌入，而不需要任何进一步的训练或微调。我们模型的第一个目标是根据两种音频和文本模式的内容生成源说话者的手势。第二个目标是根据目标说话者的多模态行为风格嵌入来调节源说话者预测的手势。第三个目标是允许训练期间看不见的说话人的零镜头风格传输，而无需重新训练模型。我们的系统包括：（1）一个说话人风格编码器网络，它学习从目标说话人多模态数据生成固定维度的说话人嵌入风格；（2）一个序列到序列合成网络，它根据源说话人的输入模态内容合成手势，并以说话人风格嵌入为条件。我们评估我们的模型可以合成源说话者的手势，并将目标说话者风格变化的知识转移到零镜头设置中的手势生成任务。我们将 2D 手势转换为 3D 姿势并生成 3D 动画。我们进行客观和主观评估来验证我们的方法并将其与基线进行比较。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一种基于文本和语音的零样本风格迁移方法，用于生成具有不同说话者风格的手势动画。
AI.motivation: 为个性化虚拟代理交互，需实现跨说话者的手势风格迁移，且无需目标说话者训练数据。
AI.method: 通过对抗性多模态风格解耦，构建说话者风格编码器和序列到序列生成网络，分离内容与风格信息实现零样本迁移。
AI.result: 模型可生成源说话者手势并迁移目标说话者风格，3D动画评估显示优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过解耦内容与风格实现高效零样本手势风格迁移，为虚拟代理交互提供新思路。

title: N-RPN: Hard Example Learning for Region Proposal Networks
title_zh: N-RPN：区域提议网络的困难示例学习
abstract: The region proposal task is to generate a set of candidate regions that contain an object. In this task, it is most important to propose as many candidates of ground-truth as possible in a fixed number of proposals. In a typical image, however, there are too few hard negative examples compared to the vast number of easy negatives, so region proposal networks struggle to train on hard negatives. Because of this problem, networks tend to propose hard negatives as candidates, while failing to propose ground-truth candidates, which leads to poor performance. In this paper, we propose a Negative Region Proposal Network(nRPN) to improve Region Proposal Network(RPN). The nRPN learns from the RPN's false positives and provide hard negative examples to the RPN. Our proposed nRPN leads to a reduction in false positives and better RPN performance. An RPN trained with an nRPN achieves performance improvements on the PASCAL VOC 2007 dataset.
summary: The region proposal task is to generate a set of candidate regions that contain an object. In this task, it is most important to propose as many candidates of ground-truth as possible in a fixed number of proposals. In a typical image, however, there are too few hard negative examples compared to the vast number of easy negatives, so region proposal networks struggle to train on hard negatives. Because of this problem, networks tend to propose hard negatives as candidates, while failing to propose ground-truth candidates, which leads to poor performance. In this paper, we propose a Negative Region Proposal Network(nRPN) to improve Region Proposal Network(RPN). The nRPN learns from the RPN's false positives and provide hard negative examples to the RPN. Our proposed nRPN leads to a reduction in false positives and better RPN performance. An RPN trained with an nRPN achieves performance improvements on the PASCAL VOC 2007 dataset.
abstract_zh: 区域提议任务是生成一组包含对象的候选区域。在这项任务中，最重要的是在固定数量的提案中提出尽可能多的候选事实。然而，在典型的图像中，与大量的简单负例相比，硬负例的数量太少，因此区域提议网络很难在硬负例上进行训练。由于这个问题，网络往往会提出硬否定作为候选，而无法提出真实的候选，这会导致性能不佳。在本文中，我们提出了负区域提议网络（nRPN）来改进区域提议网络（RPN）。 nRPN 从 RPN 的误报中学习，并向 RPN 提供硬负例。我们提出的 nRPN 可以减少误报并提高 RPN 性能。使用 nRPN 训练的 RPN 在 PASCAL VOC 2007 数据集上实现了性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进区域建议网络（RPN）的方法，通过学习困难负样本提升其性能。
AI.motivation: 传统RPN在训练中因困难负样本不足，导致网络倾向于生成假阳性而非真实目标候选框，影响性能。
AI.method: 设计负样本区域建议网络（nRPN），从RPN的假阳性中学习并生成困难负样本反馈给RPN进行训练。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC 2007数据集上，结合nRPN训练的RPN显著减少了假阳性并提升了性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入nRPN聚焦困难样本学习，有效优化了RPN的候选框生成能力。

title: Multimodal Generation of Novel Action Appearances for Synthetic-to-Real Recognition of Activities of Daily Living
title_zh: 多模态生成新动作外观，用于日常生活活动的合成到真实识别
comment: 8 pages, 7 figures, to be published in IROS 2022
comments: 8 pages, 7 figures, to be published in IROS 2022
abstract: Domain shifts, such as appearance changes, are a key challenge in real-world applications of activity recognition models, which range from assistive robotics and smart homes to driver observation in intelligent vehicles. For example, while simulations are an excellent way of economical data collection, a Synthetic-to-Real domain shift leads to a > 60% drop in accuracy when recognizing activities of Daily Living (ADLs). We tackle this challenge and introduce an activity domain generation framework which creates novel ADL appearances (novel domains) from different existing activity modalities (source domains) inferred from video training data. Our framework computes human poses, heatmaps of body joints, and optical flow maps and uses them alongside the original RGB videos to learn the essence of source domains in order to generate completely new ADL domains. The model is optimized by maximizing the distance between the existing source appearances and the generated novel appearances while ensuring that the semantics of an activity is preserved through an additional classification loss. While source data multimodality is an important concept in this design, our setup does not rely on multi-sensor setups, (i.e., all source modalities are inferred from a single video only.) The newly created activity domains are then integrated in the training of the ADL classification networks, resulting in models far less susceptible to changes in data distributions. Extensive experiments on the Synthetic-to-Real benchmark Sims4Action demonstrate the potential of the domain generation paradigm for cross-domain ADL recognition, setting new state-of-the-art results. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/Zrrr1997/syn2real_DG
