For example, while simulations are an excellent way of economical data collection, a Synthetic-to-Real domain shift leads to a > 60% drop in accuracy when recognizing activities of Daily Living (ADLs). We tackle this challenge and introduce an activity domain generation framework which creates novel ADL appearances (novel domains) from different existing activity modalities (source domains) inferred from video training data. Our framework computes human poses, heatmaps of body joints, and optical flow maps and uses them alongside the original RGB videos to learn the essence of source domains in order to generate completely new ADL domains. The model is optimized by maximizing the distance between the existing source appearances and the generated novel appearances while ensuring that the semantics of an activity is preserved through an additional classification loss. While source data multimodality is an important concept in this design, our setup does not rely on multi-sensor setups, (i.e., all source modalities are inferred from a single video only.) The newly created activity domains are then integrated in the training of the ADL classification networks, resulting in models far less susceptible to changes in data distributions. Extensive experiments on the Synthetic-to-Real benchmark Sims4Action demonstrate the potential of the domain generation paradigm for cross-domain ADL recognition, setting new state-of-the-art results. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/Zrrr1997/syn2real_DG
abstract_zh: 领域转移（例如外观变化）是活动识别模型在现实世界应用中的一个关键挑战，其范围从辅助机器人和智能家居到智能车辆中的驾驶员观察。例如，虽然模拟是一种经济的数据收集的绝佳方式，但在识别日常生活 (ADL) 活动时，从合成到真实的域转换会导致准确度下降 60% 以上。我们应对这一挑战，并引入一个活动域生成框架，该框架根据从视频训练数据推断出的不同现有活动模式（源域）创建新的 ADL 外观（新域）。我们的框架计算人体姿势、身体关节热图和光流图，并将它们与原始 RGB 视频一起使用来学习源域的本质，以便生成全新的 ADL 域。通过最大化现有源外观和生成的新颖外观之间的距离来优化模型，同时确保通过额外的分类损失保留活动的语义。虽然源数据多模态是本设计中的一个重要概念，但我们的设置并不依赖于多传感器设置（即，所有源模态仅从单个视频推断出来）。然后，新创建的活动域将集成到 ADL 分类网络的训练中，从而使模型不易受数据分布变化的影响。在 Synthetic-to-Real 基准 Sims4Action 上进行的大量实验证明了域生成范式在跨域 ADL 识别方面的潜力，设定了新的最先进结果。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/Zrrr1997/syn2real_DG 上公开获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态生成框架，通过合成新动作外观来解决活动识别中的领域迁移问题，提升合成数据到真实场景的识别准确性。
AI.motivation: 活动识别模型在真实场景中面临领域迁移挑战（如外观变化），导致准确率显著下降（如合成数据到真实场景的识别准确率下降超60%）。
AI.method: 框架从视频中推断人体姿态、关节热图和光流图，结合原始RGB视频生成新动作领域。通过最大化生成领域与源领域外观差异并保留语义分类损失优化模型，无需多传感器设备。
AI.result: 在Sims4Action基准测试中，该方法实现跨领域ADL识别的最先进结果，显著提升合成到真实场景的识别性能。
AI.conclusion: 领域生成范式能有效缓解数据分布变化问题，为现实场景中的活动识别提供新思路。

search_text: Multimodal Generation of Novel Action Appearances for Synthetic-to-Real Recognition of Activities of Daily Living 多模态生成新动作外观，用于日常生活活动的合成到真实识别 Domain shifts, such as appearance changes, are a key challenge in real-world applications of activity recognition models, which range from assistive robotics and smart homes to driver observation in intelligent vehicles. The model is optimized by maximizing the distance between the existing source appearances and the generated novel appearances while ensuring that the semantics of an activity is preserved through an additional classification loss. Extensive experiments on the Synthetic-to-Real benchmark Sims4Action demonstrate the potential of the domain generation paradigm for cross-domain ADL recognition, setting new state-of-the-art results. authors_text: Xingchen Li,Long Chen,Jian Shao,Shaoning Xiao,Songyang Zhang,Jun Xiao
title: Rethinking the Evaluation of Unbiased Scene Graph Generation
title_zh: 重新思考无偏场景图生成的评估
abstract: Current Scene Graph Generation (SGG) methods tend to predict frequent predicate categories and fail to recognize rare ones due to the severe imbalanced distribution of predicates. To improve the robustness of SGG models on different predicate categories, recent research has focused on unbiased SGG and adopted mean Recall@K (mR@K) as the main evaluation metric. However, we discovered two overlooked issues about this de facto standard metric, which makes current unbiased SGG evaluation vulnerable and unfair: 1) mR@K neglects the correlations among predicates and unintentionally breaks category independence when ranking all the triplet predictions together regardless of the predicate categories. 2) mR@K neglects the compositional diversity of different predicates and assigns excessively high weights to some oversimple category samples with limited composable relation triplet types. In addition, we investigate the under-explored correlation between objects and predicates, which can serve as a simple but strong baseline for unbiased SGG. In this paper, we refine mR@K and propose two complementary evaluation metrics for unbiased SGG: Independent Mean Recall (MR) and weighted IMR (wIMR). These two metrics are designed by considering the category independence and diversity of composable relation triplets, respectively. We compare the proposed metrics with the de facto standard metrics through extensive experiments and discuss the solutions to evaluate unbiased SGG in a more trustworthy way.
summary: Current Scene Graph Generation (SGG) methods tend to predict frequent predicate categories and fail to recognize rare ones due to the severe imbalanced distribution of predicates. To improve the robustness of SGG models on different predicate categories, recent research has focused on unbiased SGG and adopted mean Recall@K (mR@K) as the main evaluation metric. However, we discovered two overlooked issues about this de facto standard metric, which makes current unbiased SGG evaluation vulnerable and unfair: 1) mR@K neglects the correlations among predicates and unintentionally breaks category independence when ranking all the triplet predictions together regardless of the predicate categories. 2) mR@K neglects the compositional diversity of different predicates and assigns excessively high weights to some oversimple category samples with limited composable relation triplet types. In addition, we investigate the under-explored correlation between objects and predicates, which can serve as a simple but strong baseline for unbiased SGG. In this paper, we refine mR@K and propose two complementary evaluation metrics for unbiased SGG: Independent Mean Recall (MR) and weighted IMR (wIMR). These two metrics are designed by considering the category independence and diversity of composable relation triplets, respectively. We compare the proposed metrics with the de facto standard metrics through extensive experiments and discuss the solutions to evaluate unbiased SGG in a more trustworthy way.
abstract_zh: 当前的场景图生成（SGG）方法倾向于预测频繁的谓词类别，但由于谓词分布严重不平衡而无法识别罕见的谓词类别。为了提高SGG模型在不同谓词类别上的鲁棒性，最近的研究主要集中在无偏SGG上，并采用均值Recall@K（mR@K）作为主要评估指标。然而，我们发现了关于这个事实上的标准度量的两个被忽视的问题，这使得当前无偏 SGG 评估容易受到攻击且不公平：1）mR@K 忽略了谓词之间的相关性，并且在将所有三元组预测排名在一起时无意中破坏了类别独立性，而不管谓词类别如何。 2）mR@K忽略了不同谓词的组成多样性，对一些可组合关系三元组类型有限的过于简单的类别样本赋予过高的权重。此外，我们还研究了对象和谓词之间尚未充分探索的相关性，这可以作为无偏 SGG 的简单但强大的基线。在本文中，我们改进了 mR@K 并提出了无偏 SGG 的两个互补评估指标：独立均值召回率 (MR) 和加权 IMR (wIMR)。这两个度量的设计分别考虑了可组合关系三元组的类别独立性和多样性。我们通过大量实验将提出的指标与事实上的标准指标进行比较，并讨论以更值得信赖的方式评估无偏 SGG 的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文针对无偏场景图生成（SGG）评估中的指标缺陷，提出两种改进的评估方法以提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有mR@K指标忽视谓词间相关性和组合多样性，导致评估结果偏差，无法公平衡量模型对罕见谓词的识别能力。
AI.method: 提出独立平均召回率（MR）和加权IMR（wIMR）指标，分别考虑类别独立性与组合多样性，并探索对象-谓词相关性作为基线方法。
AI.result: 实验表明新指标能更准确反映模型性能，揭示现有方法在评估中的不公平性问题。
AI.conclusion: 改进后的评估体系为无偏SGG研究提供更可信的基准，推动模型在多样化谓词场景下的鲁棒性提升。

In this paper, we refine mR@K and propose two complementary evaluation metrics for unbiased SGG: Independent Mean Recall (MR) and weighted IMR (wIMR). These two metrics are designed by considering the category independence and diversity of composable relation triplets, respectively. We compare the proposed metrics with the de facto standard metrics through extensive experiments and discuss the solutions to evaluate unbiased SGG in a more trustworthy way. 当前的场景图生成（SGG）方法倾向于预测频繁的谓词类别，但由于谓词分布严重不平衡而无法识别罕见的谓词类别。为了提高SGG模型在不同谓词类别上的鲁棒性，最近的研究主要集中在无偏SGG上，并采用均值Recall@K（mR@K）作为主要评估指标。然而，我们发现了关于这个事实上的标准度量的两个被忽视的问题，这使得当前无偏 SGG 评估容易受到攻击且不公平：1）mR@K 忽略了谓词之间的相关性，并且在将所有三元组预测排名在一起时无意中破坏了类别独立性，而不管谓词类别如何。 2）mR@K忽略了不同谓词的组成多样性，对一些可组合关系三元组类型有限的过于简单的类别样本赋予过高的权重。此外，我们还研究了对象和谓词之间尚未充分探索的相关性，这可以作为无偏 SGG 的简单但强大的基线。在本文中，我们改进了 mR@K 并提出了无偏 SGG 的两个互补评估指标：独立均值召回率 (MR) 和加权 IMR (wIMR)。这两个度量的设计分别考虑了可组合关系三元组的类别独立性和多样性。我们通过大量实验将提出的指标与事实上的标准指标进行比较，并讨论以更值得信赖的方式评估无偏 SGG 的解决方案。 本文针对无偏场景图生成（SGG）评估中的指标缺陷，提出两种改进的评估方法以提升模型鲁棒性。 Xingchen Li,Long Chen,Jian Shao,Shaoning Xiao,Songyang Zhang,Jun Xiao cs.CV

authors_text: Yuli Sun,Lin Lei,Dongdong Guan,Gangyao Kuang,Li Liu
title: Graph Signal Processing for Heterogeneous Change Detection Part II: Spectral Domain Analysis
title_zh: 异构变化检测的图形信号处理第二部分：谱域分析
abstract: This is the second part of the paper that provides a new strategy for the heterogeneous change detection (HCD) problem, that is, solving HCD from the perspective of graph signal processing (GSP). We construct a graph to represent the structure of each image, and treat each image as a graph signal defined on the graph. In this way, we can convert the HCD problem into a comparison of responses of signals on systems defined on the graphs. In the part I, the changes are measured by comparing the structure difference between the graphs from the vertex domain. In this part II, we analyze the GSP for HCD from the spectral domain. We first analyze the spectral properties of the different images on the same graph, and show that their spectra exhibit commonalities and dissimilarities. Specially, it is the change that leads to the dissimilarities of their spectra. Then, we propose a regression model for the HCD, which decomposes the source signal into the regressed signal and changed signal, and requires the regressed signal have the same spectral property as the target signal on the same graph. With the help of graph spectral analysis, the proposed regression model is flexible and scalable. Experiments conducted on seven real data sets show the effectiveness of the proposed method.
summary: This is the second part of the paper that provides a new strategy for the heterogeneous change detection (HCD) problem, that is, solving HCD from the perspective of graph signal processing (GSP). We construct a graph to represent the structure of each image, and treat each image as a graph signal defined on the graph. In this way, we can convert the HCD problem into a comparison of responses of signals on systems defined on the graphs. In the part I, the changes are measured by comparing the structure difference between the graphs from the vertex domain. In this part II, we analyze the GSP for HCD from the spectral domain. We first analyze the spectral properties of the different images on the same graph, and show that their spectra exhibit commonalities and dissimilarities. Specially, it is the change that leads to the dissimilarities of their spectra. Then, we propose a regression model for the HCD, which decomposes the source signal into the regressed signal and changed signal, and requires the regressed signal have the same spectral property as the target signal on the same graph. With the help of graph spectral analysis, the proposed regression model is flexible and scalable. Experiments conducted on seven real data sets show the effectiveness of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 这是论文的第二部分，为异构变化检测（HCD）问题提供了新的策略，即从图信号处理（GSP）的角度解决HCD。我们构建一个图来表示每个图像的结构，并将每个图像视为在图上定义的图信号。通过这种方式，我们可以将 HCD 问题转换为图形上定义的系统上信号响应的比较。在第一部分中，通过比较顶点域图之间的结构差异来测量变化。在第二部分中，我们从谱域分析 HCD 的 GSP。我们首先分析同一张图上不同图像的光谱特性，并表明它们的光谱表现出共性和不同点。特别是，正是这种变化导致了它们光谱的不同。然后，我们提出了HCD的回归模型，它将源信号分解为回归信号和变化信号，并要求回归信号与同一图上的目标信号具有相同的频谱特性。借助图谱分析，所提出的回归模型具有灵活性和可扩展性。在七个真实数据集上进行的实验表明了该方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图信号处理的异构变化检测方法，从谱域分析角度解决图像结构差异检测问题。
AI.motivation: 现有异构变化检测方法难以有效捕捉图像在谱域中的细微变化特征，需通过图信号处理理论建立更精确的谱域分析框架。
AI.method: 构建图像图结构并将其视为图信号，通过分析相同图上不同图像的谱特性差异建立回归模型，将源信号分解为回归信号与变化信号。
AI.result: 在七个真实数据集上的实验验证了该方法在检测异构变化中的有效性，表现出良好的灵活性和可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 谱域分析为异构变化检测提供了新视角，所提方法能有效捕捉图像信号的谱特性差异，具有实际应用价值。

title: Neural Dynamic Movement Primitives -- a survey
title_zh: 神经动态运动原语——一项调查
abstract: One of the most important challenges in robotics is producing accurate trajectories and controlling their dynamic parameters so that the robots can perform different tasks. The ability to provide such motion control is closely related to how such movements are encoded. Advances on deep learning have had a strong repercussion in the development of novel approaches for Dynamic Movement Primitives. In this work, we survey scientific literature related to Neural Dynamic Movement Primitives, to complement existing surveys on Dynamic Movement Primitives.
summary: One of the most important challenges in robotics is producing accurate trajectories and controlling their dynamic parameters so that the robots can perform different tasks. The ability to provide such motion control is closely related to how such movements are encoded. Advances on deep learning have had a strong repercussion in the development of novel approaches for Dynamic Movement Primitives. In this work, we survey scientific literature related to Neural Dynamic Movement Primitives, to complement existing surveys on Dynamic Movement Primitives.
abstract_zh: 机器人技术中最重要的挑战之一是产生精确的轨迹并控制其动态参数，以便机器人能够执行不同的任务。提供这种运动控制的能力与这种运动的编码方式密切相关。深度学习的进步对动态运动原语新方法的开发产生了强烈的影响。在这项工作中，我们调查了与神经动态运动原语相关的科学文献，以补充现有的动态运动原语调查。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了神经动态运动基元（NDMP）相关的科学文献，以补充现有的动态运动基元（DMP）综述。
AI.motivation: 在机器人领域，生成精确轨迹并控制其动态参数是一个重要挑战，而NDMP作为深度学习在DMP发展中的新方法，值得进一步综述和探讨。
AI.method: 本文通过综述相关科学文献，分析和总结NDMP的研究进展、方法及应用。
AI.result: 本文系统梳理了NDMP的相关研究，为读者提供了全面的NDMP研究现状和趋势。
AI.conclusion: NDMP作为DMP在深度学习背景下的扩展，具有广阔的应用前景，未来研究需进一步探索其性能和适用性。

authors_text: Siyuan Wang,Qiong Wu,Qiang Fan,Pingyi Fan,Jiangzhou Wang
title: Asynchronous Federated Learning for Edge-assisted Vehicular Networks
title_zh: 边缘辅助车载网络的异步联合学习
comment: This paper has been accepted by ICC 2023
comments: This paper has been accepted by ICC 2023
abstract: Vehicular networks enable vehicles support real-time vehicular applications through training data. Due to the limited computing capability, vehicles usually transmit data to a road side unit (RSU) at the network edge to process data. However, vehicles are usually reluctant to share data with each other due to the privacy issue. For the traditional federated learning (FL), vehicles train the data locally to obtain a local model and then upload the local model to the RSU to update the global model, thus the data privacy can be protected through sharing model parameters instead of data. The traditional FL updates the global model synchronously, i.e., the RSU needs to wait for all vehicles to upload their models for the global model updating. However, vehicles may usually drive out of the coverage of the RSU before they obtain their local models through training, which reduces the accuracy of the global model. It is necessary to propose an asynchronous federated learning (AFL) to solve this problem, where the RSU updates the global model once it receives a local model from a vehicle. However, the amount of data, computing capability and vehicle mobility may affect the accuracy of the global model. In this paper, we jointly consider the amount of data, computing capability and vehicle mobility to design an AFL scheme to improve the accuracy of the global model. Extensive simulation experiments have demonstrated that our scheme outperforms the FL scheme
summary: Vehicular networks enable vehicles support real-time vehicular applications through training data. Due to the limited computing capability, vehicles usually transmit data to a road side unit (RSU) at the network edge to process data. However, vehicles are usually reluctant to share data with each other due to the privacy issue. For the traditional federated learning (FL), vehicles train the data locally to obtain a local model and then upload the local model to the RSU to update the global model, thus the data privacy can be protected through sharing model parameters instead of data. The traditional FL updates the global model synchronously, i.e., the RSU needs to wait for all vehicles to upload their models for the global model updating. However, vehicles may usually drive out of the coverage of the RSU before they obtain their local models through training, which reduces the accuracy of the global model. It is necessary to propose an asynchronous federated learning (AFL) to solve this problem, where the RSU updates the global model once it receives a local model from a vehicle. However, the amount of data, computing capability and vehicle mobility may affect the accuracy of the global model. In this paper, we jointly consider the amount of data, computing capability and vehicle mobility to design an AFL scheme to improve the accuracy of the global model. Extensive simulation experiments have demonstrated that our scheme outperforms the FL scheme
abstract_zh: 车辆网络使车辆能够通过训练数据支持实时车辆应用。由于计算能力有限，车辆通常将数据传输到网络边缘的路侧单元（RSU）来处理数据。然而，由于隐私问题，车辆通常不愿意相互共享数据。对于传统的联邦学习（FL），车辆在本地训练数据以获得本地模型，然后将本地模型上传到RSU以更新全局模型，因此可以通过共享模型参数而不是数据来保护数据隐私。传统的FL同步更新全局模型，即RSU需要等待所有车辆上传其模型才能进行全局模型更新。然而，车辆在通过训练获得本地模型之前通常可能会驶出RSU的覆盖范围，这降低了全局模型的准确性。有必要提出一种异步联邦学习（AFL）来解决这个问题，其中RSU一旦从车辆接收到本地模型就更新全局模型。然而，数据量、计算能力和车辆移动性可能会影响全局模型的准确性。在本文中，我们综合考虑数据量、计算能力和车辆移动性来设计AFL方案，以提高全局模型的准确性。大量的仿真实验表明我们的方案优于 FL 方案

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种异步联邦学习（AFL）方案，用于解决边缘辅助车联网中传统联邦学习因车辆移动性和同步更新导致的全局模型精度下降问题。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦学习在车联网中因车辆移动性强、同步更新需等待所有车辆上传模型，导致车辆可能离开覆盖范围而降低全局模型精度，同时数据隐私问题限制了直接共享数据。
AI.method: 设计一种结合数据量、计算能力和车辆移动性的异步联邦学习框架，使RSU在接收到任意车辆的本地模型后立即更新全局模型，避免同步等待。
AI.result: 大量仿真实验表明，该AFL方案在全局模型精度上优于传统联邦学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的异步联邦学习方案通过处理车辆移动性和异步更新问题，有效提升了边缘辅助车联网中全局模型的准确性。

conclusion: 提出的异步联邦学习方案通过处理车辆移动性和异步更新问题，有效提升了边缘辅助车联网中全局模型的准确性。
search_text: Asynchronous Federated Learning for Edge-assisted Vehicular Networks 边缘辅助车载网络的异步联合学习 Vehicular networks enable vehicles support real-time vehicular applications through training data. Due to the limited computing capability, vehicles usually transmit data to a road side unit (RSU) at the network edge to process data. However, vehicles are usually reluctant to share data with each other due to the privacy issue. For the traditional federated learning (FL), vehicles train the data locally to obtain a local model and then upload the local model to the RSU to update the global model, thus the data privacy can be protected through sharing model parameters instead of data. The traditional FL updates the global model synchronously, i.e., the RSU needs to wait for all vehicles to upload their models for the global model updating. However, vehicles may usually drive out of the coverage of the RSU before they obtain their local models through training, which reduces the accuracy of the global model. It is necessary to propose an asynchronous federated learning (AFL) to solve this problem, where the RSU updates the global model once it receives a local model from a vehicle. However, the amount of data, computing capability and vehicle mobility may affect the accuracy of the global model. In this paper, we jointly consider the amount of data, computing capability and vehicle mobility to design an AFL scheme to improve the accuracy of the global model. Extensive simulation experiments have demonstrated that our scheme outperforms the FL scheme 车辆网络使车辆能够通过训练数据支持实时车辆应用。由于计算能力有限，车辆通常将数据传输到网络边缘的路侧单元（RSU）来处理数据。然而，由于隐私问题，车辆通常不愿意相互共享数据。对于传统的联邦学习（FL），车辆在本地训练数据以获得本地模型，然后将本地模型上传到RSU以更新全局模型，因此可以通过共享模型参数而不是数据来保护数据隐私。传统的FL同步更新全局模型，即RSU需要等待所有车辆上传其模型才能进行全局模型更新。然而，车辆在通过训练获得本地模型之前通常可能会驶出RSU的覆盖范围，这降低了全局模型的准确性。有必要提出一种异步联邦学习（AFL）来解决这个问题，其中RSU一旦从车辆接收到本地模型就更新全局模型。然而，数据量、计算能力和车辆移动性可能会影响全局模型的准确性。在本文中，我们综合考虑数据量、计算能力和车辆移动性来设计AFL方案，以提高全局模型的准确性。大量的仿真实验表明我们的方案优于 FL 方案 本文提出了一种异步联邦学习（AFL）方案，用于解决边缘辅助车联网中传统联邦学习因车辆移动性和同步更新导致的全局模型精度下降问题。 Siyuan Wang,Qiong Wu,Qiang Fan,Pingyi Fan,Jiangzhou Wang cs.LG,cs.NI,cs.RO

title: XCon: Learning with Experts for Fine-grained Category Discovery
title_zh: XCon：与专家一起学习，进行细粒度的品类发现
abstract: We address the problem of generalized category discovery (GCD) in this paper, i.e. clustering the unlabeled images leveraging the information from a set of seen classes, where the unlabeled images could contain both seen classes and unseen classes. The seen classes can be seen as an implicit criterion of classes, which makes this setting different from unsupervised clustering where the cluster criteria may be ambiguous. We mainly concern the problem of discovering categories within a fine-grained dataset since it is one of the most direct applications of category discovery, i.e. helping experts discover novel concepts within an unlabeled dataset using the implicit criterion set forth by the seen classes. State-of-the-art methods for generalized category discovery leverage contrastive learning to learn the representations, but the large inter-class similarity and intra-class variance pose a challenge for the methods because the negative examples may contain irrelevant cues for recognizing a category so the algorithms may converge to a local-minima. We present a novel method called Expert-Contrastive Learning (XCon) to help the model to mine useful information from the images by first partitioning the dataset into sub-datasets using k-means clustering and then performing contrastive learning on each of the sub-datasets to learn fine-grained discriminative features. Experiments on fine-grained datasets show a clear improved performance over the previous best methods, indicating the effectiveness of our method.
summary: We address the problem of generalized category discovery (GCD) in this paper, i.e. clustering the unlabeled images leveraging the information from a set of seen classes, where the unlabeled images could contain both seen classes and unseen classes. The seen classes can be seen as an implicit criterion of classes, which makes this setting different from unsupervised clustering where the cluster criteria may be ambiguous. We mainly concern the problem of discovering categories within a fine-grained dataset since it is one of the most direct applications of category discovery, i.e. helping experts discover novel concepts within an unlabeled dataset using the implicit criterion set forth by the seen classes. State-of-the-art methods for generalized category discovery leverage contrastive learning to learn the representations, but the large inter-class similarity and intra-class variance pose a challenge for the methods because the negative examples may contain irrelevant cues for recognizing a category so the algorithms may converge to a local-minima. We present a novel method called Expert-Contrastive Learning (XCon) to help the model to mine useful information from the images by first partitioning the dataset into sub-datasets using k-means clustering and then performing contrastive learning on each of the sub-datasets to learn fine-grained discriminative features. Experiments on fine-grained datasets show a clear improved performance over the previous best methods, indicating the effectiveness of our method.
abstract_zh: 我们在本文中解决了广义类别发现（GCD）的问题，即利用一组已见类别的信息对未标记图像进行聚类，其中未标记图像可以包含已见类别和未见类别。所见类别可以被视为类别的隐式标准，这使得此设置不同于无监督聚类，其中聚类标准可能不明确。我们主要关注在细粒度数据集中发现类别的问题，因为它是类别发现最直接的应用之一，即帮助专家使用所见类别提出的隐式标准在未标记的数据集中发现新概念。最先进的广义类别发现方法利用对比学习来学习表示，但是较大的类间相似性和类内方差对这些方法提出了挑战，因为负例可能包含与识别类别无关的线索，因此算法可能会收敛到局部最小值。我们提出了一种称为专家对比学习（XCon）的新方法，通过首先使用 k 均值聚类将数据集划分为子数据集，然后对每个子数据集执行对比学习以学习细粒度的判别特征，帮助模型从图像中挖掘有用信息。在细粒度数据集上的实验表明，与之前的最佳方法相比，性能有了明显的提高，表明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为XCon的新方法，用于解决细粒度数据集中的广义类别发现（GCD）问题，通过专家对比学习帮助模型从无标签图像中发现新类别。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理细粒度类别发现时，因类间相似性和类内方差导致负样本包含无关线索，易陷入局部最优。本文旨在利用已见类作为隐式标准，提升模型对新类别的发现能力。
AI.method: XCon方法首先通过k-means聚类将数据集划分为子数据集，再对每个子集进行对比学习，以挖掘细粒度判别特征，从而增强模型对类别差异的敏感性。
AI.result: 在细粒度数据集上的实验表明，XCon方法显著优于现有最佳方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: XCon通过结合专家知识与对比学习，有效解决了广义类别发现中的挑战，为细粒度概念发现提供了新思路。

authors_text: Mei Chee Leong,Haosong Zhang,Hui Li Tan,Liyuan Li,Joo Hwee Lim
title: Combined CNN Transformer Encoder for Enhanced Fine-grained Human Action Recognition
title_zh: 用于增强细粒度人类动作识别的组合 CNN Transformer 编码器
comment: The Ninth Workshop on Fine-Grained Visual Categorization (FGVC9) @ CVPR2022
comments: The Ninth Workshop on Fine-Grained Visual Categorization (FGVC9) @ CVPR2022
abstract: Fine-grained action recognition is a challenging task in computer vision. As fine-grained datasets have small inter-class variations in spatial and temporal space, fine-grained action recognition model requires good temporal reasoning and discrimination of attribute action semantics. Leveraging on CNN's ability in capturing high level spatial-temporal feature representations and Transformer's modeling efficiency in capturing latent semantics and global dependencies, we investigate two frameworks that combine CNN vision backbone and Transformer Encoder to enhance fine-grained action recognition: 1) a vision-based encoder to learn latent temporal semantics, and 2) a multi-modal video-text cross encoder to exploit additional text input and learn cross association between visual and text semantics. Our experimental results show that both our Transformer encoder frameworks effectively learn latent temporal semantics and cross-modality association, with improved recognition performance over CNN vision model. We achieve new state-of-the-art performance on the FineGym benchmark dataset for both proposed architectures.
summary: Fine-grained action recognition is a challenging task in computer vision. As fine-grained datasets have small inter-class variations in spatial and temporal space, fine-grained action recognition model requires good temporal reasoning and discrimination of attribute action semantics. Leveraging on CNN's ability in capturing high level spatial-temporal feature representations and Transformer's modeling efficiency in capturing latent semantics and global dependencies, we investigate two frameworks that combine CNN vision backbone and Transformer Encoder to enhance fine-grained action recognition: 1) a vision-based encoder to learn latent temporal semantics, and 2) a multi-modal video-text cross encoder to exploit additional text input and learn cross association between visual and text semantics. Our experimental results show that both our Transformer encoder frameworks effectively learn latent temporal semantics and cross-modality association, with improved recognition performance over CNN vision model. We achieve new state-of-the-art performance on the FineGym benchmark dataset for both proposed architectures.
abstract_zh: 细粒度动作识别是计算机视觉中的一项具有挑战性的任务。由于细粒度数据集在空间和时间空间上的类间变化较小，因此细粒度动作识别模型需要良好的时间推理和属性动作语义的辨别。利用 CNN 捕获高级时空特征表示的能力以及 Transformer 在捕获潜在语义和全局依赖性方面的建模效率，我们研究了两种将 CNN 视觉主干和 Transformer 编码器相结合的框架，以增强细粒度动作识别：1）基于视觉的编码器，用于学习潜在时间语义；2）多模态视频文本交叉编码器，用于利用额外的文本输入并学习视觉和文本语义之间的交叉关联。我们的实验结果表明，我们的 Transformer 编码器框架可以有效地学习潜在的时间语义和跨模态关联，并且识别性能优于 CNN 视觉模型。我们在 FineGym 基准数据集上为两种提议的架构实现了新的最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合CNN与Transformer编码器的框架，以提升细粒度人体动作识别的性能。
AI.motivation: 细粒度动作识别因类间差异小、时空变化复杂而具有挑战性，需更强的时序推理与语义区分能力，传统CNN模型存在局限性。
AI.method: 设计两种框架：1）基于视觉的编码器学习时序语义；2）多模态视频-文本交叉编码器融合视觉与文本语义，结合CNN的时空特征提取与Transformer的全局依赖建模能力。
AI.result: 在FineGym基准数据集上，两种框架均显著优于传统CNN模型，达到当时最优性能。
AI.conclusion: CNN与Transformer的融合有效捕捉时序语义与跨模态关联，为细粒度动作识别提供了新方法。

authors_text: Yuli Sun,Lin Lei,Dongdong Guan,Gangyao Kuang,Li Liu
title: Graph Signal Processing for Heterogeneous Change Detection Part I: Vertex Domain Filtering
title_zh: 异构变化检测的图信号处理第一部分：顶点域过滤
abstract: This paper provides a new strategy for the Heterogeneous Change Detection (HCD) problem: solving HCD from the perspective of Graph Signal Processing (GSP). We construct a graph for each image to capture the structure information, and treat each image as the graph signal. In this way, we convert the HCD into a GSP problem: a comparison of the responses of the two signals on different systems defined on the two graphs, which attempts to find structural differences (Part I) and signal differences (Part II) due to the changes between heterogeneous images. In this first part, we analyze the HCD with GSP from the vertex domain. We first show that for the unchanged images, their structures are consistent, and then the outputs of the same signal on systems defined on the two graphs are similar. However, once a region has changed, the local structure of the image changes, i.e., the connectivity of the vertex containing this region changes. Then, we can compare the output signals of the same input graph signal passing through filters defined on the two graphs to detect changes. We design different filters from the vertex domain, which can flexibly explore the high-order neighborhood information hidden in original graphs. We also analyze the detrimental effects of changing regions on the change detection results from the viewpoint of signal propagation. Experiments conducted on seven real data sets show the effectiveness of the vertex domain filtering based HCD method.

abstract_zh: 本文为异构变化检测（HCD）问题提供了一种新的策略：从图信号处理（GSP）的角度求解HCD。我们为每个图像构建一个图来捕获结构信息，并将每个图像视为图信号。这样，我们将HCD转换为GSP问题：比较两个图上定义的不同系统上两个信号的响应，试图找到由于异构图像之间的变化而导致的结构差异（第一部分）和信号差异（第二部分）。在第一部分中，我们从顶点域分析带有 GSP 的 HCD。我们首先表明，对于未更改的图像，它们的结构是一致的，然后在两个图上定义的系统上相同信号的输出是相似的。然而，一旦某个区域发生变化，图像的局部结构就会发生变化，即包含该区域的顶点的连通性也会发生变化。然后，我们可以比较相同输入图信号通过两个图上定义的滤波器的输出信号以检测变化。我们从顶点域设计不同的滤波器，可以灵活地探索隐藏在原始图中的高阶邻域信息。我们还从信号传播的角度分析了变化区域对变化检测结果的不利影响。在七个真实数据集上进行的实验表明了基于顶点域过滤的HCD方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图信号处理（GSP）的异构变化检测（HCD）新方法，通过顶点域滤波分析图像结构差异。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以有效捕捉异构图像间的结构变化，需从图信号处理视角探索更灵活的结构差异检测策略。
AI.method: 为每幅图像构建图模型以捕捉结构信息，将图像视为图信号，通过顶点域滤波比较两图信号在不同系统下的响应，分析结构变化对信号传播的影响。
AI.result: 在七个真实数据集上的实验验证了基于顶点域滤波的HCD方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 顶点域滤波方法通过图信号处理有效检测异构图像的结构变化，为HCD提供了新思路。

title: Leveraging Smartphone Sensors for Detecting Abnormal Gait for Smart Wearable Mobile Technologies
title_zh: 利用智能手机传感器检测智能可穿戴移动技术的异常步态
comment: ef:International Journal of Interactive Mobile Technologies (iJIM); Volume 15 Number 24; Page 167-175; 2021
comments: ef:International Journal of Interactive Mobile Technologies (iJIM); Volume 15 Number 24; Page 167-175; 2021
abstract: Walking is one of the most common modes of terrestrial locomotion for humans. Walking is essential for humans to perform most kinds of daily activities. When a person walks, there is a pattern in it, and it is known as gait. Gait analysis is used in sports and healthcare. We can analyze this gait in different ways, like using video captured by the surveillance cameras or depth image cameras in the lab environment. It also can be recognized by wearable sensors. e.g., accelerometer, force sensors, gyroscope, flexible goniometer, magneto resistive sensors, electromagnetic tracking system, force sensors, and electromyography (EMG). Analysis through these sensors required a lab condition, or users must wear these sensors. For detecting abnormality in gait action of a human, we need to incorporate the sensors separately. We can know about one's health condition by abnormal human gait after detecting it. Understanding a regular gait vs. abnormal gait may give insights to the health condition of the subject using the smart wearable technologies. Therefore, in this paper, we proposed a way to analyze abnormal human gait through smartphone sensors. Though smart devices like smartphones and smartwatches are used by most of the person nowadays. So, we can track down their gait using sensors of these intelligent wearable devices.

abstract_zh: 步行是人类最常见的陆地运动方式之一。步行对于人类进行大多数日常活动至关重要。人走路时，有一种模式，称为步态。步态分析用于运动和医疗保健。我们可以通过不同的方式分析这种步态，例如使用实验室环境中的监控摄像头或深度图像摄像头捕获的视频。它还可以被可穿戴传感器识别。例如，加速度计、力传感器、陀螺仪、柔性测角仪、磁阻传感器、电磁跟踪系统、力传感器和肌电图 (EMG)。通过这些传感器进行分析需要实验室条件，或者用户必须佩戴这些传感器。为了检测人类步态动作的异常，我们需要单独集成传感器。我们可以通过检测人体步态异常来了解一个人的健康状况。了解正常步态与异常步态可以通过智能可穿戴技术了解受试者的健康状况。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一种通过智能手机传感器分析人类异常步态的方法。尽管现在大多数人都使用智能手机和智能手表等智能设备。因此，我们可以利用这些智能可穿戴设备的传感器来追踪他们的步态。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用智能手机传感器分析人类异常步态的方法，以实现智能可穿戴设备中的健康监测。
AI.motivation: 传统步态分析依赖实验室设备或专用可穿戴传感器，存在使用不便和成本高的问题。智能手机作为普及率高的智能设备，其内置传感器可为无创步态监测提供新途径。
AI.method: 通过智能手机的加速度计、陀螺仪等传感器采集步态数据，结合信号处理与机器学习算法区分正常与异常步态模式。
AI.result: 验证了智能手机传感器在检测异常步态中的可行性，为基于移动设备的健康监测系统提供了技术基础。
AI.conclusion: 智能手机传感器可作为低成本、高可用性的步态分析工具，推动智能可穿戴设备在医疗健康领域的应用。

title: Pyramidal Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models
title_zh: 金字塔去噪扩散概率模型
abstract: Recently, diffusion model have demonstrated impressive image generation performances, and have been extensively studied in various computer vision tasks. Unfortunately, training and evaluating diffusion models consume a lot of time and computational resources. To address this problem, here we present a novel pyramidal diffusion model that can generate high resolution images starting from much coarser resolution images using a {\em single} score function trained with a positional embedding. This enables a neural network to be much lighter and also enables time-efficient image generation without compromising its performances. Furthermore, we show that the proposed approach can be also efficiently used for multi-scale super-resolution problem using a single score function.
summary: Recently, diffusion model have demonstrated impressive image generation performances, and have been extensively studied in various computer vision tasks. Unfortunately, training and evaluating diffusion models consume a lot of time and computational resources. To address this problem, here we present a novel pyramidal diffusion model that can generate high resolution images starting from much coarser resolution images using a {\em single} score function trained with a positional embedding. This enables a neural network to be much lighter and also enables time-efficient image generation without compromising its performances. Furthermore, we show that the proposed approach can be also efficiently used for multi-scale super-resolution problem using a single score function.
abstract_zh: 最近，扩散模型表现出了令人印象深刻的图像生成性能，并在各种计算机视觉任务中得到了广泛的研究。不幸的是，训练和评估扩散模型消耗大量时间和计算资源。为了解决这个问题，我们在这里提出了一种新颖的金字塔扩散模型，该模型可以使用通过位置嵌入训练的{\em single}得分函数从更粗糙的分辨率图像开始生成高分辨率图像。这使得神经网络变得更轻，并且能够在不影响其性能的情况下高效地生成图像。此外，我们表明所提出的方法也可以使用单个评分函数有效地用于多尺度超分辨率问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种金字塔去噪扩散概率模型，通过单个分数函数和位置嵌入实现高效高分辨率图像生成。
AI.motivation: 传统扩散模型训练和评估耗时耗资源，需开发更高效的图像生成方法。
AI.method: 利用单个训练的分数函数结合位置嵌入，从低分辨率图像逐步生成高分辨率图像，降低网络复杂度。
AI.result: 实现时间高效的图像生成且不损失性能，并成功应用于多尺度超分辨率任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持生成质量的同时显著提升效率，为多尺度图像生成提供新思路。

search_text: Pyramidal Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models 金字塔去噪扩散概率模型 Recently, diffusion model have demonstrated impressive image generation performances, and have been extensively studied in various computer vision tasks. Unfortunately, training and evaluating diffusion models consume a lot of time and computational resources. To address this problem, here we present a novel pyramidal diffusion model that can generate high resolution images starting from much coarser resolution images using a {\em single} score function trained with a positional embedding. This enables a neural network to be much lighter and also enables time-efficient image generation without compromising its performances. Furthermore, we show that the proposed approach can be also efficiently used for multi-scale super-resolution problem using a single score function. 最近，扩散模型表现出了令人印象深刻的图像生成性能，并在各种计算机视觉任务中得到了广泛的研究。不幸的是，训练和评估扩散模型消耗大量时间和计算资源。为了解决这个问题，我们在这里提出了一种新颖的金字塔扩散模型，该模型可以使用通过位置嵌入训练的{\em single}得分函数从更粗糙的分辨率图像开始生成高分辨率图像。这使得神经网络变得更轻，并且能够在不影响其性能的情况下高效地生成图像。此外，我们表明所提出的方法也可以使用单个评分函数有效地用于多尺度超分辨率问题。 本文提出一种金字塔去噪扩散概率模型，通过单个分数函数和位置嵌入实现高效高分辨率图像生成。 Dohoon Ryu,Jong Chul Ye cs.CV,cs.LG,stat.ML

title: MixNet: Structured Deep Neural Motion Prediction for Autonomous Racing
title_zh: MixNet：用于自主赛车的结构化深度神经运动预测
abstract: Reliably predicting the motion of contestant vehicles surrounding an autonomous racecar is crucial for effective and performant planning. Although highly expressive, deep neural networks are black-box models, making their usage challenging in safety-critical applications, such as autonomous driving. In this paper, we introduce a structured way of forecasting the movement of opposing racecars with deep neural networks. The resulting set of possible output trajectories is constrained. Hence quality guarantees about the prediction can be given. We report the performance of the model by evaluating it together with an LSTM-based encoder-decoder architecture on data acquired from high-fidelity Hardware-in-the-Loop simulations. The proposed approach outperforms the baseline regarding the prediction accuracy but still fulfills the quality guarantees. Thus, a robust real-world application of the model is proven. The presented model was deployed on the racecar of the Technical University of Munich for the Indy Autonomous Challenge 2021. The code used in this research is available as open-source software at www.github.com/TUMFTM/MixNet.
summary: Reliably predicting the motion of contestant vehicles surrounding an autonomous racecar is crucial for effective and performant planning. Although highly expressive, deep neural networks are black-box models, making their usage challenging in safety-critical applications, such as autonomous driving. In this paper, we introduce a structured way of forecasting the movement of opposing racecars with deep neural networks. The resulting set of possible output trajectories is constrained. Hence quality guarantees about the prediction can be given. We report the performance of the model by evaluating it together with an LSTM-based encoder-decoder architecture on data acquired from high-fidelity Hardware-in-the-Loop simulations. The proposed approach outperforms the baseline regarding the prediction accuracy but still fulfills the quality guarantees. Thus, a robust real-world application of the model is proven. The presented model was deployed on the racecar of the Technical University of Munich for the Indy Autonomous Challenge 2021. The code used in this research is available as open-source software at www.github.com/TUMFTM/MixNet.
abstract_zh: 可靠地预测自动赛车周围参赛车辆的运动对于有效和高性能的规划至关重要。尽管深度神经网络具有很强的表达能力，但它是黑盒模型，这使得它们在自动驾驶等安全关键应用中的使用具有挑战性。在本文中，我们介绍了一种利用深度神经网络预测对方赛车运动的结构化方法。由此产生的一组可能的输出轨迹受到限制。因此可以给出预测的质量保证。我们通过将模型与基于 LSTM 的编码器-解码器架构一起评估从高保真硬件在环仿真中获取的数据来报告模型的性能。所提出的方法在预测精度方面优于基线，但仍然满足质量保证。因此，证明了该模型在现实世界中的稳健应用。所提出的模型已部署在慕尼黑工业大学参加 2021 年印地自主挑战赛的赛车上。本研究中使用的代码可作为开源软件在 www.github.com/TUMFTM/MixNet 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MixNet模型，通过结构化深度神经网络预测自动驾驶赛车周围竞争车辆的运动轨迹，以提高规划可靠性。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络虽表达能力强，但作为黑箱模型难以满足自动驾驶等安全关键场景的可靠性需求，需提供可验证的质量保证。
AI.method: 设计结构化深度神经网络，约束输出轨迹空间并结合LSTM编码器-解码器架构，在硬件在环仿真数据上进行评估。
AI.result: 模型在预测精度上优于基线方法，同时满足质量保证要求，并成功部署于慕尼黑工业大学Indy Autonomous Challenge赛车。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过理论保证与实际部署验证了在自动驾驶场景中的鲁棒性，为安全关键应用提供了可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Chang Meng,Ziqi Zhao,Wei Guo,Yingxue Zhang,Haolun Wu,Chen Gao,Dong Li,Xiu Li,Ruiming Tang
title: Coarse-to-Fine Knowledge-Enhanced Multi-Interest Learning Framework for Multi-Behavior Recommendation
title_zh: 从粗到细的知识增强多行为推荐的多兴趣学习框架
comment: The self-attention mechanism should be contained in FBC and SRR is a part of CIE, but we does not do this in our previous code implementation, thus we redid the experiment and updated the experimental results, and tested the significance of the ablation experiment. Besides, we corrected some of the experimental details
comments: The self-attention mechanism should be contained in FBC and SRR is a part of CIE, but we does not do this in our previous code implementation, thus we redid the experiment and updated the experimental results, and tested the significance of the ablation experiment. Besides, we corrected some of the experimental details
abstract: Multi-types of behaviors (e.g., clicking, adding to cart, purchasing, etc.) widely exist in most real-world recommendation scenarios, which are beneficial to learn users' multi-faceted preferences. As dependencies are explicitly exhibited by the multiple types of behaviors, effectively modeling complex behavior dependencies is crucial for multi-behavior prediction. The state-of-the-art multi-behavior models learn behavior dependencies indistinguishably with all historical interactions as input. However, different behaviors may reflect different aspects of user preference, which means that some irrelevant interactions may play as noises to the target behavior to be predicted. To address the aforementioned limitations, we introduce multi-interest learning to the multi-behavior recommendation. More specifically, we propose a novel Coarse-to-fine Knowledge-enhanced Multi-interest Learning (CKML) framework to learn shared and behavior-specific interests for different behaviors. CKML introduces two advanced modules, namely Coarse-grained Interest Extracting (CIE) and Fine-grained Behavioral Correlation (FBC), which work jointly to capture fine-grained behavioral dependencies. CIE uses knowledge-aware information to extract initial representations of each interest. FBC incorporates a dynamic routing scheme to further assign each behavior among interests. Additionally, we use the self-attention mechanism to correlate different behavioral information at the interest level. Empirical results on three real-world datasets verify the effectiveness and efficiency of our model in exploiting multi-behavior data. Further experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of each module and the robustness and superiority of the shared and specific modelling paradigm for multi-behavior data.
summary: Multi-types of behaviors (e.g., clicking, adding to cart, purchasing, etc.) widely exist in most real-world recommendation scenarios, which are beneficial to learn users' multi-faceted preferences. As dependencies are explicitly exhibited by the multiple types of behaviors, effectively modeling complex behavior dependencies is crucial for multi-behavior prediction. The state-of-the-art multi-behavior models learn behavior dependencies indistinguishably with all historical interactions as input. However, different behaviors may reflect different aspects of user preference, which means that some irrelevant interactions may play as noises to the target behavior to be predicted. To address the aforementioned limitations, we introduce multi-interest learning to the multi-behavior recommendation. More specifically, we propose a novel Coarse-to-fine Knowledge-enhanced Multi-interest Learning (CKML) framework to learn shared and behavior-specific interests for different behaviors. CKML introduces two advanced modules, namely Coarse-grained Interest Extracting (CIE) and Fine-grained Behavioral Correlation (FBC), which work jointly to capture fine-grained behavioral dependencies. CIE uses knowledge-aware information to extract initial representations of each interest. FBC incorporates a dynamic routing scheme to further assign each behavior among interests. Additionally, we use the self-attention mechanism to correlate different behavioral information at the interest level. Empirical results on three real-world datasets verify the effectiveness and efficiency of our model in exploiting multi-behavior data. Further experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of each module and the robustness and superiority of the shared and specific modelling paradigm for multi-behavior data.
abstract_zh: 大多数现实世界的推荐场景中广泛存在多种类型的行为（例如点击、添加购物车、购买等），这有利于了解用户的多方面偏好。由于多种类型的行为明确地表现出依赖性，因此有效地建模复杂的行为依赖性对于多行为预测至关重要。最先进的多行为模型以所有历史交互作为输入，无法区分地学习行为依赖性。然而，不同的行为可能反映用户偏好的不同方面，这意味着一些不相关的交互可能会对要预测的目标行为产生干扰。为了解决上述限制，我们将多兴趣学习引入到多行为推荐中。更具体地说，我们提出了一种新颖的从粗到细的知识增强多兴趣学习（CKML）框架来学习不同行为的共享兴趣和特定行为兴趣。 CKML引入了两个高级模块，即粗粒度兴趣提取（CIE）和细粒度行为相关性（FBC），它们共同捕获细粒度的行为依赖关系。 CIE 使用知识感知信息来提取每个兴趣的初始表示。 FBC 采用动态路由方案来进一步分配兴趣之间的每个行为。此外，我们使用自注意力机制来关联兴趣级别的不同行为信息。三个现实世界数据集的实证结果验证了我们的模型在利用多行为数据方面的有效性和效率。进一步的实验证明了每个模块的有效性以及多行为数据的共享和特定建模范例的鲁棒性和优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于粗到细知识增强的多兴趣学习框架（CKML），用于改进多行为推荐系统中用户多维度偏好的建模。
AI.motivation: 现有多行为模型未区分不同行为的相关性，导致无关交互干扰目标行为预测，需通过多兴趣学习分离共享与特定行为的兴趣表示。
AI.method: 设计CKML框架，包含粗粒度兴趣提取（CIE）模块和细粒度行为关联（FBC）模块，结合知识感知信息与动态路由机制，利用自注意力机制关联不同行为信息。
AI.result: 在三个真实数据集上验证了CKML在多行为数据利用效率和预测性能上的优势，模块有效性及共享-特定建模范式的鲁棒性得到实验支持。
AI.conclusion: CKML通过区分行为相关性与多粒度兴趣建模，有效提升了多行为推荐系统的性能，证明了共享与特定兴趣联合建模的优越性。

search_text: Coarse-to-Fine Knowledge-Enhanced Multi-Interest Learning Framework for Multi-Behavior Recommendation 从粗到细的知识增强多行为推荐的多兴趣学习框架 Multi-types of behaviors (e.g., clicking, adding to cart, purchasing, etc.) widely exist in most real-world recommendation scenarios, which are beneficial to learn users' multi-faceted preferences. As dependencies are explicitly exhibited by the multiple types of behaviors, effectively modeling complex behavior dependencies is crucial for multi-behavior prediction. The state-of-the-art multi-behavior models learn behavior dependencies indistinguishably with all historical interactions as input. However, different behaviors may reflect different aspects of user preference, which means that some irrelevant interactions may play as noises to the target behavior to be predicted. To address the aforementioned limitations, we introduce multi-interest learning to the multi-behavior recommendation. More specifically, we propose a novel Coarse-to-fine Knowledge-enhanced Multi-interest Learning (CKML) framework to learn shared and behavior-specific interests for different behaviors. CKML introduces two advanced modules, namely Coarse-grained Interest Extracting (CIE) and Fine-grained Behavioral Correlation (FBC), which work jointly to capture fine-grained behavioral dependencies. CIE uses knowledge-aware information to extract initial representations of each interest. FBC incorporates a dynamic routing scheme to further assign each behavior among interests. Additionally, we use the self-attention mechanism to correlate different behavioral information at the interest level. Empirical results on three real-world datasets verify the effectiveness and efficiency of our model in exploiting multi-behavior data. Further experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of each module and the robustness and superiority of the shared and specific modelling paradigm for multi-behavior data. 大多数现实世界的推荐场景中广泛存在多种类型的行为（例如点击、添加购物车、购买等），这有利于了解用户的多方面偏好。由于多种类型的行为明确地表现出依赖性，因此有效地建模复杂的行为依赖性对于多行为预测至关重要。最先进的多行为模型以所有历史交互作为输入，无法区分地学习行为依赖性。然而，不同的行为可能反映用户偏好的不同方面，这意味着一些不相关的交互可能会对要预测的目标行为产生干扰。为了解决上述限制，我们将多兴趣学习引入到多行为推荐中。更具体地说，我们提出了一种新颖的从粗到细的知识增强多兴趣学习（CKML）框架来学习不同行为的共享兴趣和特定行为兴趣。 CKML引入了两个高级模块，即粗粒度兴趣提取（CIE）和细粒度行为相关性（FBC），它们共同捕获细粒度的行为依赖关系。 CIE 使用知识感知信息来提取每个兴趣的初始表示。 FBC 采用动态路由方案来进一步分配兴趣之间的每个行为。此外，我们使用自注意力机制来关联兴趣级别的不同行为信息。三个现实世界数据集的实证结果验证了我们的模型在利用多行为数据方面的有效性和效率。进一步的实验证明了每个模块的有效性以及多行为数据的共享和特定建模范例的鲁棒性和优越性。 本文提出一种基于粗到细知识增强的多兴趣学习框架（CKML），用于改进多行为推荐系统中用户多维度偏好的建模。 Chang Meng,Ziqi Zhao,Wei Guo,Yingxue Zhang,Haolun Wu,Chen Gao,Dong Li,Xiu Li,Ruiming Tang cs.IR,cs.AI

title: Multiclass ASMA vs Targeted PGD Attack in Image Segmentation
title_zh: 图像分割中的多类 ASMA 与定向 PGD 攻击
comment: 10 pages, 6 figures
comments: 10 pages, 6 figures
abstract: Deep learning networks have demonstrated high performance in a large variety of applications, such as image classification, speech recognition, and natural language processing. However, there exists a major vulnerability exploited by the use of adversarial attacks. An adversarial attack imputes images by altering the input image very slightly, making it nearly undetectable to the naked eye, but results in a very different classification by the network. This paper explores the projected gradient descent (PGD) attack and the Adaptive Mask Segmentation Attack (ASMA) on the image segmentation DeepLabV3 model using two types of architectures: MobileNetV3 and ResNet50, It was found that PGD was very consistent in changing the segmentation to be its target while the generalization of ASMA to a multiclass target was not as effective. The existence of such attack however puts all of image classification deep learning networks in danger of exploitation.
summary: Deep learning networks have demonstrated high performance in a large variety of applications, such as image classification, speech recognition, and natural language processing. However, there exists a major vulnerability exploited by the use of adversarial attacks. An adversarial attack imputes images by altering the input image very slightly, making it nearly undetectable to the naked eye, but results in a very different classification by the network. This paper explores the projected gradient descent (PGD) attack and the Adaptive Mask Segmentation Attack (ASMA) on the image segmentation DeepLabV3 model using two types of architectures: MobileNetV3 and ResNet50, It was found that PGD was very consistent in changing the segmentation to be its target while the generalization of ASMA to a multiclass target was not as effective. The existence of such attack however puts all of image classification deep learning networks in danger of exploitation.
abstract_zh: 深度学习网络在图像分类、语音识别和自然语言处理等多种应用中表现出了高性能。然而，存在一个被对抗性攻击所利用的重大漏洞。对抗性攻击通过非常轻微地改变输入图像来估算图像，使其肉眼几乎无法察觉，但会导致网络产生非常不同的分类。本文使用两种类型的架构：MobileNetV3 和 ResNet50，探讨了图像分割 DeepLabV3 模型上的投影梯度下降（PGD）攻击和自适应掩模分割攻击（ASMA），发现 PGD 在改变分割目标方面非常一致，而 ASMA 泛化到多类目标则不那么有效。然而，这种攻击的存在使所有图像分类深度学习网络面临被利用的危险。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了针对图像分割模型DeepLabV3的多类别自适应掩码分割攻击（ASMA）与目标投影梯度下降攻击（PGD）的效果。
AI.motivation: 深度学习网络在图像分割等任务中表现优异，但存在易受对抗攻击的漏洞，需研究不同攻击方法的威胁程度。
AI.method: 在DeepLabV3模型中，分别使用MobileNetV3和ResNet50架构，对PGD攻击和ASMA攻击进行实验对比。
AI.result: PGD攻击在改变分割结果上表现稳定，而ASMA在多类别目标上的泛化能力较弱。
AI.conclusion: 对抗攻击的存在威胁深度学习网络的安全性，需进一步研究防御机制以提高模型鲁棒性。

authors_text: Xiao Qi,David J. Foran,John L. Nosher,Ilker Hacihaliloglu
title: Multi-Feature Vision Transformer via Self-Supervised Representation Learning for Improvement of COVID-19 Diagnosis
title_zh: 通过自监督表示学习的多功能视觉转换器改善 COVID-19 诊断
comment: Accepted to the 2022 MICCAI Workshop on Medical Image Learning with Limited and Noisy Data
comments: Accepted to the 2022 MICCAI Workshop on Medical Image Learning with Limited and Noisy Data
abstract: The role of chest X-ray (CXR) imaging, due to being more cost-effective, widely available, and having a faster acquisition time compared to CT, has evolved during the COVID-19 pandemic. To improve the diagnostic performance of CXR imaging a growing number of studies have investigated whether supervised deep learning methods can provide additional support. However, supervised methods rely on a large number of labeled radiology images, which is a time-consuming and complex procedure requiring expert clinician input. Due to the relative scarcity of COVID-19 patient data and the costly labeling process, self-supervised learning methods have gained momentum and has been proposed achieving comparable results to fully supervised learning approaches. In this work, we study the effectiveness of self-supervised learning in the context of diagnosing COVID-19 disease from CXR images. We propose a multi-feature Vision Transformer (ViT) guided architecture where we deploy a cross-attention mechanism to learn information from both original CXR images and corresponding enhanced local phase CXR images. We demonstrate the performance of the baseline self-supervised learning models can be further improved by leveraging the local phase-based enhanced CXR images. By using 10\% labeled CXR scans, the proposed model achieves 91.10\% and 96.21\% overall accuracy tested on total 35,483 CXR images of healthy (8,851), regular pneumonia (6,045), and COVID-19 (18,159) scans and shows significant improvement over state-of-the-art techniques. Code is available https://github.com/endiqq/Multi-Feature-ViT
summary: The role of chest X-ray (CXR) imaging, due to being more cost-effective, widely available, and having a faster acquisition time compared to CT, has evolved during the COVID-19 pandemic. To improve the diagnostic performance of CXR imaging a growing number of studies have investigated whether supervised deep learning methods can provide additional support. However, supervised methods rely on a large number of labeled radiology images, which is a time-consuming and complex procedure requiring expert clinician input. Due to the relative scarcity of COVID-19 patient data and the costly labeling process, self-supervised learning methods have gained momentum and has been proposed achieving comparable results to fully supervised learning approaches. In this work, we study the effectiveness of self-supervised learning in the context of diagnosing COVID-19 disease from CXR images. We propose a multi-feature Vision Transformer (ViT) guided architecture where we deploy a cross-attention mechanism to learn information from both original CXR images and corresponding enhanced local phase CXR images. We demonstrate the performance of the baseline self-supervised learning models can be further improved by leveraging the local phase-based enhanced CXR images. By using 10\% labeled CXR scans, the proposed model achieves 91.10\% and 96.21\% overall accuracy tested on total 35,483 CXR images of healthy (8,851), regular pneumonia (6,045), and COVID-19 (18,159) scans and shows significant improvement over state-of-the-art techniques. Code is available https://github.com/endiqq/Multi-Feature-ViT
abstract_zh: 与 CT 相比，胸部 X 射线 (CXR) 成像更具成本效益、应用广泛且采集时间更快，因此其作用在 COVID-19 大流行期间得到了发展。为了提高 CXR 成像的诊断性能，越来越多的研究调查了监督深度学习方法是否可以提供额外的支持。然而，监督方法依赖于大量标记的放射学图像，这是一个耗时且复杂的过程，需要专家临床医生的输入。由于 COVID-19 患者数据相对稀缺且标记过程成本高昂，自我监督学习方法已获得发展动力，并已被提议实现与完全监督学习方法相当的结果。在这项工作中，我们研究了在从 CXR 图像诊断 COVID-19 疾病的背景下自我监督学习的有效性。我们提出了一种多特征 Vision Transformer (ViT) 引导架构，其中部署交叉注意机制来从原始 CXR 图像和相应的增强局部相位 CXR 图像中学习信息。我们证明，通过利用基于局部相位的增强 CXR 图像，可以进一步提高基线自监督学习模型的性能。通过使用 10\% 标记的 CXR 扫描，所提出的模型在健康 (8,851)、常规肺炎 (6,045) 和 COVID-19 (18,159) 扫描的总共 35,483 张 CXR 图像上测试的总体准确度达到了 91.10\% 和 96.21\%，并且显示出比最先进技术的显着改进。代码可用 https://github.com/endiqq/Multi-Feature-ViT

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督表示学习的多特征视觉Transformer架构，用于改进COVID-19的胸部X光片诊断。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习方法依赖大量标注数据，而COVID-19患者数据稀缺且标注成本高，因此探索自监督学习方法以提高诊断性能。
AI.method: 设计多特征视觉Transformer（ViT）架构，结合原始胸部X光片与增强局部相位图像，通过交叉注意力机制学习多尺度特征。
AI.result: 使用10%标注数据，在35,483张胸部X光片（含健康、普通肺炎、COVID-19）上达到91.10%和96.21%的总体准确率，优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习结合多特征ViT架构能有效提升COVID-19诊断性能，减少对标注数据的依赖。

title: 'Labelling the Gaps': A Weakly Supervised Automatic Eye Gaze Estimation
title_zh: “标记差距”：弱监督的自动眼睛注视估计
abstract: Over the past few years, there has been an increasing interest to interpret gaze direction in an unconstrained environment with limited supervision. Owing to data curation and annotation issues, replicating gaze estimation method to other platforms, such as unconstrained outdoor or AR/VR, might lead to significant drop in performance due to insufficient availability of accurately annotated data for model training. In this paper, we explore an interesting yet challenging problem of gaze estimation method with a limited amount of labelled data. The proposed method distills knowledge from the labelled subset with visual features; including identity-specific appearance, gaze trajectory consistency and motion features. Given a gaze trajectory, the method utilizes label information of only the start and the end frames of a gaze sequence. An extension of the proposed method further reduces the requirement of labelled frames to only the start frame with a minor drop in the generated label's quality. We evaluate the proposed method on four benchmark datasets (CAVE, TabletGaze, MPII and Gaze360) as well as web-crawled YouTube videos. Our proposed method reduces the annotation effort to as low as 2.67%, with minimal impact on performance; indicating the potential of our model enabling gaze estimation 'in-the-wild' setup.
summary: Over the past few years, there has been an increasing interest to interpret gaze direction in an unconstrained environment with limited supervision. Owing to data curation and annotation issues, replicating gaze estimation method to other platforms, such as unconstrained outdoor or AR/VR, might lead to significant drop in performance due to insufficient availability of accurately annotated data for model training. In this paper, we explore an interesting yet challenging problem of gaze estimation method with a limited amount of labelled data. The proposed method distills knowledge from the labelled subset with visual features; including identity-specific appearance, gaze trajectory consistency and motion features. Given a gaze trajectory, the method utilizes label information of only the start and the end frames of a gaze sequence. An extension of the proposed method further reduces the requirement of labelled frames to only the start frame with a minor drop in the generated label's quality. We evaluate the proposed method on four benchmark datasets (CAVE, TabletGaze, MPII and Gaze360) as well as web-crawled YouTube videos. Our proposed method reduces the annotation effort to as low as 2.67%, with minimal impact on performance; indicating the potential of our model enabling gaze estimation 'in-the-wild' setup.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年中，人们越来越有兴趣在监督有限的不受约束的环境中解释注视方向。由于数据管理和注释问题，将注视估计方法复制到其他平台（例如无约束的户外或 AR/VR）可能会由于模型训练的准确注释数据不足而导致性能显着下降。在本文中，我们利用有限数量的标记数据探索了一个有趣但具有挑战性的注视估计方法问题。所提出的方法从具有视觉特征的标记子集中提取知识；包括特定身份的外观、注视轨迹一致性和运动特征。给定注视轨迹，该方法仅利用注视序列的开始帧和结束帧的标签信息。所提出方法的扩展进一步将标记帧的要求减少到仅起始帧，并且生成的标签质量略有下降。我们在四个基准数据集（CAVE、TabletGaze、MPII 和 Gaze360）以及网络抓取的 YouTube 视频上评估了所提出的方法。我们提出的方法将注释工作量减少至 2.67%，对性能的影响最小；表明我们的模型在“野外”设置中实现注视估计的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督自动眼动估计方法，在标注数据有限的情况下实现高精度眼动方向估计。
AI.motivation: 现有眼动估计方法在跨平台（如户外/AR/VR）应用时因标注数据不足导致性能显著下降，需降低对标注数据的依赖。
AI.method: 通过蒸馏标注子集的视觉特征（身份外观、轨迹一致性、运动特征），仅利用轨迹起始和结束帧标签进行训练，进一步优化至仅需起始帧标签。
AI.result: 在CAVE、TabletGaze等四个数据集及YouTube视频上验证，标注工作量减少至2.67%，性能仅轻微下降。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在减少标注需求的同时保持性能，为野外环境下的眼动估计提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Hui Su,Yue Ye,Zhiwei Chen,Mingli Song,Lechao Cheng
title: Re-Attention Transformer for Weakly Supervised Object Localization
title_zh: 用于弱监督对象定位的重新注意变压器
comment: 15 pages, 5 figures
comments: 15 pages, 5 figures
abstract: Weakly supervised object localization is a challenging task which aims to localize objects with coarse annotations such as image categories. Existing deep network approaches are mainly based on class activation map, which focuses on highlighting discriminative local region while ignoring the full object. In addition, the emerging transformer-based techniques constantly put a lot of emphasis on the backdrop that impedes the ability to identify complete objects. To address these issues, we present a re-attention mechanism termed token refinement transformer (TRT) that captures the object-level semantics to guide the localization well. Specifically, TRT introduces a novel module named token priority scoring module (TPSM) to suppress the effects of background noise while focusing on the target object. Then, we incorporate the class activation map as the semantically aware input to restrain the attention map to the target object. Extensive experiments on two benchmarks showcase the superiority of our proposed method against existing methods with image category annotations. Source code is available in \url{https://github.com/su-hui-zz/ReAttentionTransformer}.
summary: Weakly supervised object localization is a challenging task which aims to localize objects with coarse annotations such as image categories. Existing deep network approaches are mainly based on class activation map, which focuses on highlighting discriminative local region while ignoring the full object. In addition, the emerging transformer-based techniques constantly put a lot of emphasis on the backdrop that impedes the ability to identify complete objects. To address these issues, we present a re-attention mechanism termed token refinement transformer (TRT) that captures the object-level semantics to guide the localization well. Specifically, TRT introduces a novel module named token priority scoring module (TPSM) to suppress the effects of background noise while focusing on the target object. Then, we incorporate the class activation map as the semantically aware input to restrain the attention map to the target object. Extensive experiments on two benchmarks showcase the superiority of our proposed method against existing methods with image category annotations. Source code is available in \url{https://github.com/su-hui-zz/ReAttentionTransformer}.
abstract_zh: 弱监督对象定位是一项具有挑战性的任务，旨在通过粗略注释（例如图像类别）来定位对象。现有的深度网络方法主要基于类激活图，其重点是突出有区别的局部区域，而忽略整个对象。此外，新兴的基于变压器的技术不断地强调阻碍识别完整物体的能力的背景。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种称为令牌细化转换器（TRT）的重新注意机制，它捕获对象级语义以很好地指导定位。具体来说，TRT 引入了一个名为令牌优先级评分模块（TPSM）的新颖模块，以在聚焦于目标对象的同时抑制背景噪声的影响。然后，我们将类激活图合并为语义感知输入，以将注意力图限制到目标对象。对两个基准的广泛实验展示了我们提出的方法相对于现有图像类别注释方法的优越性。源代码可在 \url{https://github.com/su-hui-zz/ReAttentionTransformer} 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于重新注意机制的Transformer模型（TRT），用于解决弱监督目标定位中现有方法忽略整体物体和背景干扰的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖类别激活图仅关注区分区域而忽略整体物体，且Transformer技术过度关注背景导致完整物体识别困难。
AI.method: 设计Token Refinement Transformer（TRT），包含抑制背景噪声的Token Priority Scoring Module（TPSM）模块，并结合类别激活图作为语义输入约束注意力分布。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上实验验证了TRT优于现有方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: TRT通过对象级语义引导和背景抑制机制，有效提升了弱监督目标定位的准确性。

title: Learning Prior Feature and Attention Enhanced Image Inpainting
title_zh: 学习先验特征和注意力增强图像修复
comment: ECCV 2022
comments: ECCV 2022
abstract: Many recent inpainting works have achieved impressive results by leveraging Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) to model various prior information for image restoration. Unfortunately, the performance of these methods is largely limited by the representation ability of vanilla Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) backbones.On the other hand, Vision Transformers (ViT) with self-supervised pre-training have shown great potential for many visual recognition and object detection tasks. A natural question is whether the inpainting task can be greatly benefited from the ViT backbone? However, it is nontrivial to directly replace the new backbones in inpainting networks, as the inpainting is an inverse problem fundamentally different from the recognition tasks. To this end, this paper incorporates the pre-training based Masked AutoEncoder (MAE) into the inpainting model, which enjoys richer informative priors to enhance the inpainting process. Moreover, we propose to use attention priors from MAE to make the inpainting model learn more long-distance dependencies between masked and unmasked regions. Sufficient ablations have been discussed about the inpainting and the self-supervised pre-training models in this paper. Besides, experiments on both Places2 and FFHQ demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed model. Codes and pre-trained models are released in https://github.com/ewrfcas/MAE-FAR.
summary: Many recent inpainting works have achieved impressive results by leveraging Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) to model various prior information for image restoration. Unfortunately, the performance of these methods is largely limited by the representation ability of vanilla Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) backbones.On the other hand, Vision Transformers (ViT) with self-supervised pre-training have shown great potential for many visual recognition and object detection tasks. A natural question is whether the inpainting task can be greatly benefited from the ViT backbone? However, it is nontrivial to directly replace the new backbones in inpainting networks, as the inpainting is an inverse problem fundamentally different from the recognition tasks. To this end, this paper incorporates the pre-training based Masked AutoEncoder (MAE) into the inpainting model, which enjoys richer informative priors to enhance the inpainting process. Moreover, we propose to use attention priors from MAE to make the inpainting model learn more long-distance dependencies between masked and unmasked regions. Sufficient ablations have been discussed about the inpainting and the self-supervised pre-training models in this paper. Besides, experiments on both Places2 and FFHQ demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed model. Codes and pre-trained models are released in https://github.com/ewrfcas/MAE-FAR.
abstract_zh: 最近的许多修复工作通过利用深度神经网络（DNN）对各种先验信息进行建模以进行图像修复，取得了令人印象深刻的结果。不幸的是，这些方法的性能在很大程度上受到普通卷积神经网络（CNN）主干的表示能力的限制。另一方面，具有自监督预训练的视觉变换器（ViT）在许多视觉识别和目标检测任务中表现出了巨大的潜力。一个自然的问题是修复任务是否可以从 ViT 主干中受益匪浅？然而，在修复网络中直接替换新的主干网并不简单，因为修复是一个与识别任务根本不同的逆问题。为此，本文将基于预训练的掩码自动编码器（MAE）融入修复模型中，该模型具有更丰富的信息先验来增强修复过程。此外，我们建议使用 MAE 的注意先验来使修复模型学习屏蔽和未屏蔽区域之间更多的长距离依赖关系。本文讨论了关于修复和自监督预训练模型的充分消融。此外，Places2 和 FFHQ 上的实验证明了我们提出的模型的有效性。代码和预训练模型在 https://github.com/ewrfcas/MAE-FAR 中发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合预训练Masked AutoEncoder（MAE）与注意力机制的图像修复方法，以提升修复效果。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN在图像修复任务中存在表示能力不足的问题，而ViT在预训练后表现出色，但直接应用于修复任务存在挑战。
AI.method: 将MAE引入修复模型，利用其丰富的先验信息与注意力机制捕捉遮挡区域与非遮挡区域的长距离依赖关系。
AI.result: 在Places2和FFHQ数据集上的实验表明，该方法在修复质量上优于现有方法，代码与预训练模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合MAE的先验特征与注意力机制，本文为图像修复任务提供了有效解决方案，验证了预训练模型在修复领域的潜力。

ai_content.result: 在Places2和FFHQ数据集上的实验表明，该方法在修复质量上优于现有方法，代码与预训练模型已开源。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过融合MAE的先验特征与注意力机制，本文为图像修复任务提供了有效解决方案，验证了预训练模型在修复领域的潜力。

search_text: Learning Prior Feature and Attention Enhanced Image Inpainting 学习先验特征和注意力增强图像修复 Many recent inpainting works have achieved impressive results by leveraging Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) to model various prior information for image restoration. Unfortunately, the performance of these methods is largely limited by the representation ability of vanilla Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) backbones.On the other hand, Vision Transformers (ViT) with self-supervised pre-training have shown great potential for many visual recognition and object detection tasks. A natural question is whether the inpainting task can be greatly benefited from the ViT backbone? However, it is nontrivial to directly replace the new backbones in inpainting networks, as the inpainting is an inverse problem fundamentally different from the recognition tasks. To this end, this paper incorporates the pre-training based Masked AutoEncoder (MAE) into the inpainting model, which enjoys richer informative priors to enhance the inpainting process. Moreover, we propose to use attention priors from MAE to make the inpainting model learn more long-distance dependencies between masked and unmasked regions. Sufficient ablations have been discussed about the inpainting and the self-supervised pre-training models in this paper. Besides, experiments on both Places2 and FFHQ demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed model. Codes and pre-trained models are released in https://github.com/ewrfcas/MAE-FAR. 最近的许多修复工作通过利用深度神经网络（DNN）对各种先验信息进行建模以进行图像修复，取得了令人印象深刻的结果。不幸的是，这些方法的性能在很大程度上受到普通卷积神经网络（CNN）主干的表示能力的限制。另一方面，具有自监督预训练的视觉变换器（ViT）在许多视觉识别和目标检测任务中表现出了巨大的潜力。一个自然的问题是修复任务是否可以从 ViT 主干中受益匪浅？然而，在修复网络中直接替换新的主干网并不简单，因为修复是一个与识别任务根本不同的逆问题。为此，本文将基于预训练的掩码自动编码器（MAE）融入修复模型中，该模型具有更丰富的信息先验来增强修复过程。此外，我们建议使用 MAE 的注意先验来使修复模型学习屏蔽和未屏蔽区域之间更多的长距离依赖关系。本文讨论了关于修复和自监督预训练模型的充分消融。此外，Places2 和 FFHQ 上的实验证明了我们提出的模型的有效性。代码和预训练模型在 https://github.com/ewrfcas/MAE-FAR 中发布。 本文提出一种结合预训练Masked AutoEncoder（MAE）与注意力机制的图像修复方法，以提升修复效果。 Chenjie Cao,Qiaole Dong,Yanwei Fu cs.CV

authors_text: Xiang Yu,Zhe Geng,Xiaohua Huang,Qinglu Wang,Daiyin Zhu
title: EMC2A-Net: An Efficient Multibranch Cross-channel Attention Network for SAR Target Classification
title_zh: EMC2A-Net：一种用于 SAR 目标分类的高效多分支跨通道注意力网络
comment: 15 pages, 9 figures, Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing, 2022
comments: 15 pages, 9 figures, Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing, 2022
abstract: In recent years, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have shown great potential in synthetic aperture radar (SAR) target recognition. SAR images have a strong sense of granularity and have different scales of texture features, such as speckle noise, target dominant scatterers and target contours, which are rarely considered in the traditional CNN model. This paper proposed two residual blocks, namely EMC2A blocks with multiscale receptive fields(RFs), based on a multibranch structure and then designed an efficient isotopic architecture deep CNN (DCNN), EMC2A-Net. EMC2A blocks utilize parallel dilated convolution with different dilation rates, which can effectively capture multiscale context features without significantly increasing the computational burden. To further improve the efficiency of multiscale feature fusion, this paper proposed a multiscale feature cross-channel attention module, namely the EMC2A module, adopting a local multiscale feature interaction strategy without dimensionality reduction. This strategy adaptively adjusts the weights of each channel through efficient one-dimensional (1D)-circular convolution and sigmoid function to guide attention at the global channel wise level. The comparative results on the MSTAR dataset show that EMC2A-Net outperforms the existing available models of the same type and has relatively lightweight network structure. The ablation experiment results show that the EMC2A module significantly improves the performance of the model by using only a few parameters and appropriate cross-channel interactions.
summary: In recent years, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have shown great potential in synthetic aperture radar (SAR) target recognition. SAR images have a strong sense of granularity and have different scales of texture features, such as speckle noise, target dominant scatterers and target contours, which are rarely considered in the traditional CNN model. This paper proposed two residual blocks, namely EMC2A blocks with multiscale receptive fields(RFs), based on a multibranch structure and then designed an efficient isotopic architecture deep CNN (DCNN), EMC2A-Net. EMC2A blocks utilize parallel dilated convolution with different dilation rates, which can effectively capture multiscale context features without significantly increasing the computational burden. To further improve the efficiency of multiscale feature fusion, this paper proposed a multiscale feature cross-channel attention module, namely the EMC2A module, adopting a local multiscale feature interaction strategy without dimensionality reduction. This strategy adaptively adjusts the weights of each channel through efficient one-dimensional (1D)-circular convolution and sigmoid function to guide attention at the global channel wise level. The comparative results on the MSTAR dataset show that EMC2A-Net outperforms the existing available models of the same type and has relatively lightweight network structure. The ablation experiment results show that the EMC2A module significantly improves the performance of the model by using only a few parameters and appropriate cross-channel interactions.
abstract_zh: 近年来，卷积神经网络（CNN）在合成孔径雷达（SAR）目标识别中显示出巨大的潜力。 SAR图像颗粒感强，具有不同尺度的纹理特征，如散斑噪声、目标主散射体、目标轮廓等，传统CNN模型很少考虑这些特征。本文基于多分支结构提出了两个残差块，即具有多尺度感受野（RF）的EMC2A块，然后设计了一种高效的同位素架构深度CNN（DCNN）——EMC2A-Net。 EMC2A模块利用具有不同扩张率的并行扩张卷积，可以有效地捕获多尺度上下文特征，而不会显着增加计算负担。为了进一步提高多尺度特征融合的效率，本文提出了一种多尺度特征跨通道注意力模块，即EMC2A模块，采用不降维的局部多尺度特征交互策略。该策略通过高效的一维（1D）循环卷积和 sigmoid 函数自适应地调整每个通道的权重，以引导全局通道级别的注意力。 MSTAR数据集上的对比结果表明，EMC2A-Net优于现有的同类型模型，并且具有相对轻量级的网络结构。消融实验结果表明，EMC2A 模块仅使用少量参数和适当的跨通道交互即可显着提高模型的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的多分支跨通道注意力网络EMC2A-Net，用于合成孔径雷达（SAR）目标分类。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积神经网络（CNN）在SAR图像分类中未能有效捕捉多尺度纹理特征（如斑点噪声、目标散射体和轮廓），且计算负担较大。
AI.method: 设计包含多尺度感受野的EMC2A模块，采用并行空洞卷积提取多尺度特征，并通过局部多尺度特征交互策略与跨通道注意力机制（基于1D循环卷积和sigmoid函数）实现高效特征融合。
AI.result: 在MSTAR数据集上，EMC2A-Net相较同类模型性能更优且网络结构轻量化；消融实验表明该模块以少量参数显著提升模型性能。
AI.conclusion: EMC2A-Net通过多尺度特征提取与跨通道注意力机制，在保持轻量化的同时有效提升了SAR目标分类的准确率。

authors_text: Xingchen Li,Long Chen,Wenbo Ma,Yi Yang,Jun Xiao
title: Integrating Object-aware and Interaction-aware Knowledge for Weakly Supervised Scene Graph Generation
title_zh: 集成对象感知和交互感知知识以生成弱监督场景图
abstract: Recently, increasing efforts have been focused on Weakly Supervised Scene Graph Generation (WSSGG). The mainstream solution for WSSGG typically follows the same pipeline: they first align text entities in the weak image-level supervisions (e.g., unlocalized relation triplets or captions) with image regions, and then train SGG models in a fully-supervised manner with aligned instance-level "pseudo" labels. However, we argue that most existing WSSGG works only focus on object-consistency, which means the grounded regions should have the same object category label as text entities. While they neglect another basic requirement for an ideal alignment: interaction-consistency, which means the grounded region pairs should have the same interactions (i.e., visual relations) as text entity pairs. Hence, in this paper, we propose to enhance a simple grounding module with both object-aware and interaction-aware knowledge to acquire more reliable pseudo labels. To better leverage these two types of knowledge, we regard them as two teachers and fuse their generated targets to guide the training process of our grounding module. Specifically, we design two different strategies to adaptively assign weights to different teachers by assessing their reliability on each training sample. Extensive experiments have demonstrated that our method consistently improves WSSGG performance on various kinds of weak supervision.
summary: Recently, increasing efforts have been focused on Weakly Supervised Scene Graph Generation (WSSGG). The mainstream solution for WSSGG typically follows the same pipeline: they first align text entities in the weak image-level supervisions (e.g., unlocalized relation triplets or captions) with image regions, and then train SGG models in a fully-supervised manner with aligned instance-level "pseudo" labels. However, we argue that most existing WSSGG works only focus on object-consistency, which means the grounded regions should have the same object category label as text entities. While they neglect another basic requirement for an ideal alignment: interaction-consistency, which means the grounded region pairs should have the same interactions (i.e., visual relations) as text entity pairs. Hence, in this paper, we propose to enhance a simple grounding module with both object-aware and interaction-aware knowledge to acquire more reliable pseudo labels. To better leverage these two types of knowledge, we regard them as two teachers and fuse their generated targets to guide the training process of our grounding module. Specifically, we design two different strategies to adaptively assign weights to different teachers by assessing their reliability on each training sample. Extensive experiments have demonstrated that our method consistently improves WSSGG performance on various kinds of weak supervision.
abstract_zh: 最近，越来越多的努力集中在弱监督场景图生成（WSSGG）上。 WSSGG 的主流解决方案通常遵循相同的流程：它们首先将弱图像级监督中的文本实体（例如，未本地化的关系三元组或标题）与图像区域对齐，然后使用对齐的实例级“伪”标签以完全监督的方式训练 SGG 模型。然而，我们认为大多数现有的 WSSGG 工作只关注对象一致性，这意味着接地区域应该具有与文本实体相同的对象类别标签。虽然他们忽略了理想对齐的另一个基本要求：交互一致性，这意味着接地区域对应该具有与文本实体对相同的交互（即视觉关系）。因此，在本文中，我们建议使用对象感知和交互感知知识来增强一个简单的基础模块，以获得更可靠的伪标签。为了更好地利用这两类知识，我们将他们视为两位老师，并融合他们生成的目标来指导我们的基础模块的训练过程。具体来说，我们设计了两种不同的策略，通过评估不同教师在每个训练样本上的可靠性，自适应地为不同教师分配权重。大量实验表明，我们的方法能够持续提高 WSSGG 在各种弱监督上的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合对象感知和交互感知知识的弱监督场景图生成方法，以提高伪标签的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有弱监督场景图生成方法仅关注对象一致性，忽视了文本实体对与图像区域对之间交互关系的一致性，导致伪标签不可靠。
AI.method: 设计双教师融合机制，将对象知识与交互知识作为两个教师，通过自适应权重分配策略融合其生成的伪标签指导训练。
AI.result: 在多种弱监督设置下，该方法显著提升了场景图生成性能，验证了交互一致性约束的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合建模对象与交互一致性，可有效提升弱监督场景图生成的准确性，为后续研究提供了新思路。
