motivation: 现有弱监督场景图生成方法仅关注对象一致性，忽视了文本实体对与图像区域对之间交互关系的一致性，导致伪标签不可靠。
method: 设计双教师融合机制，将对象知识与交互知识作为两个教师，通过自适应权重分配策略融合其生成的伪标签指导训练。
result: 在多种弱监督设置下，该方法显著提升了场景图生成性能，验证了交互一致性约束的有效性。
conclusion: 通过联合建模对象与交互一致性，可有效提升弱监督场景图生成的准确性，为后续研究提供了新思路。
search_text: Integrating Object-aware and Interaction-aware Knowledge for Weakly Supervised Scene Graph Generation 集成对象感知和交互感知知识以生成弱监督场景图 Recently, increasing efforts have been focused on Weakly Supervised Scene Graph Generation (WSSGG). The mainstream solution for WSSGG typically follows the same pipeline: they first align text entities in the weak image-level supervisions (e.g., unlocalized relation triplets or captions) with image regions, and then train SGG models in a fully-supervised manner with aligned instance-level "pseudo" labels. However, we argue that most existing WSSGG works only focus on object-consistency, which means the grounded regions should have the same object category label as text entities. While they neglect another basic requirement for an ideal alignment: interaction-consistency, which means the grounded region pairs should have the same interactions (i.e., visual relations) as text entity pairs. Hence, in this paper, we propose to enhance a simple grounding module with both object-aware and interaction-aware knowledge to acquire more reliable pseudo labels. To better leverage these two types of knowledge, we regard them as two teachers and fuse their generated targets to guide the training process of our grounding module. Specifically, we design two different strategies to adaptively assign weights to different teachers by assessing their reliability on each training sample. Extensive experiments have demonstrated that our method consistently improves WSSGG performance on various kinds of weak supervision. 最近，越来越多的努力集中在弱监督场景图生成（WSSGG）上。 WSSGG 的主流解决方案通常遵循相同的流程：它们首先将弱图像级监督中的文本实体（例如，未本地化的关系三元组或标题）与图像区域对齐，然后使用对齐的实例级“伪”标签以完全监督的方式训练 SGG 模型。然而，我们认为大多数现有的 WSSGG 工作只关注对象一致性，这意味着接地区域应该具有与文本实体相同的对象类别标签。虽然他们忽略了理想对齐的另一个基本要求：交互一致性，这意味着接地区域对应该具有与文本实体对相同的交互（即视觉关系）。因此，在本文中，我们建议使用对象感知和交互感知知识来增强一个简单的基础模块，以获得更可靠的伪标签。为了更好地利用这两类知识，我们将他们视为两位老师，并融合他们生成的目标来指导我们的基础模块的训练过程。具体来说，我们设计了两种不同的策略，通过评估不同教师在每个训练样本上的可靠性，自适应地为不同教师分配权重。大量实验表明，我们的方法能够持续提高 WSSGG 在各种弱监督上的性能。 本文提出一种结合对象感知和交互感知知识的弱监督场景图生成方法，以提高伪标签的可靠性。 Xingchen Li,Long Chen,Wenbo Ma,Yi Yang,Jun Xiao cs.CV

title: Fast Hierarchical Deep Unfolding Network for Image Compressed Sensing
title_zh: 用于图像压缩感知的快速分层深度展开网络
comment: Accepted by ACM MM 2022
comments: Accepted by ACM MM 2022
abstract: By integrating certain optimization solvers with deep neural network, deep unfolding network (DUN) has attracted much attention in recent years for image compressed sensing (CS). However, there still exist several issues in existing DUNs: 1) For each iteration, a simple stacked convolutional network is usually adopted, which apparently limits the expressiveness of these models. 2) Once the training is completed, most hyperparameters of existing DUNs are fixed for any input content, which significantly weakens their adaptability. In this paper, by unfolding the Fast Iterative Shrinkage-Thresholding Algorithm (FISTA), a novel fast hierarchical DUN, dubbed FHDUN, is proposed for image compressed sensing, in which a well-designed hierarchical unfolding architecture is developed to cooperatively explore richer contextual prior information in multi-scale spaces. To further enhance the adaptability, series of hyperparametric generation networks are developed in our framework to dynamically produce the corresponding optimal hyperparameters according to the input content. Furthermore, due to the accelerated policy in FISTA, the newly embedded acceleration module makes the proposed FHDUN save more than 50% of the iterative loops against recent DUNs. Extensive CS experiments manifest that the proposed FHDUN outperforms existing state-of-the-art CS methods, while maintaining fewer iterations.
summary: By integrating certain optimization solvers with deep neural network, deep unfolding network (DUN) has attracted much attention in recent years for image compressed sensing (CS). However, there still exist several issues in existing DUNs: 1) For each iteration, a simple stacked convolutional network is usually adopted, which apparently limits the expressiveness of these models. 2) Once the training is completed, most hyperparameters of existing DUNs are fixed for any input content, which significantly weakens their adaptability. In this paper, by unfolding the Fast Iterative Shrinkage-Thresholding Algorithm (FISTA), a novel fast hierarchical DUN, dubbed FHDUN, is proposed for image compressed sensing, in which a well-designed hierarchical unfolding architecture is developed to cooperatively explore richer contextual prior information in multi-scale spaces. To further enhance the adaptability, series of hyperparametric generation networks are developed in our framework to dynamically produce the corresponding optimal hyperparameters according to the input content. Furthermore, due to the accelerated policy in FISTA, the newly embedded acceleration module makes the proposed FHDUN save more than 50% of the iterative loops against recent DUNs. Extensive CS experiments manifest that the proposed FHDUN outperforms existing state-of-the-art CS methods, while maintaining fewer iterations.
abstract_zh: 通过将某些优化求解器与深度神经网络相结合，深度展开网络（DUN）近年来在图像压缩感知（CS）领域引起了广泛关注。然而，现有的DUN仍然存在几个问题：1）对于每次迭代，通常采用简单的堆叠卷积网络，这显然限制了这些模型的表达能力。 2）一旦训练完成，现有DUN的大多数超参数对于任何输入内容都是固定的，这大大削弱了它们的适应性。本文通过展开快速迭代收缩阈值算法（FISTA），提出了一种用于图像压缩感知的新型快速分层DUN（称为FHDUN），其中开发了精心设计的分层展开架构，以协作探索多尺度空间中更丰富的上下文先验信息。为了进一步增强适应性，我们的框架中开发了一系列超参数生成网络，以根据输入内容动态生成相应的最优超参数。此外，由于FISTA中的加速策略，新嵌入的加速模块使得所提出的FHDUN相对于最近的DUN节省了50%以上的迭代循环。大量的 CS 实验表明，所提出的 FHDUN 优于现有最先进的 CS 方法，同时保持较少的迭代次数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为FHDUN的快速分层深度展开网络，用于改进图像压缩感知中的重建性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度展开网络（DUN）存在表达能力有限和超参数固定导致适应性差的问题，需设计更高效的网络结构和动态调整机制。
AI.method: 通过展开FISTA算法构建分层网络架构，结合多尺度上下文先验信息，并引入超参数生成网络动态调整参数，同时利用FISTA加速策略减少迭代次数。
AI.result: 实验表明FHDUN在压缩感知任务中优于现有最先进方法，且迭代次数减少50%以上。
AI.conclusion: FHDUN通过分层结构和动态超参数机制有效提升了图像压缩感知的重建质量与效率。

authors_text: Samaneh Abbasi,Meysam Tavakoli,Hamid Reza Boveiri,Mohammad Amin Mosleh Shirazi,Raouf Khayami,Hedieh Khorasani,Reza Javidan,Alireza Mehdizadeh
title: Medical image registration using unsupervised deep neural network: A scoping literature review
title_zh: 使用无监督深度神经网络的医学图像配准：范围界定文献综述
comment: ef:Biomedical Signal Processing and Control 2021
comments: ef:Biomedical Signal Processing and Control 2021
abstract: In medicine, image registration is vital in image-guided interventions and other clinical applications. However, it is a difficult subject to be addressed which by the advent of machine learning, there have been considerable progress in algorithmic performance has recently been achieved for medical image registration in this area. The implementation of deep neural networks provides an opportunity for some medical applications such as conducting image registration in less time with high accuracy, playing a key role in countering tumors during the operation. The current study presents a comprehensive scoping review on the state-of-the-art literature of medical image registration studies based on unsupervised deep neural networks is conducted, encompassing all the related studies published in this field to this date. Here, we have tried to summarize the latest developments and applications of unsupervised deep learning-based registration methods in the medical field. Fundamental and main concepts, techniques, statistical analysis from different viewpoints, novelties, and future directions are elaborately discussed and conveyed in the current comprehensive scoping review. Besides, this review hopes to help those active readers, who are riveted by this field, achieve deep insight into this exciting field.

abstract_zh: 在医学中，图像配准对于图像引导干预和其他临床应用至关重要。然而，这是一个很难解决的问题，随着机器学习的出现，最近该领域的医学图像配准算法性能取得了相当大的进步。深度神经网络的实现为一些医学应用提供了机会，例如在更短的时间内进行高精度的图像配准，在手术过程中对抗肿瘤方面发挥着关键作用。当前的研究对基于无监督深度神经网络的医学图像配准研究的最新文献进行了全面的范围审查，涵盖了迄今为止在该领域发表的所有相关研究。在这里，我们试图总结一下基于无监督深度学习的配准方法在医学领域的最新进展和应用。在当前的全面范围界定审查中，对基本和主要概念、技术、不同观点的统计分析、新颖性和未来方向进行了详细讨论和传达。此外，这篇评论希望帮助那些对该领域感兴趣的活跃读者，深入了解这个令人兴奋的领域。

AI.tldr: 本文对基于无监督深度神经网络的医学图像配准研究进行了全面的文献综述，总结了最新进展和应用。
AI.motivation: 医学图像配准在临床应用中至关重要，但传统方法存在挑战。深度学习技术的进步为提高配准效率和准确性提供了新机遇，需系统梳理当前研究现状。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，收集并分析截至当前所有相关研究，从技术原理、统计分析、创新点及未来方向等多角度进行归纳讨论。
AI.result: 总结了无监督深度学习在医学图像配准中的关键技术、应用场景及局限性，明确了研究空白与未来发展方向。
AI.conclusion: 该综述为研究者提供了领域内深度学习方法的全面视角，强调了无监督模型在提升配准精度与效率中的潜力，并指明了后续研究重点。

Besides, this review hopes to help those active readers, who are riveted by this field, achieve deep insight into this exciting field. 在医学中，图像配准对于图像引导干预和其他临床应用至关重要。然而，这是一个很难解决的问题，随着机器学习的出现，最近该领域的医学图像配准算法性能取得了相当大的进步。深度神经网络的实现为一些医学应用提供了机会，例如在更短的时间内进行高精度的图像配准，在手术过程中对抗肿瘤方面发挥着关键作用。当前的研究对基于无监督深度神经网络的医学图像配准研究的最新文献进行了全面的范围审查，涵盖了迄今为止在该领域发表的所有相关研究。在这里，我们试图总结一下基于无监督深度学习的配准方法在医学领域的最新进展和应用。在当前的全面范围界定审查中，对基本和主要概念、技术、不同观点的统计分析、新颖性和未来方向进行了详细讨论和传达。此外，这篇评论希望帮助那些对该领域感兴趣的活跃读者，深入了解这个令人兴奋的领域。 本文对基于无监督深度神经网络的医学图像配准研究进行了全面的文献综述，总结了最新进展和应用。 Samaneh Abbasi,Meysam Tavakoli,Hamid Reza Boveiri,Mohammad Amin Mosleh Shirazi,Raouf Khayami,Hedieh Khorasani,Reza Javidan,Alireza Mehdizadeh eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Yijing Yang,Vasileios Magoulianitis,Xinyu Wang,C. -C. Jay Kuo
title: Statistical Attention Localization (SAL): Methodology and Application to Object Classification
title_zh: 统计注意力定位（SAL）：对象分类的方法和应用
comment: 11 pages, 9 figures
comments: 11 pages, 9 figures
abstract: A statistical attention localization (SAL) method is proposed to facilitate the object classification task in this work. SAL consists of three steps: 1) preliminary attention window selection via decision statistics, 2) attention map refinement, and 3) rectangular attention region finalization. SAL computes soft-decision scores of local squared windows and uses them to identify salient regions in Step 1. To accommodate object of various sizes and shapes, SAL refines the preliminary result and obtain an attention map of more flexible shape in Step 2. Finally, SAL yields a rectangular attention region using the refined attention map and bounding box regularization in Step 3. As an application, we adopt E-PixelHop, which is an object classification solution based on successive subspace learning (SSL), as the baseline. We apply SAL so as to obtain a cropped-out and resized attention region as an alternative input. Classification results of the whole image as well as the attention region are ensembled to achieve the highest classification accuracy. Experiments on the CIFAR-10 dataset are given to demonstrate the advantage of the SAL-assisted object classification method.
summary: A statistical attention localization (SAL) method is proposed to facilitate the object classification task in this work. As an application, we adopt E-PixelHop, which is an object classification solution based on successive subspace learning (SSL), as the baseline. Experiments on the CIFAR-10 dataset are given to demonstrate the advantage of the SAL-assisted object classification method.
abstract_zh: 提出了一种统计注意定位（SAL）方法来促进这项工作中的对象分类任务。 SAL 包含三个步骤：1）通过决策统计进行初步注意窗口选择，2）注意图细化，3）矩形注意区域最终确定。 SAL 在步骤 1 中计算局部平方窗口的软决策分数，并使用它们来识别显着区域。为了适应各种大小和形状的目标，SAL 在步骤 2 中细化初步结果并获得形状更灵活的注意力图。最后，SAL 使用步骤 3 中细化的注意力图和边界框正则化生成矩形注意力区域。作为应用，我们采用 E-PixelHop（基于连续子空间学习（SSL）的对象分类解决方案）作为基线。我们应用 SAL 以获得裁剪并调整大小的注意力区域作为替代输入。将整幅图像以及关注区域的分类结果进行集成，以达到最高的分类精度。在CIFAR-10数据集上进行的实验证明了SAL辅助对象分类方法的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统计注意力定位（SAL）方法，通过三步骤定位关键区域并辅助物体分类任务，实验表明该方法在CIFAR-10数据集上有效。
AI.motivation: 传统物体分类方法对不同尺寸和形状的物体识别存在局限，需更灵活的注意力机制提升分类精度。
AI.method: SAL包含三步骤：基于统计决策选择初步注意力窗口、优化生成灵活形状的注意力图、通过边界框规则化生成矩形区域；结合E-PixelHop基线方法，集成全图与注意力区域分类结果。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10数据集上，SAL辅助的分类方法取得最高准确率，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: SAL通过动态定位关键区域显著提升分类性能，为物体分类任务提供了一种有效解决方案。

title: Asymptotic Tracking Control of Uncertain MIMO Nonlinear Systems with Less Conservative Controllability Conditions
title_zh: 具有较少保守可控性条件的不确定MIMO非线性系统的渐近跟踪控制
abstract: For uncertain multiple inputs multi-outputs (MIMO) nonlinear systems, it is nontrivial to achieve asymptotic tracking, and most existing methods normally demand certain controllability conditions that are rather restrictive or even impractical if unexpected actuator faults are involved. In this note, we present a method capable of achieving zero-error steady-state tracking with less conservative (more practical) controllability condition. By incorporating a novel Nussbaum gain technique and some positive integrable function into the control design, we develop a robust adaptive asymptotic tracking control scheme for the system with time-varying control gain being unknown its magnitude and direction. By resorting to the existence of some feasible auxiliary matrix, the current state-of-art controllability condition is further relaxed, which enlarges the class of systems that can be considered in the proposed control scheme. All the closed-loop signals are ensured to be globally ultimately uniformly bounded. Moreover, such control methodology is further extended to the case involving intermittent actuator faults, with application to robotic systems. Finally, simulation studies are carried out to demonstrate the effectiveness and flexibility of this method.
summary: For uncertain multiple inputs multi-outputs (MIMO) nonlinear systems, it is nontrivial to achieve asymptotic tracking, and most existing methods normally demand certain controllability conditions that are rather restrictive or even impractical if unexpected actuator faults are involved. In this note, we present a method capable of achieving zero-error steady-state tracking with less conservative (more practical) controllability condition. By incorporating a novel Nussbaum gain technique and some positive integrable function into the control design, we develop a robust adaptive asymptotic tracking control scheme for the system with time-varying control gain being unknown its magnitude and direction. By resorting to the existence of some feasible auxiliary matrix, the current state-of-art controllability condition is further relaxed, which enlarges the class of systems that can be considered in the proposed control scheme. All the closed-loop signals are ensured to be globally ultimately uniformly bounded. Moreover, such control methodology is further extended to the case involving intermittent actuator faults, with application to robotic systems. Finally, simulation studies are carried out to demonstrate the effectiveness and flexibility of this method.
abstract_zh: 对于不确定的多输入多输出（MIMO）非线性系统，实现渐近跟踪并非易事，并且大多数现有方法通常需要一定的可控性条件，如果涉及意外的执行器故障，这些可控性条件将受到相当大的限制甚至不切实际。在本文中，我们提出了一种能够在不太保守（更实用）的可控性条件下实现零误差稳态跟踪的方法。通过将新颖的努斯鲍姆增益技术和一些正可积函数结合到控制设计中，我们为时变控制增益未知其大小和方向的系统开发了一种鲁棒的自适应渐近跟踪控制方案。通过借助于一些可行的辅助矩阵的存在，进一步放宽了当前最先进的可控性条件，这扩大了所提出的控制方案中可以考虑的系统类别。确保所有闭环信号全局最终一致有界。此外，这种控制方法进一步扩展到涉及间歇性执行器故障的情况，并应用于机器人系统。最后通过仿真研究验证了该方法的有效性和灵活性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种针对不确定多输入多输出非线性系统的渐近跟踪控制方法，通过放宽可控性条件来提高实际应用的可行性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法的可控性条件过于严格或不切实际，尤其是在存在意外执行器故障时，需要更宽松的条件以提高控制方案的适用性。
AI.method: 结合新型Nussbaum增益技术与正可积函数，设计鲁棒自适应控制方案，并引入辅助矩阵以放宽可控性条件，适用于未知时变控制增益。
AI.result: 确保闭环信号全局最终一致有界，方法适用于间歇性执行器故障场景，仿真验证了有效性和灵活性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的控制方法在理论分析和实际应用中均表现出更高的灵活性和鲁棒性，适用于更广泛的非线性系统及故障场景。

authors_text: Jiatong Shi,George Saon,David Haws,Shinji Watanabe,Brian Kingsbury
title: VQ-T: RNN Transducers using Vector-Quantized Prediction Network States
title_zh: VQ-T：使用矢量量化预测网络状态的 RNN 传感器
comment: Interspeech 2022 accepted paper
comments: Interspeech 2022 accepted paper
abstract: Beam search, which is the dominant ASR decoding algorithm for end-to-end models, generates tree-structured hypotheses. However, recent studies have shown that decoding with hypothesis merging can achieve a more efficient search with comparable or better performance. But, the full context in recurrent networks is not compatible with hypothesis merging. We propose to use vector-quantized long short-term memory units (VQ-LSTM) in the prediction network of RNN transducers. By training the discrete representation jointly with the ASR network, hypotheses can be actively merged for lattice generation. Our experiments on the Switchboard corpus show that the proposed VQ RNN transducers improve ASR performance over transducers with regular prediction networks while also producing denser lattices with a very low oracle word error rate (WER) for the same beam size. Additional language model rescoring experiments also demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed lattice generation scheme.
summary: Beam search, which is the dominant ASR decoding algorithm for end-to-end models, generates tree-structured hypotheses. However, recent studies have shown that decoding with hypothesis merging can achieve a more efficient search with comparable or better performance. But, the full context in recurrent networks is not compatible with hypothesis merging. We propose to use vector-quantized long short-term memory units (VQ-LSTM) in the prediction network of RNN transducers. By training the discrete representation jointly with the ASR network, hypotheses can be actively merged for lattice generation. Our experiments on the Switchboard corpus show that the proposed VQ RNN transducers improve ASR performance over transducers with regular prediction networks while also producing denser lattices with a very low oracle word error rate (WER) for the same beam size. Additional language model rescoring experiments also demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed lattice generation scheme.
abstract_zh: 波束搜索是端到端模型的主要 ASR 解码算法，可生成树结构假设。然而，最近的研究表明，通过假设合并进行解码可以实现更有效的搜索，并具有可比或更好的性能。但是，循环网络中的完整上下文与假设合并不兼容。我们建议在 RNN 传感器的预测网络中使用矢量量化长短期记忆单元 (VQ-LSTM)。通过与 ASR 网络联合训练离散表示，可以主动合并假设以生成格。我们在 Switchboard 语料库上的实验表明，与具有常规预测网络的传感器相比，所提出的 VQ RNN 传感器提高了 ASR 性能，同时还生成了更密集的晶格，对于相同的波束尺寸，其 Oracle 字错误率 (WER) 非常低。其他语言模型重新评分实验也证明了所提出的格生成方案的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于向量量化长短期记忆单元（VQ-LSTM）的RNN转录器，以改进语音识别（ASR）中的假设合并和格生成。
AI.motivation: 传统的束搜索在端到端ASR模型中生成树状假设，但假设合并可提高搜索效率。然而，循环网络的全上下文特性与假设合并不兼容，需寻找解决方案。
AI.method: 在RNN转录器的预测网络中引入向量量化LSTM（VQ-LSTM），通过联合训练离散表示与ASR网络，实现假设的主动合并与格生成。
AI.result: 在Switchboard语料库上的实验表明，VQ-RNN转录器在相同束大小下提升了ASR性能，生成更密集的格且具有更低的最优词错误率（WER）。语言模型重排序实验进一步验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: VQ-T方法通过离散化预测网络状态，有效解决了循环网络与假设合并的兼容性问题，为ASR系统提供了更高效且性能更优的解码方案。

search_text: VQ-T: RNN Transducers using Vector-Quantized Prediction Network States VQ-T：使用矢量量化预测网络状态的 RNN 传感器 Beam search, which is the dominant ASR decoding algorithm for end-to-end models, generates tree-structured hypotheses. However, recent studies have shown that decoding with hypothesis merging can achieve a more efficient search with comparable or better performance. But, the full context in recurrent networks is not compatible with hypothesis merging. We propose to use vector-quantized long short-term memory units (VQ-LSTM) in the prediction network of RNN transducers. By training the discrete representation jointly with the ASR network, hypotheses can be actively merged for lattice generation. Our experiments on the Switchboard corpus show that the proposed VQ RNN transducers improve ASR performance over transducers with regular prediction networks while also producing denser lattices with a very low oracle word error rate (WER) for the same beam size. Additional language model rescoring experiments also demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed lattice generation scheme. 波束搜索是端到端模型的主要 ASR 解码算法，可生成树结构假设。然而，最近的研究表明，通过假设合并进行解码可以实现更有效的搜索，并具有可比或更好的性能。但是，循环网络中的完整上下文与假设合并不兼容。我们建议在 RNN 传感器的预测网络中使用矢量量化长短期记忆单元 (VQ-LSTM)。通过与 ASR 网络联合训练离散表示，可以主动合并假设以生成格。我们在 Switchboard 语料库上的实验表明，与具有常规预测网络的传感器相比，所提出的 VQ RNN 传感器提高了 ASR 性能，同时还生成了更密集的晶格，对于相同的波束尺寸，其 Oracle 字错误率 (WER) 非常低。其他语言模型重新评分实验也证明了所提出的格生成方案的有效性。 本文提出了一种基于向量量化长短期记忆单元（VQ-LSTM）的RNN转录器，以改进语音识别（ASR）中的假设合并和格生成。 Jiatong Shi,George Saon,David Haws,Shinji Watanabe,Brian Kingsbury cs.SD,cs.CL,eess.AS

authors_text: Zhijie Shen,Chunyu Lin,Lang Nie,Kang Liao,Yao Zhao
title: Neural Contourlet Network for Monocular 360 Depth Estimation
title_zh: 用于单目 360 度深度估计的神经 Contourlet 网络
comment: IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology
comments: IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology
abstract: For a monocular 360 image, depth estimation is a challenging because the distortion increases along the latitude. To perceive the distortion, existing methods devote to designing a deep and complex network architecture. In this paper, we provide a new perspective that constructs an interpretable and sparse representation for a 360 image. Considering the importance of the geometric structure in depth estimation, we utilize the contourlet transform to capture an explicit geometric cue in the spectral domain and integrate it with an implicit cue in the spatial domain. Specifically, we propose a neural contourlet network consisting of a convolutional neural network and a contourlet transform branch. In the encoder stage, we design a spatial-spectral fusion module to effectively fuse two types of cues. Contrary to the encoder, we employ the inverse contourlet transform with learned low-pass subbands and band-pass directional subbands to compose the depth in the decoder. Experiments on the three popular panoramic image datasets demonstrate that the proposed approach outperforms the state-of-the-art schemes with faster convergence. Code is available at https://github.com/zhijieshen-bjtu/Neural-Contourlet-Network-for-MODE.
summary: For a monocular 360 image, depth estimation is a challenging because the distortion increases along the latitude. To perceive the distortion, existing methods devote to designing a deep and complex network architecture. In this paper, we provide a new perspective that constructs an interpretable and sparse representation for a 360 image. Considering the importance of the geometric structure in depth estimation, we utilize the contourlet transform to capture an explicit geometric cue in the spectral domain and integrate it with an implicit cue in the spatial domain. Specifically, we propose a neural contourlet network consisting of a convolutional neural network and a contourlet transform branch. In the encoder stage, we design a spatial-spectral fusion module to effectively fuse two types of cues. Contrary to the encoder, we employ the inverse contourlet transform with learned low-pass subbands and band-pass directional subbands to compose the depth in the decoder. Experiments on the three popular panoramic image datasets demonstrate that the proposed approach outperforms the state-of-the-art schemes with faster convergence. Code is available at https://github.com/zhijieshen-bjtu/Neural-Contourlet-Network-for-MODE.
abstract_zh: 对于单目 360 度图像，深度估计具有挑战性，因为失真度沿纬度方向增加。为了感知失真，现有方法致力于设计深层且复杂的网络架构。在本文中，我们提供了一种新的视角，为 360 度图像构建可解释的稀疏表示。考虑到几何结构在深度估计中的重要性，我们利用轮廓波变换来捕获谱域中的显式几何线索，并将其与空间域中的隐式线索集成。具体来说，我们提出了一种由卷积神经网络和轮廓波变换分支组成的神经轮廓波网络。在编码器阶段，我们设计了一个空间光谱融合模块来有效融合两种类型的线索。与编码器相反，我们采用具有学习的低通子带和带通定向子带的逆轮廓波变换来构成解码器中的深度。对三个流行的全景图像数据集的实验表明，所提出的方法以更快的收敛速度优于最先进的方案。代码可在 https://github.com/zhijieshen-bjtu/Neural-Contourlet-Network-for-MODE 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种神经轮廓网络，用于单目360度图像的深度估计。
AI.motivation: 由于360度图像的失真随纬度增加而增加，现有方法设计复杂的网络结构来处理这种失真，但缺乏可解释性和稀疏性表示。
AI.method: 提出了一种神经轮廓网络，结合卷积神经网络和轮廓变换分支，通过空间-频谱融合模块融合两种线索，并在解码器中使用逆轮廓变换生成深度。
AI.result: 在三个流行的全景图像数据集上，该方法优于现有最先进的方法，且收敛速度更快。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过构造可解释和稀疏的表示，有效提升了单目360度图像深度估计的性能。

authors_text: Jun Wang,Mingfei Gao,Yuqian Hu,Ramprasaath R. Selvaraju,Chetan Ramaiah,Ran Xu,Joseph F. JaJa,Larry S. Davis
title: TAG: Boosting Text-VQA via Text-aware Visual Question-answer Generation
title_zh: 标签：通过文本感知视觉问答生成增强文本 VQA
comment: BMVC 2022
comments: BMVC 2022
abstract: Text-VQA aims at answering questions that require understanding the textual cues in an image. Despite the great progress of existing Text-VQA methods, their performance suffers from insufficient human-labeled question-answer (QA) pairs. However, we observe that, in general, the scene text is not fully exploited in the existing datasets -- only a small portion of the text in each image participates in the annotated QA activities. This results in a huge waste of useful information. To address this deficiency, we develop a new method to generate high-quality and diverse QA pairs by explicitly utilizing the existing rich text available in the scene context of each image. Specifically, we propose, TAG, a text-aware visual question-answer generation architecture that learns to produce meaningful, and accurate QA samples using a multimodal transformer. The architecture exploits underexplored scene text information and enhances scene understanding of Text-VQA models by combining the generated QA pairs with the initial training data. Extensive experimental results on two well-known Text-VQA benchmarks (TextVQA and ST-VQA) demonstrate that our proposed TAG effectively enlarges the training data that helps improve the Text-VQA performance without extra labeling effort. Moreover, our model outperforms state-of-the-art approaches that are pre-trained with extra large-scale data. Code is available at https://github.com/HenryJunW/TAG.
summary: Text-VQA aims at answering questions that require understanding the textual cues in an image. Despite the great progress of existing Text-VQA methods, their performance suffers from insufficient human-labeled question-answer (QA) pairs. However, we observe that, in general, the scene text is not fully exploited in the existing datasets -- only a small portion of the text in each image participates in the annotated QA activities. This results in a huge waste of useful information. To address this deficiency, we develop a new method to generate high-quality and diverse QA pairs by explicitly utilizing the existing rich text available in the scene context of each image. Specifically, we propose, TAG, a text-aware visual question-answer generation architecture that learns to produce meaningful, and accurate QA samples using a multimodal transformer. The architecture exploits underexplored scene text information and enhances scene understanding of Text-VQA models by combining the generated QA pairs with the initial training data. Extensive experimental results on two well-known Text-VQA benchmarks (TextVQA and ST-VQA) demonstrate that our proposed TAG effectively enlarges the training data that helps improve the Text-VQA performance without extra labeling effort. Moreover, our model outperforms state-of-the-art approaches that are pre-trained with extra large-scale data. Code is available at https://github.com/HenryJunW/TAG.
abstract_zh: Text-VQA 旨在回答需要理解图像中文本提示的问题。尽管现有的 Text-VQA 方法取得了巨大进步，但其性能却因人工标记的问答 (QA) 对不足而受到影响。然而，我们观察到，一般来说，现有数据集中的场景文本并未得到充分利用——每个图像中只有一小部分文本参与了带注释的 QA 活动。这导致了有用信息的巨大浪费。为了解决这一缺陷，我们开发了一种新方法，通过明确利用每个图像的场景上下文中现有的富文本来生成高质量和多样化的 QA 对。具体来说，我们提出了 TAG，一种文本感知的视觉问答生成架构，它学习使用多模态转换器生成有意义且准确的 QA 样本。该架构利用了未充分探索的场景文本信息，并通过将生成的 QA 对与初始训练数据相结合来增强文本-VQA 模型的场景理解。两个著名的 Text-VQA 基准（TextVQA 和 ST-VQA）上的大量实验结果表明，我们提出的 TAG 有效地扩大了训练数据，有助于提高 Text-VQA 性能，而无需额外的标记工作。此外，我们的模型优于使用超大规模数据进行预训练的最先进方法。代码可在 https://github.com/HenryJunW/TAG 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TAG方法，通过生成高质量文本感知的问答对来增强文本视觉问答（Text-VQA）任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有Text-VQA方法因人工标注的问答对不足且未充分利用场景文本信息，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 设计多模态Transformer架构TAG，利用场景文本生成多样化问答对，并与原始数据结合训练模型。
AI.result: 在TextVQA和ST-VQA基准测试中，TAG显著提升模型性能，优于使用大规模预训练数据的最新方法。
AI.conclusion: TAG通过挖掘场景文本潜力，无需额外标注即可有效提升Text-VQA模型的训练数据质量与性能。

search_text: TAG: Boosting Text-VQA via Text-aware Visual Question-answer Generation 标签：通过文本感知视觉问答生成增强文本 VQA Text-VQA aims at answering questions that require understanding the textual cues in an image. Despite the great progress of existing Text-VQA methods, their performance suffers from insufficient human-labeled question-answer (QA) pairs. However, we observe that, in general, the scene text is not fully exploited in the existing datasets -- only a small portion of the text in each image participates in the annotated QA activities. This results in a huge waste of useful information. To address this deficiency, we develop a new method to generate high-quality and diverse QA pairs by explicitly utilizing the existing rich text available in the scene context of each image. Specifically, we propose, TAG, a text-aware visual question-answer generation architecture that learns to produce meaningful, and accurate QA samples using a multimodal transformer. The architecture exploits underexplored scene text information and enhances scene understanding of Text-VQA models by combining the generated QA pairs with the initial training data. Extensive experimental results on two well-known Text-VQA benchmarks (TextVQA and ST-VQA) demonstrate that our proposed TAG effectively enlarges the training data that helps improve the Text-VQA performance without extra labeling effort. Moreover, our model outperforms state-of-the-art approaches that are pre-trained with extra large-scale data. Code is available at https://github.com/HenryJunW/TAG. Text-VQA 旨在回答需要理解图像中文本提示的问题。尽管现有的 Text-VQA 方法取得了巨大进步，但其性能却因人工标记的问答 (QA) 对不足而受到影响。然而，我们观察到，一般来说，现有数据集中的场景文本并未得到充分利用——每个图像中只有一小部分文本参与了带注释的 QA 活动。这导致了有用信息的巨大浪费。为了解决这一缺陷，我们开发了一种新方法，通过明确利用每个图像的场景上下文中现有的富文本来生成高质量和多样化的 QA 对。具体来说，我们提出了 TAG，一种文本感知的视觉问答生成架构，它学习使用多模态转换器生成有意义且准确的 QA 样本。该架构利用了未充分探索的场景文本信息，并通过将生成的 QA 对与初始训练数据相结合来增强文本-VQA 模型的场景理解。两个著名的 Text-VQA 基准（TextVQA 和 ST-VQA）上的大量实验结果表明，我们提出的 TAG 有效地扩大了训练数据，有助于提高 Text-VQA 性能，而无需额外的标记工作。此外，我们的模型优于使用超大规模数据进行预训练的最先进方法。代码可在 https://github.com/HenryJunW/TAG 获取。 本文提出TAG方法，通过生成高质量文本感知的问答对来增强文本视觉问答（Text-VQA）任务的性能。 Jun Wang,Mingfei Gao,Yuqian Hu,Ramprasaath R. Selvaraju,Chetan Ramaiah,Ran Xu,Joseph F. JaJa,Larry S. Davis cs.CV

title: A comprehensive survey on computer-aided diagnostic systems in diabetic retinopathy screening
title_zh: 计算机辅助诊断系统在糖尿病视网膜病变筛查中的综合调查
comment: 65 pages, 7 figures, 9 tables
comments: 65 pages, 7 figures, 9 tables
abstract: Diabetes Mellitus (DM) can lead to significant microvasculature disruptions that eventually causes diabetic retinopathy (DR), or complications in the eye due to diabetes. If left unchecked, this disease can increase over time and eventually cause complete vision loss. The general method to detect such optical developments is through examining the vessels, optic nerve head, microaneurysms, haemorrhage, exudates, etc. from retinal images. Ultimately this is limited by the number of experienced ophthalmologists and the vastly growing number of DM cases. To enable earlier and efficient DR diagnosis, the field of ophthalmology requires robust computer aided diagnosis (CAD) systems. Our review is intended for anyone, from student to established researcher, who wants to understand what can be accomplished with CAD systems and their algorithms to modeling and where the field of retinal image processing in computer vision and pattern recognition is headed. For someone just getting started, we place a special emphasis on the logic, strengths and shortcomings of different databases and algorithms frameworks with a focus on very recent approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了糖尿病视网膜病变筛查中计算机辅助诊断系统（CAD）的研究现状，分析了不同数据库与算法框架的优缺点，并探讨了该领域的发展方向。
AI.motivation: 糖尿病视网膜病变可能导致失明，但受制于眼科专家数量不足与病例激增，传统筛查方法效率低下，亟需高效可靠的CAD系统提升诊断能力。
AI.method: 通过文献回顾与比较分析，系统梳理了CAD系统的建模方法、常用数据库及最新算法框架，重点评估其逻辑结构与性能表现。
AI.result: 总结了当前CAD系统在视网膜图像处理中的技术进展，指出现有方法的局限性，并指出深度学习与多模态数据融合等新兴方向的潜力。
AI.conclusion: CAD系统显著提升了糖尿病视网膜病变的筛查效率，未来需进一步优化算法鲁棒性并推动标准化数据集建设以促进技术落地。

title: Post-hoc Interpretability based Parameter Selection for Data Oriented Nuclear Reactor Accident Diagnosis System
title_zh: 面向数据的核反应堆事故诊断系统基于事后可解释性的参数选择
comment: ICONE 29
comments: ICONE 29
abstract: During applying data-oriented diagnosis systems to distinguishing the type of and evaluating the severity of nuclear power plant initial events, it is of vital importance to decide which parameters to be used as the system input. However, although several diagnosis systems have already achieved acceptable performance in diagnosis precision and speed, hardly have the researchers discussed the method of monitoring point choosing and its layout. For this reason, redundant measuring data are used to train the diagnostic model, leading to high uncertainty of the classification, extra training time consumption, and higher probability of overfitting while training. In this study, a method of choosing thermal hydraulics parameters of a nuclear power plant is proposed, using the theory of post-hoc interpretability theory in deep learning. At the start, a novel Time-sequential Residual Convolutional Neural Network (TRES-CNN) diagnosis model is introduced to identify the position and hydrodynamic diameter of breaks in LOCA, using 38 parameters manually chosen on HPR1000 empirically. Afterwards, post-hoc interpretability methods are applied to evaluate the attributions of diagnosis model's outputs, deciding which 15 parameters to be more decisive in diagnosing LOCA details. The results show that the TRES-CNN based diagnostic model successfully predicts the position and size of breaks in LOCA via selected 15 parameters of HPR1000, with 25% of time consumption while training the model compared the process using total 38 parameters. In addition, the relative diagnostic accuracy error is within 1.5 percent compared with the model using parameters chosen empirically, which can be regarded as the same amount of diagnostic reliability.
summary: During applying data-oriented diagnosis systems to distinguishing the type of and evaluating the severity of nuclear power plant initial events, it is of vital importance to decide which parameters to be used as the system input. However, although several diagnosis systems have already achieved acceptable performance in diagnosis precision and speed, hardly have the researchers discussed the method of monitoring point choosing and its layout. For this reason, redundant measuring data are used to train the diagnostic model, leading to high uncertainty of the classification, extra training time consumption, and higher probability of overfitting while training. In this study, a method of choosing thermal hydraulics parameters of a nuclear power plant is proposed, using the theory of post-hoc interpretability theory in deep learning. At the start, a novel Time-sequential Residual Convolutional Neural Network (TRES-CNN) diagnosis model is introduced to identify the position and hydrodynamic diameter of breaks in LOCA, using 38 parameters manually chosen on HPR1000 empirically. Afterwards, post-hoc interpretability methods are applied to evaluate the attributions of diagnosis model's outputs, deciding which 15 parameters to be more decisive in diagnosing LOCA details. The results show that the TRES-CNN based diagnostic model successfully predicts the position and size of breaks in LOCA via selected 15 parameters of HPR1000, with 25% of time consumption while training the model compared the process using total 38 parameters. In addition, the relative diagnostic accuracy error is within 1.5 percent compared with the model using parameters chosen empirically, which can be regarded as the same amount of diagnostic reliability.
abstract_zh: 在应用面向数据的诊断系统来区分核电厂初始事件类型和评估其严重程度时，确定采用哪些参数作为系统输入至关重要。然而，尽管一些诊断系统在诊断精度和速度上已经取得了令人满意的性能，但研究人员几乎没有讨论监测点的选择方法及其布局。因此，使用冗余的测量数据来训练诊断模型，导致分类的不确定性较高，额外的训练时间消耗以及训练时过拟合的可能性较高。本研究提出了一种利用深度学习中的事后可解释理论来选择核电厂热工水力参数的方法。首先，引入了一种新颖的时序残差卷积神经网络（TRES-CNN）诊断模型，使用在 HPR1000 上凭经验手动选择的 38 个参数来识别 LOCA 中断裂的位置和流体动力学直径。然后，应用事后可解释性方法来评估诊断模型输出的归因，决定哪 15 个参数在诊断 LOCA 细节时更具决定性。结果表明，基于 TRES-CNN 的诊断模型通过 HPR1000 选定的 15 个参数成功预测了 LOCA 中断裂的位置和大小，与使用总共 38 个参数的过程相比，训练模型的时间消耗了 25%。此外，与使用经验选择的参数的模型相比，相对诊断精度误差在1.5%以内，可以认为具有相同的诊断可靠性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于深度学习事后可解释性理论的参数选择方法，用于核电厂事故诊断系统中关键参数的筛选。
AI.motivation: 现有诊断系统使用冗余监测数据导致分类不确定性高、训练耗时长且易过拟合，需通过科学方法选择关键参数以提升诊断效率与可靠性。
AI.method: 构建时间序列残差卷积神经网络（TRES-CNN）诊断模型，结合事后可解释性分析方法，从HPR1000经验选定的38个参数中筛选出15个对LOCA诊断最关键的参数。
AI.result: 基于15参数的TRES-CNN模型训练耗时减少25%，诊断准确率误差低于1.5%，可靠性与全参数模型相当。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过参数精简显著提升诊断效率，同时保持诊断可靠性，为核电厂事故诊断系统提供有效参数选择策略。

The results show that the TRES-CNN based diagnostic model successfully predicts the position and size of breaks in LOCA via selected 15 parameters of HPR1000, with 25% of time consumption while training the model compared the process using total 38 parameters. In addition, the relative diagnostic accuracy error is within 1.5 percent compared with the model using parameters chosen empirically, which can be regarded as the same amount of diagnostic reliability. 在应用面向数据的诊断系统来区分核电厂初始事件类型和评估其严重程度时，确定采用哪些参数作为系统输入至关重要。然而，尽管一些诊断系统在诊断精度和速度上已经取得了令人满意的性能，但研究人员几乎没有讨论监测点的选择方法及其布局。因此，使用冗余的测量数据来训练诊断模型，导致分类的不确定性较高，额外的训练时间消耗以及训练时过拟合的可能性较高。本研究提出了一种利用深度学习中的事后可解释理论来选择核电厂热工水力参数的方法。首先，引入了一种新颖的时序残差卷积神经网络（TRES-CNN）诊断模型，使用在 HPR1000 上凭经验手动选择的 38 个参数来识别 LOCA 中断裂的位置和流体动力学直径。然后，应用事后可解释性方法来评估诊断模型输出的归因，决定哪 15 个参数在诊断 LOCA 细节时更具决定性。结果表明，基于 TRES-CNN 的诊断模型通过 HPR1000 选定的 15 个参数成功预测了 LOCA 中断裂的位置和大小，与使用总共 38 个参数的过程相比，训练模型的时间消耗了 25%。此外，与使用经验选择的参数的模型相比，相对诊断精度误差在1.5%以内，可以认为具有相同的诊断可靠性。 本文提出基于深度学习事后可解释性理论的参数选择方法，用于核电厂事故诊断系统中关键参数的筛选。 Chengyuan Li,Meifu Li,Zhifang Qiu eess.SY,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Decentralized Learning With Limited Communications for Multi-robot Coverage of Unknown Spatial Fields
title_zh: 有限通信下的去中心化学习，用于未知空间领域的多机器人覆盖
comment: Accepted IROS 2022
comments: Accepted IROS 2022
abstract: This paper presents an algorithm for a team of mobile robots to simultaneously learn a spatial field over a domain and spatially distribute themselves to optimally cover it. Drawing from previous approaches that estimate the spatial field through a centralized Gaussian process, this work leverages the spatial structure of the coverage problem and presents a decentralized strategy where samples are aggregated locally by establishing communications through the boundaries of a Voronoi partition. We present an algorithm whereby each robot runs a local Gaussian process calculated from its own measurements and those provided by its Voronoi neighbors, which are incorporated into the individual robot's Gaussian process only if they provide sufficiently novel information. The performance of the algorithm is evaluated in simulation and compared with centralized approaches.
summary: This paper presents an algorithm for a team of mobile robots to simultaneously learn a spatial field over a domain and spatially distribute themselves to optimally cover it. Drawing from previous approaches that estimate the spatial field through a centralized Gaussian process, this work leverages the spatial structure of the coverage problem and presents a decentralized strategy where samples are aggregated locally by establishing communications through the boundaries of a Voronoi partition. We present an algorithm whereby each robot runs a local Gaussian process calculated from its own measurements and those provided by its Voronoi neighbors, which are incorporated into the individual robot's Gaussian process only if they provide sufficiently novel information. The performance of the algorithm is evaluated in simulation and compared with centralized approaches.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种算法，让一组移动机器人同时学习一个域上的空间场，并在空间上分布它们以最佳地覆盖它。这项工作借鉴了之前通过集中高斯过程估计空间场的方法，利用了覆盖问题的空间结构，并提出了一种分散策略，其中通过通过 Voronoi 分区的边界建立通信来在本地聚合样本。我们提出了一种算法，每个机器人运行一个根据其自身测量值和其 Voronoi 邻居提供的测量值计算的局部高斯过程，只有当它们提供足够新颖的信息时，才会将其合并到单个机器人的高斯过程中。该算法的性能在仿真中进行了评估，并与集中式方法进行了比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多机器人协同学习未知空间场并优化覆盖的分布式算法。
AI.motivation: 传统集中式高斯过程方法存在通信开销大、可扩展性差的问题，需设计低通信开销的分布式解决方案。
AI.method: 基于Voronoi分区建立局部通信边界，每个机器人仅在其测量数据和邻居提供的新颖信息基础上运行本地高斯过程模型。
AI.result: 仿真结果显示该算法在通信受限场景下能有效学习空间场并实现最优覆盖，性能接近集中式方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过局部信息聚合与通信约束机制，分布式策略可高效解决多机器人未知空间场覆盖问题。

authors_text: Frederico Fernandes Afonso Silva,Bruno Vilhena Adorno
title: Dynamic Modeling of Branched Robots using Modular Composition
title_zh: 使用模块化组合的分支机器人动态建模
comment: 17 pages, 9 figures, 4 tables. Under Review for the IEEE Transactions on Robotics (T-RO)
comments: 17 pages, 9 figures, 4 tables. Under Review for the IEEE Transactions on Robotics (T-RO)
abstract: When modeling complex robot systems such as branched robots, whose kinematic structures are a tree, current techniques often require modeling the whole structure from scratch, even when partial models for the branches are available. This paper proposes a systematic modular procedure for the dynamic modeling of branched robots comprising several subsystems, each composed of an arbitrary number of rigid bodies, providing the final dynamic model by reusing previous models of each branch. Unlike previous approaches, the proposed strategy is applicable even if some subsystems are regarded as black boxes, requiring only twists and their time derivatives, and wrenches at the connection points between those subsystems. To help in the model composition, we also propose a weighted directed graph representation where the weights encode the propagation of twists and their time derivatives, and wrenches between the subsystems. A simple linear operation on the graph interconnection matrix provides the dynamics of the whole system. Numerical results using a 24-DoF fixed-base branched robot composed of eight subsystems show that the proposed formalism is as accurate as a state-of-the-art library for robotic dynamic modeling. Additional results using a 30-DoF holonomic branched mobile manipulator composed of three subsystems demonstrate the fidelity of our model to a modern robotics simulator and its capability of dealing with black box subsystems. To further illustrate how the derived dynamic model can be used in closed-loop control, we also present a simple formulation of a model-based wrench-driven pose control for branched robots.
summary: When modeling complex robot systems such as branched robots, whose kinematic structures are a tree, current techniques often require modeling the whole structure from scratch, even when partial models for the branches are available. This paper proposes a systematic modular procedure for the dynamic modeling of branched robots comprising several subsystems, each composed of an arbitrary number of rigid bodies, providing the final dynamic model by reusing previous models of each branch. Unlike previous approaches, the proposed strategy is applicable even if some subsystems are regarded as black boxes, requiring only twists and their time derivatives, and wrenches at the connection points between those subsystems. To help in the model composition, we also propose a weighted directed graph representation where the weights encode the propagation of twists and their time derivatives, and wrenches between the subsystems. A simple linear operation on the graph interconnection matrix provides the dynamics of the whole system. Numerical results using a 24-DoF fixed-base branched robot composed of eight subsystems show that the proposed formalism is as accurate as a state-of-the-art library for robotic dynamic modeling. Additional results using a 30-DoF holonomic branched mobile manipulator composed of three subsystems demonstrate the fidelity of our model to a modern robotics simulator and its capability of dealing with black box subsystems. To further illustrate how the derived dynamic model can be used in closed-loop control, we also present a simple formulation of a model-based wrench-driven pose control for branched robots.
abstract_zh: 在对复杂的机器人系统（例如其运动结构是树的分支机器人）进行建模时，当前的技术通常需要从头开始对整个结构进行建模，即使分支的部分模型可用。本文提出了一种用于分支机器人动态建模的系统模块化程序，该分支机器人包含多个子系统，每个子系统由任意数量的刚体组成，通过重用每个分支的先前模型来提供最终的动态模型。与以前的方法不同，即使某些子系统被视为黑匣子，所提出的策略也适用，只需要扭转及其时间导数，以及这些子系统之间连接点的扳手。为了帮助模型构建，我们还提出了一种加权有向图表示，其中权重对扭曲及其时间导数的传播以及子系统之间的扳手进行编码。图互连矩阵上的简单线性运算提供了整个系统的动态。使用由八个子系统组成的 24 自由度固定基分支机器人的数值结果表明，所提出的形式与最先进的机器人动态建模库一样准确。使用由三个子系统组成的 30 自由度完整分支移动操纵器的其他结果证明了我们的模型对现代机器人模拟器的保真度及其处理黑盒子系统的能力。为了进一步说明如何将派生的动态模型用于闭环控制，我们还提出了用于分支机器人的基于模型的扳手驱动位姿控制的简单公式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模块化组合的分枝机器人动态建模方法，通过重用各分支子系统模型实现整体动力学建模。
AI.motivation: 传统方法需从头构建分枝机器人整体模型，无法有效复用已有分支模型，且难以处理黑盒子系统。
AI.method: 将机器人分解为多个子系统，利用加权有向图表示子系统间twists/wrenches传递关系，通过图互连矩阵的线性运算生成整体动力学模型。
AI.result: 在24-DoF固定基座和30-DoF移动机械臂上验证，模型精度与主流库和仿真器一致，并成功应用于黑盒子系统场景。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了高效准确的分枝机器人建模，支持子系统黑盒处理，为复杂机器人控制提供了新框架。

authors_text: Kamak Ebadi,Lukas Bernreiter,Harel Biggie,Gavin Catt,Yun Chang,Arghya Chatterjee,Christopher E. Denniston,Simon-Pierre Deschênes,Kyle Harlow,Shehryar Khattak,Lucas Nogueira,Matteo Palieri,Pavel Petráček,Matěj Petrlík,Andrzej Reinke,Vít Krátký,Shibo Zhao,Ali-akbar Agha-mohammadi,Kostas Alexis,Christoffer Heckman,Kasra Khosoussi,Navinda Kottege,Benjamin Morrell,Marco Hutter,Fred Pauling, et al. title: Present and Future of SLAM in Extreme Underground Environments
title_zh: 极端地下环境中 SLAM 的现状和未来
comment: 21 pages including references. This survey paper is submitted to IEEE Transactions on Robotics for pre-approval
comments: 21 pages including references. This survey paper is submitted to IEEE Transactions on Robotics for pre-approval
abstract: This paper reports on the state of the art in underground SLAM by discussing different SLAM strategies and results across six teams that participated in the three-year-long SubT competition. In particular, the paper has four main goals. First, we review the algorithms, architectures, and systems adopted by the teams; particular emphasis is put on lidar-centric SLAM solutions (the go-to approach for virtually all teams in the competition), heterogeneous multi-robot operation (including both aerial and ground robots), and real-world underground operation (from the presence of obscurants to the need to handle tight computational constraints). We do not shy away from discussing the dirty details behind the different SubT SLAM systems, which are often omitted from technical papers. Second, we discuss the maturity of the field by highlighting what is possible with the current SLAM systems and what we believe is within reach with some good systems engineering. Third, we outline what we believe are fundamental open problems, that are likely to require further research to break through. Finally, we provide a list of open-source SLAM implementations and datasets that have been produced during the SubT challenge and related efforts, and constitute a useful resource for researchers and practitioners.
summary: This paper reports on the state of the art in underground SLAM by discussing different SLAM strategies and results across six teams that participated in the three-year-long SubT competition. In particular, the paper has four main goals. First, we review the algorithms, architectures, and systems adopted by the teams; particular emphasis is put on lidar-centric SLAM solutions (the go-to approach for virtually all teams in the competition), heterogeneous multi-robot operation (including both aerial and ground robots), and real-world underground operation (from the presence of obscurants to the need to handle tight computational constraints). We do not shy away from discussing the dirty details behind the different SubT SLAM systems, which are often omitted from technical papers. Second, we discuss the maturity of the field by highlighting what is possible with the current SLAM systems and what we believe is within reach with some good systems engineering. Third, we outline what we believe are fundamental open problems, that are likely to require further research to break through. Finally, we provide a list of open-source SLAM implementations and datasets that have been produced during the SubT challenge and related efforts, and constitute a useful resource for researchers and practitioners.
abstract_zh: 本文通过讨论参加为期三年的 SubT 竞赛的六个团队的不同 SLAM 策略和结果，报告了地下 SLAM 的最新技术。具体来说，本文有四个主要目标。首先，我们回顾一下团队采用的算法、架构和系统；特别强调以激光雷达为中心的 SLAM 解决方案（几乎所有参赛团队的首选方法）、异构多机器人操作（包括空中和地面机器人）以及现实世界的地下操作（从遮挡物的存在到处理严格的计算约束的需要）。我们并不回避讨论不同 SubT SLAM 系统背后的肮脏细节，这些细节经常在技术论文中被省略。其次，我们通过强调当前 SLAM 系统的可能性以及我们认为通过一些良好的系统工程可以实现的目标来讨论该领域的成熟度。第三，我们概述了我们认为可能需要进一步研究才能突破的根本性开放问题。最后，我们提供了 SubT 挑战赛和相关工作期间生成的开源 SLAM 实现和数据集列表，为研究人员和从业者提供了有用的资源。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了极端地下环境中SLAM技术的现状与未来，基于SubT竞赛中六个团队的策略与成果，探讨算法、系统架构及实际应用挑战。
AI.motivation: 推动开发适用于极端地下环境（如遮挡、计算限制）的可靠SLAM系统，以满足实际勘探与救援需求。
AI.method: 通过回顾SubT竞赛中团队采用的SLAM算法、异构机器人协同方案及实际部署细节，结合系统工程分析与开放问题讨论，总结技术成熟度与改进方向。
AI.result: 明确了当前SLAM系统在地下环境中的可行性，识别了关键开放问题（如动态障碍物处理），并整理了开源工具与数据集资源。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步研究突破SLAM在极端环境下的性能瓶颈，同时开源资源将加速技术迭代与实际应用落地。

search_text: Present and Future of SLAM in Extreme Underground Environments 极端地下环境中 SLAM 的现状和未来 This paper reports on the state of the art in underground SLAM by discussing different SLAM strategies and results across six teams that participated in the three-year-long SubT competition. In particular, the paper has four main goals. First, we review the algorithms, architectures, and systems adopted by the teams; particular emphasis is put on lidar-centric SLAM solutions (the go-to approach for virtually all teams in the competition), heterogeneous multi-robot operation (including both aerial and ground robots), and real-world underground operation (from the presence of obscurants to the need to handle tight computational constraints). We do not shy away from discussing the dirty details behind the different SubT SLAM systems, which are often omitted from technical papers. Second, we discuss the maturity of the field by highlighting what is possible with the current SLAM systems and what we believe is within reach with some good systems engineering. Third, we outline what we believe are fundamental open problems, that are likely to require further research to break through. Finally, we provide a list of open-source SLAM implementations and datasets that have been produced during the SubT challenge and related efforts, and constitute a useful resource for researchers and practitioners. 本文通过讨论参加为期三年的 SubT 竞赛的六个团队的不同 SLAM 策略和结果，报告了地下 SLAM 的最新技术。具体来说，本文有四个主要目标。首先，我们回顾一下团队采用的算法、架构和系统；特别强调以激光雷达为中心的 SLAM 解决方案（几乎所有参赛团队的首选方法）、异构多机器人操作（包括空中和地面机器人）以及现实世界的地下操作（从遮挡物的存在到处理严格的计算约束的需要）。我们并不回避讨论不同 SubT SLAM 系统背后的肮脏细节，这些细节经常在技术论文中被省略。其次，我们通过强调当前 SLAM 系统的可能性以及我们认为通过一些良好的系统工程可以实现的目标来讨论该领域的成熟度。第三，我们概述了我们认为可能需要进一步研究才能突破的根本性开放问题。最后，我们提供了 SubT 挑战赛和相关工作期间生成的开源 SLAM 实现和数据集列表，为研究人员和从业者提供了有用的资源。 本文分析了极端地下环境中SLAM技术的现状与未来，基于SubT竞赛中六个团队的策略与成果，探讨算法、系统架构及实际应用挑战。 Kamak Ebadi,Lukas Bernreiter,Harel Biggie,Gavin Catt,Yun Chang,Arghya Chatterjee,Christopher E. Denniston,Simon-Pierre Deschênes,Kyle Harlow,Shehryar Khattak,Lucas Nogueira,Matteo Palieri,Pavel Petráček,Matěj Petrlík,Andrzej Reinke,Vít Krátký,Shibo Zhao,Ali-akbar Agha-mohammadi,Kostas Alexis,Christoffer Heckman,Kasra Khosoussi,Navinda Kottege,Benjamin Morrell,Marco Hutter,Fred Pauling, et al. title: Resolved Motion Control for 3D Underactuated Bipedal Walking using Linear Inverted Pendulum Dynamics and Neural Adaptation
title_zh: 使用线性倒立摆动力学和神经适应的 3D 欠驱动双足行走的解析运动控制
comment: 7 pages, to appear in IROS 2022
comments: 7 pages, to appear in IROS 2022
abstract: We present a framework to generate periodic trajectory references for a 3D under-actuated bipedal robot, using a linear inverted pendulum (LIP) based controller with adaptive neural regulation. We use the LIP template model to estimate the robot's center of mass (CoM) position and velocity at the end of the current step, and formulate a discrete controller that determines the next footstep location to achieve a desired walking profile. This controller is equipped on the frontal plane with a Neural-Network-based adaptive term that reduces the model mismatch between the template and physical robot that particularly affects the lateral motion. Then, the foot placement location computed for the LIP model is used to generate task space trajectories (CoM and swing foot trajectories) for the actual robot to realize stable walking. We use a fast, real-time QP-based inverse kinematics algorithm that produces joint references from the task space trajectories, which makes the formulation independent of the knowledge of the robot dynamics. Finally, we implemented and evaluated the proposed approach in simulation and hardware experiments with a Digit robot obtaining stable periodic locomotion for both cases.
summary: We present a framework to generate periodic trajectory references for a 3D under-actuated bipedal robot, using a linear inverted pendulum (LIP) based controller with adaptive neural regulation. We use the LIP template model to estimate the robot's center of mass (CoM) position and velocity at the end of the current step, and formulate a discrete controller that determines the next footstep location to achieve a desired walking profile. This controller is equipped on the frontal plane with a Neural-Network-based adaptive term that reduces the model mismatch between the template and physical robot that particularly affects the lateral motion. Then, the foot placement location computed for the LIP model is used to generate task space trajectories (CoM and swing foot trajectories) for the actual robot to realize stable walking. We use a fast, real-time QP-based inverse kinematics algorithm that produces joint references from the task space trajectories, which makes the formulation independent of the knowledge of the robot dynamics. Finally, we implemented and evaluated the proposed approach in simulation and hardware experiments with a Digit robot obtaining stable periodic locomotion for both cases.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个框架，使用基于线性倒立摆 (LIP) 的控制器和自适应神经调节，为 3D 欠驱动双足机器人生成周期性轨迹参考。我们使用 LIP 模板模型来估计机器人在当前步骤结束时的质心 (CoM) 位置和速度，并制定一个离散控制器来确定下一个脚步位置以实现所需的行走轮廓。该控制器在额面上配备了基于神经网络的自适应项，可减少模板与物理机器人之间的模型不匹配，特别是影响横向运动。然后，利用LIP模型计算出的足部放置位置来生成实际机器人的任务空间轨迹（CoM和摆动足轨迹）以实现稳定行走。我们使用快速、实时的基于 QP 的逆运动学算法，该算法从任务空间轨迹生成关节参考，这使得公式独立于机器人动力学知识。最后，我们在模拟和硬件实验中实现并评估了所提出的方法，数字机器人在这两种情况下都获得了稳定的周期性运动。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合线性倒立摆模型与神经自适应调节的控制框架，用于生成3D欠驱动双足机器人的周期性轨迹参考，实现稳定行走。
AI.motivation: 现有双足机器人控制方法在处理3D欠驱动特性及模型与实际机器人之间的不匹配问题时存在局限，尤其在横向运动控制方面表现不足。
AI.method: 基于线性倒立摆模板模型估计质心状态，结合神经网络自适应项修正模型误差，并通过实时QP算法生成关节轨迹参考。
AI.result: 在仿真与Digit机器人硬件实验中均实现了稳定的周期性行走，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合LIP模型与神经自适应调节，有效解决了欠驱动双足机器人3D行走中的模型不匹配问题，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

search_text: Resolved Motion Control for 3D Underactuated Bipedal Walking using Linear Inverted Pendulum Dynamics and Neural Adaptation 使用线性倒立摆动力学和神经适应的 3D 欠驱动双足行走的解析运动控制 We present a framework to generate periodic trajectory references for a 3D under-actuated bipedal robot, using a linear inverted pendulum (LIP) based controller with adaptive neural regulation. We use the LIP template model to estimate the robot's center of mass (CoM) position and velocity at the end of the current step, and formulate a discrete controller that determines the next footstep location to achieve a desired walking profile. Finally, we implemented and evaluated the proposed approach in simulation and hardware experiments with a Digit robot obtaining stable periodic locomotion for both cases. 我们提出了一个框架，使用基于线性倒立摆 (LIP) 的控制器和自适应神经调节，为 3D 欠驱动双足机器人生成周期性轨迹参考。我们使用 LIP 模板模型来估计机器人在当前步骤结束时的质心 (CoM) 位置和速度，并制定一个离散控制器来确定下一个脚步位置以实现所需的行走轮廓。该控制器在额面上配备了基于神经网络的自适应项，可减少模板与物理机器人之间的模型不匹配，特别是影响横向运动。然后，利用LIP模型计算出的足部放置位置来生成实际机器人的任务空间轨迹（CoM和摆动足轨迹）以实现稳定行走。我们使用快速、实时的基于 QP 的逆运动学算法，该算法从任务空间轨迹生成关节参考，这使得公式独立于机器人动力学知识。最后，我们在模拟和硬件实验中实现并评估了所提出的方法，数字机器人在这两种情况下都获得了稳定的周期性运动。 本文提出了一种结合线性倒立摆模型与神经自适应调节的控制框架，用于生成3D欠驱动双足机器人的周期性轨迹参考，实现稳定行走。 Victor Paredes,Ayonga Hereid cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Xiucheng Wang,Longfei Ma,Haocheng Li,Zhisheng Yin,Tom. Luan,Nan Cheng
title: Digital Twin-Assisted Efficient Reinforcement Learning for Edge Task Scheduling
title_zh: 数字孪生辅助高效强化学习边缘任务调度
abstract: Task scheduling is a critical problem when one user offloads multiple different tasks to the edge server. When a user has multiple tasks to offload and only one task can be transmitted to server at a time, while server processes tasks according to the transmission order, the problem is NP-hard. However, it is difficult for traditional optimization methods to quickly obtain the optimal solution, while approaches based on reinforcement learning face with the challenge of excessively large action space and slow convergence. In this paper, we propose a Digital Twin (DT)-assisted RL-based task scheduling method in order to improve the performance and convergence of the RL. We use DT to simulate the results of different decisions made by the agent, so that one agent can try multiple actions at a time, or, similarly, multiple agents can interact with environment in parallel in DT. In this way, the exploration efficiency of RL can be significantly improved via DT, and thus RL can converges faster and local optimality is less likely to happen. Particularly, two algorithms are designed to made task scheduling decisions, i.e., DT-assisted asynchronous Q-learning (DTAQL) and DT-assisted exploring Q-learning (DTEQL). Simulation results show that both algorithms significantly improve the convergence speed of Q-learning by increasing the exploration efficiency.
summary: Task scheduling is a critical problem when one user offloads multiple different tasks to the edge server. When a user has multiple tasks to offload and only one task can be transmitted to server at a time, while server processes tasks according to the transmission order, the problem is NP-hard. However, it is difficult for traditional optimization methods to quickly obtain the optimal solution, while approaches based on reinforcement learning face with the challenge of excessively large action space and slow convergence. In this paper, we propose a Digital Twin (DT)-assisted RL-based task scheduling method in order to improve the performance and convergence of the RL. We use DT to simulate the results of different decisions made by the agent, so that one agent can try multiple actions at a time, or, similarly, multiple agents can interact with environment in parallel in DT. In this way, the exploration efficiency of RL can be significantly improved via DT, and thus RL can converges faster and local optimality is less likely to happen. Particularly, two algorithms are designed to made task scheduling decisions, i.e., DT-assisted asynchronous Q-learning (DTAQL) and DT-assisted exploring Q-learning (DTEQL). Simulation results show that both algorithms significantly improve the convergence speed of Q-learning by increasing the exploration efficiency.
abstract_zh: 当一个用户将多个不同的任务卸载到边缘服务器时，任务调度是一个关键问题。当用户有多个任务需要卸载，并且一次只能将一个任务传输到服务器，而服务器根据传输顺序处理任务时，该问题是NP困难的。然而，传统的优化方法很难快速获得最优解，而基于强化学习的方法则面临着动作空间过大、收敛速度慢的挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种数字孪生（DT）辅助的基于强化学习的任务调度方法，以提高强化学习的性能和收敛性。我们使用DT来模拟Agent做出的不同决策的结果，以便一个Agent可以一次尝试多个动作，或者类似地，多个Agent可以在DT中并行地与环境交互。这样，通过DT可以显着提高RL的探索效率，从而RL可以更快地收敛，并且不太可能出现局部最优。特别是，设计了两种算法来做出任务调度决策，即DT辅助异步Q学习（DTAQL）和DT辅助探索Q学习（DTEQL）。仿真结果表明，两种算法通过提高探索效率，显着提高了Q-learning的收敛速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于数字孪生（DT）的强化学习（RL）方法，用于提升边缘计算中任务调度的效率和收敛速度。
AI.motivation: 传统优化方法难以快速求解NP难的任务调度问题，而基于RL的方法面临动作空间过大和收敛速度慢的挑战。
AI.method: 利用数字孪生模拟代理的不同决策结果，实现多动作并行探索，设计了DT辅助异步Q学习（DTAQL）和DT辅助探索Q学习（DTEQL）两种算法。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，两种算法通过提升探索效率显著加快了Q学习的收敛速度。
AI.conclusion: 数字孪生辅助的RL方法能有效解决边缘任务调度中的探索效率与收敛速度问题，减少局部最优风险。

search_text: Digital Twin-Assisted Efficient Reinforcement Learning for Edge Task Scheduling 数字孪生辅助高效强化学习边缘任务调度 Task scheduling is a critical problem when one user offloads multiple different tasks to the edge server. When a user has multiple tasks to offload and only one task can be transmitted to server at a time, while server processes tasks according to the transmission order, the problem is NP-hard. However, it is difficult for traditional optimization methods to quickly obtain the optimal solution, while approaches based on reinforcement learning face with the challenge of excessively large action space and slow convergence. In this paper, we propose a Digital Twin (DT)-assisted RL-based task scheduling method in order to improve the performance and convergence of the RL. We use DT to simulate the results of different decisions made by the agent, so that one agent can try multiple actions at a time, or, similarly, multiple agents can interact with environment in parallel in DT. In this way, the exploration efficiency of RL can be significantly improved via DT, and thus RL can converges faster and local optimality is less likely to happen. Particularly, two algorithms are designed to made task scheduling decisions, i.e., DT-assisted asynchronous Q-learning (DTAQL) and DT-assisted exploring Q-learning (DTEQL). Simulation results show that both algorithms significantly improve the convergence speed of Q-learning by increasing the exploration efficiency. 当一个用户将多个不同的任务卸载到边缘服务器时，任务调度是一个关键问题。当用户有多个任务需要卸载，并且一次只能将一个任务传输到服务器，而服务器根据传输顺序处理任务时，该问题是NP困难的。然而，传统的优化方法很难快速获得最优解，而基于强化学习的方法则面临着动作空间过大、收敛速度慢的挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种数字孪生（DT）辅助的基于强化学习的任务调度方法，以提高强化学习的性能和收敛性。我们使用DT来模拟Agent做出的不同决策的结果，以便一个Agent可以一次尝试多个动作，或者类似地，多个Agent可以在DT中并行地与环境交互。这样，通过DT可以显着提高RL的探索效率，从而RL可以更快地收敛，并且不太可能出现局部最优。特别是，设计了两种算法来做出任务调度决策，即DT辅助异步Q学习（DTAQL）和DT辅助探索Q学习（DTEQL）。仿真结果表明，两种算法通过提高探索效率，显着提高了Q-learning的收敛速度。 本文提出了一种基于数字孪生（DT）的强化学习（RL）方法，用于提升边缘计算中任务调度的效率和收敛速度。 Xiucheng Wang,Longfei Ma,Haocheng Li,Zhisheng Yin,Tom. Luan,Nan Cheng cs.LG,cs.AI,eess.SY

authors_text: Chase Stokes,Vidya Setlur,Bridget Cogley,Arvind Satyanarayan,Marti Hearst
title: Striking a Balance: Reader Takeaways and Preferences when Integrating Text and Charts
title_zh: 取得平衡：整合文本和图表时读者的要点和偏好
comment: 11 pages, 4 tables, 6 figures, accepted to IEEE Transaction on Visualization and Graphics
comments: 11 pages, 4 tables, 6 figures, accepted to IEEE Transaction on Visualization and Graphics
abstract: While visualizations are an effective way to represent insights about information, they rarely stand alone. When designing a visualization, text is often added to provide additional context and guidance for the reader. However, there is little experimental evidence to guide designers as to what is the right amount of text to show within a chart, what its qualitative properties should be, and where it should be placed. Prior work also shows variation in personal preferences for charts versus textual representations. In this paper, we explore several research questions about the relative value of textual components of visualizations. 302 participants ranked univariate line charts containing varying amounts of text, ranging from no text (except for the axes) to a written paragraph with no visuals. Participants also described what information they could take away from line charts containing text with varying semantic content. We find that heavily annotated charts were not penalized. In fact, participants preferred the charts with the largest number of textual annotations over charts with fewer annotations or text alone. We also find effects of semantic content. For instance, the text that describes statistical or relational components of a chart leads to more takeaways referring to statistics or relational comparisons than text describing elemental or encoded components. Finally, we find different effects for the semantic levels based on the placement of the text on the chart; some kinds of information are best placed in the title, while others should be placed closer to the data. We compile these results into four chart design guidelines and discuss future implications for the combination of text and charts.

Participants also described what information they could take away from line charts containing text with varying semantic content. We find that heavily annotated charts were not penalized. In fact, participants preferred the charts with the largest number of textual annotations over charts with fewer annotations or text alone. We also find effects of semantic content. For instance, the text that describes statistical or relational components of a chart leads to more takeaways referring to statistics or relational comparisons than text describing elemental or encoded components. Finally, we find different effects for the semantic levels based on the placement of the text on the chart; some kinds of information are best placed in the title, while others should be placed closer to the data. We compile these results into four chart design guidelines and discuss future implications for the combination of text and charts.
abstract_zh: 虽然可视化是表达信息见解的有效方式，但它们很少独立存在。设计可视化时，通常会添加文本来为读者提供额外的上下文和指导。然而，几乎没有实验证据可以指导设计人员确定图表中显示的正确文本量、其定性属性应该是什么以及应该放置在哪里。之前的工作还表明，图表与文本表示的个人偏好存在差异。在本文中，我们探讨了有关可视化文本组件相对价值的几个研究问题。 302 名参与者对包含不同数量文本的单变量折线图进行了排名，从没有文本（轴除外）到没有视觉效果的书面段落。参与者还描述了他们可以从包含不同语义内容的文本的折线图中获取哪些信息。我们发现带有大量注释的图表并没有受到惩罚。事实上，参与者更喜欢带有最多文本注释的图表，而不是带有较少注释或仅文本的图表。我们还发现语义内容的影响。例如，描述图表的统计或关系组件的文本比描述元素或编码组件的文本会带来更多涉及统计或关系比较的要点。最后，我们根据文本在图表上的位置发现语义级别的不同效果；某些类型的信息最好放置在标题中，而其他信息则应放置在靠近数据的位置。我们将这些结果汇编成四个图表设计指南，并讨论文本和图表组合的未来影响。

AI.tldr: 探讨在图表中整合文本与图表时，读者的信息获取偏好及文本设计对图表效果的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏关于图表中文本量、内容及位置的实验依据，难以指导设计实践，需明确文本与图表的最优结合方式。
AI.method: 通过实验招募302名参与者，让他们对不同文本量（从无到完整段落）的折线图进行排名，并分析文本语义内容与位置对信息提取的影响。
AI.result: 高度注释图表更受青睐；统计类文本促进统计相关结论，元素描述文本影响信息提取；文本位置与信息类型匹配度影响效果。
AI.conclusion: 提出四条图表设计指南：增加文本注释、区分文本语义类型、根据信息类型调整文本位置，以优化图表与文本的协同效果。

authors_text: James Noeckel,Benjamin T. Jones,Karl Willis,Brian Curless,Adriana Schulz
title: Mates2Motion: Learning How Mechanical CAD Assemblies Work
title_zh: Mates2Motion：学习机械 CAD 装配体的工作原理
comment: Contains 5 pages, 2 figures. Presented at the ICML 2022 Workshop on Machine Learning in Computational Design
comments: Contains 5 pages, 2 figures. Presented at the ICML 2022 Workshop on Machine Learning in Computational Design
abstract: We describe our work on inferring the degrees of freedom between mated parts in mechanical assemblies using deep learning on CAD representations. We train our model using a large dataset of real-world mechanical assemblies consisting of CAD parts and mates joining them together. We present methods for re-defining these mates to make them better reflect the motion of the assembly, as well as narrowing down the possible axes of motion. We also conduct a user study to create a motion-annotated test set with more reliable labels.
summary: We describe our work on inferring the degrees of freedom between mated parts in mechanical assemblies using deep learning on CAD representations. We train our model using a large dataset of real-world mechanical assemblies consisting of CAD parts and mates joining them together. We present methods for re-defining these mates to make them better reflect the motion of the assembly, as well as narrowing down the possible axes of motion. We also conduct a user study to create a motion-annotated test set with more reliable labels.
abstract_zh: 我们描述了使用 CAD 表示的深度学习来推断机械装配中配合零件之间的自由度的工作。我们使用由 CAD 零件和将它们连接在一起的配合组成的真实机械装配体的大型数据集来训练我们的模型。我们提出了重新定义这些配合的方法，使它们更好地反映装配体的运动，并缩小可能的运动轴范围。我们还进行了一项用户研究，以创建带有更可靠标签的运动注释测试集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的方法，用于从CAD模型中推断机械装配体中部件之间的运动自由度。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖手动定义机械装配的连接关系，效率低且容易出错，而利用深度学习可以自动推断运动自由度，提高准确性和效率。
AI.method: 通过构建包含CAD零件和连接关系的大数据集训练深度学习模型，重新定义连接以更精确地反映运动，并结合用户研究生成更可靠的标注测试集。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，模型能够有效推断机械装配的运动自由度，用户研究验证了测试集的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为自动化分析机械装配运动提供了新思路，构建的标注数据集有助于推动相关研究的发展。

We train our model using a large dataset of real-world mechanical assemblies consisting of CAD parts and mates joining them together. We also conduct a user study to create a motion-annotated test set with more reliable labels. 我们描述了使用 CAD 表示的深度学习来推断机械装配中配合零件之间的自由度的工作。我们使用由 CAD 零件和将它们连接在一起的配合组成的真实机械装配体的大型数据集来训练我们的模型。我们提出了重新定义这些配合的方法，使它们更好地反映装配体的运动，并缩小可能的运动轴范围。我们还进行了一项用户研究，以创建带有更可靠标签的运动注释测试集。 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的方法，用于从CAD模型中推断机械装配体中部件之间的运动自由度。 James Noeckel,Benjamin T. Jones,Karl Willis,Brian Curless,Adriana Schulz cs.CV

title: On CAD Informed Adaptive Robotic Assembly
title_zh: 基于 CAD 的自适应机器人装配
abstract: We introduce a robotic assembly system that streamlines the design-to-make workflow for going from a CAD model of a product assembly to a fully programmed and adaptive assembly process. Our system captures (in the CAD tool) the intent of the assembly process for a specific robotic workcell and generates a recipe of task-level instructions. By integrating visual sensing with deep-learned perception models, the robots infer the necessary actions to assemble the design from the generated recipe. The perception models are trained directly from simulation, allowing the system to identify various parts based on CAD information. We demonstrate the system with a workcell of two robots to assemble interlocking 3D part designs. We first build and tune the assembly process in simulation, verifying the generated recipe. Finally, the real robotic workcell assembles the design using the same behavior.
summary: We introduce a robotic assembly system that streamlines the design-to-make workflow for going from a CAD model of a product assembly to a fully programmed and adaptive assembly process. Our system captures (in the CAD tool) the intent of the assembly process for a specific robotic workcell and generates a recipe of task-level instructions. By integrating visual sensing with deep-learned perception models, the robots infer the necessary actions to assemble the design from the generated recipe. The perception models are trained directly from simulation, allowing the system to identify various parts based on CAD information. We demonstrate the system with a workcell of two robots to assemble interlocking 3D part designs. We first build and tune the assembly process in simulation, verifying the generated recipe. Finally, the real robotic workcell assembles the design using the same behavior.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了一种机器人装配系统，该系统可简化从产品装配的 CAD 模型到完全编程的自适应装配流程的从设计到制造的工作流程。我们的系统（在 CAD 工具中）捕获特定机器人工作单元的装配过程的意图，并生成任务级指令的配方。通过将视觉传感与深度学习的感知模型相结合，机器人可以根据生成的配方推断出组装设计所需的必要动作。感知模型直接通过仿真进行训练，使系统能够根据 CAD 信息识别各种零件。我们演示了该系统，该系统由两个机器人组成的工作单元来组装互锁的 3D 零件设计。我们首先在模拟中构建和调整装配过程，验证生成的配方。最后，真正的机器人工作单元使用相同的行为来组装设计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合CAD模型与机器人视觉感知的自适应装配系统，实现从产品设计到自动化装配的全流程衔接。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人装配流程依赖人工编程且缺乏灵活性，难以应对复杂装配任务与设计变更需求。
AI.method: 在CAD工具中捕捉装配意图生成任务指令，融合视觉感知与深度学习模型，通过仿真训练识别零件并指导双机器人协同装配。
AI.result: 成功验证了仿真到现实的装配迁移能力，双机器人工作单元可依据CAD生成的装配方案完成互锁3D零件的自动组装。
AI.conclusion: 该系统实现了设计意图到自适应装配行为的闭环，为复杂产品自动化制造提供了可扩展的解决方案。

authors_text: Ibrahim H. Ahmed,Cillian Brewitt,Ignacio Carlucho,Filippos Christianos,Mhairi Dunion,Elliot Fosong,Samuel Garcin,Shangmin Guo,Balint Gyevnar,Trevor McInroe,Georgios Papoudakis,Arrasy Rahman,Lukas Schäfer,Massimiliano Tamborski,Giuseppe Vecchio,Cheng Wang,Stefano V. Albrecht
title: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Multi-Agent Interaction
title_zh: 多智能体交互的深度强化学习
comment: Published in AI Communications Special Issue on Multi-Agent Systems Research in the UK
comments: Published in AI Communications Special Issue on Multi-Agent Systems Research in the UK
abstract: The development of autonomous agents which can interact with other agents to accomplish a given task is a core area of research in artificial intelligence and machine learning. Towards this goal, the Autonomous Agents Research Group develops novel machine learning algorithms for autonomous systems control, with a specific focus on deep reinforcement learning and multi-agent reinforcement learning. Research problems include scalable learning of coordinated agent policies and inter-agent communication; reasoning about the behaviours, goals, and composition of other agents from limited observations; and sample-efficient learning based on intrinsic motivation, curriculum learning, causal inference, and representation learning. This article provides a broad overview of the ongoing research portfolio of the group and discusses open problems for future directions.
summary: The development of autonomous agents which can interact with other agents to accomplish a given task is a core area of research in artificial intelligence and machine learning. Towards this goal, the Autonomous Agents Research Group develops novel machine learning algorithms for autonomous systems control, with a specific focus on deep reinforcement learning and multi-agent reinforcement learning. Research problems include scalable learning of coordinated agent policies and inter-agent communication; reasoning about the behaviours, goals, and composition of other agents from limited observations; and sample-efficient learning based on intrinsic motivation, curriculum learning, causal inference, and representation learning. This article provides a broad overview of the ongoing research portfolio of the group and discusses open problems for future directions.
abstract_zh: 开发可以与其他代理交互以完成给定任务的自主代理是人工智能和机器学习研究的核心领域。为了实现这一目标，自主代理研究小组开发了用于自主系统控制的新型机器学习算法，特别关注深度强化学习和多代理强化学习。研究问题包括协调代理策略的可扩展学习和代理间通信；根据有限的观察来推理其他主体的行为、目标和组成；基于内在动机、课程学习、因果推理和表征学习的样本有效学习。本文对该小组正在进行的研究组合进行了广泛的概述，并讨论了未来方向的未决问题。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了自主智能体研究组在深度强化学习与多智能体交互领域的研究方向，重点探讨协作策略学习与智能体间通信等关键技术。
AI.motivation: 多智能体系统在复杂任务中需要实现高效协作与自主决策，现有算法在可扩展性、样本效率及环境适应性方面存在显著不足。
AI.method: 采用深度强化学习框架，结合内在动机驱动、课程学习、因果推理等技术，研究可扩展的协作策略学习与跨智能体通信机制。
AI.result: 系统梳理了当前研究的技术路线图，明确了在策略协调、行为推理与高效学习等方向的关键挑战，为后续研究提供框架参考。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体交互研究需突破传统算法局限，未来应聚焦于动态环境适应性提升与跨领域通用性增强的算法创新。

authors_text: Zongwei Wu,Shriarulmozhivarman Gobichettipalayam,Brahim Tamadazte,Guillaume Allibert,Danda Pani Paudel,Cédric Demonceaux
title: Robust RGB-D Fusion for Saliency Detection
title_zh: 用于显着性检测的稳健 RGB-D 融合
comment: Accepted to 3DV 2022
comments: Accepted to 3DV 2022
abstract: Efficiently exploiting multi-modal inputs for accurate RGB-D saliency detection is a topic of high interest. Most existing works leverage cross-modal interactions to fuse the two streams of RGB-D for intermediate features' enhancement. In this process, a practical aspect of the low quality of the available depths has not been fully considered yet. In this work, we aim for RGB-D saliency detection that is robust to the low-quality depths which primarily appear in two forms: inaccuracy due to noise and the misalignment to RGB. To this end, we propose a robust RGB-D fusion method that benefits from (1) layer-wise, and (2) trident spatial, attention mechanisms. On the one hand, layer-wise attention (LWA) learns the trade-off between early and late fusion of RGB and depth features, depending upon the depth accuracy. On the other hand, trident spatial attention (TSA) aggregates the features from a wider spatial context to address the depth misalignment problem. The proposed LWA and TSA mechanisms allow us to efficiently exploit the multi-modal inputs for saliency detection while being robust against low-quality depths. Our experiments on five benchmark datasets demonstrate that the proposed fusion method performs consistently better than the state-of-the-art fusion alternatives.
summary: Efficiently exploiting multi-modal inputs for accurate RGB-D saliency detection is a topic of high interest. Most existing works leverage cross-modal interactions to fuse the two streams of RGB-D for intermediate features' enhancement. In this process, a practical aspect of the low quality of the available depths has not been fully considered yet. In this work, we aim for RGB-D saliency detection that is robust to the low-quality depths which primarily appear in two forms: inaccuracy due to noise and the misalignment to RGB. To this end, we propose a robust RGB-D fusion method that benefits from (1) layer-wise, and (2) trident spatial, attention mechanisms. On the one hand, layer-wise attention (LWA) learns the trade-off between early and late fusion of RGB and depth features, depending upon the depth accuracy. On the other hand, trident spatial attention (TSA) aggregates the features from a wider spatial context to address the depth misalignment problem. The proposed LWA and TSA mechanisms allow us to efficiently exploit the multi-modal inputs for saliency detection while being robust against low-quality depths. Our experiments on five benchmark datasets demonstrate that the proposed fusion method performs consistently better than the state-of-the-art fusion alternatives.
abstract_zh: 有效利用多模态输入进行准确的 RGB-D 显着性检测是人们高度关注的主题。大多数现有作品利用跨模式交互来融合 RGB-D 的两个流以增强中间特征。在此过程中，尚未充分考虑可用深度质量低的实际问题。在这项工作中，我们的目标是实现对低质量深度具有鲁棒性的 RGB-D 显着性检测，低质量深度主要以两种形式出现：噪声引起的不准确和 RGB 未对准。为此，我们提出了一种鲁棒的 RGB-D 融合方法，该方法受益于（1）逐层和（2）三叉戟空间注意机制。一方面，逐层注意力（LWA）根据深度精度学习 RGB 和深度特征的早期和晚期融合之间的权衡。另一方面，三叉戟空间注意力（TSA）聚合了更广泛的空间上下文中的特征，以解决深度错位问题。所提出的 LWA 和 TSA 机制使我们能够有效地利用多模态输入进行显着性检测，同时对低质量深度具有鲁棒性。我们对五个基准数据集的实验表明，所提出的融合方法的性能始终优于最先进的融合替代方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种鲁棒的RGB-D融合方法，用于在低质量深度数据下提升显著性检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有RGB-D显著性检测方法未充分考虑深度数据存在噪声和RGB对齐误差等低质量问题，导致融合效果受限。
AI.method: 设计层间注意力机制（LWA）动态平衡RGB与深度特征的融合时机，并引入三叉空间注意力机制（TSA）通过多尺度上下文聚合缓解深度对齐误差。
AI.result: 在五个基准数据集上实验表明，该方法在低质量深度场景下显著优于现有最先进融合算法。
AI.conclusion: 通过双注意力机制的协同作用，提出的融合框架有效提升了RGB-D显著性检测对低质量深度数据的鲁棒性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种鲁棒的RGB-D融合方法，用于在低质量深度数据下提升显著性检测性能。
ai_content.motivation: 现有RGB-D显著性检测方法未充分考虑深度数据存在噪声和RGB对齐误差等低质量问题，导致融合效果受限。
ai_content.method: 设计层间注意力机制（LWA）动态平衡RGB与深度特征的融合时机，并引入三叉空间注意力机制（TSA）通过多尺度上下文聚合缓解深度对齐误差。
ai_content.result: 在五个基准数据集上实验表明，该方法在低质量深度场景下显著优于现有最先进融合算法。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过双注意力机制的协同作用，提出的融合框架有效提升了RGB-D显著性检测对低质量深度数据的鲁棒性。
