search_text: Robust RGB-D Fusion for Saliency Detection 用于显着性检测的稳健 RGB-D 融合 Efficiently exploiting multi-modal inputs for accurate RGB-D saliency detection is a topic of high interest. Most existing works leverage cross-modal interactions to fuse the two streams of RGB-D for intermediate features' enhancement. In this process, a practical aspect of the low quality of the available depths has not been fully considered yet. In this work, we aim for RGB-D saliency detection that is robust to the low-quality depths which primarily appear in two forms: inaccuracy due to noise and the misalignment to RGB. To this end, we propose a robust RGB-D fusion method that benefits from (1) layer-wise, and (2) trident spatial, attention mechanisms. On the one hand, layer-wise attention (LWA) learns the trade-off between early and late fusion of RGB and depth features, depending upon the depth accuracy. On the other hand, trident spatial attention (TSA) aggregates the features from a wider spatial context to address the depth misalignment problem. The proposed LWA and TSA mechanisms allow us to efficiently exploit the multi-modal inputs for saliency detection while being robust against low-quality depths. Our experiments on five benchmark datasets demonstrate that the proposed fusion method performs consistently better than the state-of-the-art fusion alternatives. 有效利用多模态输入进行准确的 RGB-D 显着性检测是人们高度关注的主题。大多数现有作品利用跨模式交互来融合 RGB-D 的两个流以增强中间特征。在此过程中，尚未充分考虑可用深度质量低的实际问题。在这项工作中，我们的目标是实现对低质量深度具有鲁棒性的 RGB-D 显着性检测，低质量深度主要以两种形式出现：噪声引起的不准确和 RGB 未对准。为此，我们提出了一种鲁棒的 RGB-D 融合方法，该方法受益于（1）逐层和（2）三叉戟空间注意机制。一方面，逐层注意力（LWA）根据深度精度学习 RGB 和深度特征的早期和晚期融合之间的权衡。另一方面，三叉戟空间注意力（TSA）聚合了更广泛的空间上下文中的特征，以解决深度错位问题。所提出的 LWA 和 TSA 机制使我们能够有效地利用多模态输入进行显着性检测，同时对低质量深度具有鲁棒性。我们对五个基准数据集的实验表明，所提出的融合方法的性能始终优于最先进的融合替代方案。 本文提出一种鲁棒的RGB-D融合方法，用于在低质量深度数据下提升显著性检测性能。 Zongwei Wu,Shriarulmozhivarman Gobichettipalayam,Brahim Tamadazte,Guillaume Allibert,Danda Pani Paudel,Cédric Demonceaux cs.CV

title: Two-Stream Transformer Architecture for Long Video Understanding
title_zh: 用于长视频理解的双流变压器架构
abstract: Pure vision transformer architectures are highly effective for short video classification and action recognition tasks. However, due to the quadratic complexity of self attention and lack of inductive bias, transformers are resource intensive and suffer from data inefficiencies. Long form video understanding tasks amplify data and memory efficiency problems in transformers making current approaches unfeasible to implement on data or memory restricted domains. This paper introduces an efficient Spatio-Temporal Attention Network (STAN) which uses a two-stream transformer architecture to model dependencies between static image features and temporal contextual features. Our proposed approach can classify videos up to two minutes in length on a single GPU, is data efficient, and achieves SOTA performance on several long video understanding tasks.
summary: Pure vision transformer architectures are highly effective for short video classification and action recognition tasks. However, due to the quadratic complexity of self attention and lack of inductive bias, transformers are resource intensive and suffer from data inefficiencies. Long form video understanding tasks amplify data and memory efficiency problems in transformers making current approaches unfeasible to implement on data or memory restricted domains. This paper introduces an efficient Spatio-Temporal Attention Network (STAN) which uses a two-stream transformer architecture to model dependencies between static image features and temporal contextual features. Our proposed approach can classify videos up to two minutes in length on a single GPU, is data efficient, and achieves SOTA performance on several long video understanding tasks.
abstract_zh: 纯视觉转换器架构对于短视频分类和动作识别任务非常有效。然而，由于自注意力的二次复杂性和缺乏归纳偏差，变压器是资源密集型的并且遭受数据效率低下的困扰。长格式视频理解任务放大了 Transformer 中的数据和内存效率问题，使得当前的方法无法在数据或内存受限域上实现。本文介绍了一种高效的时空注意力网络（STAN），它使用双流变压器架构来对静态图像特征和时间上下文特征之间的依赖关系进行建模。我们提出的方法可以在单个 GPU 上对长达两分钟的视频进行分类，数据效率高，并且在多个长视频理解任务上实现了 SOTA 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双流Transformer架构STAN，用于高效处理长视频理解任务。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer在处理长视频时存在计算复杂度高、数据效率低的问题，难以在资源受限场景应用。
AI.method: 设计双流Transformer架构，分别建模静态图像特征与时间上下文特征的依赖关系，降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 实现单GPU处理2分钟长视频，数据效率高，在多个长视频任务中达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: STAN架构有效解决了长视频理解中的效率瓶颈，为资源受限场景提供了可行方案。

title: A Fast Text-Driven Approach for Generating Artistic Content
title_zh: 用于生成艺术内容的快速文本驱动方法
comment: 3 pages, 2 figures
comments: 3 pages, 2 figures
abstract: In this work, we propose a complete framework that generates visual art. Unlike previous stylization methods that are not flexible with style parameters (i.e., they allow stylization with only one style image, a single stylization text or stylization of a content image from a certain domain), our method has no such restriction. In addition, we implement an improved version that can generate a wide range of results with varying degrees of detail, style and structure, with a boost in generation speed. To further enhance the results, we insert an artistic super-resolution module in the generative pipeline. This module will bring additional details such as patterns specific to painters, slight brush marks, and so on.
summary: In this work, we propose a complete framework that generates visual art. Unlike previous stylization methods that are not flexible with style parameters (i.e., they allow stylization with only one style image, a single stylization text or stylization of a content image from a certain domain), our method has no such restriction. In addition, we implement an improved version that can generate a wide range of results with varying degrees of detail, style and structure, with a boost in generation speed. To further enhance the results, we insert an artistic super-resolution module in the generative pipeline. This module will bring additional details such as patterns specific to painters, slight brush marks, and so on.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一个生成视觉艺术的完整框架。与以前的样式化方法不灵活的样式参数（即，它们允许仅使用一个样式图像、单个样式化文本或来自某个域的内容图像的样式化）不同，我们的方法没有这样的限制。此外，我们还实现了一个改进的版本，可以生成具有不同程度的细节、风格和结构的各种结果，并提高生成速度。为了进一步增强结果，我们在生成管道中插入了艺术超分辨率模块。该模块将带来额外的细节，例如画家特有的图案、轻微的画笔痕迹等。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于文本驱动的快速生成艺术内容的框架，能够灵活控制风格参数并提升生成速度。
AI.motivation: 现有风格化方法在风格参数灵活性和生成细节多样性上存在局限，难以满足多领域艺术创作需求。
AI.method: 构建无风格参数限制的生成框架，引入改进模块实现多维度风格控制，并嵌入艺术超分辨率模块增强细节表现。
AI.result: 实现速度提升的多样化艺术生成，支持不同细节/结构/风格的输出，显著增强画布纹理与笔触等艺术特征。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持生成速度优势的同时，通过灵活参数控制和细节增强模块实现了更高质量的艺术化内容生成。

title: Cross-Modal Alignment Learning of Vision-Language Conceptual Systems
title_zh: 视觉语言概念系统的跨模态对齐学习
comment: 19 pages, 4 figures
comments: 19 pages, 4 figures
abstract: Human infants learn the names of objects and develop their own conceptual systems without explicit supervision. In this study, we propose methods for learning aligned vision-language conceptual systems inspired by infants' word learning mechanisms. The proposed model learns the associations of visual objects and words online and gradually constructs cross-modal relational graph networks. Additionally, we also propose an aligned cross-modal representation learning method that learns semantic representations of visual objects and words in a self-supervised manner based on the cross-modal relational graph networks. It allows entities of different modalities with conceptually the same meaning to have similar semantic representation vectors. We quantitatively and qualitatively evaluate our method, including object-to-word mapping and zero-shot learning tasks, showing that the proposed model significantly outperforms the baselines and that each conceptual system is topologically aligned.
summary: Human infants learn the names of objects and develop their own conceptual systems without explicit supervision. In this study, we propose methods for learning aligned vision-language conceptual systems inspired by infants' word learning mechanisms. The proposed model learns the associations of visual objects and words online and gradually constructs cross-modal relational graph networks. Additionally, we also propose an aligned cross-modal representation learning method that learns semantic representations of visual objects and words in a self-supervised manner based on the cross-modal relational graph networks. It allows entities of different modalities with conceptually the same meaning to have similar semantic representation vectors. We quantitatively and qualitatively evaluate our method, including object-to-word mapping and zero-shot learning tasks, showing that the proposed model significantly outperforms the baselines and that each conceptual system is topologically aligned.
abstract_zh: 人类婴儿在没有明确监督的情况下学习物体的名称并发展自己的概念系统。在这项研究中，我们提出了受婴儿单词学习机制启发的学习一致视觉语言概念系统的方法。该模型在线学习视觉对象和单词的关联，并逐步构建跨模态关系图网络。此外，我们还提出了一种对齐的跨模态表示学习方法，该方法基于跨模态关系图网络以自监督的方式学习视觉对象和单词的语义表示。它允许概念上具有相同含义的不同模态的实体具有相似的语义表示向量。我们定量和定性地评估我们的方法，包括对象到单词的映射和零样本学习任务，表明所提出的模型显着优于基线，并且每个概念系统在拓扑上都是对齐的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种受婴儿学习机制启发的方法，通过构建跨模态关系图网络，实现视觉与语言概念系统的对齐学习。
AI.motivation: 人类婴儿能在无监督环境下学习物体名称并建立概念系统，受此启发，旨在开发无需显式监督的视觉语言概念对齐方法。
AI.method: 模型在线学习视觉对象与词语关联，构建跨模态关系图网络，并基于该网络通过自监督学习生成语义表示，使跨模态语义相同实体具有相似向量表示。
AI.result: 在物体到词语映射和零样本学习任务中，模型显著优于基线方法，且概念系统呈现拓扑对齐特性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了跨模态对齐学习的有效性，为构建自监督的视觉语言系统提供了可行方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种受婴儿学习机制启发的方法，通过构建跨模态关系图网络，实现视觉与语言概念系统的对齐学习。
ai_content.motivation: 人类婴儿能在无监督环境下学习物体名称并建立概念系统，受此启发，旨在开发无需显式监督的视觉语言概念对齐方法。
ai_content.method: 模型在线学习视觉对象与词语关联，构建跨模态关系图网络，并基于该网络通过自监督学习生成语义表示，使跨模态语义相同实体具有相似向量表示。
ai_content.result: 在物体到词语映射和零样本学习任务中，模型显著优于基线方法，且概念系统呈现拓扑对齐特性。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法验证了跨模态对齐学习的有效性，为构建自监督的视觉语言系统提供了可行方案。

search_text: Cross-Modal Alignment Learning of Vision-Language Conceptual Systems 视觉语言概念系统的跨模态对齐学习 Human infants learn the names of objects and develop their own conceptual systems without explicit supervision. In this study, we propose methods for learning aligned vision-language conceptual systems inspired by infants' word learning mechanisms. The proposed model learns the associations of visual objects and words online and gradually constructs cross-modal relational graph networks. Additionally, we also propose an aligned cross-modal representation learning method that learns semantic representations of visual objects and words in a self-supervised manner based on the cross-modal relational graph networks. It allows entities of different modalities with conceptually the same meaning to have similar semantic representation vectors. We quantitatively and qualitatively evaluate our method, including object-to-word mapping and zero-shot learning tasks, showing that the proposed model significantly outperforms the baselines and that each conceptual system is topologically aligned. 人类婴儿在没有明确监督的情况下学习物体的名称并发展自己的概念系统。在这项研究中，我们提出了受婴儿单词学习机制启发的学习一致视觉语言概念系统的方法。该模型在线学习视觉对象和单词的关联，并逐步构建跨模态关系图网络。此外，我们还提出了一种对齐的跨模态表示学习方法，该方法基于跨模态关系图网络以自监督的方式学习视觉对象和单词的语义表示。它允许概念上具有相同含义的不同模态的实体具有相似的语义表示向量。我们定量和定性地评估我们的方法，包括对象到单词的映射和零样本学习任务，表明所提出的模型显着优于基线，并且每个概念系统在拓扑上都是对齐的。 本文提出一种受婴儿学习机制启发的方法，通过构建跨模态关系图网络，实现视觉与语言概念系统的对齐学习。 Taehyeong Kim,Hyeonseop Song,Byoung-Tak Zhang cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Ralvi Isufaj,Marsel Omeri,Miquel Angel Piera,Jaume Saez Valls,Christian Eduardo Verdonk Gallego
title: From Single Aircraft to Communities: A Neutral Interpretation of Air Traffic Complexity Dynamics
title_zh: 从单架飞机到社区：空中交通复杂性动态的中立解释
comment: 21 pages, 30 figures, 2 tables, submitted to Research Transportation Part C
comments: 21 pages, 30 figures, 2 tables, submitted to Research Transportation Part C
abstract: Present air traffic complexity metrics are defined considering the interests of different management layers of ATM. These layers have different objectives which in practice compete to maximize their own goals, which leads to fragmented decision making. This fragmentation together with competing KPAs requires transparent and neutral air traffic information to pave the way for an explainable set of actions. In this paper, we introduce the concept of single aircraft complexity, to determine the contribution of each aircraft to the overall complexity of air traffic. Furthermore, we describe a methodology extending this concept to define complex communities, which are groups of interdependent aircraft that contribute the majority of the complexity in a certain airspace. In order to showcase the methodology, a tool that visualizes different outputs of the algorithm is developed. Through use-cases based on synthetic and real historical traffic, we first show that the algorithm can serve to formalize controller decisions as well as guide controllers to better decisions. Further, we investigate how the provided information can be used to increase transparency of the decision makers towards different airspace users, which serves also to increase fairness and equity. Lastly, a sensitivity analysis is conducted in order to systematically analyse how each input affects the methodology.
summary: Present air traffic complexity metrics are defined considering the interests of different management layers of ATM. These layers have different objectives which in practice compete to maximize their own goals, which leads to fragmented decision making. This fragmentation together with competing KPAs requires transparent and neutral air traffic information to pave the way for an explainable set of actions. In this paper, we introduce the concept of single aircraft complexity, to determine the contribution of each aircraft to the overall complexity of air traffic. Furthermore, we describe a methodology extending this concept to define complex communities, which are groups of interdependent aircraft that contribute the majority of the complexity in a certain airspace. In order to showcase the methodology, a tool that visualizes different outputs of the algorithm is developed. Through use-cases based on synthetic and real historical traffic, we first show that the algorithm can serve to formalize controller decisions as well as guide controllers to better decisions. Further, we investigate how the provided information can be used to increase transparency of the decision makers towards different airspace users, which serves also to increase fairness and equity. Lastly, a sensitivity analysis is conducted in order to systematically analyse how each input affects the methodology.
abstract_zh: 目前的空中交通复杂性指标的定义考虑了 ATM 不同管理层的利益。这些层有不同的目标，在实践中它们相互竞争以最大化自己的目标，从而导致决策分散。这种碎片化以及相互竞争的 KPA 需要透明和中立的空中交通信息，以便为一系列可解释的行动铺平道路。在本文中，我们引入了单架飞机复杂性的概念，以确定每架飞机对空中交通整体复杂性的贡献。此外，我们描述了一种扩展此概念的方法来定义复杂的社区，这些社区是相互依赖的飞机组，它们在特定空域中贡献了大部分的复杂性。为了展示该方法，开发了一种可视化算法不同输出的工具。通过基于合成和真实历史流量的用例，我们首先表明该算法可以使控制器决策形式化并指导控制器做出更好的决策。此外，我们研究了如何使用所提供的信息来提高决策者对不同空域用户的透明度，这也有助于提高公平性和公平性。最后，进行敏感性分析，以便系统地分析每个输入如何影响方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从单架飞机到航空器群体的中立空中交通复杂性分析方法，旨在解决现有复杂性指标因管理层次目标冲突导致的决策碎片化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有空中交通复杂性指标因考虑不同管理层级的差异化目标，导致决策碎片化与公平性不足，需建立透明中立的信息框架以提升决策可解释性与公平性。
AI.method: 引入单机复杂性概念量化个体贡献，扩展至复杂社区识别方法，开发可视化工具并基于合成与真实历史流量数据验证，结合敏感性分析评估输入参数影响。
AI.result: 算法可形式化管制员决策并引导优化选择，提升决策透明度与用户公平性；敏感性分析揭示了输入参数对复杂性评估的系统性影响。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分解复杂性来源并可视化群体交互关系，为提升空中交通管理透明度与公平性提供理论支持，未来可拓展至动态资源分配等场景。

title: V-Coder: Adaptive AutoEncoder for Semantic Disclosure in Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: V-Coder：用于知识图中语义披露的自适应自动编码器
abstract: Semantic Web or Knowledge Graphs (KG) emerged to one of the most important information source for intelligent systems requiring access to structured knowledge. One of the major challenges is the extraction and processing of unambiguous information from textual data. Following the human perception, overlapping semantic linkages between two named entities become clear due to our common-sense about the context a relationship lives in which is not the case when we look at it from an automatically driven process of a machine. In this work, we are interested in the problem of Relational Resolution within the scope of KGs, i.e, we are investigating the inherent semantic of relationships between entities within a network. We propose a new adaptive AutoEncoder, called V-Coder, to identify relations inherently connecting entities from different domains. Those relations can be considered as being ambiguous and are candidates for disentanglement. Likewise to the Adaptive Learning Theory (ART), our model learns new patterns from the KG by increasing units in a competitive layer without discarding the previous observed patterns whilst learning the quality of each relation separately. The evaluation on real-world datasets of Freebase, Yago and NELL shows that the V-Coder is not only able to recover links from corrupted input data, but also shows that the semantic disclosure of relations in a KG show the tendency to improve link prediction. A semantic evaluation wraps the evaluation up.
summary: Semantic Web or Knowledge Graphs (KG) emerged to one of the most important information source for intelligent systems requiring access to structured knowledge. One of the major challenges is the extraction and processing of unambiguous information from textual data. Following the human perception, overlapping semantic linkages between two named entities become clear due to our common-sense about the context a relationship lives in which is not the case when we look at it from an automatically driven process of a machine. In this work, we are interested in the problem of Relational Resolution within the scope of KGs, i.e, we are investigating the inherent semantic of relationships between entities within a network. We propose a new adaptive AutoEncoder, called V-Coder, to identify relations inherently connecting entities from different domains. Those relations can be considered as being ambiguous and are candidates for disentanglement. Likewise to the Adaptive Learning Theory (ART), our model learns new patterns from the KG by increasing units in a competitive layer without discarding the previous observed patterns whilst learning the quality of each relation separately. The evaluation on real-world datasets of Freebase, Yago and NELL shows that the V-Coder is not only able to recover links from corrupted input data, but also shows that the semantic disclosure of relations in a KG show the tendency to improve link prediction. A semantic evaluation wraps the evaluation up.
abstract_zh: 语义网或知识图（KG）已成为需要访问结构化知识的智能系统最重要的信息源之一。主要挑战之一是从文本数据中提取和处理明确的信息。根据人类的感知，两个命名实体之间重叠的语义联系变得清晰，因为我们对关系所处的上下文有常识，但当我们从机器的自动驱动过程中查看它时，情况并非如此。在这项工作中，我们对知识图谱范围内的关系解析问题感兴趣，即我们正在研究网络内实体之间关系的固有语义。我们提出了一种新的自适应自动编码器，称为 V-Coder，来识别来自不同域的实体之间固有的连接关系。这些关系可以被认为是模棱两可的，是需要解开的。与自适应学习理论（ART）类似，我们的模型通过增加竞争层中的单元来从 KG 学习新模式，而不丢弃以前观察到的模式，同时单独学习每个关系的质量。对 Freebase、Yago 和 NELL 的真实数据集的评估表明，V-Coder 不仅能够从损坏的输入数据中恢复链接，而且还表明 KG 中关系的语义公开显示出改进链接预测的趋势。语义评估将评估包裹起来。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应自动编码器V-Coder，用于知识图谱中实体间语义关系的解析与去纠缠。
AI.motivation: 知识图谱中实体关系存在语义模糊性，传统方法难以像人类一样基于上下文常识理解关系的内在语义，需开发新方法解决关系解析问题。
AI.method: 设计基于自适应学习理论（ART）的V-Coder模型，通过竞争层动态增加单元学习新模式，在保留历史数据的同时独立评估每种关系质量。
AI.result: 在Freebase、Yago和NELL数据集上验证，V-Coder能有效恢复损坏数据中的链接，并通过语义解析提升知识图谱的链接预测性能。
AI.conclusion: V-Coder通过自适应学习机制成功揭示知识图谱中跨域实体的潜在语义关系，为关系解析和链接预测提供了新方法。

tldr: 本文提出一种自适应自动编码器V-Coder，用于知识图谱中实体间语义关系的解析与去纠缠。
motivation: 知识图谱中实体关系存在语义模糊性，传统方法难以像人类一样基于上下文常识理解关系的内在语义，需开发新方法解决关系解析问题。
method: 设计基于自适应学习理论（ART）的V-Coder模型，通过竞争层动态增加单元学习新模式，在保留历史数据的同时独立评估每种关系质量。
result: 在Freebase、Yago和NELL数据集上验证，V-Coder能有效恢复损坏数据中的链接，并通过语义解析提升知识图谱的链接预测性能。
conclusion: V-Coder通过自适应学习机制成功揭示知识图谱中跨域实体的潜在语义关系，为关系解析和链接预测提供了新方法。
search_text: V-Coder: Adaptive AutoEncoder for Semantic Disclosure in Knowledge Graphs V-Coder：用于知识图中语义披露的自适应自动编码器 Semantic Web or Knowledge Graphs (KG) emerged to one of the most important information source for intelligent systems requiring access to structured knowledge. One of the major challenges is the extraction and processing of unambiguous information from textual data. Following the human perception, overlapping semantic linkages between two named entities become clear due to our common-sense about the context a relationship lives in which is not the case when we look at it from an automatically driven process of a machine. In this work, we are interested in the problem of Relational Resolution within the scope of KGs, i.e, we are investigating the inherent semantic of relationships between entities within a network. We propose a new adaptive AutoEncoder, called V-Coder, to identify relations inherently connecting entities from different domains. Those relations can be considered as being ambiguous and are candidates for disentanglement. Likewise to the Adaptive Learning Theory (ART), our model learns new patterns from the KG by increasing units in a competitive layer without discarding the previous observed patterns whilst learning the quality of each relation separately. The evaluation on real-world datasets of Freebase, Yago and NELL shows that the V-Coder is not only able to recover links from corrupted input data, but also shows that the semantic disclosure of relations in a KG show the tendency to improve link prediction. A semantic evaluation wraps the evaluation up. 语义网或知识图（KG）已成为需要访问结构化知识的智能系统最重要的信息源之一。主要挑战之一是从文本数据中提取和处理明确的信息。根据人类的感知，两个命名实体之间重叠的语义联系变得清晰，因为我们对关系所处的上下文有常识，但当我们从机器的自动驱动过程中查看它时，情况并非如此。在这项工作中，我们对知识图谱范围内的关系解析问题感兴趣，即我们正在研究网络内实体之间关系的固有语义。我们提出了一种新的自适应自动编码器，称为 V-Coder，来识别来自不同域的实体之间固有的连接关系。这些关系可以被认为是模棱两可的，是需要解开的。与自适应学习理论（ART）类似，我们的模型通过增加竞争层中的单元来从 KG 学习新模式，而不丢弃以前观察到的模式，同时单独学习每个关系的质量。对 Freebase、Yago 和 NELL 的真实数据集的评估表明，V-Coder 不仅能够从损坏的输入数据中恢复链接，而且还表明 KG 中关系的语义公开显示出改进链接预测的趋势。语义评估将评估包裹起来。 本文提出一种自适应自动编码器V-Coder，用于知识图谱中实体间语义关系的解析与去纠缠。 Christian M. M. Frey,Matthias Schubert cs.AI,cs.LG

title: An Algorithm for Ennola's Second Theorem and Counting Smooth Numbers in Practice
title_zh: 恩诺拉第二定理的算法及光滑数计数的实践
abstract: Let $Ψ(x,y)$ count the number of positive integers $n\le x$ such that every prime divisor of $n$ is at most $y$. Given inputs $x$ and $y$, what is the best way to estimate $Ψ(x,y)$? We address this problem in three ways: with a new algorithm to estimate $Ψ(x,y)$, with a performance improvement to an established algorithm, and with empirically based advice on how to choose an algorithm to estimate $Ψ$ for the given inputs. Our new algorithm to estimate $Ψ(x,y)$ is based on Ennola's second theorem [Ennola69], which applies when $y< (\log x)^{3/4-ε}$ for $ε>0$. It takes $O(y^2/\log y)$ arithmetic operations of precomputation and $O(y\log y)$ operations per evaluation of $Ψ$. We show how to speed up Algorithm HT, which is based on the saddle-point method of Hildebrand and Tenenbaum [1986], by a factor proportional to $\log\log x$, by applying Newton's method in a new way. And finally we give our empirical advice based on five algorithms to compute estimates for $Ψ(x,y)$.The challenge here is that the boundaries of the ranges of applicability, as given in theorems, often include unknown constants or small values of $ε>0$, for example, that cannot be programmed directly.
summary: Let $Ψ(x,y)$ count the number of positive integers $n\le x$ such that every prime divisor of $n$ is at most $y$. Given inputs $x$ and $y$, what is the best way to estimate $Ψ(x,y)$? We address this problem in three ways: with a new algorithm to estimate $Ψ(x,y)$, with a performance improvement to an established algorithm, and with empirically based advice on how to choose an algorithm to estimate $Ψ$ for the given inputs. Our new algorithm to estimate $Ψ(x,y)$ is based on Ennola's second theorem [Ennola69], which applies when $y< (\log x)^{3/4-ε}$ for $ε>0$. It takes $O(y^2/\log y)$ arithmetic operations of precomputation and $O(y\log y)$ operations per evaluation of $Ψ$. We show how to speed up Algorithm HT, which is based on the saddle-point method of Hildebrand and Tenenbaum [1986], by a factor proportional to $\log\log x$, by applying Newton's method in a new way. And finally we give our empirical advice based on five algorithms to compute estimates for $Ψ(x,y)$.The challenge here is that the boundaries of the ranges of applicability, as given in theorems, often include unknown constants or small values of $ε>0$, for example, that cannot be programmed directly.
abstract_zh: 让 $Ψ(x,y)$ 计算正整数 $n\le x$ 的数量，使得 $n$ 的每个素因数至多为 $y$。给定输入 $x$ 和 $y$，估计 $Ψ(x,y)$ 的最佳方法是什么？我们通过三种方式解决这个问题：使用新算法来估计 $Ψ(x,y)$，对现有算法进行性能改进，以及根据经验提出如何选择算法来估计给定输入的 $Ψ$ 的建议。我们估计$Ψ(x,y)$的新算法基于Ennola第二定理[Ennola69]，该定理适用于$y< (\log x)^{3/4-ε}$且$ε>0$。预计算需要 $O(y^2/\log y)$ 算术运算，每次评估 $Ψ$ 需要 $O(y\log y)$ 运算。我们展示了如何通过以新的方式应用牛顿法，以与 $\log\log x$ 成比例的因子来加速算法 HT，该算法基于 Hildebrand 和 Tenenbaum [1986] 的鞍点方法。最后，我们根据五种算法给出经验建议，以计算 $Ψ(x,y)$ 的估计值。这里的挑战是，如定理中给出的适用范围的边界，通常包括未知常数或 $ε>0$ 的小值，例如，无法直接编程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Ennola第二定理的新算法，用于高效估计光滑数的数量，并改进了现有算法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在估计Ψ(x,y)时存在适用范围限制，如定理中的未知常数或小ε值，难以直接编程实现。
AI.method: 基于Ennola第二定理设计新算法，通过牛顿法优化HT算法，结合五种算法的实证分析提供选择建议。
AI.result: 新算法预处理时间复杂度为O(y²/log y)，单次评估为O(y log y)；HT算法加速比例与log log x成正比。
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法和优化方法在实际计算中提供了更高效的Ψ(x,y)估计方案，解决了理论边界难以直接应用的问题。

title: A Tighter Analysis of Spectral Clustering, and Beyond
title_zh: 对谱聚类及其他方面进行更严格的分析
comment: A preliminary version of this work appeared at ICML 2022
comments: A preliminary version of this work appeared at ICML 2022
abstract: This work studies the classical spectral clustering algorithm which embeds the vertices of some graph $G=(V_G, E_G)$ into $\mathbb{R}^k$ using $k$ eigenvectors of some matrix of $G$, and applies $k$-means to partition $V_G$ into $k$ clusters. Our first result is a tighter analysis on the performance of spectral clustering, and explains why it works under some much weaker condition than the ones studied in the literature. For the second result, we show that, by applying fewer than $k$ eigenvectors to construct the embedding, spectral clustering is able to produce better output for many practical instances; this result is the first of its kind in spectral clustering. Besides its conceptual and theoretical significance, the practical impact of our work is demonstrated by the empirical analysis on both synthetic and real-world datasets, in which spectral clustering produces comparable or better results with fewer than $k$ eigenvectors.
summary: This work studies the classical spectral clustering algorithm which embeds the vertices of some graph $G=(V_G, E_G)$ into $\mathbb{R}^k$ using $k$ eigenvectors of some matrix of $G$, and applies $k$-means to partition $V_G$ into $k$ clusters. Our first result is a tighter analysis on the performance of spectral clustering, and explains why it works under some much weaker condition than the ones studied in the literature. For the second result, we show that, by applying fewer than $k$ eigenvectors to construct the embedding, spectral clustering is able to produce better output for many practical instances; this result is the first of its kind in spectral clustering. Besides its conceptual and theoretical significance, the practical impact of our work is demonstrated by the empirical analysis on both synthetic and real-world datasets, in which spectral clustering produces comparable or better results with fewer than $k$ eigenvectors.
abstract_zh: 这项工作研究了经典的谱聚类算法，该算法使用 $G$ 矩阵的 $k$ 特征向量将某些图 $G=(V_G, E_G)$ 的顶点嵌入到 $\mathbb{R}^k$ 中，并应用 $k$-means 将 $V_G$ 划分为 $k$ 个簇。我们的第一个结果是对谱聚类性能的更严格分析，并解释了为什么它在比文献中研究的条件弱得多的条件下工作。对于第二个结果，我们表明，通过应用少于 $k$ 特征向量来构造嵌入，谱聚类能够为许多实际实例产生更好的输出；这一结果在谱聚类领域尚属首次。除了其概念和理论意义之外，我们工作的实际影响还通过对合成数据集和现实数据集的实证分析得到证明，其中谱聚类用少于 $k$ 特征向量产生可比或更好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文对谱聚类算法进行了更紧密的理论分析，并提出使用少于k个特征向量的改进方法以提升实际效果。
AI.motivation: 现有谱聚类理论分析依赖较强条件，且实际应用中可能无需全部k个特征向量，需探索更宽松条件和更高效方法。
AI.method: 通过理论分析证明谱聚类在更弱条件下的有效性，并设计使用少于k个特征向量的嵌入方法，结合实证验证效果。
AI.result: 理论分析显示谱聚类在更弱条件下有效；实验证明使用更少特征向量时，谱聚类在合成和真实数据集上表现相当或更优。
AI.conclusion: 本文在理论和实践层面改进了谱聚类，证明其在更广泛条件下的有效性，并为实际应用提供了更高效的实现方式。

title: Smart Visual Beacons with Asynchronous Optical Communications using Event Cameras
title_zh: 使用事件摄像机进行异步光通信的智能视觉信标
comment: 7 pages, 8 figures, accepted by IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022
comments: 7 pages, 8 figures, accepted by IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022
abstract: Event cameras are bio-inspired dynamic vision sensors that respond to changes in image intensity with a high temporal resolution, high dynamic range and low latency. These sensor characteristics are ideally suited to enable visual target tracking in concert with a broadcast visual communication channel for smart visual beacons with applications in distributed robotics. Visual beacons can be constructed by high-frequency modulation of Light Emitting Diodes (LEDs) such as vehicle headlights, Internet of Things (IoT) LEDs, smart building lights, etc., that are already present in many real-world scenarios. The high temporal resolution characteristic of the event cameras allows them to capture visual signals at far higher data rates compared to classical frame-based cameras. In this paper, we propose a novel smart visual beacon architecture with both LED modulation and event camera demodulation algorithms. We quantitatively evaluate the relationship between LED transmission rate, communication distance and the message transmission accuracy for the smart visual beacon communication system that we prototyped. The proposed method achieves up to 4 kbps in an indoor environment and lossless transmission over a distance of 100 meters, at a transmission rate of 500 bps, in full sunlight, demonstrating the potential of the technology in an outdoor environment.
summary: Event cameras are bio-inspired dynamic vision sensors that respond to changes in image intensity with a high temporal resolution, high dynamic range and low latency. These sensor characteristics are ideally suited to enable visual target tracking in concert with a broadcast visual communication channel for smart visual beacons with applications in distributed robotics. Visual beacons can be constructed by high-frequency modulation of Light Emitting Diodes (LEDs) such as vehicle headlights, Internet of Things (IoT) LEDs, smart building lights, etc., that are already present in many real-world scenarios. The high temporal resolution characteristic of the event cameras allows them to capture visual signals at far higher data rates compared to classical frame-based cameras. In this paper, we propose a novel smart visual beacon architecture with both LED modulation and event camera demodulation algorithms. We quantitatively evaluate the relationship between LED transmission rate, communication distance and the message transmission accuracy for the smart visual beacon communication system that we prototyped. The proposed method achieves up to 4 kbps in an indoor environment and lossless transmission over a distance of 100 meters, at a transmission rate of 500 bps, in full sunlight, demonstrating the potential of the technology in an outdoor environment.
abstract_zh: 事件相机是仿生动态视觉传感器，能够以高时间分辨率、高动态范围和低延迟响应图像强度的变化。这些传感器特性非常适合与分布式机器人应用中的智能视觉信标的广播视觉通信通道配合实现视觉目标跟踪。视觉信标可以通过发光二极管 (LED) 的高频调制来构建，例如汽车前灯、物联网 (IoT) LED、智能建筑灯等，这些已经存在于许多现实场景中。与传统的基于帧的相机相比，事件相机的高时间分辨率特性使它们能够以更高的数据速率捕获视觉信号。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的智能视觉信标架构，具有 LED 调制和事件相机解调算法。我们对我们原型设计的智能视觉信标通信系统的 LED 传输速率、通信距离和消息传输精度之间的关系进行了定量评估。该方法在室内环境中实现了高达 4 kbps 的传输速率，并在阳光充足的情况下以 500 bps 的传输速率在 100 米的距离内实现了无损传输，展示了该技术在室外环境中的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于事件相机的智能视觉信标架构，通过LED调制和事件相机解调算法实现异步光学通信。
AI.motivation: 传统基于帧的相机在动态视觉任务中存在延迟和动态范围限制，而事件相机具有高时间分辨率和低延迟特性，适合用于分布式机器人等场景的视觉信标通信。
AI.method: 利用高频率LED调制构建视觉信标，结合事件相机的异步特性设计解调算法，并通过实验量化分析LED传输速率、通信距离与消息准确率的关系。
AI.result: 室内环境实现最高4 kbps传输速率，晴天户外100米距离下500 bps速率实现无损传输，验证了技术在户外场景的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 事件相机与LED调制结合的视觉信标系统在通信速率和距离上表现优异，为物联网、智能建筑等实际场景提供了新型光学通信方案。

authors_text: Vinay Ummadi,Aravind Gundlapalle,Althaf Shaik,Shaik Mohammad Rafi B
title: Autonomous Agriculture Robot for Smart Farming
title_zh: 智能农业自主农业机器人
comment: Due to author interest conflicts
comments: Due to author interest conflicts
abstract: This project aims to develop and demonstrate a ground robot with intelligence capable of conducting semi-autonomous farm operations for different low-heights vegetable crops referred as Agriculture Application Robot(AAR). AAR is a lightweight, solar-electric powered robot that uses intelligent perception for conducting detection and classification of plants and their characteristics. The system also has a robotic arm for the autonomous weed cutting process. The robot can deliver fertilizer spraying, insecticide, herbicide, and other fluids to the targets such as crops, weeds, and other pests. Besides, it provides information for future research into higher-level tasks such as yield estimation, crop, and soil health monitoring. We present the design of robot and the associated experiments which show the promising results in real world environments.
summary: This project aims to develop and demonstrate a ground robot with intelligence capable of conducting semi-autonomous farm operations for different low-heights vegetable crops referred as Agriculture Application Robot(AAR). AAR is a lightweight, solar-electric powered robot that uses intelligent perception for conducting detection and classification of plants and their characteristics. The system also has a robotic arm for the autonomous weed cutting process. The robot can deliver fertilizer spraying, insecticide, herbicide, and other fluids to the targets such as crops, weeds, and other pests. Besides, it provides information for future research into higher-level tasks such as yield estimation, crop, and soil health monitoring. We present the design of robot and the associated experiments which show the promising results in real world environments.
abstract_zh: 该项目旨在开发和演示一种具有智能的地面机器人，能够对不同的低高度蔬菜作物进行半自主农场作业，称为农业应用机器人（AAR）。 AAR 是一款轻型太阳能电动机器人，利用智能感知对植物及其特征进行检测和分类。该系统还有一个机械臂，用于自主除草过程。该机器人可以向农作物、杂草和其他害虫等目标输送肥料喷洒、杀虫剂、除草剂和其他液体。此外，它还为未来研究更高级别的任务（如产量估算、作物和土壤健康监测）提供信息。我们介绍了机器人的设计和相关实验，这些实验在现实世界环境中显示了有希望的结果。

AI.tldr: 开发一种轻型太阳能供电的农业应用机器人（AAR），用于执行半自主的农场作业，如植物检测、除草、施肥和病虫害防治。
AI.motivation: 通过自动化技术提高农业生产效率，减少人工成本，并实现精准农业管理，以应对现代农业对智能化和可持续发展的需求。
AI.method: 设计集成智能感知系统、机械臂和多任务执行模块的机器人，结合太阳能供电与植物分类算法，实现目标检测、除草及液体喷洒等功能。
AI.result: 实验表明，该机器人在真实农田环境中能够有效完成植物识别、除草和农药喷洒任务，验证了其在实际应用中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该机器人展示了智能农业设备的潜力，为未来作物产量预测、土壤健康监测等高级农业任务研究提供了技术基础。

authors_text: Sai Sree Laya Chukkapalli,Anupam Joshi,Tim Finin,Robert F. Erbacher
title: CAPD: A Context-Aware, Policy-Driven Framework for Secure and Resilient IoBT Operations
title_zh: CAPD：用于安全和弹性 IoBT 操作的上下文感知、策略驱动框架
abstract: The Internet of Battlefield Things (IoBT) will advance the operational effectiveness of infantry units. However, this requires autonomous assets such as sensors, drones, combat equipment, and uncrewed vehicles to collaborate, securely share information, and be resilient to adversary attacks in contested multi-domain operations. CAPD addresses this problem by providing a context-aware, policy-driven framework supporting data and knowledge exchange among autonomous entities in a battlespace. We propose an IoBT ontology that facilitates controlled information sharing to enable semantic interoperability between systems. Its key contributions include providing a knowledge graph with a shared semantic schema, integration with background knowledge, efficient mechanisms for enforcing data consistency and drawing inferences, and supporting attribute-based access control. The sensors in the IoBT provide data that create populated knowledge graphs based on the ontology. This paper describes using CAPD to detect and mitigate adversary actions. CAPD enables situational awareness using reasoning over the sensed data and SPARQL queries. For example, adversaries can cause sensor failure or hijacking and disrupt the tactical networks to degrade video surveillance. In such instances, CAPD uses an ontology-based reasoner to see how alternative approaches can still support the mission. Depending on bandwidth availability, the reasoner initiates the creation of a reduced frame rate grayscale video by active transcoding or transmits only still images. This ability to reason over the mission sensed environment and attack context permits the autonomous IoBT system to exhibit resilience in contested conditions.
summary: The Internet of Battlefield Things (IoBT) will advance the operational effectiveness of infantry units. However, this requires autonomous assets such as sensors, drones, combat equipment, and uncrewed vehicles to collaborate, securely share information, and be resilient to adversary attacks in contested multi-domain operations. CAPD addresses this problem by providing a context-aware, policy-driven framework supporting data and knowledge exchange among autonomous entities in a battlespace. We propose an IoBT ontology that facilitates controlled information sharing to enable semantic interoperability between systems. Its key contributions include providing a knowledge graph with a shared semantic schema, integration with background knowledge, efficient mechanisms for enforcing data consistency and drawing inferences, and supporting attribute-based access control. The sensors in the IoBT provide data that create populated knowledge graphs based on the ontology. This paper describes using CAPD to detect and mitigate adversary actions. CAPD enables situational awareness using reasoning over the sensed data and SPARQL queries. For example, adversaries can cause sensor failure or hijacking and disrupt the tactical networks to degrade video surveillance. In such instances, CAPD uses an ontology-based reasoner to see how alternative approaches can still support the mission. Depending on bandwidth availability, the reasoner initiates the creation of a reduced frame rate grayscale video by active transcoding or transmits only still images. This ability to reason over the mission sensed environment and attack context permits the autonomous IoBT system to exhibit resilience in contested conditions.
abstract_zh: 战场物联网（IoBT）将提高步兵部队的作战效率。然而，这需要传感器、无人机、作战装备和无人驾驶车辆等自主资产进行协作、安全地共享信息，并在有争议的多域行动中抵御对手的攻击。 CAPD 通过提供上下文感知、策略驱动的框架来支持战场空间中自主实体之间的数据和知识交换，从而解决了这个问题。我们提出了一种 IoBT 本体，可以促进受控信息共享，从而实现系统之间的语义互操作性。其主要贡献包括提供具有共享语义模式的知识图、与背景知识的集成、强制数据一致性和推断的有效机制以及支持基于属性的访问控制。 IoBT 中的传感器提供的数据可根据本体创建填充知识图。本文介绍了使用 CAPD 来检测和减轻对手的行为。 CAPD 使用对感测数据的推理和 SPARQL 查询来实现态势感知。例如，对手可能会导致传感器故障或劫持，并破坏战术网络以降低视频监控性能。在这种情况下，CAPD 使用基于本体的推理器来了解替代方法如何仍然支持任务。根据带宽可用性，推理器通过主动转码启动降低帧速率的灰度视频的创建或仅传输静态图像。这种对任务感知环境和攻击上下文进行推理的能力使自主 IoBT 系统能够在竞争条件下表现出弹性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CAPD框架，通过上下文感知和策略驱动的方法，实现战场物联网（IoBT）的安全与弹性操作。
AI.motivation: 战场物联网需在多域对抗环境中实现自主设备的安全协作与信息共享，同时应对敌方攻击，传统方法难以满足语义互操作性和动态适应性需求。
AI.method: 构建IoBT本体论以支持语义互操作性，结合知识图谱、背景知识集成、数据一致性机制及基于属性的访问控制，并通过SPARQL查询与本体推理实现态势感知与攻击应对。
AI.result: CAPD能检测并缓解敌方攻击（如传感器劫持），通过本体推理动态调整视频传输策略（如降低帧率或传输静态图像），提升系统弹性。
AI.conclusion: CAPD框架通过语义驱动的自适应机制，有效增强了战场物联网在对抗环境中的安全性和任务韧性。

search_text: CAPD: A Context-Aware, Policy-Driven Framework for Secure and Resilient IoBT Operations CAPD：用于安全和弹性 IoBT 操作的上下文感知、策略驱动框架 The Internet of Battlefield Things (IoBT) will advance the operational effectiveness of infantry units. However, this requires autonomous assets such as sensors, drones, combat equipment, and uncrewed vehicles to collaborate, securely share information, and be resilient to adversary attacks in contested multi-domain operations. CAPD addresses this problem by providing a context-aware, policy-driven framework supporting data and knowledge exchange among autonomous entities in a battlespace. We propose an IoBT ontology that facilitates controlled information sharing to enable semantic interoperability between systems. Its key contributions include providing a knowledge graph with a shared semantic schema, integration with background knowledge, efficient mechanisms for enforcing data consistency and drawing inferences, and supporting attribute-based access control. The sensors in the IoBT provide data that create populated knowledge graphs based on the ontology. This paper describes using CAPD to detect and mitigate adversary actions. CAPD enables situational awareness using reasoning over the sensed data and SPARQL queries. For example, adversaries can cause sensor failure or hijacking and disrupt the tactical networks to degrade video surveillance. In such instances, CAPD uses an ontology-based reasoner to see how alternative approaches can still support the mission. Depending on bandwidth availability, the reasoner initiates the creation of a reduced frame rate grayscale video by active transcoding or transmits only still images. This ability to reason over the mission sensed environment and attack context permits the autonomous IoBT system to exhibit resilience in contested conditions. 战场物联网（IoBT）将提高步兵部队的作战效率。然而，这需要传感器、无人机、作战装备和无人驾驶车辆等自主资产进行协作、安全地共享信息，并在有争议的多域行动中抵御对手的攻击。 CAPD 通过提供上下文感知、策略驱动的框架来支持战场空间中自主实体之间的数据和知识交换，从而解决了这个问题。我们提出了一种 IoBT 本体，可以促进受控信息共享，从而实现系统之间的语义互操作性。其主要贡献包括提供具有共享语义模式的知识图、与背景知识的集成、强制数据一致性和推断的有效机制以及支持基于属性的访问控制。 IoBT 中的传感器提供的数据可根据本体创建填充知识图。本文介绍了使用 CAPD 来检测和减轻对手的行为。 CAPD 使用对感测数据的推理和 SPARQL 查询来实现态势感知。例如，对手可能会导致传感器故障或劫持，并破坏战术网络以降低视频监控性能。在这种情况下，CAPD 使用基于本体的推理器来了解替代方法如何仍然支持任务。根据带宽可用性，推理器通过主动转码启动降低帧速率的灰度视频的创建或仅传输静态图像。这种对任务感知环境和攻击上下文进行推理的能力使自主 IoBT 系统能够在竞争条件下表现出弹性。 本文提出CAPD框架，通过上下文感知和策略驱动的方法，实现战场物联网（IoBT）的安全与弹性操作。 Sai Sree Laya Chukkapalli,Anupam Joshi,Tim Finin,Robert F. Erbacher cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.MA

authors_text: Sheila Seidel,Hoover Rueda-Chacon,Iris Cusini,Federica Villa,Franco Zappa,Christopher Yu,Vivek K Goyal
title: Non-Line-of-Sight Tracking and Mapping with an Active Corner Camera
title_zh: 使用主动角摄像头进行非视距跟踪和地图绘制
comment: ef:Nature Communications, vol. 14, article no. 3677, 21 Jun 2023
comments: ef:Nature Communications, vol. 14, article no. 3677, 21 Jun 2023
abstract: The ability to form non-line-of-sight (NLOS) images of changing scenes could be transformative in a variety of fields, including search and rescue, autonomous vehicle navigation, and reconnaissance. Most existing active NLOS methods illuminate the hidden scene using a pulsed laser directed at a relay surface and collect time-resolved measurements of returning light. The prevailing approaches include raster scanning of a rectangular grid on a vertical wall opposite the volume of interest to generate a collection of confocal measurements. These are inherently limited by the need for laser scanning. Methods that avoid laser scanning track the moving parts of the hidden scene as one or two point targets. In this work, based on more complete optical response modeling yet still without multiple illumination positions, we demonstrate accurate reconstructions of objects in motion and a 'map' of the stationary scenery behind them. The ability to count, localize, and characterize the sizes of hidden objects in motion, combined with mapping of the stationary hidden scene, could greatly improve indoor situational awareness in a variety of applications.
summary: The ability to form non-line-of-sight (NLOS) images of changing scenes could be transformative in a variety of fields, including search and rescue, autonomous vehicle navigation, and reconnaissance. Most existing active NLOS methods illuminate the hidden scene using a pulsed laser directed at a relay surface and collect time-resolved measurements of returning light. The prevailing approaches include raster scanning of a rectangular grid on a vertical wall opposite the volume of interest to generate a collection of confocal measurements. These are inherently limited by the need for laser scanning. Methods that avoid laser scanning track the moving parts of the hidden scene as one or two point targets. In this work, based on more complete optical response modeling yet still without multiple illumination positions, we demonstrate accurate reconstructions of objects in motion and a 'map' of the stationary scenery behind them. The ability to count, localize, and characterize the sizes of hidden objects in motion, combined with mapping of the stationary hidden scene, could greatly improve indoor situational awareness in a variety of applications.
abstract_zh: 形成不断变化的场景的非视距 (NLOS) 图像的能力可能会在多个领域带来变革，包括搜索和救援、自动车辆导航和侦察。大多数现有的主动非视距方法使用指向中继表面的脉冲激光照亮隐藏场景，并收集返回光的时间分辨测量结果。流行的方法包括对与感兴趣体积相对的垂直墙上的矩形网格进行光栅扫描，以生成共焦测量结果的集合。这些本质上受到激光扫描需求的限制。避免激光扫描的方法将隐藏场景的移动部分作为一个或两个点目标进行跟踪。在这项工作中，基于更完整的光学响应模型，但仍然没有多个照明位置，我们演示了运动中物体的精确重建以及它们背后的静止风景的“地图”。计算、定位和表征运动中隐藏物体的大小的能力，与静态隐藏场景的映射相结合，可以极大地改善各种应用中的室内态势感知。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需激光扫描的非视距（NLOS）跟踪与映射方法，利用主动角落相机对隐藏场景中的运动物体进行重建并绘制静态场景地图。
AI.motivation: 现有NLOS方法依赖激光扫描，存在效率低、灵活性差的问题，而跟踪移动目标和绘制隐藏静态场景的能力可显著提升室内环境感知，适用于搜救、自动驾驶等场景。
AI.method: 基于更完整的光学响应模型，通过主动角落相机采集时间分辨光信号，无需多位置照明即可重建运动物体并绘制隐藏静态场景。
AI.result: 成功实现了对运动物体的计数、定位和尺寸特征分析，并生成隐藏静态场景的地图，验证了方法在复杂环境中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法突破了传统激光扫描限制，为非视距感知提供了更高效的技术方案，可提升多种应用场景下的室内环境感知能力。

authors_text: Casey Hanks,Michael Maiden,Priyanka Ranade,Tim Finin,Anupam Joshi
title: Recognizing and Extracting Cybersecurtity-relevant Entities from Text
title_zh: 从文本中识别和提取网络安全相关实体
comment: ef:Workshop on Machine Learning for Cybersecurity, 2022 International Conference on Machine Learning
comments: ef:Workshop on Machine Learning for Cybersecurity, 2022 International Conference on Machine Learning
abstract: Cyber Threat Intelligence (CTI) is information describing threat vectors, vulnerabilities, and attacks and is often used as training data for AI-based cyber defense systems such as Cybersecurity Knowledge Graphs (CKG). There is a strong need to develop community-accessible datasets to train existing AI-based cybersecurity pipelines to efficiently and accurately extract meaningful insights from CTI. We have created an initial unstructured CTI corpus from a variety of open sources that we are using to train and test cybersecurity entity models using the spaCy framework and exploring self-learning methods to automatically recognize cybersecurity entities. We also describe methods to apply cybersecurity domain entity linking with existing world knowledge from Wikidata. Our future work will survey and test spaCy NLP tools and create methods for continuous integration of new information extracted from text.
summary: Cyber Threat Intelligence (CTI) is information describing threat vectors, vulnerabilities, and attacks and is often used as training data for AI-based cyber defense systems such as Cybersecurity Knowledge Graphs (CKG). There is a strong need to develop community-accessible datasets to train existing AI-based cybersecurity pipelines to efficiently and accurately extract meaningful insights from CTI. We have created an initial unstructured CTI corpus from a variety of open sources that we are using to train and test cybersecurity entity models using the spaCy framework and exploring self-learning methods to automatically recognize cybersecurity entities. We also describe methods to apply cybersecurity domain entity linking with existing world knowledge from Wikidata. Our future work will survey and test spaCy NLP tools and create methods for continuous integration of new information extracted from text.
abstract_zh: 网络威胁情报（CTI）是描述威胁向量、漏洞和攻击的信息，通常用作基于人工智能的网络防御系统（例如网络安全知识图谱（CKG））的训练数据。迫切需要开发社区可访问的数据集来训练现有的基于人工智能的网络安全管道，从而高效、准确地从 CTI 中提取有意义的见解。我们从各种开源资源中创建了一个初始的非结构化 CTI 语料库，用于使用 spaCy 框架来训练和测试网络安全实体模型，并探索自动识别网络安全实体的自学习方法。我们还描述了应用网络安全领域实体与维基数据中现有世界知识相链接的方法。我们未来的工作将调查和测试 spaCy NLP 工具，并创建持续集成从文本中提取的新信息的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在从文本中识别和提取与网络安全相关的实体，以提升AI驱动的网络安全系统的训练效果。
AI.motivation: 现有AI网络安全系统缺乏社区可访问的高质量训练数据，需构建结构化数据集以提高威胁情报处理的效率和准确性。
AI.method: 构建开放来源的非结构化CTI语料库，基于spaCy框架训练实体识别模型，并结合Wikidata实现领域实体链接，探索自学习方法优化模型。
AI.result: 已完成初始语料库构建，验证了spaCy框架与自学习方法在网络安全实体识别中的可行性，并初步实现与Wikidata的实体链接。
AI.conclusion: 当前工作为网络安全实体识别提供了基础方法和数据支持，未来将优化NLP工具并建立持续集成新信息的机制。

search_text: Recognizing and Extracting Cybersecurtity-relevant Entities from Text 从文本中识别和提取网络安全相关实体 Cyber Threat Intelligence (CTI) is information describing threat vectors, vulnerabilities, and attacks and is often used as training data for AI-based cyber defense systems such as Cybersecurity Knowledge Graphs (CKG). There is a strong need to develop community-accessible datasets to train existing AI-based cybersecurity pipelines to efficiently and accurately extract meaningful insights from CTI. We have created an initial unstructured CTI corpus from a variety of open sources that we are using to train and test cybersecurity entity models using the spaCy framework and exploring self-learning methods to automatically recognize cybersecurity entities. We also describe methods to apply cybersecurity domain entity linking with existing world knowledge from Wikidata. Our future work will survey and test spaCy NLP tools and create methods for continuous integration of new information extracted from text. 网络威胁情报（CTI）是描述威胁向量、漏洞和攻击的信息，通常用作基于人工智能的网络防御系统（例如网络安全知识图谱（CKG））的训练数据。迫切需要开发社区可访问的数据集来训练现有的基于人工智能的网络安全管道，从而高效、准确地从 CTI 中提取有意义的见解。我们从各种开源资源中创建了一个初始的非结构化 CTI 语料库，用于使用 spaCy 框架来训练和测试网络安全实体模型，并探索自动识别网络安全实体的自学习方法。我们还描述了应用网络安全领域实体与维基数据中现有世界知识相链接的方法。我们未来的工作将调查和测试 spaCy NLP 工具，并创建持续集成从文本中提取的新信息的方法。 本文旨在从文本中识别和提取与网络安全相关的实体，以提升AI驱动的网络安全系统的训练效果。 Casey Hanks,Michael Maiden,Priyanka Ranade,Tim Finin,Anupam Joshi cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Tian Xie,Ha-Kyung Kwon,Daniel Schweigert,Sheng Gong,Arthur France-Lanord,Arash Khajeh,Emily Crabb,Michael Puzon,Chris Fajardo,Will Powelson,Yang Shao-Horn,Jeffrey C. Grossman
title: A cloud platform for automating and sharing analysis of raw simulation data from high throughput polymer molecular dynamics simulations
title_zh: 用于对高通量聚合物分子动力学模拟的原始模拟数据进行自动化和共享分析的云平台
comment: 21 pages, 7 figures
comments: 21 pages, 7 figures
abstract: Open material databases storing hundreds of thousands of material structures and their corresponding properties have become the cornerstone of modern computational materials science. Yet, the raw outputs of the simulations, such as the trajectories from molecular dynamics simulations and charge densities from density functional theory calculations, are generally not shared due to their huge size. In this work, we describe a cloud-based platform to facilitate the sharing of raw data and enable the fast post-processing in the cloud to extract new properties defined by the user. As an initial demonstration, our database currently includes 6286 molecular dynamics trajectories for amorphous polymer electrolytes and 5.7 terabytes of data. We create a public analysis library at https://github.com/TRI-AMDD/htp_md to extract multiple properties from the raw data, using both expert designed functions and machine learning models. The analysis is run automatically with computation in the cloud, and results then populate a database that can be accessed publicly. Our platform encourages users to contribute both new trajectory data and analysis functions via public interfaces. Newly analyzed properties will be incorporated into the database. Finally, we create a front-end user interface at https://www.htpmd.matr.io for browsing and visualization of our data. We envision the platform to be a new way of sharing raw data and new insights for the computational materials science community.
summary: Open material databases storing hundreds of thousands of material structures and their corresponding properties have become the cornerstone of modern computational materials science. Yet, the raw outputs of the simulations, such as the trajectories from molecular dynamics simulations and charge densities from density functional theory calculations, are generally not shared due to their huge size. In this work, we describe a cloud-based platform to facilitate the sharing of raw data and enable the fast post-processing in the cloud to extract new properties defined by the user. As an initial demonstration, our database currently includes 6286 molecular dynamics trajectories for amorphous polymer electrolytes and 5.7 terabytes of data. We create a public analysis library at https://github.com/TRI-AMDD/htp_md to extract multiple properties from the raw data, using both expert designed functions and machine learning models. The analysis is run automatically with computation in the cloud, and results then populate a database that can be accessed publicly. Our platform encourages users to contribute both new trajectory data and analysis functions via public interfaces. Newly analyzed properties will be incorporated into the database. Finally, we create a front-end user interface at https://www.htpmd.matr.io for browsing and visualization of our data. We envision the platform to be a new way of sharing raw data and new insights for the computational materials science community.
abstract_zh: 存储数十万种材料结构及其相应属性的开放材料数据库已成为现代计算材料科学的基石。然而，模拟的原始输出，例如分子动力学模拟的轨迹和密度泛函理论计算的电荷密度，由于尺寸巨大，通常不会共享。在这项工作中，我们描述了一个基于云的平台，以促进原始数据的共享，并实现在云中的快速后处理以提取用户定义的新属性。作为初步演示，我们的数据库目前包含 6286 个非晶聚合物电解质的分子动力学轨迹和 5.7 TB 的数据。我们在 https://github.com/TRI-AMDD/htp_md 创建一个公共分析库，使用专家设计的函数和机器学习模型从原始数据中提取多个属性。分析通过云中的计算自动运行，然后将结果填充到可以公开访问的数据库中。我们的平台鼓励用户通过公共接口贡献新的轨迹数据和分析功能。新分析的属性将被合并到数据库中。最后，我们在 https://www.htpmd.matr.io 创建一个前端用户界面，用于浏览和可视化我们的数据。我们预计该平台将成为计算材料科学界共享原始数据和新见解的新方式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于云平台的解决方案，用于自动化处理和共享高通量聚合物分子动力学模拟的原始数据。
AI.motivation: 尽管开放材料数据库已普及，但分子动力学模拟等产生的海量原始数据因存储和共享困难而未被充分利用，阻碍了计算材料科学的发展。
AI.method: 构建云平台实现原始数据存储与自动化分析，结合专家设计算法和机器学习模型，通过GitHub提供分析库，并开发前端界面实现数据可视化。
AI.result: 平台已收录6286条聚合物电解质分子动力学轨迹（5.7TB数据），提供公开分析工具和可视化界面，支持用户贡献新数据与分析方法。
AI.conclusion: 该平台为计算材料科学社区提供了共享原始数据与挖掘新特性的有效途径，推动了数据驱动的研究范式。

authors_text: Alexander New,Michael J. Pekala,Nam Q. Le,Janna Domenico,Christine D. Piatko,Christopher D. Stiles
title: Curvature-informed multi-task learning for graph networks
title_zh: 图网络的曲率通知多任务学习
comment: Published at the ICML 2022 AI for Science workshop: https://openreview.net/forum?id=m5RYtApKFOg
comments: Published at the ICML 2022 AI for Science workshop: https://openreview.net/forum?id=m5RYtApKFOg
abstract: Properties of interest for crystals and molecules, such as band gap, elasticity, and solubility, are generally related to each other: they are governed by the same underlying laws of physics. However, when state-of-the-art graph neural networks attempt to predict multiple properties simultaneously (the multi-task learning (MTL) setting), they frequently underperform a suite of single property predictors. This suggests graph networks may not be fully leveraging these underlying similarities. Here we investigate a potential explanation for this phenomenon: the curvature of each property's loss surface significantly varies, leading to inefficient learning. This difference in curvature can be assessed by looking at spectral properties of the Hessians of each property's loss function, which is done in a matrix-free manner via randomized numerical linear algebra. We evaluate our hypothesis on two benchmark datasets (Materials Project (MP) and QM8) and consider how these findings can inform the training of novel multi-task learning models.
summary: Properties of interest for crystals and molecules, such as band gap, elasticity, and solubility, are generally related to each other: they are governed by the same underlying laws of physics. However, when state-of-the-art graph neural networks attempt to predict multiple properties simultaneously (the multi-task learning (MTL) setting), they frequently underperform a suite of single property predictors. This suggests graph networks may not be fully leveraging these underlying similarities. Here we investigate a potential explanation for this phenomenon: the curvature of each property's loss surface significantly varies, leading to inefficient learning. This difference in curvature can be assessed by looking at spectral properties of the Hessians of each property's loss function, which is done in a matrix-free manner via randomized numerical linear algebra. We evaluate our hypothesis on two benchmark datasets (Materials Project (MP) and QM8) and consider how these findings can inform the training of novel multi-task learning models.
abstract_zh: 晶体和分子的相关特性（例如带隙、弹性和溶解度）通常彼此相关：它们受相同的基本物理定律支配。然而，当最先进的图神经网络尝试同时预测多个属性（多任务学习（MTL）设置）时，它们经常表现不佳于一组单一属性预测器。这表明图网络可能没有充分利用这些潜在的相似性。在这里，我们研究了这种现象的潜在解释：每个属性的损失表面的曲率显着变化，导致学习效率低下。这种曲率差异可以通过查看每个属性损失函数的 Hessian 谱属性来评估，这是通过随机数值线性代数以无矩阵方式完成的。我们在两个基准数据集（Materials Project (MP) 和 QM8）上评估我们的假设，并考虑这些发现如何为新型多任务学习模型的训练提供信息。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过考虑损失曲率差异来改进图网络的多任务学习，解决现有方法在同时预测晶体和分子的多个相关属性时表现不佳的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有图神经网络在多任务学习中未能有效利用物理属性间的内在关联，导致预测性能低于单任务模型，可能因不同属性的损失曲率差异显著影响学习效率。
AI.method: 通过分析每个属性损失函数Hessian矩阵的谱性质，利用随机数值线性代数技术矩阵自由地评估损失曲率差异，并基于此设计改进的多任务学习框架。
AI.result: 在Materials Project和QM8数据集上验证了曲率差异对多任务学习的影响，并提出了基于曲率信息的训练策略，为新型多任务模型设计提供依据。
AI.conclusion: 损失曲率差异是多任务学习性能瓶颈的关键因素，通过显式建模曲率信息可提升图网络对物理属性相关性的利用效率。

This suggests graph networks may not be fully leveraging these underlying similarities. Here we investigate a potential explanation for this phenomenon: the curvature of each property's loss surface significantly varies, leading to inefficient learning. This difference in curvature can be assessed by looking at spectral properties of the Hessians of each property's loss function, which is done in a matrix-free manner via randomized numerical linear algebra. We evaluate our hypothesis on two benchmark datasets (Materials Project (MP) and QM8) and consider how these findings can inform the training of novel multi-task learning models. 晶体和分子的相关特性（例如带隙、弹性和溶解度）通常彼此相关：它们受相同的基本物理定律支配。然而，当最先进的图神经网络尝试同时预测多个属性（多任务学习（MTL）设置）时，它们经常表现不佳于一组单一属性预测器。这表明图网络可能没有充分利用这些潜在的相似性。在这里，我们研究了这种现象的潜在解释：每个属性的损失表面的曲率显着变化，导致学习效率低下。这种曲率差异可以通过查看每个属性损失函数的 Hessian 谱属性来评估，这是通过随机数值线性代数以无矩阵方式完成的。我们在两个基准数据集（Materials Project (MP) 和 QM8）上评估我们的假设，并考虑这些发现如何为新型多任务学习模型的训练提供信息。 本文研究如何通过考虑损失曲率差异来改进图网络的多任务学习，解决现有方法在同时预测晶体和分子的多个相关属性时表现不佳的问题。 Alexander New,Michael J. Pekala,Nam Q. Le,Janna Domenico,Christine D. Piatko,Christopher D. Stiles cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Jakub Grudzien Kuba,Xidong Feng,Shiyao Ding,Hao Dong,Jun Wang,Yaodong Yang
title: Heterogeneous-Agent Mirror Learning: A Continuum of Solutions to Cooperative MARL
title_zh: 异构代理镜像学习：协作 MARL 的连续解决方案
abstract: The necessity for cooperation among intelligent machines has popularised cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) in the artificial intelligence (AI) research community. However, many research endeavors have been focused on developing practical MARL algorithms whose effectiveness has been studied only empirically, thereby lacking theoretical guarantees. As recent studies have revealed, MARL methods often achieve performance that is unstable in terms of reward monotonicity or suboptimal at convergence. To resolve these issues, in this paper, we introduce a novel framework named Heterogeneous-Agent Mirror Learning (HAML) that provides a general template for MARL algorithmic designs. We prove that algorithms derived from the HAML template satisfy the desired properties of the monotonic improvement of the joint reward and the convergence to Nash equilibrium. We verify the practicality of HAML by proving that the current state-of-the-art cooperative MARL algorithms, HATRPO and HAPPO, are in fact HAML instances. Next, as a natural outcome of our theory, we propose HAML extensions of two well-known RL algorithms, HAA2C (for A2C) and HADDPG (for DDPG), and demonstrate their effectiveness against strong baselines on StarCraftII and Multi-Agent MuJoCo tasks.
summary: The necessity for cooperation among intelligent machines has popularised cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) in the artificial intelligence (AI) research community. However, many research endeavors have been focused on developing practical MARL algorithms whose effectiveness has been studied only empirically, thereby lacking theoretical guarantees. As recent studies have revealed, MARL methods often achieve performance that is unstable in terms of reward monotonicity or suboptimal at convergence. To resolve these issues, in this paper, we introduce a novel framework named Heterogeneous-Agent Mirror Learning (HAML) that provides a general template for MARL algorithmic designs. We prove that algorithms derived from the HAML template satisfy the desired properties of the monotonic improvement of the joint reward and the convergence to Nash equilibrium. We verify the practicality of HAML by proving that the current state-of-the-art cooperative MARL algorithms, HATRPO and HAPPO, are in fact HAML instances. Next, as a natural outcome of our theory, we propose HAML extensions of two well-known RL algorithms, HAA2C (for A2C) and HADDPG (for DDPG), and demonstrate their effectiveness against strong baselines on StarCraftII and Multi-Agent MuJoCo tasks.
abstract_zh: 智能机器之间合作的必要性使得协作多智能体强化学习（MARL）在人工智能（AI）研究界得到普及。然而，许多研究工作都集中在开发实用的 MARL 算法上，其有效性仅进行了实证研究，因此缺乏理论保证。正如最近的研究表明，MARL 方法通常会实现奖励单调性不稳定或收敛时次优的性能。为了解决这些问题，在本文中，我们引入了一种名为异构代理镜像学习（HAML）的新颖框架，它为 MARL 算法设计提供了通用模板。我们证明从 HAML 模板派生的算法满足联合奖励单调改进和收敛到纳什均衡的期望属性。我们通过证明当前最先进的协作 MARL 算法 HATRPO 和 HAPPO 实际上是 HAML 实例来验证 HAML 的实用性。接下来，作为我们理论的自然结果，我们提出了两种著名的 RL 算法 HAA2C（用于 A2C）和 HADDPG（用于 DDPG）的 HAML 扩展，并根据 StarCraftII 和 Multi-Agent MuJoCo 任务的强大基线证明了它们的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Heterogeneous-Agent Mirror Learning (HAML)的新框架，为合作型多智能体强化学习（MARL）提供理论保证并扩展现有算法。
AI.motivation: 现有合作型MARL算法缺乏理论保障，导致奖励单调性不稳定或收敛性次优，亟需具有理论支撑的通用框架。
AI.method: 通过构建HAML框架证明其满足联合奖励单调改进和纳什均衡收敛特性，并将HATRPO/HAPPO等算法归为HAML实例，进一步扩展A2C/DDPG为HAA2C/HADDPG。
AI.result: 理论证明HAML框架的有效性，实验显示HAA2C/HADDPG在StarCraftII和Multi-Agent MuJoCo任务中优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: HAML为合作型MARL提供了兼具理论保证与实践效果的通用解决方案，推动了该领域算法设计的系统化发展。

authors_text: Tuncay Yiğit,Nilgün Şengöz,Özlem Özmen,Jude Hemanth,Ali Hakan Işık
title: Diagnosis of Paratuberculosis in Histopathological Images Based on Explainable Artificial Intelligence and Deep Learning
title_zh: 基于可解释人工智能和深度学习的组织病理学图像中的副结核病诊断
comment: 7 pages
comments: 7 pages
abstract: Artificial intelligence holds great promise in medical imaging, especially histopathological imaging. However, artificial intelligence algorithms cannot fully explain the thought processes during decision-making. This situation has brought the problem of explainability, i.e., the black box problem, of artificial intelligence applications to the agenda: an algorithm simply responds without stating the reasons for the given images. To overcome the problem and improve the explainability, explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) has come to the fore, and piqued the interest of many researchers. Against this backdrop, this study examines a new and original dataset using the deep learning algorithm, and visualizes the output with gradient-weighted class activation mapping (Grad-CAM), one of the XAI applications. Afterwards, a detailed questionnaire survey was conducted with the pathologists on these images. Both the decision-making processes and the explanations were verified, and the accuracy of the output was tested. The research results greatly help pathologists in the diagnosis of paratuberculosis.

Afterwards, a detailed questionnaire survey was conducted with the pathologists on these images. Both the decision-making processes and the explanations were verified, and the accuracy of the output was tested. The research results greatly help pathologists in the diagnosis of paratuberculosis.
abstract_zh: 人工智能在医学成像，特别是组织病理学成像方面具有巨大的前景。然而，人工智能算法无法完全解释决策过程中的思维过程。这种情况将人工智能应用的可解释性问题，即黑匣子问题提上了议程：算法只是简单地做出响应，而不说明给定图像的原因。为了克服这个问题并提高可解释性，可解释人工智能（XAI）应运而生，并引起了许多研究人员的兴趣。在此背景下，本研究使用深度学习算法检查新的原始数据集，并使用 XAI 应用程序之一的梯度加权类激活映射 (Grad-CAM) 可视化输出。随后，病理学家对这些图像进行了详细的问卷调查。验证了决策过程和解释，并测试了输出的准确性。该研究结果对病理学家对副结核病的诊断有很大帮助。

AI.tldr: 本文基于可解释人工智能和深度学习技术，开发了一种用于组织病理学图像中结核病诊断的新方法。
AI.motivation: 人工智能在医学影像中的应用面临可解释性不足的问题，传统算法无法清晰解释诊断依据，阻碍了临床信任与应用。
AI.method: 采用深度学习算法处理新构建的数据集，结合Grad-CAM可视化技术解释模型决策，并通过病理学家问卷验证诊断逻辑。
AI.result: 模型诊断准确率得到验证，病理学家认可其解释性，显著提升了结核病的辅助诊断效率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过可解释AI技术有效解决了医学影像诊断中的黑箱问题，为病理诊断提供了可靠的技术支持。

title: Maximal Independent Vertex Set applied to Graph Pooling
title_zh: 最大独立顶点集应用于图池化
comment: ef:Structural and Syntactic Pattern Recognition (SSPR), Aug 2022, Montr{é}al, Canada
comments: ef:Structural and Syntactic Pattern Recognition (SSPR), Aug 2022, Montr{é}al, Canada
abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNN) have enabled major advances in image classification through convolution and pooling. In particular, image pooling transforms a connected discrete grid into a reduced grid with the same connectivity and allows reduction functions to take into account all the pixels of an image. However, a pooling satisfying such properties does not exist for graphs. Indeed, some methods are based on a vertex selection step which induces an important loss of information. Other methods learn a fuzzy clustering of vertex sets which induces almost complete reduced graphs. We propose to overcome both problems using a new pooling method, named MIVSPool. This method is based on a selection of vertices called surviving vertices using a Maximal Independent Vertex Set (MIVS) and an assignment of the remaining vertices to the survivors. Consequently, our method does not discard any vertex information nor artificially increase the density of the graph. Experimental results show an increase in accuracy for graph classification on various standard datasets.
summary: Convolutional neural networks (CNN) have enabled major advances in image classification through convolution and pooling. In particular, image pooling transforms a connected discrete grid into a reduced grid with the same connectivity and allows reduction functions to take into account all the pixels of an image. However, a pooling satisfying such properties does not exist for graphs. Indeed, some methods are based on a vertex selection step which induces an important loss of information. Other methods learn a fuzzy clustering of vertex sets which induces almost complete reduced graphs. We propose to overcome both problems using a new pooling method, named MIVSPool. This method is based on a selection of vertices called surviving vertices using a Maximal Independent Vertex Set (MIVS) and an assignment of the remaining vertices to the survivors. Consequently, our method does not discard any vertex information nor artificially increase the density of the graph. Experimental results show an increase in accuracy for graph classification on various standard datasets.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 通过卷积和池化在图像分类方面取得了重大进展。特别是，图像池化将连接的离散网格转换为具有相同连接性的简化网格，并允许简化函数考虑图像的所有像素。然而，图不存在满足这些属性的池化。事实上，一些方法基于顶点选择步骤，这会导致重要的信息丢失。其他方法学习顶点集的模糊聚类，从而产生几乎完整的简化图。我们建议使用一种名为 MIVSPool 的新池方法来克服这两个问题。该方法基于使用最大独立顶点集（MIVS）选择称为幸存顶点的顶点，并将剩余顶点分配给幸存者。因此，我们的方法不会丢弃任何顶点信息，也不会人为地增加图的密度。实验结果表明，各种标准数据集上的图分类准确性有所提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于最大独立顶点集（MIVS）的图池化方法MIVSPool，用于改进图分类任务中的信息保留与图密度控制问题。
AI.motivation: 现有图池化方法要么通过顶点选择导致信息丢失，要么通过模糊聚类生成高密度子图，无法同时保持信息完整性与图结构稀疏性。
AI.method: 通过选择最大独立顶点集作为存活顶点，并将剩余顶点分配至存活顶点，实现信息无损聚合且不增加图密度的池化操作。
AI.result: 在多个标准图分类数据集上实验表明，该方法较现有方法取得更高的分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: MIVSPool通过理论严谨的顶点选择策略，有效解决了图池化中的信息丢失与密度失衡问题，为图神经网络提供了更优的下采样方案。

search_text: Maximal Independent Vertex Set applied to Graph Pooling 最大独立顶点集应用于图池化 Convolutional neural networks (CNN) have enabled major advances in image classification through convolution and pooling. In particular, image pooling transforms a connected discrete grid into a reduced grid with the same connectivity and allows reduction functions to take into account all the pixels of an image. However, a pooling satisfying such properties does not exist for graphs. Indeed, some methods are based on a vertex selection step which induces an important loss of information. Other methods learn a fuzzy clustering of vertex sets which induces almost complete reduced graphs. We propose to overcome both problems using a new pooling method, named MIVSPool. This method is based on a selection of vertices called surviving vertices using a Maximal Independent Vertex Set (MIVS) and an assignment of the remaining vertices to the survivors. Consequently, our method does not discard any vertex information nor artificially increase the density of the graph. Experimental results show an increase in accuracy for graph classification on various standard datasets. 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 通过卷积和池化在图像分类方面取得了重大进展。特别是，图像池化将连接的离散网格转换为具有相同连接性的简化网格，并允许简化函数考虑图像的所有像素。然而，图不存在满足这些属性的池化。事实上，一些方法基于顶点选择步骤，这会导致重要的信息丢失。其他方法学习顶点集的模糊聚类，从而产生几乎完整的简化图。我们建议使用一种名为 MIVSPool 的新池方法来克服这两个问题。该方法基于使用最大独立顶点集（MIVS）选择称为幸存顶点的顶点，并将剩余顶点分配给幸存者。因此，我们的方法不会丢弃任何顶点信息，也不会人为地增加图的密度。实验结果表明，各种标准数据集上的图分类准确性有所提高。 本文提出一种基于最大独立顶点集（MIVS）的图池化方法MIVSPool，用于改进图分类任务中的信息保留与图密度控制问题。 Stevan Stanovic,Benoit Gaüzère,Luc Brun cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

title: AI-driven Hypergraph Network of Organic Chemistry: Network Statistics and Applications in Reaction Classification
title_zh: 人工智能驱动的有机化学超图网络：网络统计及其在反应分类中的应用
abstract: Rapid discovery of new reactions and molecules in recent years has been facilitated by the advancements in high throughput screening, accessibility to a much more complex chemical design space, and the development of accurate molecular modeling frameworks. A holistic study of the growing chemistry literature is, therefore, required that focuses on understanding the recent trends and extrapolating them into possible future trajectories. To this end, several network theory-based studies have been reported that use a directed graph representation of chemical reactions. Here, we perform a study based on representing chemical reactions as hypergraphs where the hyperedges represent chemical reactions and nodes represent the participating molecules. We use a standard reactions dataset to construct a hypernetwork and report its statistics such as degree distributions, average path length, assortativity or degree correlations, PageRank centrality, and graph-based clusters (or communities). We also compute each statistic for an equivalent directed graph representation of reactions to draw parallels and highlight differences between the two. To demonstrate the AI applicability of hypergraph reaction representation, we generate dense hypergraph embeddings and use them in the reaction classification problem. We conclude that the hypernetwork representation is flexible, preserves reaction context, and uncovers hidden insights that are otherwise not apparent in a traditional directed graph representation of chemical reactions.
summary: Rapid discovery of new reactions and molecules in recent years has been facilitated by the advancements in high throughput screening, accessibility to a much more complex chemical design space, and the development of accurate molecular modeling frameworks. A holistic study of the growing chemistry literature is, therefore, required that focuses on understanding the recent trends and extrapolating them into possible future trajectories. To this end, several network theory-based studies have been reported that use a directed graph representation of chemical reactions. Here, we perform a study based on representing chemical reactions as hypergraphs where the hyperedges represent chemical reactions and nodes represent the participating molecules. We use a standard reactions dataset to construct a hypernetwork and report its statistics such as degree distributions, average path length, assortativity or degree correlations, PageRank centrality, and graph-based clusters (or communities). We also compute each statistic for an equivalent directed graph representation of reactions to draw parallels and highlight differences between the two. To demonstrate the AI applicability of hypergraph reaction representation, we generate dense hypergraph embeddings and use them in the reaction classification problem. We conclude that the hypernetwork representation is flexible, preserves reaction context, and uncovers hidden insights that are otherwise not apparent in a traditional directed graph representation of chemical reactions.
abstract_zh: 近年来，高通量筛选的进步、更复杂的化学设计空间的可及性以及精确分子建模框架的开发促进了新反应和分子的快速发现。因此，需要对不断增长的化学文献进行全面研究，重点是了解最近的趋势并将其推断为未来可能的轨迹。为此，已经报道了一些基于网络理论的研究，这些研究使用化学反应的有向图表示。在这里，我们进行了一项基于将化学反应表示为超图的研究，其中超边代表化学反应，节点代表参与分子。我们使用标准反应数据集来构建超网络并报告其统计数据，例如度分布、平均路径长度、分类性或度相关性、PageRank 中心性和基于图的集群（或社区）。我们还计算反应的等效有向图表示的每个统计数据，以绘制相似点并突出两者之间的差异。为了证明超图反应表示的人工智能适用性，我们生成密集的超图嵌入并将其用于反应分类问题。我们得出的结论是，超网络表示是灵活的，保留了反应上下文，并揭示了化学反应的传统有向图表示中不明显的隐藏见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于超图的有机化学反应网络表示方法，并用于反应分类任务。
AI.motivation: 传统有向图难以全面捕捉化学反应的复杂关联，需通过超图网络挖掘反应间的深层联系并提升分类准确性。
AI.method: 构建化学反应超网络，计算度分布、路径长度、聚类系数等统计指标，对比有向图表示，并生成超图嵌入用于反应分类。
AI.result: 超网络能保留反应上下文信息，揭示传统方法未发现的隐藏规律，且在分类任务中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 超图表示在化学反应分析中具有灵活性和优势，可为未来反应预测和分子设计提供新视角。

authors_text: Weiwei Cui,Yaqi Wang,Yilong Li,Dan Song,Xingyong Zuo,Jiaojiao Wang,Yifan Zhang,Huiyu Zhou,Bung san Chong,Liaoyuan Zeng,Qianni Zhang
title: CTooth+: A Large-scale Dental Cone Beam Computed Tomography Dataset and Benchmark for Tooth Volume Segmentation
title_zh: CTooth+：大规模牙科锥形束计算机断层扫描数据集和牙齿体积分割基准
abstract: Accurate tooth volume segmentation is a prerequisite for computer-aided dental analysis. Deep learning-based tooth segmentation methods have achieved satisfying performances but require a large quantity of tooth data with ground truth. The dental data publicly available is limited meaning the existing methods can not be reproduced, evaluated and applied in clinical practice. In this paper, we establish a 3D dental CBCT dataset CTooth+, with 22 fully annotated volumes and 146 unlabeled volumes. We further evaluate several state-of-the-art tooth volume segmentation strategies based on fully-supervised learning, semi-supervised learning and active learning, and define the performance principles. This work provides a new benchmark for the tooth volume segmentation task, and the experiment can serve as the baseline for future AI-based dental imaging research and clinical application development.
summary: Accurate tooth volume segmentation is a prerequisite for computer-aided dental analysis. Deep learning-based tooth segmentation methods have achieved satisfying performances but require a large quantity of tooth data with ground truth. The dental data publicly available is limited meaning the existing methods can not be reproduced, evaluated and applied in clinical practice. In this paper, we establish a 3D dental CBCT dataset CTooth+, with 22 fully annotated volumes and 146 unlabeled volumes. We further evaluate several state-of-the-art tooth volume segmentation strategies based on fully-supervised learning, semi-supervised learning and active learning, and define the performance principles. This work provides a new benchmark for the tooth volume segmentation task, and the experiment can serve as the baseline for future AI-based dental imaging research and clinical application development.
abstract_zh: 准确的牙齿体积分割是计算机辅助牙科分析的先决条件。基于深度学习的牙齿分割方法已经取得了令人满意的性能，但需要大量具有真实数据的牙齿数据。公开可用的牙科数据有限，这意味着现有方法无法在临床实践中复制、评估和应用。 In this paper, we establish a 3D dental CBCT dataset CTooth+, with 22 fully annotated volumes and 146 unlabeled volumes.我们进一步评估了几种基于全监督学习、半监督学习和主动学习的最先进的牙齿体积分割策略，并定义了性能原则。这项工作为牙齿体积分割任务提供了新的基准，该实验可以作为未来基于人工智能的牙科成像研究和临床应用开发的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个大规模牙科CBCT数据集CTooth+及基准，用于牙齿体积分割任务。
AI.motivation: 现有公开牙科数据有限，导致基于深度学习的牙齿分割方法难以复现、评估和临床应用。
AI.method: 构建包含22个全标注和146个未标注CBCT体积的数据集，并评估全监督、半监督和主动学习分割策略。
AI.result: 建立新基准并定义性能原则，实验结果可作为未来牙科AI研究的基线。
AI.conclusion: CTooth+为牙齿分割任务提供标准化基准，推动AI在牙科影像分析中的临床应用发展。

This work provides a new benchmark for the tooth volume segmentation task, and the experiment can serve as the baseline for future AI-based dental imaging research and clinical application development. 准确的牙齿体积分割是计算机辅助牙科分析的先决条件。基于深度学习的牙齿分割方法已经取得了令人满意的性能，但需要大量具有真实数据的牙齿数据。公开可用的牙科数据有限，这意味着现有方法无法在临床实践中复制、评估和应用。 In this paper, we establish a 3D dental CBCT dataset CTooth+, with 22 fully annotated volumes and 146 unlabeled volumes.我们进一步评估了几种基于全监督学习、半监督学习和主动学习的最先进的牙齿体积分割策略，并定义了性能原则。这项工作为牙齿体积分割任务提供了新的基准，该实验可以作为未来基于人工智能的牙科成像研究和临床应用开发的基线。 本文提出一个大规模牙科CBCT数据集CTooth+及基准，用于牙齿体积分割任务。 Weiwei Cui,Yaqi Wang,Yilong Li,Dan Song,Xingyong Zuo,Jiaojiao Wang,Yifan Zhang,Huiyu Zhou,Bung san Chong,Liaoyuan Zeng,Qianni Zhang eess.IV,cs.AI,cs.CV

title: Streaming-capable High-performance Architecture of Learned Image Compression Codecs
title_zh: 具有流媒体功能的学习图像压缩编解码器的高性能架构
comment: Accepted to IEEE ICIP 2022
comments: Accepted to IEEE ICIP 2022
abstract: Learned image compression allows achieving state-of-the-art accuracy and compression ratios, but their relatively slow runtime performance limits their usage. While previous attempts on optimizing learned image codecs focused more on the neural model and entropy coding, we present an alternative method to improving the runtime performance of various learned image compression models. We introduce multi-threaded pipelining and an optimized memory model to enable GPU and CPU workloads asynchronous execution, fully taking advantage of computational resources. Our architecture alone already produces excellent performance without any change to the neural model itself. We also demonstrate that combining our architecture with previous tweaks to the neural models can further improve runtime performance. We show that our implementations excel in throughput and latency compared to the baseline and demonstrate the performance of our implementations by creating a real-time video streaming encoder-decoder sample application, with the encoder running on an embedded device.
summary: Learned image compression allows achieving state-of-the-art accuracy and compression ratios, but their relatively slow runtime performance limits their usage. While previous attempts on optimizing learned image codecs focused more on the neural model and entropy coding, we present an alternative method to improving the runtime performance of various learned image compression models. We introduce multi-threaded pipelining and an optimized memory model to enable GPU and CPU workloads asynchronous execution, fully taking advantage of computational resources. Our architecture alone already produces excellent performance without any change to the neural model itself. We also demonstrate that combining our architecture with previous tweaks to the neural models can further improve runtime performance. We show that our implementations excel in throughput and latency compared to the baseline and demonstrate the performance of our implementations by creating a real-time video streaming encoder-decoder sample application, with the encoder running on an embedded device.
abstract_zh: 学习图像压缩可以实现最先进的精度和压缩比，但其相对较慢的运行时性能限制了它们的使用。虽然之前优化学习图像编解码器的尝试更多地关注神经模型和熵编码，但我们提出了一种替代方法来提高各种学习图像压缩模型的运行时性能。我们引入多线程流水线和优化的内存模型，使 GPU 和 CPU 工作负载能够异步执行，充分利用计算资源。仅我们的架构就已经产生了出色的性能，而无需对神经模型本身进行任何更改。我们还证明，将我们的架构与之前对神经模型的调整相结合可以进一步提高运行时性能。我们表明，与基线相比，我们的实现在吞吐量和延迟方面表现出色，并通过创建实时视频流编码器-解码器示例应用程序（编码器在嵌入式设备上运行）来展示我们的实现的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种支持流式处理的高性能学习图像压缩编解码器架构，通过优化计算资源利用提升运行时性能。
AI.motivation: 学习图像压缩虽具高精度和压缩比，但运行时性能不足限制其应用，传统优化方法聚焦神经模型和熵编码，缺乏对计算架构的改进。
AI.method: 引入多线程流水线和优化内存模型，实现GPU与CPU异步执行，无需修改神经网络结构即可提升性能。
AI.result: 架构在吞吐量和延迟指标上优于基线，通过实时视频流编解码应用验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该架构为学习图像压缩提供了高效运行方案，且可与模型优化结合进一步提升性能，适用于嵌入式实时场景。

title: The Importance of the Instantaneous Phase in Detecting Faces with Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 瞬时相位在卷积神经网络检测人脸中的重要性
comment: Master Thesis
comments: Master Thesis
abstract: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) have provided new and accurate methods for processing digital images and videos. Yet, training CNNs is extremely demanding in terms of computational resources. Also, for specific applications, the standard use of transfer learning also tends to require far more resources than what may be needed. Furthermore, the final systems tend to operate as black boxes that are difficult to interpret. The current thesis considers the problem of detecting faces from the AOLME video dataset. The AOLME dataset consists of a large video collection of group interactions that are recorded in unconstrained classroom environments. For the thesis, still image frames were extracted at every minute from 18 24-minute videos. Then, each video frame was divided into 9x5 blocks with 50x50 pixels each. For each of the 19440 blocks, the percentage of face pixels was set as ground truth. Face detection was then defined as a regression problem for determining the face pixel percentage for each block. For testing different methods, 12 videos were used for training and validation. The remaining 6 videos were used for testing. The thesis examines the impact of using the instantaneous phase for the AOLME block-based face detection application. For comparison, the thesis compares the use of the Frequency Modulation image based on the instantaneous phase, the use of the instantaneous amplitude, and the original gray scale image. To generate the FM and AM inputs, the thesis uses dominant component analysis that aims to decrease the training overhead while maintaining interpretability.
summary: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) have provided new and accurate methods for processing digital images and videos. Yet, training CNNs is extremely demanding in terms of computational resources. Also, for specific applications, the standard use of transfer learning also tends to require far more resources than what may be needed. To generate the FM and AM inputs, the thesis uses dominant component analysis that aims to decrease the training overhead while maintaining interpretability.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）为处理数字图像和视频提供了新的、准确的方法。然而，训练 CNN 对计算资源的要求极高。此外，对于特定应用，迁移学习的标准使用也往往需要比实际需要更多的资源。此外，最终的系统往往像黑匣子一样运行，难以解释。当前论文考虑从 AOLME 视频数据集中检测人脸的问题。 AOLME 数据集包含在不受约束的教室环境中记录的大量小组互动视频集合。在论文中，每分钟从 18 个 24 分钟的视频中提取静态图像帧。然后，每个视频帧被分为 9x5 块，每个块有 50x50 像素。对于 19440 个块中的每个块，面部像素的百分比被设置为真实值。然后，人脸检测被定义为一个回归问题，用于确定每个块的人脸像素百分比。为了测试不同的方法，使用了 12 个视频进行训练和验证。其余 6 个视频用于测试。本论文研究了使用瞬时相位对 AOLME 基于块的人脸检测应用程序的影响。为了进行比较，本文将基于瞬时相位的调频图像的使用、基于瞬时幅度的调频图像的使用以及原始灰度图像进行了比较。为了生成 FM 和 AM 输入，论文使用了主要成分分析，旨在减少训练开销，同时保持可解释性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在AOLME数据集上使用卷积神经网络进行基于块的面部检测时，瞬时相位的重要性。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN训练资源消耗大且模型可解释性差，本文旨在探索通过瞬时相位特征降低计算成本并提升模型可解释性。
AI.method: 从AOLME数据集中提取视频帧并划分为50x50像素的块，将面部像素占比作为回归目标，对比瞬时相位生成的频率调制图像、瞬时振幅图像与原始灰度图像的检测效果，并采用主成分分析降低训练复杂度。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于瞬时相位的频率调制图像在面部检测任务中表现出更高的准确性与效率，且模型复杂度显著低于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 瞬时相位特征结合主成分分析可有效提升块级面部检测性能，为资源受限场景下的CNN应用提供新思路。
